_**User (2026-02-12 15:14:39Z)**_

Implement the following plan:

# Tasks Page

## Context
Add a Tasks page under the Workspace sidebar section for managing team tasks with reordering, multiple tabs, and full CRUD. Styled consistently with the daily standup page and using table patterns from delivery logs.

---

## Step 1: Database Migration (`create_tasks_table`)

```sql
CREATE TABLE tasks (
  id uuid PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
  task_name text NOT NULL,
  assigned_to uuid REFERENCES auth.users(id) ON DELETE SET NULL,
  assigned_to_name text,
  due_date date,
  latest_comment text,
  frequency text NOT NULL CHECK (frequency IN ('one-time','daily','weekly','monthly','recurring')),
  task_type text NOT NULL CHECK (task_type IN ('Admin & Operations','Finance & Invoicing','General','Tech & Tools','Marketing & Sales','Client SOP','Client Delivery','Performance Review','Research & Analytics')),
  link text,
  created_by uuid REFERENCES auth.users(id),
  created_by_name text,
  sort_order integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  created_at timestamptz DEFAULT now(),
  updated_at timestamptz DEFAULT now()
);
-- RLS: authenticated full access
```

## Step 2: Create `app/tasks/layout.tsx`
Re-export clients layout (same pattern as daily-standup, delivery-logs).

## Step 3: Add Tasks to Sidebar
- Add `ListTodo` icon import to `components/Sidebar.tsx`
- Add Tasks link under Workspace section, after Daily Stand-Up

## Step 4: Create `app/tasks/page.tsx`

### Page Structure (matches daily-standup pattern)
- Header: ListTodo icon + "Tasks" title + "Add Task" button
- **3 Tabs**: One-Time | Recurring | Client SOP (with count badges)
  - One-Time: `frequency = 'one-time'` AND `task_type != 'Client SOP'`
  - Recurring: `frequency IN (daily, weekly, monthly, recurring)` AND `task_type != 'Client SOP'`
  - Client SOP: `task_type = 'Client SOP'` (any frequency)
- Search bar
- Table view

### Table Columns
| Reorder arrows | Task Name | Assigned To | Due Date | Comment | Frequency | Type | Link | Created By | Created | Actions |
Reorder uses ChevronUp/ChevronDown with sort_order swap (delivery-logs pattern). Due date color-coded red if overdue, amber if within 3 days.

### Add/Edit Dialog
Fields: Task Name (required), Assigned To (select from team), Due Date (calendar picker), Frequency (required select), Task Type (required select), Link (input), Latest Comment (textarea)

### Key Patterns to Reuse
- Page layout, tabs, search, dialog: `app/daily-standup/page.tsx`
- Table structure, reorder logic, badge styling: `app/delivery-logs/page.tsx`
- Team members: `UserService.getAllUsers()` filtered to non-client roles
- Date picker: `Calendar` + `Popover` from delivery-logs

## Files to Create/Modify
- **Create**: `app/tasks/layout.tsx`, `app/tasks/page.tsx`
- **Modify**: `components/Sidebar.tsx` (add Tasks link + ListTodo import)
- **Migration**: `create_tasks_table` via Supabase MCP

## Verification
1. Sidebar shows Tasks under Workspace section
2. All 3 tabs filter correctly, counts are accurate
3. Add/Edit/Delete tasks works
4. Reorder arrows persist order via sort_order
5. Due date highlighting works (overdue=red, soon=amber)
6. Build passes with no errors


If you need specific details from before exiting plan mode (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: /Users/andylee/.claude/projects/-Users-andylee-Downloads-KOL-Campaign-Manager/0c26cdb7-9b7a-4f46-8afe-520b97da7a8d.jsonl

    17→interface SidebarProps {
    18→  children: React.ReactNode;
    19→}
    20→
    21→export default function Sidebar({ children }: SidebarProps) {
    22→  const pathname = usePathname();
    23→  const router = useRouter();
    24→  const { userProfile, signOut } = useAuth();
    25→  const [isSidebarCollapsed, setIsSidebarCollapsed] = React.useState(() => {
    26→    if (typeof window !== 'undefined') {
    27→      const stored = localStorage.getItem('sidebarCollapsed');
    28→      return stored === 'true';
    29→    }
    30→    return false;
    31→  });
    32→  const [isChangelogOpen, setIsChangelogOpen] = useState(false);
    33→  const [changelogPage, setChangelogPage] = useState(0);
    34→  const changelogsPerPage = 3;
    35→
    36→  // Get changelog data from context (fetched once at app level)
    37→  const { changelogs, latestVersion } = useChangelog();
    38→
    39→  // Format date for changelog display
    40→  const formatChangelogDate = (dateString: string | null) => {
    41→    if (!dateString) return '';
    42→    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
    43→      year: 'numeric',
    44→      month: 'long',
    45→      day: 'numeric'
    46→    });
    47→  };
    48→
    49→  // Render changelog content
    50→  const renderChangelogContent = (content: string) => {
    51→    return content.split('\n').map((line, index) => {
    52→      if (line.trim().startsWith('- ') || line.trim().startsWith('* ')) {
    53→        return (
    54→          <li key={index} className="ml-4 text-gray-700 text-sm">
    55→            {line.trim().substring(2)}
    56→          </li>
    57→        );
    58→      }
    59→      if (line.trim().startsWith('### ')) {
    60→        return (
    61→          <h4 key={index} className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mt-3 mb-1 text-sm">
    62→            {line.trim().substring(4)}
    63→          </h4>
    64→        );
    65→      }
    66→      if (line.trim().startsWith('## ')) {
    67→        return (
    68→          <h3 key={index} className="font-bold text-gray-900 mt-4 mb-2 text-sm">
    69→            {line.trim().substring(3)}
    70→          </h3>
    71→        );
    72→      }
    73→      if (line.trim() === '') {
    74→        return <div key={index} className="h-2" />;
    75→      }
    76→      return (
    77→        <p key={index} className="text-gray-700 text-sm">
    78→          {line}
    79→        </p>
    80→      );
    81→    });
    82→  };
    83→
    84→  const handleSidebarToggle = () => {

    96→        .map(word => word.charAt(0).toUpperCase())
    97→        .join('')

   417→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/links') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}

   490→                      style={pathname.startsWith('/admin/changelog') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   491→                      title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Changelog' : undefined}

   495→                        {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Changelog'}

   504→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/archive') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}

   506→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/archive') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   507→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Archive' : undefined}
   508→                  >

   511→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Archive'}
   512→                    </span>
   513→                  </Button>
   514→                </Link>
   515→              </div>
   516→
   517→            </nav>
   518→            {/* Collapse Button at Bottom */}
   519→            <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-200">
   520→              <div className="flex justify-center">
   521→                <Button
   522→                  variant="ghost"
   523→                  size="sm"
   524→                  onClick={handleSidebarToggle}
   525→                  className="hover:bg-gray-100 w-auto px-2"
   526→                  title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Expand sidebar' : 'Collapse sidebar'}
   527→                >
   528→                  {isSidebarCollapsed ? (
   529→                    <PanelLeftOpen className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
   530→                  ) : (
   531→                    <PanelLeftClose className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
   532→                  )}
   533→                </Button>
   534→              </div>
   535→            </div>
   536→          </div>
   537→        </aside>
   538→        {/* Main Content */}
   539→        <main className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6">{children}</main>
   540→      </div>
   541→
   542→      {/* Changelog History Dialog */}
   543→      <Dialog open={isChangelogOpen} onOpenChange={(open) => {
   544→        setIsChangelogOpen(open);
   545→        if (open) setChangelogPage(0);
   546→      }}>
   547→        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-lg max-h-[80vh]">
   548→          <DialogHeader>
   549→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   550→              <Sparkles className="h-5 w-5 text-[#3e8692]" />
   551→              <DialogTitle className="text-xl">Changelog</DialogTitle>
   552→            </div>
   553→            <DialogDescription>
   554→              Version history and updates
   555→            </DialogDescription>
   556→          </DialogHeader>
   557→          <ScrollArea className="max-h-[50vh] pr-4">
   558→            <div className="space-y-6">
   559→              {changelogs
   560→                .slice(changelogPage * changelogsPerPage, (changelogPage + 1) * changelogsPerPage)
   561→                .map((changelog, idx) => (
   562→                <div key={changelog.id} className={idx > 0 ? 'border-t pt-6' : ''}>
   563→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
   564→                    <Badge
   565→                      variant="secondary"
   566→                      className="bg-[#3e8692]/10 text-[#3e8692]"
   567→                    >
   568→                      v{changelog.version}
   569→                    </Badge>
   570→                    {changelog.published_at && (
   571→                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
   572→                        {formatChangelogDate(changelog.published_at)}
   573→                      </span>
   574→                    )}
   575→                  </div>
   576→                  <h3 className="font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">
   577→                    {changelog.title}
   578→                  </h3>
   579→                  <div className="space-y-1">
   580→                    {renderChangelogContent(changelog.content)}
   581→                  </div>
   582→                </div>
   583→              ))}
   584→              {changelogs.length === 0 && (
   585→                <p className="text-gray-500 text-center py-4">
   586→                  No changelogs available yet.
   587→                </p>
   588→              )}
   589→            </div>
   590→          </ScrollArea>
   591→          {changelogs.length > changelogsPerPage && (
   592→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-4 border-t">
   593→              <Button
   594→                variant="outline"
   595→                size="sm"
   596→                onClick={() => setChangelogPage(p => Math.max(0, p - 1))}
   597→                disabled={changelogPage === 0}
   598→              >
   599→                <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
   600→                Previous
   601→              </Button>
   602→              <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
   603→                Page {changelogPage + 1} of {Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage)}
   604→              </span>
   605→              <Button
   606→                variant="outline"
   607→                size="sm"
   608→                onClick={() => setChangelogPage(p => Math.min(Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage) - 1, p + 1))}
   609→                disabled={changelogPage >= Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage) - 1}
   610→              >
   611→                Next
   612→                <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4 ml-1" />
   613→              </Button>
   614→            </div>
   615→          )}
   616→        </DialogContent>
   617→      </Dialog>
   618→    </div>
   619→  );
   620→}
```

     1→'use client';

    25→  X,
    26→  Check,
    27→  XCircle,
    28→  ExternalLink,
    29→} from 'lucide-react';
    30→
    31→type DailyStandup = {
    32→  id: string;
    33→  user_id: string;
    34→  user_name: string;
    35→  completed_yesterday: 'Yes' | 'No';
    36→  priorities: string;
    37→  output_goal: string;
    38→  blockers: string | null;
    39→  submitted_at: string;
    40→  submission_date: string;
    41→  created_at: string;
    42→};
    43→
    44→type TeamMember = {
    45→  id: string;
    46→  name: string;
    47→  email: string;
    48→  role: string;
    49→  profile_photo_url: string | null;
    50→};
    51→
    52→export default function DailyStandupPage() {
    53→  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();
    54→  const { toast } = useToast();
    55→
    56→  const [standups, setStandups] = useState<DailyStandup[]>([]);
    57→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    58→  const [teamMembers, setTeamMembers] = useState<TeamMember[]>([]);
    59→  const [selectedUserId, setSelectedUserId] = useState<string>('all');
    60→  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
    61→
    62→  // Form state
    63→  const [isFormOpen, setIsFormOpen] = useState(false);
    64→  const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
    65→  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
    66→  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
    67→  const [form, setForm] = useState({
    68→    completed_yesterday: '' as string,
    69→    priorities: '',
    70→    output_goal: '',
    71→    blockers: '',
    72→  });
    73→
    74→  useEffect(() => {
    75→    fetchStandups();
    76→    UserService.getAllUsers().then((users) => {
    77→      setTeamMembers(
    78→        users
    79→          .filter(u => u.role !== 'client')
    80→          .map(u => ({ id: u.id, name: u.name || u.email, email: u.email, role: u.role, profile_photo_url: u.profile_photo_url || null }))
    81→      );
    82→    });
    83→  }, []);
    84→
    85→  const fetchStandups = async () => {
    86→    setLoading(true);
    87→    const { data } = await supabase
    88→      .from('daily_standups')
    89→      .select('*')
    90→      .order('submission_date', { ascending: false })
    91→      .order('submitted_at', { ascending: false });
    92→    setStandups(data || []);
    93→    setLoading(false);
    94→  };
    95→
    96→  // Check if user already submitted today
    97→  const todayStr = new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];
    98→  const hasSubmittedToday = useMemo(() => {
    99→    return standups.some(s => s.user_id === user?.id && s.submission_date === todayStr);
   100→  }, [standups, user?.id, todayStr]);
   101→
   102→  // Filter standups
   103→  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
   104→    return standups.filter(s => {
   105→      const matchesUser = selectedUserId === 'all' || s.user_id === selectedUserId;
   106→      const matchesSearch = !searchTerm ||
   107→        s.priorities.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
   108→        s.output_goal.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
   109→        (s.blockers && s.blockers.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())) ||
   110→        s.user_name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase());
   111→      return matchesUser && matchesSearch;
   112→    });
   113→  }, [standups, selectedUserId, searchTerm]);
   114→
   115→  // Group by date
   116→  const groupedByDate = useMemo(() => {
   117→    const groups: Record<string, DailyStandup[]> = {};
   118→    for (const s of filtered) {
   119→      if (!groups[s.submission_date]) groups[s.submission_date] = [];
   120→      groups[s.submission_date].push(s);
   121→    }
   122→    return Object.entries(groups).sort(([a], [b]) => b.localeCompare(a));
   123→  }, [filtered]);
   124→
   125→  // Get team members who have submitted at least one standup
   126→  const activeMembers = useMemo(() => {
   127→    const userIds = new Set(standups.map(s => s.user_id));
   128→    return teamMembers.filter(m => userIds.has(m.id));
   129→  }, [standups, teamMembers]);
   130→
   131→  // Map user_id to profile photo
   132→  const userPhotoMap = useMemo(() => {
   133→    const map: Record<string, string | null> = {};
   134→    teamMembers.forEach(m => { map[m.id] = m.profile_photo_url; });
   135→    return map;
   136→  }, [teamMembers]);
   137→
   138→  const openForm = (standup?: DailyStandup) => {
   139→    if (standup) {
   140→      setEditingId(standup.id);
   141→      setForm({
   142→        completed_yesterday: standup.completed_yesterday,
   143→        priorities: standup.priorities,
   144→        output_goal: standup.output_goal,
   145→        blockers: standup.blockers || '',
   146→      });
   147→    } else {
   148→      setEditingId(null);
   149→      setForm({
   150→        completed_yesterday: '',
   151→        priorities: '',
   152→        output_goal: '',
   153→        blockers: '',
   154→      });
   155→    }
   156→    setIsFormOpen(true);
   157→  };
   158→
   159→  const handleSubmit = async () => {
   160→    if (!form.completed_yesterday || !form.priorities.trim() || !form.output_goal.trim()) return;
   161→    if (!user?.id || !userProfile) return;
   162→
   163→    setSubmitting(true);
   164→    try {
   165→      const payload = {
   166→        completed_yesterday: form.completed_yesterday,
   167→        priorities: form.priorities.trim(),
   168→        output_goal: form.output_goal.trim(),
   169→        blockers: form.blockers.trim() || null,
   170→      };
   171→
   172→      if (editingId) {
   173→        const { error } = await supabase
   174→          .from('daily_standups')
   175→          .update(payload)
   176→          .eq('id', editingId);
   177→        if (error) throw error;
   178→        toast({ title: 'Updated', description: 'Stand-up entry updated.' });
   179→      } else {
   180→        const { error } = await supabase
   181→          .from('daily_standups')
   182→          .insert({
   183→            ...payload,
   184→            user_id: user.id,
   185→            user_name: userProfile.name || userProfile.email || 'Unknown',
   186→            submission_date: todayStr,
   187→          });
   188→        if (error) throw error;
   189→        toast({ title: 'Submitted', description: 'Daily stand-up submitted.' });
   190→      }
   191→
   192→      setIsFormOpen(false);
   193→      setEditingId(null);
   194→      setForm({ completed_yesterday: '', priorities: '', output_goal: '', blockers: '' });
   195→      await fetchStandups();
   196→    } catch (err) {
   197→      console.error('Error submitting standup:', err);
   198→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to submit stand-up.', variant: 'destructive' });
   199→    } finally {
   200→      setSubmitting(false);
   201→    }
   202→  };
   203→
   204→  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
   205→    setDeletingId(null);
   206→    setStandups(prev => prev.filter(s => s.id !== id));
   207→    try {
   208→      await supabase.from('daily_standups').delete().eq('id', id);
   209→    } catch (error) {
   210→      console.error('Error deleting:', error);
   211→      await fetchStandups();
   212→    }
   213→  };
   214→
   215→  const formatDate = (dateStr: string) => {
   216→    const date = new Date(dateStr + 'T00:00:00');
   217→    const today = new Date();
   218→    const yesterday = new Date();
   219→    yesterday.setDate(yesterday.getDate() - 1);
   220→
   221→    if (dateStr === today.toISOString().split('T')[0]) return 'Today';
   222→    if (dateStr === yesterday.toISOString().split('T')[0]) return 'Yesterday';
   223→
   224→    return date.toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'short', month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' });
   225→  };
   226→
   227→  const formatTime = (dateStr: string) => {
   228→    return new Date(dateStr).toLocaleTimeString('en-US', { hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit' });
   229→  };
   230→
   231→  return (
   232→    <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] w-full bg-gray-50">
   233→      <div className="w-full">
   234→        <div className="space-y-4">
   235→          {/* Header */}
   236→          <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6">
   237→            <div className="pb-5 border-b border-gray-100 flex flex-row items-center justify-between">
   238→              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   239→                <div className="bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-lg">
   240→                  <CheckCircle className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-600" />
   241→                </div>
   242→                <div>
   243→                  <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Daily Stand-Up</h2>
   244→                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Track daily priorities and progress across the team</p>
   245→                </div>
   246→              </div>
   247→              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   248→              <Button
   249→                variant="outline"
   250→                onClick={() => window.open('/public/standup/submit', '_blank')}
   251→                className="hover:opacity-90"
   252→              >
   253→                <ExternalLink className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
   254→                Submission Form
   255→              </Button>
   256→              <Button
   257→                className="hover:opacity-90"
   258→                style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   259→                onClick={() => openForm()}
   260→                disabled={hasSubmittedToday && !editingId}
   261→              >
   262→                <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
   263→                {hasSubmittedToday ? 'Already Submitted Today' : 'Submit Stand-Up'}
   264→              </Button>
   265→              </div>
   266→            </div>
   267→
   268→            {/* User Tabs */}
   269→            <div className="pt-4">
   270→              {loading ? (
   271→                <div className="flex gap-2">
   272→                  {[1, 2, 3, 4].map((i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-9 w-24 rounded" />)}
   273→                </div>
   274→              ) : (
   275→                <Tabs value={selectedUserId} onValueChange={setSelectedUserId}>
   276→                  <TabsList className="bg-gray-100 p-1 h-auto flex-wrap">
   277→                    <TabsTrigger
   278→                      value="all"
   279→                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
   280→                    >
   281→                      All
   282→                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{standups.length}</span>
   283→                    </TabsTrigger>
   284→                    {activeMembers.map((member) => (
   285→                      <TabsTrigger
   286→                        key={member.id}
   287→                        value={member.id}
   288→                        className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
   289→                      >
   290→                        {member.name}
   291→                      </TabsTrigger>
   292→                    ))}
   293→                  </TabsList>
   294→                </Tabs>
   295→              )}
   296→            </div>
   297→
   298→            {/* Search */}
   299→            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 pt-4">
   300→              <div className="relative flex-1 max-w-sm">
   301→                <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   302→                <Input
   303→                  placeholder="Search priorities, goals, blockers..."
   304→                  className="pl-10 auth-input"
   305→                  value={searchTerm}
   306→                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
   307→                />
   308→              </div>
   309→              {searchTerm && (
   310→                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setSearchTerm('')}>
   311→                  Clear
   312→                </Button>
   313→              )}
   314→            </div>
   315→
   316→            {/* Content */}
   317→            <div className="mt-5 -mx-6 -mb-6">
   318→              {loading ? (
   319→                <div className="p-6 space-y-4">
   320→                  {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => (
   321→                    <div key={i} className="space-y-2">
   322→                      <Skeleton className="h-6 w-32" />
   323→                      <Skeleton className="h-32 w-full rounded-lg" />
   324→                    </div>
   325→                  ))}
   326→                </div>
   327→              ) : filtered.length === 0 ? (
   328→                <div className="text-center py-16">
   329→                  <ClipboardList className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-3" />
   330→                  <p className="text-gray-500 font-medium">
   331→                    {standups.length === 0 ? 'No stand-up submissions yet.' : 'No entries match your filters.'}
   332→                  </p>
   333→                  {standups.length === 0 && !hasSubmittedToday && (
   334→                    <Button
   335→                      className="mt-4 hover:opacity-90"
   336→                      style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   337→                      onClick={() => openForm()}
   338→                    >
   339→                      <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Submit Your First Stand-Up
   340→                    </Button>
   341→                  )}
   342→                </div>
   343→              ) : (
   344→                <div className="divide-y divide-gray-200">
   345→                  {groupedByDate.map(([date, entries]) => (
   346→                    <div key={date} className="px-6 py-5">
   347→                      {/* Date header */}
   348→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-4">
   349→                        <CalendarIcon className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   350→                        <h3 className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-700">{formatDate(date)}</h3>
   351→                        <span className="text-xs text-gray-400">{date}</span>
   352→                        <span className="text-xs bg-gray-100 text-gray-500 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full">{entries.length} {entries.length === 1 ? 'submission' : 'submissions'}</span>
   353→                      </div>
   354→
   355→                      {/* Entries grid */}
   356→                      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-4">
   357→                        {entries.map((entry) => (
   358→                          <div key={entry.id} className="border border-gray-200 rounded-xl bg-white hover:shadow-md transition-all group overflow-hidden">
   359→                            {/* Card header with colored top border */}
   360→                            <div className="border-b border-gray-100 bg-gray-50/50 px-5 py-3">
   361→                              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   362→                                <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   363→                                  {userPhotoMap[entry.user_id] ? (
   364→                                    <Image
   365→                                      src={userPhotoMap[entry.user_id]!}
   366→                                      alt={entry.user_name}
   367→                                      width={36}
   368→                                      height={36}
   369→                                      className="rounded-full object-cover h-9 w-9"
   370→                                    />
   371→                                  ) : (
   372→                                    <div className="h-9 w-9 rounded-full bg-[#3e8692]/10 flex items-center justify-center text-[#3e8692] text-sm font-bold">
   373→                                      {entry.user_name.split(' ').map(w => w[0]).join('').slice(0, 2).toUpperCase()}
   374→                                    </div>
   375→                                  )}
   376→                                  <div>
   377→                                    <p className="text-sm font-semibold text-gray-900">{entry.user_name}</p>
   378→                                    <p className="text-xs text-gray-400">{formatTime(entry.submitted_at)}</p>
   379→                                  </div>
   380→                                </div>
   381→                                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   382→                                  {entry.completed_yesterday === 'Yes' ? (
   383→                                    <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-medium text-green-700 bg-green-100 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full">
   384→                                      <Check className="h-3 w-3" /> Done
   385→                                    </span>
   386→                                  ) : (
   387→                                    <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs font-medium text-red-700 bg-red-100 px-2.5 py-1 rounded-full">
   388→                                      <X className="h-3 w-3" /> Not Done
   389→                                    </span>
   390→                                  )}
   391→                                  {entry.user_id === user?.id && (
   392→                                    <div className="flex items-center gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
   393→                                      <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0 hover:bg-gray-200" onClick={() => openForm(entry)}>
   394→                                        <Edit className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
   395→                                      </Button>
   396→                                      <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0 hover:bg-red-50" onClick={() => setDeletingId(entry.id)}>
   397→                                        <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-500" />
   398→                                      </Button>
   399→                                    </div>
   400→                                  )}
   401→                                </div>
   402→                              </div>
   403→                            </div>
   404→
   405→                            {/* Card body */}
   406→                            <div className="px-5 py-4 space-y-4">
   407→                              {/* Priorities */}
   408→                              <div>
   409→                                <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-[#3e8692] uppercase tracking-wider mb-1.5">Top Priorities</p>
   410→                                <p className="text-sm text-gray-800 whitespace-pre-wrap leading-relaxed">{entry.priorities}</p>
   411→                              </div>
   412→
   413→                              {/* Output Goal */}
   414→                              <div>
   415→                                <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-blue-600 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1.5">Output Goal</p>
   416→                                <p className="text-sm text-gray-800 whitespace-pre-wrap leading-relaxed">{entry.output_goal}</p>
   417→                              </div>
   418→
   419→                              {/* Blockers */}
   420→                              {entry.blockers && (
   421→                                <div className="bg-amber-50 border border-amber-200 rounded-lg px-3.5 py-2.5">
   422→                                  <p className="text-xs font-semibold text-amber-700 uppercase tracking-wider mb-1">Blockers</p>
   423→                                  <p className="text-sm text-amber-900 whitespace-pre-wrap leading-relaxed">{entry.blockers}</p>
   424→                                </div>
   425→                              )}
   426→                            </div>
   427→                          </div>
   428→                        ))}
   429→                      </div>
   430→                    </div>
   431→                  ))}
   432→                </div>
   433→              )}
   434→            </div>
   435→          </div>
   436→        </div>
   437→      </div>
   438→
   439→      {/* Submit / Edit Dialog */}
   440→      <Dialog open={isFormOpen} onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) { setIsFormOpen(false); setEditingId(null); } }}>
   441→        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-[550px]">
   442→          <DialogHeader>
   443→            <DialogTitle>{editingId ? 'Edit Stand-Up' : 'Daily Stand-Up'}</DialogTitle>
   444→            <DialogDescription>
   445→              {userProfile?.name || userProfile?.email} &mdash; {new Date().toLocaleDateString('en-US', { weekday: 'long', month: 'long', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' })}
   446→            </DialogDescription>
   447→          </DialogHeader>
   448→          <div className="space-y-5 max-h-[60vh] overflow-y-auto px-1 pb-2">
   449→            {/* Completed yesterday */}
   450→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   451→              <Label>Did you complete yesterday's priorities? <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   452→              <Select value={form.completed_yesterday} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, completed_yesterday: v })}>
   453→                <SelectTrigger className="auth-input">
   454→                  <SelectValue placeholder="Select..." />
   455→                </SelectTrigger>
   456→                <SelectContent>
   457→                  <SelectItem value="Yes">Yes</SelectItem>
   458→                  <SelectItem value="No">No</SelectItem>
   459→                </SelectContent>
   460→              </Select>
   461→            </div>
   462→
   463→            {/* Top Priorities */}
   464→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   465→              <Label>Top 1-2 Priorities <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   466→              <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 -mt-1">What will you finish or move forward significantly today? (e.g., "Send outbound pitch deck to 10 partners" instead of "Work on deck")</p>
   467→              <Textarea
   468→                value={form.priorities}
   469→                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, priorities: e.target.value })}
   470→                placeholder="e.g., Send outbound pitch deck to 10 partners"
   471→                className="auth-input"
   472→                rows={3}
   473→              />
   474→            </div>
   475→
   476→            {/* Output Goal */}
   477→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   478→              <Label>Output Goal <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   479→              <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 -mt-1">Quantify what success looks like today (e.g., "Book 2 calls")</p>
   480→              <Textarea
   481→                value={form.output_goal}
   482→                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, output_goal: e.target.value })}
   483→                placeholder='e.g., Book 2 calls'
   484→                className="auth-input"
   485→                rows={2}
   486→              />
   487→            </div>
   488→
   489→            {/* Blockers */}
   490→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   491→              <Label>Any blockers, comments, etc.</Label>
   492→              <p className="text-xs text-gray-400 -mt-1">Is anything slowing you down?</p>
   493→              <Textarea
   494→                value={form.blockers}
   495→                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, blockers: e.target.value })}
   496→                placeholder="Optional — leave blank if none"
   497→                className="auth-input"
   498→                rows={2}
   499→              />
   500→            </div>
   501→          </div>
   502→          <DialogFooter>
   503→            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => { setIsFormOpen(false); setEditingId(null); }}>Cancel</Button>
   504→            <Button
   505→              className="hover:opacity-90"
   506→              style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   507→              onClick={handleSubmit}
   508→              disabled={!form.completed_yesterday || !form.priorities.trim() || !form.output_goal.trim() || submitting}
   509→            >
   510→              {submitting ? (
   511→                <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-4 w-4 border-b-2 border-white" />
   512→              ) : editingId ? 'Save Changes' : 'Submit'}
   513→            </Button>
   514→          </DialogFooter>
   515→        </DialogContent>
   516→      </Dialog>
   517→
   518→      {/* Delete Confirmation */}
   519→      <Dialog open={!!deletingId} onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) setDeletingId(null); }}>
   520→        <DialogContent className="max-w-md">
   521→          <DialogHeader>
   522→            <DialogTitle>Delete Stand-Up Entry</DialogTitle>
   523→            <DialogDescription>Are you sure you want to delete this stand-up entry? This action cannot be undone.</DialogDescription>
   524→          </DialogHeader>
   525→          <DialogFooter>
   526→            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setDeletingId(null)}>Cancel</Button>
   527→            <Button variant="destructive" onClick={() => deletingId && handleDelete(deletingId)}>Delete</Button>
   528→          </DialogFooter>
   529→        </DialogContent>
   530→      </Dialog>
   531→    </div>
   532→  );
   533→}
   534→
```
</details></tool-use>

    33→type DeliveryLogEntry = {

    35→  client_id: string;
    36→  work_type: string;
    37→  action: string;
    38→  who: string | null;
    39→  method: string | null;

    49→
    50→type Client = {
    51→  id: string;
    52→  name: string;
    53→  logo_url: string | null;
    54→  is_active: boolean;
    55→};
    56→
    57→const WORK_TYPES = ['Client-Facing', 'Internal'] as const;
    58→const TRIGGERS = ['Client Request', 'Follow-Up Needed', 'SOP', 'Extra'] as const;
    59→
    60→const workTypeBadge = (type: string) => {
    61→  return type === 'Client-Facing'
    62→    ? 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800'
    63→    : 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
    64→};
    65→
    66→const triggerBadge = (trigger: string) => {
    67→  switch (trigger) {
    68→    case 'Client Request': return 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800';
    69→    case 'Follow-Up Needed': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800';
    70→    case 'SOP': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800';
    71→    case 'Extra': return 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800';
    72→    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
    73→  }
    74→};
    75→
    76→type EditingCell = { entryId: string; field: string } | null;
    77→
    78→export default function DeliveryLogsPage() {
    79→  const { user } = useAuth();
    80→
    81→  const [clients, setClients] = useState<Client[]>([]);
    82→  const [selectedClientId, setSelectedClientId] = useState<string>('');
    83→  const [entries, setEntries] = useState<DeliveryLogEntry[]>([]);
    84→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    85→  const [clientsLoading, setClientsLoading] = useState(true);
    86→  const [teamMembers, setTeamMembers] = useState<{ id: string; name: string }[]>([]);
    87→  const [whoMode, setWhoMode] = useState<'team' | 'custom'>('team');
    88→  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');

    90→  const [filterTrigger, setFilterTrigger] = useState<string>('all');

    92→
    93→  // Inline editing state
