```text
    95→  const [editingValue, setEditingValue] = useState<string>('');
    96→  const [inlineWhoMode, setInlineWhoMode] = useState<'team' | 'custom'>('team');
    97→
    98→  // Inline add row state
    99→  const [isAddingInline, setIsAddingInline] = useState(false);
   100→  const [inlineNew, setInlineNew] = useState({
   101→    work_type: '',
   102→    action: '',
   103→    who: '',
   104→    method: '',
   105→    location: '',
   106→    trigger: '',
   107→    notes: '',
   108→    logged_at: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0],
   109→  });
   110→  const [inlineNewWhoMode, setInlineNewWhoMode] = useState<'team' | 'custom'>('team');
   111→
   112→  // Popup form state
   113→  const [isFormOpen, setIsFormOpen] = useState(false);
   114→  const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
   115→  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
   116→  const [form, setForm] = useState({
   117→    work_type: '' as string,
   118→    action: '',
   119→    who: '',
   120→    method: '',
   121→    location: '',
   122→    trigger: '' as string,
   123→    notes: '',
   124→    logged_at: undefined as Date | undefined,
   125→  });
   126→
   127→  // Compute day numbers
   128→  const dayZeroDate = useMemo(() => {
   129→    if (entries.length === 0) return null;
   130→    const dates = entries.map(e => new Date(e.logged_at + 'T00:00:00').getTime());
   131→    return Math.min(...dates);
   132→  }, [entries]);
   133→
   134→  const getDayNumber = (loggedAt: string) => {
   135→    if (!dayZeroDate) return 0;
   136→    const d = new Date(loggedAt + 'T00:00:00').getTime();
   137→    return Math.round((d - dayZeroDate) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   138→  };
   139→
   140→  // Fetch clients on mount
   141→  useEffect(() => {
   142→    const fetchClients = async () => {
   143→      setClientsLoading(true);
   144→      const { data } = await supabase
   145→        .from('clients')
   146→        .select('id, name, logo_url, is_active')
   147→        .eq('is_active', true)
   148→        .is('archived_at', null)
   149→        .order('name');
   150→      setClients(data || []);
   151→      if (data && data.length > 0 && !selectedClientId) {
   152→        setSelectedClientId(data[0].id);
   153→      }
   154→      setClientsLoading(false);
   155→    };
   156→    fetchClients();
   157→    UserService.getAllUsers().then((users) => {
   158→      setTeamMembers(users.filter(u => u.role !== 'client').map(u => ({ id: u.id, name: u.name || u.email })));
   159→    });
   160→  }, []);
   161→
   162→  // Fetch entries when client changes
   163→  useEffect(() => {
   164→    if (selectedClientId) {
   165→      fetchEntries(true);
   166→      // Reset filters when switching clients
   167→      setSearchTerm('');
   168→      setFilterWorkType('all');
   169→      setFilterTrigger('all');
   170→      setIsAddingInline(false);
   171→      setEditingCell(null);
   172→    }
   173→  }, [selectedClientId]);
   174→
   175→  const fetchEntries = async (showLoading = false) => {
   176→    if (!selectedClientId) return;
   177→    if (showLoading) setLoading(true);
   178→    const { data } = await supabase
   179→      .from('client_delivery_log')
   180→      .select('*')
   181→      .eq('client_id', selectedClientId)
   182→      .order('logged_at', { ascending: false })
   183→      .order('sort_order', { ascending: true });
   184→    setEntries(data || []);
   185→    setLoading(false);
   186→  };
   187→
   188→  const selectedClient = clients.find(c => c.id === selectedClientId);
   189→
   190→  // --- Inline cell editing ---
   191→  const startEditing = (entryId: string, field: string, currentValue: string) => {
   192→    setEditingCell({ entryId, field });
   193→    setEditingValue(currentValue);
   194→    if (field === 'who') {
   195→      const isTeam = teamMembers.some(m => m.name === currentValue);
   196→      setInlineWhoMode(isTeam ? 'team' : (currentValue ? 'custom' : 'team'));
   197→    }
   198→  };
   199→
   200→  const cancelEditing = () => {
   201→    setEditingCell(null);
   202→    setEditingValue('');
   203→  };
   204→
   205→  const saveInlineEdit = async () => {
   206→    if (!editingCell) return;
   207→    const { entryId, field } = editingCell;
   208→    const value = editingValue.trim() || null;
   209→    setEditingCell(null);
   210→    setEditingValue('');
   211→    setEntries(prev => prev.map(e => e.id === entryId ? { ...e, [field]: value, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() } : e));
   212→    try {
   213→      await supabase.from('client_delivery_log').update({
   214→        [field]: value,
   215→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   216→      }).eq('id', entryId);
   217→    } catch (error) {
   218→      console.error('Error saving:', error);
   219→      await fetchEntries();
   220→    }
   221→  };
   222→
   223→  const saveSelectField = async (entryId: string, field: string, value: string) => {
   224→    setEntries(prev => prev.map(e => e.id === entryId ? { ...e, [field]: value || null, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() } : e));
   225→    try {
   226→      await supabase.from('client_delivery_log').update({
   227→        [field]: value || null,
   228→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   229→      }).eq('id', entryId);
   230→    } catch (error) {
   231→      console.error('Error saving:', error);
   232→      await fetchEntries();
   233→    }
   234→  };
   235→
   236→  const saveDateField = async (entryId: string, date: Date | undefined) => {
   237→    if (!date) return;
   238→    const dateStr = date.toISOString().split('T')[0];
   239→    setEditingCell(null);
   240→    setEditingValue('');
   241→    setEntries(prev => prev.map(e => e.id === entryId ? { ...e, logged_at: dateStr, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() } : e));
   242→    try {
   243→      await supabase.from('client_delivery_log').update({
   244→        logged_at: dateStr,
   245→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   246→      }).eq('id', entryId);
   247→    } catch (error) {
   248→      console.error('Error saving:', error);
   249→      await fetchEntries();
   250→    }
   251→  };
   252→
   253→  // --- Inline add row ---
   254→  const handleInlineAdd = async () => {
   255→    if (!inlineNew.work_type || !inlineNew.action.trim() || !inlineNew.logged_at) return;
   256→    await supabase.from('client_delivery_log').insert({
   257→      client_id: selectedClientId,
   258→      work_type: inlineNew.work_type,
   259→      action: inlineNew.action.trim(),
   260→      who: inlineNew.who.trim() || null,
   261→      method: inlineNew.method.trim() || null,
   262→      location: inlineNew.location.trim() || null,
   263→      trigger: inlineNew.trigger || null,
   264→      notes: inlineNew.notes.trim() || null,
   265→      logged_at: inlineNew.logged_at,
   266→      created_by: user?.id,
   267→    });
   268→    setIsAddingInline(false);
   269→    setInlineNew({ work_type: '', action: '', who: '', method: '', location: '', trigger: '', notes: '', logged_at: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] });
   270→    setInlineNewWhoMode('team');
   271→    await fetchEntries();
   272→  };
   273→
   274→  // --- Popup form ---
   275→  const openForm = (entry?: DeliveryLogEntry) => {
   276→    if (entry) {
   277→      setEditingId(entry.id);
   278→      const isTeamMember = teamMembers.some(m => m.name === entry.who);
   279→      setWhoMode(isTeamMember ? 'team' : (entry.who ? 'custom' : 'team'));
   280→      setForm({
   281→        work_type: entry.work_type,
   282→        action: entry.action,
   283→        who: entry.who || '',
   284→        method: entry.method || '',
   285→        location: entry.location || '',
   286→        trigger: entry.trigger || '',
   287→        notes: entry.notes || '',
   288→        logged_at: new Date(entry.logged_at + 'T00:00:00'),
   289→      });
   290→    } else {
   291→      setEditingId(null);
   292→      setWhoMode('team');
   293→      setForm({
   294→        work_type: '',
   295→        action: '',
   296→        who: '',
   297→        method: '',
   298→        location: '',
   299→        trigger: '',
   300→        notes: '',
   301→        logged_at: new Date(),
   302→      });
   303→    }
   304→    setIsFormOpen(true);
   305→  };
   306→
   307→  const handleSubmit = async () => {
   308→    if (!form.work_type || !form.action.trim() || !form.logged_at) return;
   309→    const payload = {
   310→      client_id: selectedClientId,
   311→      work_type: form.work_type,
   312→      action: form.action.trim(),
   313→      who: form.who.trim() || null,
   314→      method: form.method.trim() || null,
   315→      location: form.location.trim() || null,
   316→      trigger: form.trigger || null,
   317→      notes: form.notes.trim() || null,
   318→      logged_at: form.logged_at.toISOString().split('T')[0],
   319→      updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   320→    };
   321→    setIsFormOpen(false);
   322→    if (editingId) {
   323→      setEntries(prev => prev.map(e => e.id === editingId ? { ...e, ...payload } : e));
   324→      setEditingId(null);
   325→      try {
   326→        await supabase.from('client_delivery_log').update(payload).eq('id', editingId);
   327→      } catch (error) {
   328→        console.error('Error saving:', error);
   329→        await fetchEntries();
   330→      }
   331→    } else {
   332→      setEditingId(null);
   333→      await supabase.from('client_delivery_log').insert({ ...payload, created_by: user?.id });
   334→      await fetchEntries();
   335→    }
   336→  };
   337→
   338→  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
   339→    setDeletingId(null);
   340→    setEntries(prev => prev.filter(e => e.id !== id));
   341→    try {
   342→      await supabase.from('client_delivery_log').delete().eq('id', id);
   343→    } catch (error) {
   344→      console.error('Error deleting:', error);
   345→      await fetchEntries();
   346→    }
   347→  };
   348→
   349→  // Reorder entries within the same date
   350→  const handleReorder = async (entryId: string, direction: 'up' | 'down') => {
   351→    const entry = entries.find(e => e.id === entryId);
   352→    if (!entry) return;
   353→    const sameDateEntries = entries
   354→      .filter(e => e.logged_at === entry.logged_at)
   355→      .sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
   356→    const idx = sameDateEntries.findIndex(e => e.id === entryId);
   357→    const swapIdx = direction === 'up' ? idx - 1 : idx + 1;
   358→    if (swapIdx < 0 || swapIdx >= sameDateEntries.length) return;
   359→
   360→    const current = sameDateEntries[idx];
   361→    const swap = sameDateEntries[swapIdx];
   362→
   363→    const currentOrder = current.sort_order;
   364→    const swapOrder = swap.sort_order;
   365→    const newCurrentOrder = currentOrder === swapOrder
   366→      ? (direction === 'up' ? swapOrder - 1 : swapOrder + 1)
   367→      : swapOrder;
   368→    const newSwapOrder = currentOrder === swapOrder
   369→      ? currentOrder
   370→      : currentOrder;
   371→
   372→    setEntries(prev => prev.map(e => {
   373→      if (e.id === current.id) return { ...e, sort_order: newCurrentOrder };
   374→      if (e.id === swap.id) return { ...e, sort_order: newSwapOrder };
   375→      return e;
   376→    }));
   377→
   378→    try {
   379→      await Promise.all([
   380→        supabase.from('client_delivery_log').update({ sort_order: newCurrentOrder }).eq('id', current.id),
   381→        supabase.from('client_delivery_log').update({ sort_order: newSwapOrder }).eq('id', swap.id),
   382→      ]);
   383→    } catch (error) {
   384→      console.error('Error reordering:', error);
   385→      await fetchEntries();
   386→    }
   387→  };
   388→
   389→  const filtered = entries.filter((e) => {
   390→    const matchesSearch = !searchTerm ||
   391→      e.action.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
   392→      (e.who && e.who.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())) ||
   393→      (e.notes && e.notes.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())) ||
   394→      (e.location && e.location.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()));
   395→    const matchesWorkType = filterWorkType === 'all' || e.work_type === filterWorkType;
   396→    const matchesTrigger = filterTrigger === 'all' || e.trigger === filterTrigger;
   397→    return matchesSearch && matchesWorkType && matchesTrigger;
   398→  }).sort((a, b) => {
   399→    const dateDiff = a.logged_at.localeCompare(b.logged_at);
   400→    if (dateDiff !== 0) return sortAsc ? dateDiff : -dateDiff;
   401→    return a.sort_order - b.sort_order;
   402→  });
   403→
   404→  // Render an editable cell
   405→  const renderEditableCell = (entry: DeliveryLogEntry, field: string, type: 'text' | 'textarea' | 'select-type' | 'select-trigger' | 'who' = 'text') => {
   406→    const value = (entry as any)[field] || '';
   407→    const isEditing = editingCell?.entryId === entry.id && editingCell?.field === field;
   408→
   409→    if (type === 'select-type') {
   410→      return (
   411→        <td className="py-3 px-4">
   412→          <Select value={entry.work_type} onValueChange={(v) => saveSelectField(entry.id, 'work_type', v)}>
   413→            <SelectTrigger
   414→              className={`border-none shadow-none bg-transparent w-auto h-auto ${workTypeBadge(entry.work_type)} px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium inline-flex items-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none`}
   415→              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   416→            >
   417→              <SelectValue />
   418→            </SelectTrigger>
   419→            <SelectContent>
   420→              {WORK_TYPES.map((t) => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
   421→            </SelectContent>
   422→          </Select>
   423→        </td>
   424→      );
   425→    }
   426→
   427→    if (type === 'select-trigger') {
   428→      return (
   429→        <td className="py-3 px-4">
   430→          <Select value={entry.trigger || ''} onValueChange={(v) => saveSelectField(entry.id, 'trigger', v)}>
   431→            <SelectTrigger
   432→              className={`border-none shadow-none bg-transparent w-auto h-auto ${entry.trigger ? triggerBadge(entry.trigger) : 'text-gray-400'} px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium inline-flex items-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none`}
   433→              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   434→            >
   435→              <SelectValue placeholder="—" />
   436→            </SelectTrigger>
   437→            <SelectContent>
   438→              {TRIGGERS.map((t) => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
   439→            </SelectContent>
   440→          </Select>
   441→        </td>
   442→      );
   443→    }
   444→
   445→    if (type === 'who') {
   446→      if (isEditing) {
   447→        return (
   448→          <td className="py-1 px-2 whitespace-nowrap">
   449→            {inlineWhoMode === 'team' ? (
   450→              <Select value={editingValue} onValueChange={(v) => { setEditingValue(v); }}>
   451→                <SelectTrigger className="h-7 text-xs w-[120px]"><SelectValue placeholder="Select" /></SelectTrigger>
   452→                <SelectContent>
   453→                  {teamMembers.map((m) => <SelectItem key={m.id} value={m.name}>{m.name}</SelectItem>)}
   454→                </SelectContent>
   455→              </Select>
   456→            ) : (
   457→              <Input
   458→                value={editingValue}
   459→                onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
   460→                onBlur={saveInlineEdit}
   461→                onKeyDown={(e) => {
   462→                  if (e.key === 'Enter') saveInlineEdit();
   463→                  if (e.key === 'Escape') cancelEditing();
   464→                }}
   465→                className="w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 text-xs"
   466→                style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   467→                autoFocus
   468→              />
   469→            )}
   470→            <div className="flex items-center gap-1 mt-0.5">
   471→              {inlineWhoMode === 'team' && (
   472→                <button type="button" className="text-[10px] text-green-600 hover:underline" onClick={saveInlineEdit}>Save</button>
   473→              )}
   474→              <button type="button" className="text-[10px] text-[#3e8692] hover:underline" onClick={() => { setInlineWhoMode(inlineWhoMode === 'team' ? 'custom' : 'team'); setEditingValue(''); }}>
   475→                {inlineWhoMode === 'team' ? 'Manual' : 'Team'}
   476→              </button>
   477→              <button type="button" className="text-[10px] text-gray-400 hover:underline" onClick={cancelEditing}>Cancel</button>
   478→            </div>
   479→          </td>
   480→        );
   481→      }
   482→      return (
   483→        <td className="py-3 px-4 cursor-pointer whitespace-nowrap" onDoubleClick={() => startEditing(entry.id, field, value)} title="Double-click to edit">
   484→          <span className="text-gray-600">{value || '—'}</span>
   485→        </td>
   486→      );
   487→    }
   488→
   489→    if (type === 'textarea') {
   490→      if (isEditing) {
   491→        return (
   492→          <td className="py-1 px-2">
   493→            <textarea
   494→              value={editingValue}
   495→              onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
   496→              onBlur={saveInlineEdit}
   497→              onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Escape') cancelEditing(); }}
   498→              className="w-full min-w-[140px] border-none shadow-none p-0 bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 text-xs resize-none"
   499→              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   500→              rows={2}
   501→              autoFocus
   502→            />
   503→          </td>
   504→        );
   505→      }
   506→      return (
   507→        <td className="py-3 px-4 cursor-pointer max-w-[200px]" onDoubleClick={() => startEditing(entry.id, field, value)} title="Double-click to edit">
   508→          <span className="text-gray-600 line-clamp-2 whitespace-pre-wrap">{value || '—'}</span>
   509→        </td>
   510→      );
   511→    }
   512→
   513→    if (isEditing) {
   514→      return (
   515→        <td className="py-1 px-2">
   516→          <Input
   517→            value={editingValue}
   518→            onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
   519→            onBlur={saveInlineEdit}
   520→            onKeyDown={(e) => {
   521→              if (e.key === 'Enter') saveInlineEdit();
   522→              if (e.key === 'Escape') cancelEditing();
   523→            }}
   524→            className="w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 text-xs"
   525→            style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   526→            autoFocus
   527→          />
   528→        </td>
   529→      );
   530→    }
   531→
   532→    return (
   533→      <td
   534→        className={`py-3 px-4 cursor-pointer ${field === 'action' ? 'max-w-[200px]' : field === 'location' ? 'max-w-[150px]' : ''}`}
   535→        onDoubleClick={() => startEditing(entry.id, field, value)}
   536→        title="Double-click to edit"
   537→      >
   538→        <span className={`${field === 'action' ? 'line-clamp-2 text-gray-900 font-medium' : 'text-gray-600'} ${field === 'location' ? 'truncate block' : ''}`}>
   539→          {value || '—'}
   540→        </span>
   541→      </td>
   542→    );
   543→  };
   544→
   545→  return (
   546→    <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] w-full bg-gray-50">
   547→      <div className="w-full">
   548→        <div className="space-y-4">
   549→          {/* Header */}
   550→          <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6">
   551→            <div className="pb-5 border-b border-gray-100 flex flex-row items-center justify-between">
   552→              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   553→                <div className="bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-lg">
   554→                  <ClipboardList className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-600" />
   555→                </div>
   556→                <div>
   557→                  <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Delivery Logs</h2>
   558→                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Track work delivered for each client</p>
   559→                </div>
   560→              </div>
   561→              {selectedClientId && (
   562→                <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   563→                  <Button variant="outline" size="sm" onClick={() => { setIsAddingInline(true); }}>
   564→                    <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
   565→                    Add Inline
   566→                  </Button>
   567→                  <Button className="hover:opacity-90" style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }} onClick={() => openForm()}>
   568→                    <Expand className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
   569→                    Add via Form
   570→                  </Button>
   571→                </div>
   572→              )}
   573→            </div>
   574→
   575→            {/* Client Tabs */}
   576→            <div className="pt-4">
   577→              {clientsLoading ? (
   578→                <div className="flex gap-2">
   579→                  {[1, 2, 3, 4].map((i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-9 w-24 rounded" />)}
   580→                </div>
   581→              ) : clients.length === 0 ? (
   582→                <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">No active clients found.</p>
   583→              ) : (
   584→                <Tabs value={selectedClientId} onValueChange={setSelectedClientId}>
   585→                  <TabsList className="bg-gray-100 p-1 h-auto flex-wrap">
   586→                    {clients.map((client) => (
   587→                      <TabsTrigger
   588→                        key={client.id}
   589→                        value={client.id}
   590→                        className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
   591→                      >
   592→                        {client.logo_url ? (
   593→                          <img src={client.logo_url} alt="" className="h-4 w-4 object-contain rounded mr-2 inline-block" />
   594→                        ) : (
   595→                          <Building2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2 inline-block" />
   596→                        )}
   597→                        {client.name}
   598→                      </TabsTrigger>
   599→                    ))}
   600→                  </TabsList>
   601→                </Tabs>
   602→              )}
   603→            </div>
   604→
   605→            {/* Filters */}
   606→            {selectedClientId && (
   607→              <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 pt-4">
   608→                <div className="relative flex-1 max-w-sm">
   609→                  <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   610→                  <Input
   611→                    placeholder="Search actions, who, notes..."
   612→                    className="pl-10 auth-input"
   613→                    value={searchTerm}
   614→                    onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
   615→                  />
   616→                </div>
   617→                <Select value={filterWorkType} onValueChange={setFilterWorkType}>
   618→                  <SelectTrigger className="w-[160px] auth-input">
   619→                    <Filter className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2 text-gray-400" />
   620→                    <SelectValue placeholder="Work Type" />
   621→                  </SelectTrigger>
   622→                  <SelectContent>
   623→                    <SelectItem value="all">All Types</SelectItem>
   624→                    {WORK_TYPES.map((t) => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
   625→                  </SelectContent>
   626→                </Select>
   627→                <Select value={filterTrigger} onValueChange={setFilterTrigger}>
   628→                  <SelectTrigger className="w-[180px] auth-input">
   629→                    <Filter className="h-3.5 w-3.5 mr-2 text-gray-400" />
   630→                    <SelectValue placeholder="Trigger" />
   631→                  </SelectTrigger>
   632→                  <SelectContent>
   633→                    <SelectItem value="all">All Triggers</SelectItem>
   634→                    {TRIGGERS.map((t) => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
   635→                  </SelectContent>
   636→                </Select>
   637→                {(filterWorkType !== 'all' || filterTrigger !== 'all' || searchTerm) && (
   638→                  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => { setFilterWorkType('all'); setFilterTrigger('all'); setSearchTerm(''); }}>
   639→                    Clear
   640→                  </Button>
   641→                )}
   642→              </div>
   643→            )}
   644→
   645→            {/* Table */}
   646→            <div className="mt-5 -mx-6 -mb-6">
   647→              {!selectedClientId ? (
   648→                <div className="text-center py-16">
   649→                  <Building2 className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-3" />
   650→                  <p className="text-gray-500 font-medium">Select a client to view their delivery log.</p>
   651→                </div>
   652→              ) : loading ? (
   653→                <div className="p-6 space-y-3">
   654→                  {[1, 2, 3, 4].map((i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-12 w-full rounded" />)}
   655→                </div>
   656→              ) : filtered.length === 0 && !isAddingInline ? (
   657→                <div className="text-center py-16">
   658→                  <ClipboardList className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-3" />
   659→                  <p className="text-gray-500 font-medium">
   660→                    {entries.length === 0 ? 'No delivery log entries yet.' : 'No entries match your filters.'}
   661→                  </p>
   662→                  {entries.length === 0 && (
   663→                    <div className="flex items-center justify-center gap-2 mt-4">
   664→                      <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setIsAddingInline(true)}>
   665→                        <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" /> Add Inline
   666→                      </Button>
   667→                      <Button className="hover:opacity-90" style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }} onClick={() => openForm()}>
   668→                        <Expand className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Add via Form
   669→                      </Button>
   670→                    </div>
   671→                  )}
   672→                </div>
   673→              ) : (
   674→                <div className="overflow-x-auto">
   675→                  <table className="w-full text-sm">
   676→                    <thead>
   677→                      <tr className="border-t border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/80">
   678→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap w-14">
   679→                          <button className="inline-flex items-center gap-1 hover:text-gray-900 transition-colors" onClick={() => setSortAsc(!sortAsc)}>
   680→                            Day
   681→                            <ArrowUpDown className="h-3 w-3" />
   682→                          </button>
   683→                        </th>
   684→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Date</th>
   685→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Type</th>
   686→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Action</th>
   687→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Who</th>
   688→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">How</th>
   689→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Where</th>
   690→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Trigger</th>
   691→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Notes</th>
   692→                        <th className="text-right py-3 px-4 w-20"></th>
   693→                      </tr>
   694→                    </thead>
   695→                    <tbody>
   696→                      {/* Inline add row */}
   697→                      {isAddingInline && (
   698→                        <tr className="border-b border-[#3e8692]/20 bg-[#e8f4f5]/20">
   699→                          <td className="py-3 px-4 text-gray-400 text-xs">—</td>
   700→                          <td className="py-3 px-4 whitespace-nowrap">
   701→                            <Popover>
   702→                              <PopoverTrigger asChild>
   703→                                <button className="text-sm text-gray-500 hover:text-gray-700 cursor-pointer">
   704→                                  {inlineNew.logged_at ? new Date(inlineNew.logged_at + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' }) : 'Select date'}
   705→                                </button>
   706→                              </PopoverTrigger>
   707→                              <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
   708→                                <Calendar
   709→                                  mode="single"
   710→                                  selected={inlineNew.logged_at ? new Date(inlineNew.logged_at + 'T00:00:00') : undefined}
   711→                                  onSelect={(date) => setInlineNew({ ...inlineNew, logged_at: date ? date.toISOString().split('T')[0] : '' })}
   712→                                  initialFocus
   713→                                  classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
   714→                                  modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
   715→                                />
   716→                              </PopoverContent>
   717→                            </Popover>
   718→                          </td>
   719→                          <td className="py-3 px-4">
   720→                            <Select value={inlineNew.work_type} onValueChange={(v) => setInlineNew({ ...inlineNew, work_type: v })}>
   721→                              <SelectTrigger
   722→                                className={`border-none shadow-none bg-transparent w-auto h-auto ${inlineNew.work_type ? workTypeBadge(inlineNew.work_type) : 'text-gray-400'} px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium inline-flex items-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none`}
   723→                                style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   724→                              >
   725→                                <SelectValue placeholder="Type *" />
   726→                              </SelectTrigger>
   727→                              <SelectContent>
   728→                                {WORK_TYPES.map((t) => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
   729→                              </SelectContent>
   730→                            </Select>
   731→                          </td>
   732→                          <td className="py-3 px-4">
   733→                            <Input
   734→                              value={inlineNew.action}
   735→                              onChange={(e) => setInlineNew({ ...inlineNew, action: e.target.value })}
   736→                              placeholder="Action *"
   737→                              className="w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 text-xs font-medium text-gray-900"
   738→                              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   739→                            />
   740→                          </td>
   741→                          <td className="py-3 px-4">
   742→                            {inlineNewWhoMode === 'team' ? (
   743→                              <div>
   744→                                <Select value={inlineNew.who} onValueChange={(v) => setInlineNew({ ...inlineNew, who: v })}>
   745→                                  <SelectTrigger
   746→                                    className="border-none shadow-none bg-transparent w-auto h-auto px-0 py-0 text-xs text-gray-600 inline-flex items-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none"
   747→                                    style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   748→                                  >
   749→                                    <SelectValue placeholder="Who" />
   750→                                  </SelectTrigger>
   751→                                  <SelectContent>
   752→                                    {teamMembers.map((m) => <SelectItem key={m.id} value={m.name}>{m.name}</SelectItem>)}
   753→                                  </SelectContent>
   754→                                </Select>
   755→                                <button type="button" className="text-[10px] text-[#3e8692] hover:underline mt-0.5 block" onClick={() => { setInlineNewWhoMode('custom'); setInlineNew({ ...inlineNew, who: '' }); }}>Manual</button>
   756→                              </div>
   757→                            ) : (
   758→                              <div>
   759→                                <Input
   760→                                  value={inlineNew.who}
   761→                                  onChange={(e) => setInlineNew({ ...inlineNew, who: e.target.value })}
   762→                                  placeholder="Who"
   763→                                  className="w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 text-xs text-gray-600"
   764→                                  style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   765→                                />
   766→                                <button type="button" className="text-[10px] text-[#3e8692] hover:underline mt-0.5 block" onClick={() => { setInlineNewWhoMode('team'); setInlineNew({ ...inlineNew, who: '' }); }}>Team</button>
   767→                              </div>
   768→                            )}
   769→                          </td>
   770→                          <td className="py-3 px-4">
   771→                            <Input
   772→                              value={inlineNew.method}
   773→                              onChange={(e) => setInlineNew({ ...inlineNew, method: e.target.value })}
   774→                              placeholder="How"
   775→                              className="w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 text-xs text-gray-600"
   776→                              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   777→                            />
   778→                          </td>
   779→                          <td className="py-3 px-4">
   780→                            <Input
   781→                              value={inlineNew.location}
   782→                              onChange={(e) => setInlineNew({ ...inlineNew, location: e.target.value })}
   783→                              placeholder="Where"
   784→                              className="w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 text-xs text-gray-600"
   785→                              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   786→                            />
   787→                          </td>
   788→                          <td className="py-3 px-4">
   789→                            <Select value={inlineNew.trigger} onValueChange={(v) => setInlineNew({ ...inlineNew, trigger: v })}>
   790→                              <SelectTrigger
   791→                                className={`border-none shadow-none bg-transparent w-auto h-auto ${inlineNew.trigger ? triggerBadge(inlineNew.trigger) : 'text-gray-400'} px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium inline-flex items-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none`}
   792→                                style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   793→                              >
   794→                                <SelectValue placeholder="Trigger" />
   795→                              </SelectTrigger>
   796→                              <SelectContent>
   797→                                {TRIGGERS.map((t) => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
   798→                              </SelectContent>
   799→                            </Select>
   800→                          </td>
   801→                          <td className="py-3 px-4">
   802→                            <Input
   803→                              value={inlineNew.notes}
   804→                              onChange={(e) => setInlineNew({ ...inlineNew, notes: e.target.value })}
   805→                              placeholder="Notes"
   806→                              className="w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 text-xs text-gray-600"
   807→                              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   808→                            />
   809→                          </td>
   810→                          <td className="py-3 px-4 text-right">
   811→                            <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-1">
   812→                              <Button size="sm" variant="ghost" className="h-7 w-7 p-0" onClick={handleInlineAdd} disabled={!inlineNew.work_type || !inlineNew.action.trim()}>
   813→                                <Check className="h-4 w-4 text-green-600" />
   814→                              </Button>
   815→                              <Button size="sm" variant="ghost" className="h-7 w-7 p-0" onClick={() => { setIsAddingInline(false); setInlineNew({ work_type: '', action: '', who: '', method: '', location: '', trigger: '', notes: '', logged_at: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0] }); }}>
   816→                                <X className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   817→                              </Button>
   818→                            </div>
   819→                          </td>
   820→                        </tr>
   821→                      )}
   822→                      {filtered.map((entry) => (
   823→                        <tr key={entry.id} className="border-b border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors group">
   824→                          <td className="py-3 px-4">
   825→                            <span className="inline-flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-100 text-gray-600 text-xs font-bold rounded-full h-6 w-6">{getDayNumber(entry.logged_at)}</span>
   826→                          </td>
   827→                          <td className="py-3 px-4 whitespace-nowrap">
   828→                            <Popover>
   829→                              <PopoverTrigger asChild>
   830→                                <button className="text-gray-500 text-sm hover:text-gray-700 cursor-pointer">
   831→                                  {new Date(entry.logged_at + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}
   832→                                </button>
   833→                              </PopoverTrigger>
   834→                              <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
   835→                                <Calendar
   836→                                  mode="single"
   837→                                  selected={new Date(entry.logged_at + 'T00:00:00')}
   838→                                  onSelect={(date) => saveDateField(entry.id, date)}
   839→                                  initialFocus
   840→                                  classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
   841→                                  modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
   842→                                />
   843→                              </PopoverContent>
   844→                            </Popover>
   845→                          </td>
   846→                          {renderEditableCell(entry, 'work_type', 'select-type')}
   847→                          {renderEditableCell(entry, 'action', 'text')}
   848→                          {renderEditableCell(entry, 'who', 'who')}
   849→                          {renderEditableCell(entry, 'method', 'textarea')}
   850→                          {renderEditableCell(entry, 'location', 'text')}
   851→                          {renderEditableCell(entry, 'trigger', 'select-trigger')}
   852→                          {renderEditableCell(entry, 'notes', 'textarea')}
   853→                          <td className="py-3 px-4 text-right">
   854→                            <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-0.5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
   855→                              {(() => {
   856→                                const sameDateEntries = filtered.filter(e => e.logged_at === entry.logged_at);
   857→                                if (sameDateEntries.length <= 1) return null;
   858→                                const sameDateSorted = [...sameDateEntries].sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
   859→                                const posInGroup = sameDateSorted.findIndex(e => e.id === entry.id);
   860→                                return (
   861→                                  <>
   862→                                    <Button
   863→                                      variant="ghost"
   864→                                      size="sm"
   865→                                      className="w-auto px-1 hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-30"
   866→                                      onClick={() => handleReorder(entry.id, 'up')}
   867→                                      disabled={posInGroup === 0}
   868→                                      title="Move up within same date"
   869→                                    >
   870→                                      <ChevronUp className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
   871→                                    </Button>
   872→                                    <Button
   873→                                      variant="ghost"
   874→                                      size="sm"
   875→                                      className="w-auto px-1 hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-30"
   876→                                      onClick={() => handleReorder(entry.id, 'down')}
   877→                                      disabled={posInGroup === sameDateSorted.length - 1}
   878→                                      title="Move down within same date"
   879→                                    >
   880→                                      <ChevronDown className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
   881→                                    </Button>
   882→                                  </>
   883→                                );
   884→                              })()}
   885→                              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="w-auto px-2 hover:bg-gray-100" onClick={() => openForm(entry)} title="Edit in popup">
   886→                                <Expand className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-600" />
   887→                              </Button>
   888→                              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="w-auto px-2 hover:bg-red-50" onClick={() => setDeletingId(entry.id)}>
   889→                                <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-600" />
   890→                              </Button>
   891→                            </div>
   892→                          </td>
   893→                        </tr>
   894→                      ))}
   895→                    </tbody>
   896→                  </table>
   897→                </div>
   898→              )}
   899→            </div>
   900→          </div>
   901→        </div>
   902→      </div>
   903→
   904→      {/* Add/Edit Dialog */}
   905→      <Dialog open={isFormOpen} onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) { setIsFormOpen(false); setEditingId(null); } }}>
   906→        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-[600px] max-h-[85vh] overflow-hidden">
   907→          <DialogHeader>
   908→            <DialogTitle>{editingId ? 'Edit Entry' : 'Add Delivery Log Entry'}</DialogTitle>
   909→            <DialogDescription>Log work delivered for {selectedClient?.name}.</DialogDescription>
   910→          </DialogHeader>
   911→          <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[60vh] overflow-y-auto px-1 pb-4">
   912→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   913→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   914→                <Label>Work Type <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   915→                <Select value={form.work_type} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, work_type: v })}>
   916→                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select type" /></SelectTrigger>
   917→                  <SelectContent>
   918→                    {WORK_TYPES.map((t) => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
   919→                  </SelectContent>
   920→                </Select>
   921→              </div>
   922→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   923→                <Label>Date <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   924→                <Popover>
   925→                  <PopoverTrigger asChild>
   926→                    <Button variant="outline" className="auth-input justify-start text-left font-normal" style={{ borderColor: '#e5e7eb', backgroundColor: 'white', color: form.logged_at ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af' }}>
   927→                      <CalendarIcon className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
   928→                      {form.logged_at ? form.logged_at.toLocaleDateString() : 'Select date'}
   929→                    </Button>
   930→                  </PopoverTrigger>
   931→                  <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
   932→                    <Calendar mode="single" selected={form.logged_at} onSelect={(date) => setForm({ ...form, logged_at: date || undefined })} initialFocus classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }} modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }} />
   933→                  </PopoverContent>
   934→                </Popover>
   935→              </div>
   936→            </div>
   937→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   938→              <Label>Action <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   939→              <Input value={form.action} onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, action: e.target.value })} placeholder="What was done?" className="auth-input" />
   940→            </div>
   941→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   942→              <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   943→                <Label>Who</Label>
   944→                <button
   945→                  type="button"
   946→                  className="text-xs text-[#3e8692] hover:underline"
   947→                  onClick={() => { setWhoMode(whoMode === 'team' ? 'custom' : 'team'); setForm({ ...form, who: '' }); }}
   948→                >
   949→                  {whoMode === 'team' ? 'Enter manually instead' : 'Pick from team'}
   950→                </button>
   951→              </div>
   952→              {whoMode === 'team' ? (
   953→                <Select value={form.who} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, who: v })}>
   954→                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select team member" /></SelectTrigger>
   955→                  <SelectContent>
   956→                    {teamMembers.map((m) => <SelectItem key={m.id} value={m.name}>{m.name}</SelectItem>)}
   957→                  </SelectContent>
   958→                </Select>
   959→              ) : (
   960→                <Input value={form.who} onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, who: e.target.value })} placeholder="Enter name manually" className="auth-input" />
   961→              )}
   962→            </div>
   963→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   964→              <Label>How (Method)</Label>
   965→              <Textarea value={form.method} onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, method: e.target.value })} placeholder="Method, script, tool, process used..." className="auth-input" rows={3} />
   966→            </div>
   967→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   968→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   969→                <Label>Where</Label>
   970→                <Input value={form.location} onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, location: e.target.value })} placeholder="Location or platform" className="auth-input" />
   971→              </div>
   972→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   973→                <Label>Trigger</Label>
   974→                <Select value={form.trigger} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, trigger: v })}>
   975→                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select trigger" /></SelectTrigger>
   976→                  <SelectContent>
   977→                    {TRIGGERS.map((t) => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
   978→                  </SelectContent>
   979→                </Select>
   980→              </div>
   981→            </div>
   982→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   983→              <Label>Notes</Label>
   984→              <Textarea value={form.notes} onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, notes: e.target.value })} placeholder="Additional notes..." className="auth-input" rows={3} />
   985→            </div>
   986→          </div>
   987→          <DialogFooter>
   988→            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => { setIsFormOpen(false); setEditingId(null); }}>Cancel</Button>
   989→            <Button
   990→              className="hover:opacity-90"
   991→              style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   992→              onClick={handleSubmit}
   993→              disabled={!form.work_type || !form.action.trim() || !form.logged_at}
   994→            >
   995→              {editingId ? 'Save Changes' : 'Add Entry'}
   996→            </Button>
   997→          </DialogFooter>
   998→        </DialogContent>
   999→      </Dialog>
  1000→
  1001→      {/* Delete Confirmation */}
  1002→      <Dialog open={!!deletingId} onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) setDeletingId(null); }}>
  1003→        <DialogContent className="max-w-md">
  1004→          <DialogHeader>
  1005→            <DialogTitle>Delete Entry</DialogTitle>
  1006→            <DialogDescription>Are you sure you want to delete this delivery log entry? This action cannot be undone.</DialogDescription>
  1007→          </DialogHeader>
  1008→          <DialogFooter>
  1009→            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setDeletingId(null)}>Cancel</Button>
  1010→            <Button variant="destructive" onClick={() => deletingId && handleDelete(deletingId)}>Delete</Button>
  1011→          </DialogFooter>
  1012→        </DialogContent>
  1013→      </Dialog>
  1014→    </div>
  1015→  );
  1016→}
  1017→
```
</details></tool-use>
