```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Calendar } from '@/components/ui/calendar';
import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from '@/components/ui/popover';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase';
import { UserService } from '@/lib/userService';
import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
import {
  Plus,
  ListTodo,
  Search,
  Trash2,
  Edit,
  Calendar as CalendarIcon,
  ChevronUp,
  ChevronDown,
  ExternalLink,
  ClipboardList,
} from 'lucide-react';

type Task = {
  id: string;
  task_name: string;
  assigned_to: string | null;
  assigned_to_name: string | null;
  due_date: string | null;
  latest_comment: string | null;
  frequency: string;
  task_type: string;
  link: string | null;
  created_by: string | null;
  created_by_name: string | null;
  sort_order: number;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
};

type TeamMember = {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  role: string;
};

const FREQUENCIES = ['one-time', 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'recurring'] as const;
const TASK_TYPES = [
  'Admin & Operations',
  'Finance & Invoicing',
  'General',
  'Tech & Tools',
  'Marketing & Sales',
  'Client SOP',
  'Client Delivery',
  'Performance Review',
  'Research & Analytics',
] as const;

const frequencyBadge = (freq: string) => {
  switch (freq) {
    case 'one-time': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
    case 'daily': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';
    case 'weekly': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800';
    case 'monthly': return 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800';
    case 'recurring': return 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800';
    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
  }
};

const typeBadge = (type: string) => {
  switch (type) {
    case 'Admin & Operations': return 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-700';
    case 'Finance & Invoicing': return 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800';
    case 'General': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
    case 'Tech & Tools': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';
    case 'Marketing & Sales': return 'bg-pink-100 text-pink-800';
    case 'Client SOP': return 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-800';
    case 'Client Delivery': return 'bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-800';
    case 'Performance Review': return 'bg-violet-100 text-violet-800';
    case 'Research & Analytics': return 'bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800';
    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
  }
};

const getDueDateColor = (dueDate: string | null) => {
  if (!dueDate) return '';
  const today = new Date();
  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  const due = new Date(dueDate + 'T00:00:00');
  const diffDays = Math.ceil((due.getTime() - today.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  if (diffDays < 0) return 'text-red-600 font-semibold';
  if (diffDays <= 3) return 'text-amber-600 font-semibold';
  return 'text-gray-600';
};

export default function TasksPage() {
  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();
  const { toast } = useToast();

  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<Task[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [teamMembers, setTeamMembers] = useState<TeamMember[]>([]);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<string>('one-time');
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');

  // Form state
  const [isFormOpen, setIsFormOpen] = useState(false);
  const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
  const [form, setForm] = useState({
    task_name: '',
    assigned_to: '' as string,
    due_date: undefined as Date | undefined,
    frequency: '' as string,
    task_type: '' as string,
    link: '',
    latest_comment: '',
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchTasks();
    UserService.getAllUsers().then((users) => {
      setTeamMembers(
        users
          .filter(u => u.role !== 'client')
          .map(u => ({ id: u.id, name: u.name || u.email, email: u.email, role: u.role }))
      );
    });
  }, []);

  const fetchTasks = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    const { data } = await supabase
      .from('tasks')
      .select('*')
      .order('sort_order', { ascending: true })
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
    setTasks(data || []);
    setLoading(false);
  };

  // Tab counts
  const oneTimeCount = useMemo(() =>
    tasks.filter(t => t.frequency === 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP').length,
    [tasks]
  );
  const recurringCount = useMemo(() =>
    tasks.filter(t => t.frequency !== 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP').length,
    [tasks]
  );
  const clientSopCount = useMemo(() =>
    tasks.filter(t => t.task_type === 'Client SOP').length,
    [tasks]
  );

  // Filter tasks by tab + search
  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
    let tabFiltered: Task[];
    if (activeTab === 'one-time') {
      tabFiltered = tasks.filter(t => t.frequency === 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP');
    } else if (activeTab === 'recurring') {
      tabFiltered = tasks.filter(t => t.frequency !== 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP');
    } else {
      tabFiltered = tasks.filter(t => t.task_type === 'Client SOP');
    }

    if (!searchTerm) return tabFiltered.sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);

    const term = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
    return tabFiltered.filter(t =>
      t.task_name.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
      (t.assigned_to_name && t.assigned_to_name.toLowerCase().includes(term)) ||
      (t.latest_comment && t.latest_comment.toLowerCase().includes(term)) ||
      t.task_type.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
      (t.created_by_name && t.created_by_name.toLowerCase().includes(term))
    ).sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
  }, [tasks, activeTab, searchTerm]);

  const openForm = (task?: Task) => {
    if (task) {
      setEditingId(task.id);
      setForm({
        task_name: task.task_name,
        assigned_to: task.assigned_to || '',
        due_date: task.due_date ? new Date(task.due_date + 'T00:00:00') : undefined,
        frequency: task.frequency,
        task_type: task.task_type,
        link: task.link || '',
        latest_comment: task.latest_comment || '',
      });
    } else {
      setEditingId(null);
      setForm({
        task_name: '',
        assigned_to: '',
        due_date: undefined,
        frequency: '',
        task_type: '',
        link: '',
        latest_comment: '',
      });
    }
    setIsFormOpen(true);
  };

  const handleSubmit = async () => {
    if (!form.task_name.trim() || !form.frequency || !form.task_type) return;
    if (!user?.id || !userProfile) return;

    setSubmitting(true);
    try {
      const assignedMember = teamMembers.find(m => m.id === form.assigned_to);
      const payload = {
        task_name: form.task_name.trim(),
        assigned_to: form.assigned_to || null,
        assigned_to_name: assignedMember?.name || null,
        due_date: form.due_date ? form.due_date.toISOString().split('T')[0] : null,
        frequency: form.frequency,
        task_type: form.task_type,
        link: form.link.trim() || null,
        latest_comment: form.latest_comment.trim() || null,
        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      };

      if (editingId) {
        const { error } = await supabase
          .from('tasks')
          .update(payload)
          .eq('id', editingId);
        if (error) throw error;
        toast({ title: 'Updated', description: 'Task updated successfully.' });
      } else {
        const { error } = await supabase
          .from('tasks')
          .insert({
            ...payload,
            created_by: user.id,
            created_by_name: userProfile.name || userProfile.email || 'Unknown',
          });
        if (error) throw error;
        toast({ title: 'Created', description: 'Task created successfully.' });
      }

      setIsFormOpen(false);
      setEditingId(null);
      setForm({ task_name: '', assigned_to: '', due_date: undefined, frequency: '', task_type: '', link: '', latest_comment: '' });
      await fetchTasks();
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error saving task:', err);
      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to save task.', variant: 'destructive' });
    } finally {
      setSubmitting(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
    setDeletingId(null);
    setTasks(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id));
    try {
      await supabase.from('tasks').delete().eq('id', id);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error deleting:', error);
      await fetchTasks();
    }
  };

  const handleReorder = async (taskId: string, direction: 'up' | 'down') => {
    const sorted = [...filtered].sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
    const idx = sorted.findIndex(t => t.id === taskId);
    const swapIdx = direction === 'up' ? idx - 1 : idx + 1;
    if (swapIdx < 0 || swapIdx >= sorted.length) return;

    const current = sorted[idx];
    const swap = sorted[swapIdx];

    const currentOrder = current.sort_order;
    const swapOrder = swap.sort_order;
    const newCurrentOrder = currentOrder === swapOrder
      ? (direction === 'up' ? swapOrder - 1 : swapOrder + 1)
      : swapOrder;
    const newSwapOrder = currentOrder === swapOrder
      ? currentOrder
      : currentOrder;

    setTasks(prev => prev.map(t => {
      if (t.id === current.id) return { ...t, sort_order: newCurrentOrder };
      if (t.id === swap.id) return { ...t, sort_order: newSwapOrder };
      return t;
    }));

    try {
      await Promise.all([
        supabase.from('tasks').update({ sort_order: newCurrentOrder }).eq('id', current.id),
        supabase.from('tasks').update({ sort_order: newSwapOrder }).eq('id', swap.id),
      ]);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error reordering:', error);
      await fetchTasks();
    }
  };

  const formatDate = (dateStr: string) => {
    return new Date(dateStr + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' });
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] w-full bg-gray-50">
      <div className="w-full">
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {/* Header */}
          <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6">
            <div className="pb-5 border-b border-gray-100 flex flex-row items-center justify-between">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <div className="bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-lg">
                  <ListTodo className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-600" />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Tasks</h2>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Manage team tasks, SOPs, and recurring work</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <Button
                className="hover:opacity-90"
                style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
                onClick={() => openForm()}
              >
                <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                Add Task
              </Button>
            </div>

            {/* Tabs */}
            <div className="pt-4">
              {loading ? (
                <div className="flex gap-2">
                  {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-9 w-28 rounded" />)}
                </div>
              ) : (
                <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={setActiveTab}>
                  <TabsList className="bg-gray-100 p-1 h-auto flex-wrap">
                    <TabsTrigger
                      value="one-time"
                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
                    >
                      One-Time
                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{oneTimeCount}</span>
                    </TabsTrigger>
                    <TabsTrigger
                      value="recurring"
                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
                    >
                      Recurring
                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{recurringCount}</span>
                    </TabsTrigger>
                    <TabsTrigger
                      value="client-sop"
                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
                    >
                      Client SOP
                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{clientSopCount}</span>
                    </TabsTrigger>
                  </TabsList>
                </Tabs>
              )}
            </div>

            {/* Search */}
            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 pt-4">
              <div className="relative flex-1 max-w-sm">
                <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
                <Input
                  placeholder="Search tasks, assignees, comments..."
                  className="pl-10 auth-input"
                  value={searchTerm}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
                />
              </div>
              {searchTerm && (
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setSearchTerm('')}>
                  Clear
                </Button>
              )}
            </div>

            {/* Table */}
            <div className="mt-5 -mx-6 -mb-6">
              {loading ? (
                <div className="p-6 space-y-3">
                  {[1, 2, 3, 4].map((i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-12 w-full rounded" />)}
                </div>
              ) : filtered.length === 0 ? (
                <div className="text-center py-16">
                  <ClipboardList className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-3" />
                  <p className="text-gray-500 font-medium">
                    {tasks.length === 0 ? 'No tasks yet.' : 'No tasks match your filters.'}
                  </p>
                  {tasks.length === 0 && (
                    <Button
                      className="mt-4 hover:opacity-90"
                      style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
                      onClick={() => openForm()}
                    >
                      <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Create Your First Task
                    </Button>
                  )}
                </div>
              ) : (
                <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                  <table className="w-full text-sm">
                    <thead>
                      <tr className="border-t border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/80">
                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider w-16"></th>
                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Task Name</th>
                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Assigned To</th>
                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Due Date</th>
                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Comment</th>
                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Frequency</th>
                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Type</th>
                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Link</th>
                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Created By</th>
                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Created</th>
                        <th className="text-right py-3 px-4 w-20"></th>
                      </tr>
                    </thead>
                    <tbody>
                      {filtered.map((task, idx) => (
                        <tr key={task.id} className="border-b border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors group">
                          {/* Reorder arrows */}
                          <td className="py-3 px-4">
                            <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                              <Button
                                variant="ghost"
                                size="sm"
                                className="w-auto h-auto px-1 py-0 hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-30"
                                onClick={() => handleReorder(task.id, 'up')}
                                disabled={idx === 0}
                              >
                                <ChevronUp className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
                              </Button>
                              <Button
                                variant="ghost"
                                size="sm"
                                className="w-auto h-auto px-1 py-0 hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-30"
                                onClick={() => handleReorder(task.id, 'down')}
                                disabled={idx === filtered.length - 1}
                              >
                                <ChevronDown className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
                              </Button>
                            </div>
                          </td>
                          {/* Task Name */}
                          <td className="py-3 px-4 max-w-[250px]">
                            <span className="text-gray-900 font-medium line-clamp-2">{task.task_name}</span>
                          </td>
                          {/* Assigned To */}
                          <td className="py-3 px-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                            <span className="text-gray-600">{task.assigned_to_name || '—'}</span>
                          </td>
                          {/* Due Date */}
                          <td className="py-3 px-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                            <span className={getDueDateColor(task.due_date)}>
                              {task.due_date ? formatDate(task.due_date) : '—'}
                            </span>
                          </td>
                          {/* Comment */}
                          <td className="py-3 px-4 max-w-[200px]">
                            <span className="text-gray-600 line-clamp-2 whitespace-pre-wrap">{task.latest_comment || '—'}</span>
                          </td>
                          {/* Frequency */}
                          <td className="py-3 px-4">
                            <span className={`inline-flex px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium ${frequencyBadge(task.frequency)}`}>
                              {task.frequency}
                            </span>
                          </td>
                          {/* Type */}
                          <td className="py-3 px-4">
                            <span className={`inline-flex px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium whitespace-nowrap ${typeBadge(task.task_type)}`}>
                              {task.task_type}
                            </span>
                          </td>
                          {/* Link */}
                          <td className="py-3 px-4">
                            {task.link ? (
                              <a
                                href={task.link}
                                target="_blank"
                                rel="noopener noreferrer"
                                className="text-[#3e8692] hover:underline inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs"
                              >
                                <ExternalLink className="h-3 w-3" />
                                Link
                              </a>
                            ) : (
                              <span className="text-gray-400">—</span>
                            )}
                          </td>
                          {/* Created By */}
                          <td className="py-3 px-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                            <span className="text-gray-600 text-xs">{task.created_by_name || '—'}</span>
                          </td>
                          {/* Created */}
                          <td className="py-3 px-4 whitespace-nowrap">
                            <span className="text-gray-500 text-xs">
                              {new Date(task.created_at).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}
                            </span>
                          </td>
                          {/* Actions */}
                          <td className="py-3 px-4 text-right">
                            <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
                              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0 hover:bg-gray-200" onClick={() => openForm(task)}>
                                <Edit className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
                              </Button>
                              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0 hover:bg-red-50" onClick={() => setDeletingId(task.id)}>
                                <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-500" />
                              </Button>
                            </div>
                          </td>
                        </tr>
                      ))}
                    </tbody>
                  </table>
                </div>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Add/Edit Dialog */}
      <Dialog open={isFormOpen} onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) { setIsFormOpen(false); setEditingId(null); } }}>
        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-[600px] max-h-[85vh] overflow-hidden">
          <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle>{editingId ? 'Edit Task' : 'Add Task'}</DialogTitle>
            <DialogDescription>
              {editingId ? 'Update the task details below.' : 'Create a new task for the team.'}
            </DialogDescription>
          </DialogHeader>
          <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[60vh] overflow-y-auto px-1 pb-4">
            {/* Task Name */}
            <div className="grid gap-2">
              <Label>Task Name <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
              <Input
                value={form.task_name}
                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, task_name: e.target.value })}
                placeholder="Enter task name"
                className="auth-input"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              {/* Assigned To */}
              <div className="grid gap-2">
                <Label>Assigned To</Label>
                <Select value={form.assigned_to} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, assigned_to: v })}>
                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select team member" /></SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    {teamMembers.map((m) => <SelectItem key={m.id} value={m.id}>{m.name}</SelectItem>)}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              {/* Due Date */}
              <div className="grid gap-2">
                <Label>Due Date</Label>
                <Popover>
                  <PopoverTrigger asChild>
                    <Button
                      variant="outline"
                      className="auth-input justify-start text-left font-normal"
                      style={{ borderColor: '#e5e7eb', backgroundColor: 'white', color: form.due_date ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af' }}
                    >
                      <CalendarIcon className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
                      {form.due_date ? form.due_date.toLocaleDateString() : 'Select date'}
                    </Button>
                  </PopoverTrigger>
                  <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
                    <Calendar
                      mode="single"
                      selected={form.due_date}
                      onSelect={(date) => setForm({ ...form, due_date: date || undefined })}
                      initialFocus
                      classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
                      modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
                    />
                  </PopoverContent>
                </Popover>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              {/* Frequency */}
              <div className="grid gap-2">
                <Label>Frequency <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
                <Select value={form.frequency} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, frequency: v })}>
                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select frequency" /></SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    {FREQUENCIES.map((f) => <SelectItem key={f} value={f}>{f}</SelectItem>)}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              {/* Task Type */}
              <div className="grid gap-2">
                <Label>Task Type <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
                <Select value={form.task_type} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, task_type: v })}>
                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select type" /></SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    {TASK_TYPES.map((t) => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Link */}
            <div className="grid gap-2">
              <Label>Link</Label>
              <Input
                value={form.link}
                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, link: e.target.value })}
                placeholder="https://..."
                className="auth-input"
              />
            </div>

            {/* Latest Comment */}
            <div className="grid gap-2">
              <Label>Latest Comment</Label>
              <Textarea
                value={form.latest_comment}
                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, latest_comment: e.target.value })}
                placeholder="Add a comment or note..."
                className="auth-input"
                rows={3}
              />
            </div>
          </div>
          <DialogFooter>
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => { setIsFormOpen(false); setEditingId(null); }}>Cancel</Button>
            <Button
              className="hover:opacity-90"
              style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
              onClick={handleSubmit}
              disabled={!form.task_name.trim() || !form.frequency || !form.task_type || submitting}
            >
              {submitting ? (
                <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-4 w-4 border-b-2 border-white" />
              ) : editingId ? 'Save Changes' : 'Add Task'}
            </Button>
          </DialogFooter>
        </DialogContent>
      </Dialog>

      {/* Delete Confirmation */}
      <Dialog open={!!deletingId} onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) setDeletingId(null); }}>
        <DialogContent className="max-w-md">
          <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle>Delete Task</DialogTitle>
            <DialogDescription>Are you sure you want to delete this task? This action cannot be undone.</DialogDescription>
          </DialogHeader>
          <DialogFooter>
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setDeletingId(null)}>Cancel</Button>
            <Button variant="destructive" onClick={() => deletingId && handleDelete(deletingId)}>Delete</Button>
          </DialogFooter>
        </DialogContent>
      </Dialog>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```text
File created successfully at: /Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/tasks/page.tsx
```

_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-12 15:18:43Z)**_

All done. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

**Database Migration** (`create_tasks_table`)
- Created `tasks` table with all columns: `id`, `task_name`, `assigned_to`, `assigned_to_name`, `due_date`, `latest_comment`, `frequency`, `task_type`, `link`, `created_by`, `created_by_name`, `sort_order`, `created_at`, `updated_at`
- CHECK constraints on `frequency` and `task_type`
- RLS enabled with full authenticated access policy

**Files Created:**
- `app/tasks/layout.tsx` — Re-exports clients layout (same pattern as daily-standup/delivery-logs)

```text
    75→const frequencyBadge = (freq: string) => {

    77→    case 'one-time': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
    78→    case 'daily': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';
    79→    case 'weekly': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800';
    80→    case 'monthly': return 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800';
    81→    case 'recurring': return 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800';
    82→    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
    83→  }
    84→};
    85→
    86→const typeBadge = (type: string) => {
    87→  switch (type) {
    88→    case 'Admin & Operations': return 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-700';
    89→    case 'Finance & Invoicing': return 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800';
    90→    case 'General': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
    91→    case 'Tech & Tools': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';
    92→    case 'Marketing & Sales': return 'bg-pink-100 text-pink-800';
    93→    case 'Client SOP': return 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-800';
    94→    case 'Client Delivery': return 'bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-800';
    95→    case 'Performance Review': return 'bg-violet-100 text-violet-800';
    96→    case 'Research & Analytics': return 'bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800';
    97→    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
    98→  }
    99→};
   100→
   101→const getDueDateColor = (dueDate: string | null) => {
   102→  if (!dueDate) return '';
   103→  const today = new Date();
   104→  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
   105→  const due = new Date(dueDate + 'T00:00:00');
   106→  const diffDays = Math.ceil((due.getTime() - today.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   107→  if (diffDays < 0) return 'text-red-600 font-semibold';
   108→  if (diffDays <= 3) return 'text-amber-600 font-semibold';
   109→  return 'text-gray-600';
   110→};
   111→
   112→export default function TasksPage() {
   113→  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();
   114→  const { toast } = useToast();
   115→
   116→  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<Task[]>([]);
   117→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
   118→  const [teamMembers, setTeamMembers] = useState<TeamMember[]>([]);
   119→  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<string>('one-time');
   120→  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
   121→
   122→  // Form state
   123→  const [isFormOpen, setIsFormOpen] = useState(false);
   124→  const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
   125→  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
   126→  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
   127→  const [form, setForm] = useState({
   128→    task_name: '',
   129→    assigned_to: '' as string,
   130→    due_date: undefined as Date | undefined,
   131→    frequency: '' as string,
   132→    task_type: '' as string,
   133→    link: '',
   134→    latest_comment: '',
   135→  });
   136→
   137→  useEffect(() => {
   138→    fetchTasks();
   139→    UserService.getAllUsers().then((users) => {
   140→      setTeamMembers(
   141→        users
   142→          .filter(u => u.role !== 'client')
   143→          .map(u => ({ id: u.id, name: u.name || u.email, email: u.email, role: u.role }))
   144→      );
   145→    });
   146→  }, []);
   147→
   148→  const fetchTasks = async () => {
   149→    setLoading(true);
   150→    const { data } = await supabase
   151→      .from('tasks')
   152→      .select('*')
   153→      .order('sort_order', { ascending: true })
   154→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   155→    setTasks(data || []);
   156→    setLoading(false);
   157→  };
   158→
   159→  // Tab counts
   160→  const oneTimeCount = useMemo(() =>
   161→    tasks.filter(t => t.frequency === 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP').length,
   162→    [tasks]
   163→  );
   164→  const recurringCount = useMemo(() =>
   165→    tasks.filter(t => t.frequency !== 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP').length,
   166→    [tasks]
   167→  );
   168→  const clientSopCount = useMemo(() =>
   169→    tasks.filter(t => t.task_type === 'Client SOP').length,
   170→    [tasks]
   171→  );
   172→
   173→  // Filter tasks by tab + search
   174→  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
   175→    let tabFiltered: Task[];
   176→    if (activeTab === 'one-time') {
   177→      tabFiltered = tasks.filter(t => t.frequency === 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP');
   178→    } else if (activeTab === 'recurring') {
   179→      tabFiltered = tasks.filter(t => t.frequency !== 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP');
   180→    } else {
   181→      tabFiltered = tasks.filter(t => t.task_type === 'Client SOP');
   182→    }
   183→
   184→    if (!searchTerm) return tabFiltered.sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
   185→
   186→    const term = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
   187→    return tabFiltered.filter(t =>
   188→      t.task_name.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
   189→      (t.assigned_to_name && t.assigned_to_name.toLowerCase().includes(term)) ||
   190→      (t.latest_comment && t.latest_comment.toLowerCase().includes(term)) ||
   191→      t.task_type.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
   192→      (t.created_by_name && t.created_by_name.toLowerCase().includes(term))
   193→    ).sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
   194→  }, [tasks, activeTab, searchTerm]);
   195→
   196→  const openForm = (task?: Task) => {
   197→    if (task) {
   198→      setEditingId(task.id);
   199→      setForm({
   200→        task_name: task.task_name,
   201→        assigned_to: task.assigned_to || '',
   202→        due_date: task.due_date ? new Date(task.due_date + 'T00:00:00') : undefined,
   203→        frequency: task.frequency,
   204→        task_type: task.task_type,
   205→        link: task.link || '',
   206→        latest_comment: task.latest_comment || '',
   207→      });
   208→    } else {
   209→      setEditingId(null);
   210→      setForm({
   211→        task_name: '',
   212→        assigned_to: '',
   213→        due_date: undefined,
   214→        frequency: '',
   215→        task_type: '',
   216→        link: '',
   217→        latest_comment: '',
   218→      });
   219→    }
   220→    setIsFormOpen(true);
   221→  };
   222→
   223→  const handleSubmit = async () => {
   224→    if (!form.task_name.trim() || !form.frequency || !form.task_type) return;
   225→    if (!user?.id || !userProfile) return;
   226→
   227→    setSubmitting(true);
   228→    try {
   229→      const assignedMember = teamMembers.find(m => m.id === form.assigned_to);
   230→      const payload = {
   231→        task_name: form.task_name.trim(),
   232→        assigned_to: form.assigned_to || null,
   233→        assigned_to_name: assignedMember?.name || null,
   234→        due_date: form.due_date ? form.due_date.toISOString().split('T')[0] : null,
   235→        frequency: form.frequency,
   236→        task_type: form.task_type,
   237→        link: form.link.trim() || null,
   238→        latest_comment: form.latest_comment.trim() || null,
   239→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   240→      };
   241→
   242→      if (editingId) {
   243→        const { error } = await supabase
   244→          .from('tasks')
   245→          .update(payload)
   246→          .eq('id', editingId);
   247→        if (error) throw error;
   248→        toast({ title: 'Updated', description: 'Task updated successfully.' });
   249→      } else {
   250→        const { error } = await supabase
   251→          .from('tasks')
   252→          .insert({
   253→            ...payload,
   254→            created_by: user.id,
   255→            created_by_name: userProfile.name || userProfile.email || 'Unknown',
   256→          });
   257→        if (error) throw error;
   258→        toast({ title: 'Created', description: 'Task created successfully.' });
   259→      }
   260→
   261→      setIsFormOpen(false);
   262→      setEditingId(null);
   263→      setForm({ task_name: '', assigned_to: '', due_date: undefined, frequency: '', task_type: '', link: '', latest_comment: '' });
   264→      await fetchTasks();
   265→    } catch (err) {
   266→      console.error('Error saving task:', err);
   267→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to save task.', variant: 'destructive' });
   268→    } finally {
   269→      setSubmitting(false);
   270→    }
   271→  };
   272→
   273→  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
   274→    setDeletingId(null);
   275→    setTasks(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id));
   276→    try {
   277→      await supabase.from('tasks').delete().eq('id', id);
   278→    } catch (error) {
   279→      console.error('Error deleting:', error);
   280→      await fetchTasks();
   281→    }
   282→  };
   283→
   284→  const handleReorder = async (taskId: string, direction: 'up' | 'down') => {
   285→    const sorted = [...filtered].sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
   286→    const idx = sorted.findIndex(t => t.id === taskId);
   287→    const swapIdx = direction === 'up' ? idx - 1 : idx + 1;
   288→    if (swapIdx < 0 || swapIdx >= sorted.length) return;
   289→
   290→    const current = sorted[idx];
   291→    const swap = sorted[swapIdx];
   292→
   293→    const currentOrder = current.sort_order;
   294→    const swapOrder = swap.sort_order;
   295→    const newCurrentOrder = currentOrder === swapOrder
   296→      ? (direction === 'up' ? swapOrder - 1 : swapOrder + 1)
   297→      : swapOrder;
   298→    const newSwapOrder = currentOrder === swapOrder
   299→      ? currentOrder
   300→      : currentOrder;
   301→
   302→    setTasks(prev => prev.map(t => {
   303→      if (t.id === current.id) return { ...t, sort_order: newCurrentOrder };
   304→      if (t.id === swap.id) return { ...t, sort_order: newSwapOrder };
   305→      return t;
   306→    }));
   307→
   308→    try {
   309→      await Promise.all([
   310→        supabase.from('tasks').update({ sort_order: newCurrentOrder }).eq('id', current.id),
   311→        supabase.from('tasks').update({ sort_order: newSwapOrder }).eq('id', swap.id),
   312→      ]);
   313→    } catch (error) {
   314→      console.error('Error reordering:', error);
   315→      await fetchTasks();
   316→    }
   317→  };
   318→
   319→  const formatDate = (dateStr: string) => {
   320→    return new Date(dateStr + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' });
   321→  };
   322→
   323→  return (
   324→    <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] w-full bg-gray-50">
   325→      <div className="w-full">
   326→        <div className="space-y-4">
   327→          {/* Header */}
   328→          <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6">
   329→            <div className="pb-5 border-b border-gray-100 flex flex-row items-center justify-between">
   330→              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   331→                <div className="bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-lg">
   332→                  <ListTodo className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-600" />
   333→                </div>
   334→                <div>
   335→                  <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Tasks</h2>
   336→                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Manage team tasks, SOPs, and recurring work</p>
   337→                </div>
   338→              </div>
   339→              <Button
   340→                className="hover:opacity-90"
   341→                style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   342→                onClick={() => openForm()}
   343→              >
   344→                <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
   345→                Add Task
   346→              </Button>
   347→            </div>
   348→
   349→            {/* Tabs */}
   350→            <div className="pt-4">
   351→              {loading ? (
   352→                <div className="flex gap-2">
   353→                  {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-9 w-28 rounded" />)}
   354→                </div>
   355→              ) : (
   356→                <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={setActiveTab}>
   357→                  <TabsList className="bg-gray-100 p-1 h-auto flex-wrap">
   358→                    <TabsTrigger
   359→                      value="one-time"
   360→                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
   361→                    >
   362→                      One-Time
   363→                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{oneTimeCount}</span>
   364→                    </TabsTrigger>
   365→                    <TabsTrigger
   366→                      value="recurring"
   367→                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
   368→                    >
   369→                      Recurring
   370→                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{recurringCount}</span>
   371→                    </TabsTrigger>
   372→                    <TabsTrigger
   373→                      value="client-sop"
   374→                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
   375→                    >
   376→                      Client SOP
   377→                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{clientSopCount}</span>
   378→                    </TabsTrigger>
   379→                  </TabsList>
   380→                </Tabs>
   381→              )}
   382→            </div>
   383→
   384→            {/* Search */}
   385→            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 pt-4">
   386→              <div className="relative flex-1 max-w-sm">
   387→                <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   388→                <Input
   389→                  placeholder="Search tasks, assignees, comments..."
   390→                  className="pl-10 auth-input"
   391→                  value={searchTerm}
   392→                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
   393→                />
   394→              </div>
   395→              {searchTerm && (
   396→                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setSearchTerm('')}>
   397→                  Clear
   398→                </Button>
   399→              )}
   400→            </div>
   401→
   402→            {/* Table */}
   403→            <div className="mt-5 -mx-6 -mb-6">
   404→              {loading ? (
   405→                <div className="p-6 space-y-3">
   406→                  {[1, 2, 3, 4].map((i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-12 w-full rounded" />)}
   407→                </div>
   408→              ) : filtered.length === 0 ? (
   409→                <div className="text-center py-16">
   410→                  <ClipboardList className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-3" />
   411→                  <p className="text-gray-500 font-medium">
   412→                    {tasks.length === 0 ? 'No tasks yet.' : 'No tasks match your filters.'}
   413→                  </p>
   414→                  {tasks.length === 0 && (
   415→                    <Button
   416→                      className="mt-4 hover:opacity-90"
   417→                      style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   418→                      onClick={() => openForm()}
   419→                    >
   420→                      <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Create Your First Task
   421→                    </Button>
   422→                  )}
   423→                </div>
   424→              ) : (
   425→                <div className="overflow-x-auto">
   426→                  <table className="w-full text-sm">
   427→                    <thead>
   428→                      <tr className="border-t border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/80">
   429→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider w-16"></th>
   430→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Task Name</th>
   431→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Assigned To</th>
   432→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Due Date</th>
   433→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Comment</th>
   434→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Frequency</th>
   435→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Type</th>
   436→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Link</th>
   437→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Created By</th>
   438→                        <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Created</th>
   439→                        <th className="text-right py-3 px-4 w-20"></th>
   440→                      </tr>
   441→                    </thead>
   442→                    <tbody>
   443→                      {filtered.map((task, idx) => (
   444→                        <tr key={task.id} className="border-b border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors group">
   445→                          {/* Reorder arrows */}
   446→                          <td className="py-3 px-4">
   447→                            <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
   448→                              <Button
   449→                                variant="ghost"
   450→                                size="sm"
   451→                                className="w-auto h-auto px-1 py-0 hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-30"
   452→                                onClick={() => handleReorder(task.id, 'up')}
   453→                                disabled={idx === 0}
   454→                              >
   455→                                <ChevronUp className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
   456→                              </Button>
   457→                              <Button
   458→                                variant="ghost"
   459→                                size="sm"
   460→                                className="w-auto h-auto px-1 py-0 hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-30"
   461→                                onClick={() => handleReorder(task.id, 'down')}
   462→                                disabled={idx === filtered.length - 1}
   463→                              >
   464→                                <ChevronDown className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
   465→                              </Button>
   466→                            </div>
   467→                          </td>
   468→                          {/* Task Name */}
   469→                          <td className="py-3 px-4 max-w-[250px]">
   470→                            <span className="text-gray-900 font-medium line-clamp-2">{task.task_name}</span>
   471→                          </td>
   472→                          {/* Assigned To */}
   473→                          <td className="py-3 px-4 whitespace-nowrap">
   474→                            <span className="text-gray-600">{task.assigned_to_name || '—'}</span>
   475→                          </td>
   476→                          {/* Due Date */}
   477→                          <td className="py-3 px-4 whitespace-nowrap">
   478→                            <span className={getDueDateColor(task.due_date)}>
   479→                              {task.due_date ? formatDate(task.due_date) : '—'}
   480→                            </span>
   481→                          </td>
   482→                          {/* Comment */}
   483→                          <td className="py-3 px-4 max-w-[200px]">
   484→                            <span className="text-gray-600 line-clamp-2 whitespace-pre-wrap">{task.latest_comment || '—'}</span>
   485→                          </td>
   486→                          {/* Frequency */}
   487→                          <td className="py-3 px-4">
   488→                            <span className={`inline-flex px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium ${frequencyBadge(task.frequency)}`}>
   489→                              {task.frequency}
   490→                            </span>
   491→                          </td>
   492→                          {/* Type */}
   493→                          <td className="py-3 px-4">
   494→                            <span className={`inline-flex px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium whitespace-nowrap ${typeBadge(task.task_type)}`}>
   495→                              {task.task_type}
   496→                            </span>
   497→                          </td>
   498→                          {/* Link */}
   499→                          <td className="py-3 px-4">
   500→                            {task.link ? (
   501→                              <a
   502→                                href={task.link}
   503→                                target="_blank"
   504→                                rel="noopener noreferrer"
   505→                                className="text-[#3e8692] hover:underline inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs"
   506→                              >
   507→                                <ExternalLink className="h-3 w-3" />
   508→                                Link
   509→                              </a>
   510→                            ) : (
   511→                              <span className="text-gray-400">—</span>
   512→                            )}
   513→                          </td>
   514→                          {/* Created By */}
   515→                          <td className="py-3 px-4 whitespace-nowrap">
   516→                            <span className="text-gray-600 text-xs">{task.created_by_name || '—'}</span>
   517→                          </td>
   518→                          {/* Created */}
   519→                          <td className="py-3 px-4 whitespace-nowrap">
   520→                            <span className="text-gray-500 text-xs">
   521→                              {new Date(task.created_at).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}
   522→                            </span>
   523→                          </td>
   524→                          {/* Actions */}
   525→                          <td className="py-3 px-4 text-right">
   526→                            <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
   527→                              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0 hover:bg-gray-200" onClick={() => openForm(task)}>
   528→                                <Edit className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
   529→                              </Button>
   530→                              <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0 hover:bg-red-50" onClick={() => setDeletingId(task.id)}>
   531→                                <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-500" />
   532→                              </Button>
   533→                            </div>
   534→                          </td>
   535→                        </tr>
   536→                      ))}
   537→                    </tbody>
   538→                  </table>
   539→                </div>
   540→              )}
   541→            </div>
   542→          </div>
   543→        </div>
   544→      </div>
   545→
   546→      {/* Add/Edit Dialog */}
   547→      <Dialog open={isFormOpen} onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) { setIsFormOpen(false); setEditingId(null); } }}>
   548→        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-[600px] max-h-[85vh] overflow-hidden">
   549→          <DialogHeader>
   550→            <DialogTitle>{editingId ? 'Edit Task' : 'Add Task'}</DialogTitle>
   551→            <DialogDescription>
   552→              {editingId ? 'Update the task details below.' : 'Create a new task for the team.'}
   553→            </DialogDescription>
   554→          </DialogHeader>
   555→          <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[60vh] overflow-y-auto px-1 pb-4">
   556→            {/* Task Name */}
   557→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   558→              <Label>Task Name <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   559→              <Input
   560→                value={form.task_name}
   561→                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, task_name: e.target.value })}
   562→                placeholder="Enter task name"
   563→                className="auth-input"
   564→              />
   565→            </div>
   566→
   567→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   568→              {/* Assigned To */}
   569→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   570→                <Label>Assigned To</Label>
   571→                <Select value={form.assigned_to} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, assigned_to: v })}>
   572→                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select team member" /></SelectTrigger>
   573→                  <SelectContent>
   574→                    {teamMembers.map((m) => <SelectItem key={m.id} value={m.id}>{m.name}</SelectItem>)}
   575→                  </SelectContent>
   576→                </Select>
   577→              </div>
   578→
   579→              {/* Due Date */}
   580→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   581→                <Label>Due Date</Label>
   582→                <Popover>
   583→                  <PopoverTrigger asChild>
   584→                    <Button
   585→                      variant="outline"
   586→                      className="auth-input justify-start text-left font-normal"
   587→                      style={{ borderColor: '#e5e7eb', backgroundColor: 'white', color: form.due_date ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af' }}
   588→                    >
   589→                      <CalendarIcon className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
   590→                      {form.due_date ? form.due_date.toLocaleDateString() : 'Select date'}
   591→                    </Button>
   592→                  </PopoverTrigger>
   593→                  <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
   594→                    <Calendar
   595→                      mode="single"
   596→                      selected={form.due_date}
   597→                      onSelect={(date) => setForm({ ...form, due_date: date || undefined })}
   598→                      initialFocus
   599→                      classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
   600→                      modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
   601→                    />
   602→                  </PopoverContent>
   603→                </Popover>
   604→              </div>
   605→            </div>
   606→
   607→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   608→              {/* Frequency */}
   609→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   610→                <Label>Frequency <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   611→                <Select value={form.frequency} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, frequency: v })}>
   612→                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select frequency" /></SelectTrigger>
   613→                  <SelectContent>
   614→                    {FREQUENCIES.map((f) => <SelectItem key={f} value={f}>{FREQUENCY_LABELS[f]}</SelectItem>)}
   615→                  </SelectContent>
   616→                </Select>
   617→              </div>
   618→
   619→              {/* Task Type */}
   620→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   621→                <Label>Task Type <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   622→                <Select value={form.task_type} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, task_type: v })}>
   623→                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select type" /></SelectTrigger>
   624→                  <SelectContent>
   625→                    {TASK_TYPES.map((t) => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
   626→                  </SelectContent>
   627→                </Select>
   628→              </div>
   629→            </div>
   630→
   631→            {/* Link */}
   632→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   633→              <Label>Link</Label>
   634→              <Input
   635→                value={form.link}
   636→                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, link: e.target.value })}
   637→                placeholder="https://..."
   638→                className="auth-input"
   639→              />
   640→            </div>
   641→
   642→            {/* Latest Comment */}
   643→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   644→              <Label>Latest Comment</Label>
   645→              <Textarea
   646→                value={form.latest_comment}
   647→                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, latest_comment: e.target.value })}
   648→                placeholder="Add a comment or note..."
   649→                className="auth-input"
   650→                rows={3}
   651→              />
   652→            </div>
   653→          </div>
   654→          <DialogFooter>
   655→            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => { setIsFormOpen(false); setEditingId(null); }}>Cancel</Button>
   656→            <Button
   657→              className="hover:opacity-90"
   658→              style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   659→              onClick={handleSubmit}
   660→              disabled={!form.task_name.trim() || !form.frequency || !form.task_type || submitting}
   661→            >
   662→              {submitting ? (
   663→                <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-4 w-4 border-b-2 border-white" />
   664→              ) : editingId ? 'Save Changes' : 'Add Task'}
   665→            </Button>
   666→          </DialogFooter>
   667→        </DialogContent>
   668→      </Dialog>
   669→
   670→      {/* Delete Confirmation */}
   671→      <Dialog open={!!deletingId} onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) setDeletingId(null); }}>
   672→        <DialogContent className="max-w-md">
   673→          <DialogHeader>
   674→            <DialogTitle>Delete Task</DialogTitle>
   675→            <DialogDescription>Are you sure you want to delete this task? This action cannot be undone.</DialogDescription>
   676→          </DialogHeader>
   677→          <DialogFooter>
   678→            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setDeletingId(null)}>Cancel</Button>
   679→            <Button variant="destructive" onClick={() => deletingId && handleDelete(deletingId)}>Delete</Button>
   680→          </DialogFooter>
   681→        </DialogContent>
   682→      </Dialog>
   683→    </div>
   684→  );
   685→}
   686→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
  1300→              isOver ? 'bg-blue-50 border-blue-300' : ''
  1301→            }`}
```

Now I understand the pipeline pattern. It groups items by stage (or in our case, by assigned user) and renders each group as a separate collapsible section with its own table. Each section has a colored header with the name and count badge.

Now I need to make three changes to the tasks page:
1. Capitalize frequency in the table - use `FREQUENCY_LABELS[task.frequency]` instead of `task.frequency`
2. Fix due date offset - the issue is `form.due_date.toISOString().split('T')[0]` which converts to UTC and can shift the date. I need to use a local date format instead.


3. Group tasks by assigned user in separate tables like the pipeline page.

Let me implement all three changes now.
