```text
     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
     4→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
     5→import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
     6→import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
     7→import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
     8→import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
     9→import { Calendar } from '@/components/ui/calendar';
    10→import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from '@/components/ui/popover';
    11→import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
    12→import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
    13→import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
    14→import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
    15→import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
    16→import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase';
    17→import { UserService } from '@/lib/userService';
    18→import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
    19→import {
    20→  Plus,
    21→  ListTodo,
    22→  Search,
    23→  Trash2,
    24→  Edit,
    25→  Calendar as CalendarIcon,
    26→  ChevronUp,
    27→  ChevronDown,
    28→  ChevronRight,
    29→  ExternalLink,
    30→  ClipboardList,
    31→} from 'lucide-react';
    32→
    33→type Task = {
    34→  id: string;
    35→  task_name: string;
    36→  assigned_to: string | null;
    37→  assigned_to_name: string | null;
    38→  due_date: string | null;
    39→  latest_comment: string | null;
    40→  frequency: string;
    41→  task_type: string;
    42→  link: string | null;
    43→  created_by: string | null;
    44→  created_by_name: string | null;
    45→  sort_order: number;
    46→  created_at: string;
    47→  updated_at: string;
    48→};
    49→
    50→type TeamMember = {
    51→  id: string;
    52→  name: string;
    53→  email: string;
    54→  role: string;
    55→};
    56→
    57→const FREQUENCIES = ['one-time', 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'recurring'] as const;
    58→const FREQUENCY_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
    59→  'one-time': 'One-Time',
    60→  'daily': 'Daily',
    61→  'weekly': 'Weekly',
    62→  'monthly': 'Monthly',
    63→  'recurring': 'Recurring',
    64→};
    65→const TASK_TYPES = [
    66→  'Admin & Operations',
    67→  'Finance & Invoicing',
    68→  'General',
    69→  'Tech & Tools',
    70→  'Marketing & Sales',
    71→  'Client SOP',
    72→  'Client Delivery',
    73→  'Performance Review',
    74→  'Research & Analytics',
    75→] as const;
    76→
    77→const frequencyBadge = (freq: string) => {
    78→  switch (freq) {
    79→    case 'one-time': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
    80→    case 'daily': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';
    81→    case 'weekly': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800';
    82→    case 'monthly': return 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800';
    83→    case 'recurring': return 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800';
    84→    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
    85→  }
    86→};
    87→
    88→const typeBadge = (type: string) => {
    89→  switch (type) {
    90→    case 'Admin & Operations': return 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-700';
    91→    case 'Finance & Invoicing': return 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800';
    92→    case 'General': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
    93→    case 'Tech & Tools': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';
    94→    case 'Marketing & Sales': return 'bg-pink-100 text-pink-800';
    95→    case 'Client SOP': return 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-800';
    96→    case 'Client Delivery': return 'bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-800';
    97→    case 'Performance Review': return 'bg-violet-100 text-violet-800';
    98→    case 'Research & Analytics': return 'bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800';
    99→    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
   100→  }
   101→};
   102→
   103→const getDueDateColor = (dueDate: string | null) => {
   104→  if (!dueDate) return '';
   105→  const today = new Date();
   106→  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
   107→  const due = new Date(dueDate + 'T00:00:00');
   108→  const diffDays = Math.ceil((due.getTime() - today.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   109→  if (diffDays < 0) return 'text-red-600 font-semibold';
   110→  if (diffDays <= 3) return 'text-amber-600 font-semibold';
   111→  return 'text-gray-600';
   112→};
   113→
   114→/** Format a Date to YYYY-MM-DD in local timezone (avoids UTC offset issues) */
   115→const toLocalDateString = (date: Date) => {
   116→  const year = date.getFullYear();
   117→  const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
   118→  const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
   119→  return `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
   120→};
   121→
   122→export default function TasksPage() {
   123→  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();
   124→  const { toast } = useToast();
   125→
   126→  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<Task[]>([]);
   127→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
   128→  const [teamMembers, setTeamMembers] = useState<TeamMember[]>([]);
   129→  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<string>('one-time');
   130→  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
   131→  const [collapsedUsers, setCollapsedUsers] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
   132→
   133→  // Form state
   134→  const [isFormOpen, setIsFormOpen] = useState(false);
   135→  const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
   136→  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
   137→  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
   138→  const [form, setForm] = useState({
   139→    task_name: '',
   140→    assigned_to: '' as string,
   141→    due_date: undefined as Date | undefined,
   142→    frequency: '' as string,
   143→    task_type: '' as string,
   144→    link: '',
   145→    latest_comment: '',
   146→  });
   147→
   148→  useEffect(() => {
   149→    fetchTasks();
   150→    UserService.getAllUsers().then((users) => {
   151→      setTeamMembers(
   152→        users
   153→          .filter(u => u.role !== 'client')
   154→          .map(u => ({ id: u.id, name: u.name || u.email, email: u.email, role: u.role }))
   155→      );
   156→    });
   157→  }, []);
   158→
   159→  const fetchTasks = async () => {
   160→    setLoading(true);
   161→    const { data } = await supabase
   162→      .from('tasks')
   163→      .select('*')
   164→      .order('sort_order', { ascending: true })
   165→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   166→    setTasks(data || []);
   167→    setLoading(false);
   168→  };
   169→
   170→  // Tab counts
   171→  const oneTimeCount = useMemo(() =>
   172→    tasks.filter(t => t.frequency === 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP').length,
   173→    [tasks]
   174→  );
   175→  const recurringCount = useMemo(() =>
   176→    tasks.filter(t => t.frequency !== 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP').length,
   177→    [tasks]
   178→  );
   179→  const clientSopCount = useMemo(() =>
   180→    tasks.filter(t => t.task_type === 'Client SOP').length,
   181→    [tasks]
   182→  );
   183→
   184→  // Filter tasks by tab + search
   185→  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
   186→    let tabFiltered: Task[];
   187→    if (activeTab === 'one-time') {
   188→      tabFiltered = tasks.filter(t => t.frequency === 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP');
   189→    } else if (activeTab === 'recurring') {
   190→      tabFiltered = tasks.filter(t => t.frequency !== 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP');
   191→    } else {
   192→      tabFiltered = tasks.filter(t => t.task_type === 'Client SOP');
   193→    }
   194→
   195→    if (!searchTerm) return tabFiltered.sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
   196→
   197→    const term = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
   198→    return tabFiltered.filter(t =>
   199→      t.task_name.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
   200→      (t.assigned_to_name && t.assigned_to_name.toLowerCase().includes(term)) ||
   201→      (t.latest_comment && t.latest_comment.toLowerCase().includes(term)) ||
   202→      t.task_type.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
   203→      (t.created_by_name && t.created_by_name.toLowerCase().includes(term))
   204→    ).sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
   205→  }, [tasks, activeTab, searchTerm]);
   206→
   207→  // Group filtered tasks by assigned_to_name
   208→  const groupedByUser = useMemo(() => {
   209→    const groups: { key: string; label: string; tasks: Task[] }[] = [];
   210→    const map = new Map<string, Task[]>();
   211→
   212→    for (const task of filtered) {
   213→      const key = task.assigned_to || '_unassigned';
   214→      if (!map.has(key)) map.set(key, []);
   215→      map.get(key)!.push(task);
   216→    }
   217→
   218→    // Sort groups: assigned users first (alphabetical by name), unassigned last
   219→    const sortedKeys = Array.from(map.keys()).sort((a, b) => {
   220→      if (a === '_unassigned') return 1;
   221→      if (b === '_unassigned') return -1;
   222→      const nameA = map.get(a)![0].assigned_to_name || '';
   223→      const nameB = map.get(b)![0].assigned_to_name || '';
   224→      return nameA.localeCompare(nameB);
   225→    });
   226→
   227→    for (const key of sortedKeys) {
   228→      const tasks = map.get(key)!;
   229→      const label = key === '_unassigned' ? 'Unassigned' : (tasks[0].assigned_to_name || 'Unknown');
   230→      groups.push({ key, label, tasks });
   231→    }
   232→
   233→    return groups;
   234→  }, [filtered]);
   235→
   236→  const toggleUserCollapse = (key: string) => {
   237→    setCollapsedUsers(prev => {
   238→      const newSet = new Set(prev);
   239→      if (newSet.has(key)) {
   240→        newSet.delete(key);
   241→      } else {
   242→        newSet.add(key);
   243→      }
   244→      return newSet;
   245→    });
   246→  };
   247→
   248→  const openForm = (task?: Task) => {
   249→    if (task) {
   250→      setEditingId(task.id);
   251→      setForm({
   252→        task_name: task.task_name,
   253→        assigned_to: task.assigned_to || '',
   254→        due_date: task.due_date ? new Date(task.due_date + 'T00:00:00') : undefined,
   255→        frequency: task.frequency,
   256→        task_type: task.task_type,
   257→        link: task.link || '',
   258→        latest_comment: task.latest_comment || '',
   259→      });
   260→    } else {
   261→      setEditingId(null);
   262→      setForm({
   263→        task_name: '',
   264→        assigned_to: '',
   265→        due_date: undefined,
   266→        frequency: '',
   267→        task_type: '',
   268→        link: '',
   269→        latest_comment: '',
   270→      });
   271→    }
   272→    setIsFormOpen(true);
   273→  };
   274→
   275→  const handleSubmit = async () => {
   276→    if (!form.task_name.trim() || !form.frequency || !form.task_type) return;
   277→    if (!user?.id || !userProfile) return;
   278→
   279→    setSubmitting(true);
   280→    try {
   281→      const assignedMember = teamMembers.find(m => m.id === form.assigned_to);
   282→      const payload = {
   283→        task_name: form.task_name.trim(),
   284→        assigned_to: form.assigned_to || null,
   285→        assigned_to_name: assignedMember?.name || null,
   286→        due_date: form.due_date ? toLocalDateString(form.due_date) : null,
   287→        frequency: form.frequency,
   288→        task_type: form.task_type,
   289→        link: form.link.trim() || null,
   290→        latest_comment: form.latest_comment.trim() || null,
   291→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   292→      };
   293→
   294→      if (editingId) {
   295→        const { error } = await supabase
   296→          .from('tasks')
   297→          .update(payload)
   298→          .eq('id', editingId);
   299→        if (error) throw error;
   300→        toast({ title: 'Updated', description: 'Task updated successfully.' });
   301→      } else {
   302→        const { error } = await supabase
   303→          .from('tasks')
   304→          .insert({
   305→            ...payload,
   306→            created_by: user.id,
   307→            created_by_name: userProfile.name || userProfile.email || 'Unknown',
   308→          });
   309→        if (error) throw error;
   310→        toast({ title: 'Created', description: 'Task created successfully.' });
   311→      }
   312→
   313→      setIsFormOpen(false);
   314→      setEditingId(null);
   315→      setForm({ task_name: '', assigned_to: '', due_date: undefined, frequency: '', task_type: '', link: '', latest_comment: '' });
   316→      await fetchTasks();
   317→    } catch (err) {
   318→      console.error('Error saving task:', err);
   319→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to save task.', variant: 'destructive' });
   320→    } finally {
   321→      setSubmitting(false);
   322→    }
   323→  };
   324→
   325→  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
   326→    setDeletingId(null);
   327→    setTasks(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id));
   328→    try {
   329→      await supabase.from('tasks').delete().eq('id', id);
   330→    } catch (error) {
   331→      console.error('Error deleting:', error);
   332→      await fetchTasks();
   333→    }
   334→  };
   335→
   336→  const handleReorder = async (taskId: string, direction: 'up' | 'down', groupTasks: Task[]) => {
   337→    const sorted = [...groupTasks].sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
   338→    const idx = sorted.findIndex(t => t.id === taskId);
   339→    const swapIdx = direction === 'up' ? idx - 1 : idx + 1;
   340→    if (swapIdx < 0 || swapIdx >= sorted.length) return;
   341→
   342→    const current = sorted[idx];
   343→    const swap = sorted[swapIdx];
   344→
   345→    const currentOrder = current.sort_order;
   346→    const swapOrder = swap.sort_order;
   347→    const newCurrentOrder = currentOrder === swapOrder
   348→      ? (direction === 'up' ? swapOrder - 1 : swapOrder + 1)
   349→      : swapOrder;
   350→    const newSwapOrder = currentOrder === swapOrder
   351→      ? currentOrder
   352→      : currentOrder;
   353→
   354→    setTasks(prev => prev.map(t => {
   355→      if (t.id === current.id) return { ...t, sort_order: newCurrentOrder };
   356→      if (t.id === swap.id) return { ...t, sort_order: newSwapOrder };
   357→      return t;
   358→    }));
   359→
   360→    try {
   361→      await Promise.all([
   362→        supabase.from('tasks').update({ sort_order: newCurrentOrder }).eq('id', current.id),
   363→        supabase.from('tasks').update({ sort_order: newSwapOrder }).eq('id', swap.id),
   364→      ]);
   365→    } catch (error) {
   366→      console.error('Error reordering:', error);
   367→      await fetchTasks();
   368→    }
   369→  };
   370→
   371→  const formatDate = (dateStr: string) => {
   372→    return new Date(dateStr + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' });
   373→  };
   374→
   375→  const userColors = [
   376→    { bg: 'bg-blue-50', text: 'text-blue-700', border: 'border-blue-200', solid: 'bg-blue-500' },
   377→    { bg: 'bg-emerald-50', text: 'text-emerald-700', border: 'border-emerald-200', solid: 'bg-emerald-500' },
   378→    { bg: 'bg-purple-50', text: 'text-purple-700', border: 'border-purple-200', solid: 'bg-purple-500' },
   379→    { bg: 'bg-amber-50', text: 'text-amber-700', border: 'border-amber-200', solid: 'bg-amber-500' },
   380→    { bg: 'bg-cyan-50', text: 'text-cyan-700', border: 'border-cyan-200', solid: 'bg-cyan-500' },
   381→    { bg: 'bg-pink-50', text: 'text-pink-700', border: 'border-pink-200', solid: 'bg-pink-500' },
   382→    { bg: 'bg-indigo-50', text: 'text-indigo-700', border: 'border-indigo-200', solid: 'bg-indigo-500' },
   383→    { bg: 'bg-orange-50', text: 'text-orange-700', border: 'border-orange-200', solid: 'bg-orange-500' },
   384→    { bg: 'bg-teal-50', text: 'text-teal-700', border: 'border-teal-200', solid: 'bg-teal-500' },
   385→    { bg: 'bg-slate-50', text: 'text-slate-600', border: 'border-slate-200', solid: 'bg-slate-400' },
   386→  ];
   387→
   388→  const getColorForIndex = (idx: number) => userColors[idx % userColors.length];
   389→
   390→  const renderTaskTable = (groupTasks: Task[]) => {
   391→    const sorted = [...groupTasks].sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
   392→    return (
   393→      <table className="w-full text-sm">
   394→        <thead>
   395→          <tr className="border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/80">
   396→            <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider w-16"></th>
   397→            <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Task Name</th>
   398→            <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Due Date</th>
   399→            <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Comment</th>
   400→            <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Frequency</th>
   401→            <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Type</th>
   402→            <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider">Link</th>
   403→            <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Created By</th>
   404→            <th className="text-left py-3 px-4 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider whitespace-nowrap">Created</th>
   405→            <th className="text-right py-3 px-4 w-20"></th>
   406→          </tr>
   407→        </thead>
   408→        <tbody>
   409→          {sorted.map((task, idx) => (
   410→            <tr key={task.id} className="border-b border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors group">
   411→              {/* Reorder arrows */}
   412→              <td className="py-3 px-4">
   413→                <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
   414→                  <Button
   415→                    variant="ghost"
   416→                    size="sm"
   417→                    className="w-auto h-auto px-1 py-0 hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-30"
   418→                    onClick={() => handleReorder(task.id, 'up', groupTasks)}
   419→                    disabled={idx === 0}
   420→                  >
   421→                    <ChevronUp className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
   422→                  </Button>
   423→                  <Button
   424→                    variant="ghost"
   425→                    size="sm"
   426→                    className="w-auto h-auto px-1 py-0 hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-30"
   427→                    onClick={() => handleReorder(task.id, 'down', groupTasks)}
   428→                    disabled={idx === sorted.length - 1}
   429→                  >
   430→                    <ChevronDown className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
   431→                  </Button>
   432→                </div>
   433→              </td>
   434→              {/* Task Name */}
   435→              <td className="py-3 px-4 max-w-[250px]">
   436→                <span className="text-gray-900 font-medium line-clamp-2">{task.task_name}</span>
   437→              </td>
   438→              {/* Due Date */}
   439→              <td className="py-3 px-4 whitespace-nowrap">
   440→                <span className={getDueDateColor(task.due_date)}>
   441→                  {task.due_date ? formatDate(task.due_date) : '—'}
   442→                </span>
   443→              </td>
   444→              {/* Comment */}
   445→              <td className="py-3 px-4 max-w-[200px]">
   446→                <span className="text-gray-600 line-clamp-2 whitespace-pre-wrap">{task.latest_comment || '—'}</span>
   447→              </td>
   448→              {/* Frequency */}
   449→              <td className="py-3 px-4">
   450→                <span className={`inline-flex px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium ${frequencyBadge(task.frequency)}`}>
   451→                  {FREQUENCY_LABELS[task.frequency] || task.frequency}
   452→                </span>
   453→              </td>
   454→              {/* Type */}
   455→              <td className="py-3 px-4">
   456→                <span className={`inline-flex px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium whitespace-nowrap ${typeBadge(task.task_type)}`}>
   457→                  {task.task_type}
   458→                </span>
   459→              </td>
   460→              {/* Link */}
   461→              <td className="py-3 px-4">
   462→                {task.link ? (
   463→                  <a
   464→                    href={task.link}
   465→                    target="_blank"
   466→                    rel="noopener noreferrer"
   467→                    className="text-[#3e8692] hover:underline inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs"
   468→                  >
   469→                    <ExternalLink className="h-3 w-3" />
   470→                    Link
   471→                  </a>
   472→                ) : (
   473→                  <span className="text-gray-400">—</span>
   474→                )}
   475→              </td>
   476→              {/* Created By */}
   477→              <td className="py-3 px-4 whitespace-nowrap">
   478→                <span className="text-gray-600 text-xs">{task.created_by_name || '—'}</span>
   479→              </td>
   480→              {/* Created */}
   481→              <td className="py-3 px-4 whitespace-nowrap">
   482→                <span className="text-gray-500 text-xs">
   483→                  {new Date(task.created_at).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}
   484→                </span>
   485→              </td>
   486→              {/* Actions */}
   487→              <td className="py-3 px-4 text-right">
   488→                <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-1 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
   489→                  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0 hover:bg-gray-200" onClick={() => openForm(task)}>
   490→                    <Edit className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
   491→                  </Button>
   492→                  <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0 hover:bg-red-50" onClick={() => setDeletingId(task.id)}>
   493→                    <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-500" />
   494→                  </Button>
   495→                </div>
   496→              </td>
   497→            </tr>
   498→          ))}
   499→        </tbody>
   500→      </table>
   501→    );
   502→  };
   503→
   504→  return (
   505→    <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] w-full bg-gray-50">
   506→      <div className="w-full">
   507→        <div className="space-y-4">
   508→          {/* Header */}
   509→          <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6">
   510→            <div className="pb-5 border-b border-gray-100 flex flex-row items-center justify-between">
   511→              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   512→                <div className="bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-lg">
   513→                  <ListTodo className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-600" />
   514→                </div>
   515→                <div>
   516→                  <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Tasks</h2>
   517→                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Manage team tasks, SOPs, and recurring work</p>
   518→                </div>
   519→              </div>
   520→              <Button
   521→                className="hover:opacity-90"
   522→                style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   523→                onClick={() => openForm()}
   524→              >
   525→                <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
   526→                Add Task
   527→              </Button>
   528→            </div>
   529→
   530→            {/* Tabs */}
   531→            <div className="pt-4">
   532→              {loading ? (
   533→                <div className="flex gap-2">
   534→                  {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-9 w-28 rounded" />)}
   535→                </div>
   536→              ) : (
   537→                <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={setActiveTab}>
   538→                  <TabsList className="bg-gray-100 p-1 h-auto flex-wrap">
   539→                    <TabsTrigger
   540→                      value="one-time"
   541→                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
   542→                    >
   543→                      One-Time
   544→                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{oneTimeCount}</span>
   545→                    </TabsTrigger>
   546→                    <TabsTrigger
   547→                      value="recurring"
   548→                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
   549→                    >
   550→                      Recurring
   551→                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{recurringCount}</span>
   552→                    </TabsTrigger>
   553→                    <TabsTrigger
   554→                      value="client-sop"
   555→                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
   556→                    >
   557→                      Client SOP
   558→                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{clientSopCount}</span>
   559→                    </TabsTrigger>
   560→                  </TabsList>
   561→                </Tabs>
   562→              )}
   563→            </div>
   564→
   565→            {/* Search */}
   566→            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 pt-4">
   567→              <div className="relative flex-1 max-w-sm">
   568→                <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   569→                <Input
   570→                  placeholder="Search tasks, assignees, comments..."
   571→                  className="pl-10 auth-input"
   572→                  value={searchTerm}
   573→                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
   574→                />
   575→              </div>
   576→              {searchTerm && (
   577→                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setSearchTerm('')}>
   578→                  Clear
   579→                </Button>
   580→              )}
   581→            </div>
   582→          </div>
   583→
   584→          {/* Grouped Tables */}
   585→          {loading ? (
   586→            <div className="p-6 space-y-3">
   587→              {[1, 2, 3, 4].map((i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-12 w-full rounded" />)}
   588→            </div>
   589→          ) : filtered.length === 0 ? (
   590→            <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm">
   591→              <div className="text-center py-16">
   592→                <ClipboardList className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-3" />
   593→                <p className="text-gray-500 font-medium">
   594→                  {tasks.length === 0 ? 'No tasks yet.' : 'No tasks match your filters.'}
   595→                </p>
   596→                {tasks.length === 0 && (
   597→                  <Button
   598→                    className="mt-4 hover:opacity-90"
   599→                    style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   600→                    onClick={() => openForm()}
   601→                  >
   602→                    <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Create Your First Task
   603→                  </Button>
   604→                )}
   605→              </div>
   606→            </div>
   607→          ) : (
   608→            <div className="space-y-4">
   609→              {groupedByUser.map((group, groupIdx) => {
   610→                const isCollapsed = collapsedUsers.has(group.key);
   611→                const colors = group.key === '_unassigned'
   612→                  ? { bg: 'bg-slate-50', text: 'text-slate-600', border: 'border-slate-200', solid: 'bg-slate-400' }
   613→                  : getColorForIndex(groupIdx);
   614→
   615→                return (
   616→                  <div key={group.key}>
   617→                    {/* Group Header */}
   618→                    <div
   619→                      className={`flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 ${colors.bg} ${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} border ${colors.border} ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} cursor-pointer select-none transition-all`}
   620→                      onClick={() => toggleUserCollapse(group.key)}
   621→                    >
   622→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   623→                        {isCollapsed ? (
   624→                          <ChevronRight className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
   625→                        ) : (
   626→                          <ChevronDown className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
   627→                        )}
   628→                        <div className={`w-3 h-3 rounded-full ${colors.solid}`} />
   629→                        <h3 className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`}>{group.label}</h3>
   630→                        <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">
   631→                          {group.tasks.length}
   632→                        </Badge>
   633→                      </div>
   634→                    </div>
   635→
   636→                    {/* Group Table */}
   637→                    {!isCollapsed && (
   638→                      <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0 overflow-hidden">
   639→                        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
   640→                          {renderTaskTable(group.tasks)}
   641→                        </div>
   642→                      </div>
   643→                    )}
   644→                  </div>
   645→                );
   646→              })}
   647→            </div>
   648→          )}
   649→        </div>
   650→      </div>
   651→
   652→      {/* Add/Edit Dialog */}
   653→      <Dialog open={isFormOpen} onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) { setIsFormOpen(false); setEditingId(null); } }}>
   654→        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-[600px] max-h-[85vh] overflow-hidden">
   655→          <DialogHeader>
   656→            <DialogTitle>{editingId ? 'Edit Task' : 'Add Task'}</DialogTitle>
   657→            <DialogDescription>
   658→              {editingId ? 'Update the task details below.' : 'Create a new task for the team.'}
   659→            </DialogDescription>
   660→          </DialogHeader>
   661→          <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[60vh] overflow-y-auto px-1 pb-4">
   662→            {/* Task Name */}
   663→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   664→              <Label>Task Name <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   665→              <Input
   666→                value={form.task_name}
   667→                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, task_name: e.target.value })}
   668→                placeholder="Enter task name"
   669→                className="auth-input"
   670→              />
   671→            </div>
   672→
   673→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   674→              {/* Assigned To */}
   675→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   676→                <Label>Assigned To</Label>
   677→                <Select value={form.assigned_to} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, assigned_to: v })}>
   678→                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select team member" /></SelectTrigger>
   679→                  <SelectContent>
   680→                    {teamMembers.map((m) => <SelectItem key={m.id} value={m.id}>{m.name}</SelectItem>)}
   681→                  </SelectContent>
   682→                </Select>
   683→              </div>
   684→
   685→              {/* Due Date */}
   686→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   687→                <Label>Due Date</Label>
   688→                <Popover>
   689→                  <PopoverTrigger asChild>
   690→                    <Button
   691→                      variant="outline"
   692→                      className="auth-input justify-start text-left font-normal"
   693→                      style={{ borderColor: '#e5e7eb', backgroundColor: 'white', color: form.due_date ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af' }}
   694→                    >
   695→                      <CalendarIcon className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
   696→                      {form.due_date ? form.due_date.toLocaleDateString() : 'Select date'}
   697→                    </Button>
   698→                  </PopoverTrigger>
   699→                  <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
   700→                    <Calendar
   701→                      mode="single"
   702→                      selected={form.due_date}
   703→                      onSelect={(date) => setForm({ ...form, due_date: date || undefined })}
   704→                      initialFocus
   705→                      classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
   706→                      modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
   707→                    />
   708→                  </PopoverContent>
   709→                </Popover>
   710→              </div>
   711→            </div>
   712→
   713→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   714→              {/* Frequency */}
   715→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   716→                <Label>Frequency <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   717→                <Select value={form.frequency} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, frequency: v })}>
   718→                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select frequency" /></SelectTrigger>
   719→                  <SelectContent>
   720→                    {FREQUENCIES.map((f) => <SelectItem key={f} value={f}>{FREQUENCY_LABELS[f]}</SelectItem>)}
   721→                  </SelectContent>
   722→                </Select>
   723→              </div>
   724→
   725→              {/* Task Type */}
   726→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   727→                <Label>Task Type <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   728→                <Select value={form.task_type} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, task_type: v })}>
   729→                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select type" /></SelectTrigger>
   730→                  <SelectContent>
   731→                    {TASK_TYPES.map((t) => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
   732→                  </SelectContent>
   733→                </Select>
   734→              </div>
   735→            </div>
   736→
   737→            {/* Link */}
   738→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   739→              <Label>Link</Label>
   740→              <Input
   741→                value={form.link}
   742→                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, link: e.target.value })}
   743→                placeholder="https://..."
   744→                className="auth-input"
   745→              />
   746→            </div>
   747→
   748→            {/* Latest Comment */}
   749→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   750→              <Label>Latest Comment</Label>
   751→              <Textarea
   752→                value={form.latest_comment}
   753→                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, latest_comment: e.target.value })}
   754→                placeholder="Add a comment or note..."
   755→                className="auth-input"
   756→                rows={3}
   757→              />
   758→            </div>
   759→          </div>
   760→          <DialogFooter>
   761→            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => { setIsFormOpen(false); setEditingId(null); }}>Cancel</Button>
   762→            <Button
   763→              className="hover:opacity-90"
   764→              style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   765→              onClick={handleSubmit}
   766→              disabled={!form.task_name.trim() || !form.frequency || !form.task_type || submitting}
   767→            >
   768→              {submitting ? (
   769→                <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-4 w-4 border-b-2 border-white" />
   770→              ) : editingId ? 'Save Changes' : 'Add Task'}
   771→            </Button>
   772→          </DialogFooter>
   773→        </DialogContent>
   774→      </Dialog>
   775→
   776→      {/* Delete Confirmation */}
   777→      <Dialog open={!!deletingId} onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) setDeletingId(null); }}>
   778→        <DialogContent className="max-w-md">
   779→          <DialogHeader>
   780→            <DialogTitle>Delete Task</DialogTitle>
   781→            <DialogDescription>Are you sure you want to delete this task? This action cannot be undone.</DialogDescription>
   782→          </DialogHeader>
   783→          <DialogFooter>
   784→            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setDeletingId(null)}>Cancel</Button>
   785→            <Button variant="destructive" onClick={() => deletingId && handleDelete(deletingId)}>Delete</Button>
   786→          </DialogFooter>
   787→        </DialogContent>
   788→      </Dialog>
   789→    </div>
   790→  );
   791→}
   792→
```
</details></tool-use>

```tsx
'use client';

import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Calendar } from '@/components/ui/calendar';
import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from '@/components/ui/popover';
import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback } from '@/components/ui/avatar';
import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase';
import { UserService } from '@/lib/userService';
import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
import Image from 'next/image';
import {
  Plus,
  ListTodo,
  Search,
  Trash2,
  Edit,
  Calendar as CalendarIcon,
  ChevronUp,
  ChevronDown,
  ChevronRight,
  ExternalLink,
  ClipboardList,
  Expand,
  User,
} from 'lucide-react';

type Task = {
  id: string;
  task_name: string;
  assigned_to: string | null;
  assigned_to_name: string | null;
  due_date: string | null;
  latest_comment: string | null;
  frequency: string;
  task_type: string;
  link: string | null;
  created_by: string | null;
  created_by_name: string | null;
  sort_order: number;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
};

type TeamMember = {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  email: string;
  role: string;
  profile_photo_url: string | null;
};

type EditingCell = { taskId: string; field: string } | null;

const FREQUENCIES = ['one-time', 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'recurring'] as const;
const FREQUENCY_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
  'one-time': 'One-Time',
  'daily': 'Daily',
  'weekly': 'Weekly',
  'monthly': 'Monthly',
  'recurring': 'Recurring',
};
const TASK_TYPES = [
  'Admin & Operations',
  'Finance & Invoicing',
  'General',
  'Tech & Tools',
  'Marketing & Sales',
  'Client SOP',
  'Client Delivery',
  'Performance Review',
  'Research & Analytics',
] as const;

const frequencyBadge = (freq: string) => {
  switch (freq) {
    case 'one-time': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
    case 'daily': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';
    case 'weekly': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800';
    case 'monthly': return 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800';
    case 'recurring': return 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800';
    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
  }
};

const typeBadge = (type: string) => {
  switch (type) {
    case 'Admin & Operations': return 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-700';
    case 'Finance & Invoicing': return 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800';
    case 'General': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
    case 'Tech & Tools': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';
    case 'Marketing & Sales': return 'bg-pink-100 text-pink-800';
    case 'Client SOP': return 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-800';
    case 'Client Delivery': return 'bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-800';
    case 'Performance Review': return 'bg-violet-100 text-violet-800';
    case 'Research & Analytics': return 'bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800';
    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
  }
};

const getDueDateColor = (dueDate: string | null) => {
  if (!dueDate) return '';
  const today = new Date();
  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  const due = new Date(dueDate + 'T00:00:00');
  const diffDays = Math.ceil((due.getTime() - today.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
  if (diffDays < 0) return 'text-red-600 font-semibold';
  if (diffDays <= 3) return 'text-amber-600 font-semibold';
  return 'text-gray-600';
};

/** Format a Date to YYYY-MM-DD in local timezone (avoids UTC offset issues) */
const toLocalDateString = (date: Date) => {
  const year = date.getFullYear();
  const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
  const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
  return `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
};

// Fixed column widths for consistency across all tables
const COL = {
  reorder: 'w-[50px]',
  taskName: 'w-[22%] min-w-[180px]',
  dueDate: 'w-[110px]',
  comment: 'w-[20%] min-w-[140px]',
  frequency: 'w-[100px]',
  type: 'w-[140px]',
  link: 'w-[80px]',
  createdBy: 'w-[100px]',
  created: 'w-[80px]',
  actions: 'w-[80px]',
};

export default function TasksPage() {
  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();
  const { toast } = useToast();

  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<Task[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [teamMembers, setTeamMembers] = useState<TeamMember[]>([]);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<string>('one-time');
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [collapsedUsers, setCollapsedUsers] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());

  // Inline editing state
  const [editingCell, setEditingCell] = useState<EditingCell>(null);
  const [editingValue, setEditingValue] = useState<string>('');

  // Form state
  const [isFormOpen, setIsFormOpen] = useState(false);
  const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
  const [form, setForm] = useState({
    task_name: '',
    assigned_to: '' as string,
    due_date: undefined as Date | undefined,
    frequency: '' as string,
    task_type: '' as string,
    link: '',
    latest_comment: '',
  });

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchTasks();
    UserService.getAllUsers().then((users) => {
      setTeamMembers(
        users
          .filter(u => u.role !== 'client')
          .map(u => ({ id: u.id, name: u.name || u.email, email: u.email, role: u.role, profile_photo_url: u.profile_photo_url || null }))
      );
    });
  }, []);

  const fetchTasks = async () => {
    setLoading(true);
    const { data } = await supabase
      .from('tasks')
      .select('*')
      .order('sort_order', { ascending: true })
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
    setTasks(data || []);
    setLoading(false);
  };

  // Build a map of user id -> profile photo
  const userPhotoMap = useMemo(() => {
    const map: Record<string, string | null> = {};
    teamMembers.forEach(m => { map[m.id] = m.profile_photo_url; });
    return map;
  }, [teamMembers]);

  // Tab counts
  const oneTimeCount = useMemo(() =>
    tasks.filter(t => t.frequency === 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP').length,
    [tasks]
  );
  const recurringCount = useMemo(() =>
    tasks.filter(t => t.frequency !== 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP').length,
    [tasks]
  );
  const clientSopCount = useMemo(() =>
    tasks.filter(t => t.task_type === 'Client SOP').length,
    [tasks]
  );

  // Filter tasks by tab + search
  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
    let tabFiltered: Task[];
    if (activeTab === 'one-time') {
      tabFiltered = tasks.filter(t => t.frequency === 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP');
    } else if (activeTab === 'recurring') {
      tabFiltered = tasks.filter(t => t.frequency !== 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP');
    } else {
      tabFiltered = tasks.filter(t => t.task_type === 'Client SOP');
    }

    if (!searchTerm) return tabFiltered.sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);

    const term = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
    return tabFiltered.filter(t =>
      t.task_name.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
      (t.assigned_to_name && t.assigned_to_name.toLowerCase().includes(term)) ||
      (t.latest_comment && t.latest_comment.toLowerCase().includes(term)) ||
      t.task_type.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
      (t.created_by_name && t.created_by_name.toLowerCase().includes(term))
    ).sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
  }, [tasks, activeTab, searchTerm]);

  // Group filtered tasks by assigned_to
  const groupedByUser = useMemo(() => {
    const groups: { key: string; label: string; tasks: Task[] }[] = [];
    const map = new Map<string, Task[]>();

    for (const task of filtered) {
      const key = task.assigned_to || '_unassigned';
      if (!map.has(key)) map.set(key, []);
      map.get(key)!.push(task);
    }

    const sortedKeys = Array.from(map.keys()).sort((a, b) => {
      if (a === '_unassigned') return 1;
      if (b === '_unassigned') return -1;
      const nameA = map.get(a)![0].assigned_to_name || '';
      const nameB = map.get(b)![0].assigned_to_name || '';
      return nameA.localeCompare(nameB);
    });

    for (const key of sortedKeys) {
      const tasks = map.get(key)!;
      const label = key === '_unassigned' ? 'Unassigned' : (tasks[0].assigned_to_name || 'Unknown');
      groups.push({ key, label, tasks });
    }

    return groups;
  }, [filtered]);

  const toggleUserCollapse = (key: string) => {
    setCollapsedUsers(prev => {
      const newSet = new Set(prev);
      if (newSet.has(key)) newSet.delete(key);
      else newSet.add(key);
      return newSet;
    });
  };

  // --- Inline editing ---
  const startEditing = (taskId: string, field: string, currentValue: string) => {
    setEditingCell({ taskId, field });
    setEditingValue(currentValue);
  };

  const cancelEditing = () => {
    setEditingCell(null);
    setEditingValue('');
  };

  const saveInlineEdit = async () => {
    if (!editingCell) return;
    const { taskId, field } = editingCell;
    const value = editingValue.trim() || null;
    setEditingCell(null);
    setEditingValue('');
    setTasks(prev => prev.map(t => t.id === taskId ? { ...t, [field]: value, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() } : t));
    try {
      await supabase.from('tasks').update({
        [field]: value,
        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      }).eq('id', taskId);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error saving:', error);
      await fetchTasks();
    }
  };

  const saveSelectField = async (taskId: string, field: string, value: string, extra?: Record<string, string | null>) => {
    const updates: Record<string, string | null> = { [field]: value || null, ...extra };
    setTasks(prev => prev.map(t => t.id === taskId ? { ...t, ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() } : t));
    try {
      await supabase.from('tasks').update({
        ...updates,
        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      }).eq('id', taskId);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error saving:', error);
      await fetchTasks();
    }
  };

  const saveDateField = async (taskId: string, date: Date | undefined) => {
    if (!date) return;
    const dateStr = toLocalDateString(date);
    setEditingCell(null);
    setEditingValue('');
    setTasks(prev => prev.map(t => t.id === taskId ? { ...t, due_date: dateStr, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() } : t));
    try {
      await supabase.from('tasks').update({
        due_date: dateStr,
        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      }).eq('id', taskId);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error saving:', error);
      await fetchTasks();
    }
  };

  const openForm = (task?: Task) => {
    if (task) {
      setEditingId(task.id);
      setForm({
        task_name: task.task_name,
        assigned_to: task.assigned_to || '',
        due_date: task.due_date ? new Date(task.due_date + 'T00:00:00') : undefined,
        frequency: task.frequency,
        task_type: task.task_type,
        link: task.link || '',
        latest_comment: task.latest_comment || '',
      });
    } else {
      setEditingId(null);
      setForm({
        task_name: '',
        assigned_to: '',
        due_date: undefined,
        frequency: '',
        task_type: '',
        link: '',
        latest_comment: '',
      });
    }
    setIsFormOpen(true);
  };

  const handleSubmit = async () => {
    if (!form.task_name.trim() || !form.frequency || !form.task_type) return;
    if (!user?.id || !userProfile) return;

    setSubmitting(true);
    try {
      const assignedMember = teamMembers.find(m => m.id === form.assigned_to);
      const payload = {
        task_name: form.task_name.trim(),
        assigned_to: form.assigned_to || null,
        assigned_to_name: assignedMember?.name || null,
        due_date: form.due_date ? toLocalDateString(form.due_date) : null,
        frequency: form.frequency,
        task_type: form.task_type,
        link: form.link.trim() || null,
        latest_comment: form.latest_comment.trim() || null,
        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
      };

      if (editingId) {
        const { error } = await supabase
          .from('tasks')
          .update(payload)
          .eq('id', editingId);
        if (error) throw error;
        toast({ title: 'Updated', description: 'Task updated successfully.' });
      } else {
        const { error } = await supabase
          .from('tasks')
          .insert({
            ...payload,
            created_by: user.id,
            created_by_name: userProfile.name || userProfile.email || 'Unknown',
          });
        if (error) throw error;
        toast({ title: 'Created', description: 'Task created successfully.' });
      }

      setIsFormOpen(false);
      setEditingId(null);
      setForm({ task_name: '', assigned_to: '', due_date: undefined, frequency: '', task_type: '', link: '', latest_comment: '' });
      await fetchTasks();
    } catch (err) {
      console.error('Error saving task:', err);
      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to save task.', variant: 'destructive' });
    } finally {
      setSubmitting(false);
    }
  };

  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
    setDeletingId(null);
    setTasks(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id));
    try {
      await supabase.from('tasks').delete().eq('id', id);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error deleting:', error);
      await fetchTasks();
    }
  };

  const handleReorder = async (taskId: string, direction: 'up' | 'down', groupTasks: Task[]) => {
    const sorted = [...groupTasks].sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
    const idx = sorted.findIndex(t => t.id === taskId);
    const swapIdx = direction === 'up' ? idx - 1 : idx + 1;
    if (swapIdx < 0 || swapIdx >= sorted.length) return;

    const current = sorted[idx];
    const swap = sorted[swapIdx];

    const currentOrder = current.sort_order;
    const swapOrder = swap.sort_order;
    const newCurrentOrder = currentOrder === swapOrder
      ? (direction === 'up' ? swapOrder - 1 : swapOrder + 1)
      : swapOrder;
    const newSwapOrder = currentOrder === swapOrder
      ? currentOrder
      : currentOrder;

    setTasks(prev => prev.map(t => {
      if (t.id === current.id) return { ...t, sort_order: newCurrentOrder };
      if (t.id === swap.id) return { ...t, sort_order: newSwapOrder };
      return t;
    }));

    try {
      await Promise.all([
        supabase.from('tasks').update({ sort_order: newCurrentOrder }).eq('id', current.id),
        supabase.from('tasks').update({ sort_order: newSwapOrder }).eq('id', swap.id),
      ]);
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error reordering:', error);
      await fetchTasks();
    }
  };

  const formatDate = (dateStr: string) => {
    return new Date(dateStr + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' });
  };

  const userColors = [
    { bg: 'bg-blue-50', text: 'text-blue-700', border: 'border-blue-200' },
    { bg: 'bg-emerald-50', text: 'text-emerald-700', border: 'border-emerald-200' },
    { bg: 'bg-purple-50', text: 'text-purple-700', border: 'border-purple-200' },
    { bg: 'bg-amber-50', text: 'text-amber-700', border: 'border-amber-200' },
    { bg: 'bg-cyan-50', text: 'text-cyan-700', border: 'border-cyan-200' },
    { bg: 'bg-pink-50', text: 'text-pink-700', border: 'border-pink-200' },
    { bg: 'bg-indigo-50', text: 'text-indigo-700', border: 'border-indigo-200' },
    { bg: 'bg-orange-50', text: 'text-orange-700', border: 'border-orange-200' },
    { bg: 'bg-teal-50', text: 'text-teal-700', border: 'border-teal-200' },
    { bg: 'bg-slate-50', text: 'text-slate-600', border: 'border-slate-200' },
  ];

  const getColorForIndex = (idx: number) => userColors[idx % userColors.length];

  const getUserInitials = (name: string) => {
    return name.split(' ').map(w => w[0]).join('').slice(0, 2).toUpperCase();
  };

  const tableHeader = (
    <thead>
      <tr className="border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/80">
        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.reorder}`}></th>
        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.taskName}`}>Task Name</th>
        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.dueDate}`}>Due Date</th>
        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.comment}`}>Comment</th>
        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.frequency}`}>Frequency</th>
        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.type}`}>Type</th>
        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.link}`}>Link</th>
        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.createdBy}`}>Created By</th>
        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.created}`}>Created</th>
        <th className={`text-right py-3 px-3 ${COL.actions}`}></th>
      </tr>
    </thead>
  );

  const renderTaskRow = (task: Task, idx: number, sorted: Task[], groupTasks: Task[]) => {
    const isEditingField = (field: string) => editingCell?.taskId === task.id && editingCell?.field === field;

    return (
      <tr key={task.id} className="border-b border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors group">
        {/* Reorder arrows */}
        <td className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.reorder}`}>
          <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="sm"
              className="w-auto h-auto px-1 py-0 hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-30"
              onClick={() => handleReorder(task.id, 'up', groupTasks)}
              disabled={idx === 0}
            >
              <ChevronUp className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
            </Button>
            <Button
              variant="ghost"
              size="sm"
              className="w-auto h-auto px-1 py-0 hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-30"
              onClick={() => handleReorder(task.id, 'down', groupTasks)}
              disabled={idx === sorted.length - 1}
            >
              <ChevronDown className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
            </Button>
          </div>
        </td>

        {/* Task Name - inline editable */}
        <td className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.taskName}`}>
          {isEditingField('task_name') ? (
            <Input
              value={editingValue}
              onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
              onBlur={saveInlineEdit}
              onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter') saveInlineEdit(); if (e.key === 'Escape') cancelEditing(); }}
              className="w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 text-sm font-medium text-gray-900"
              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
              autoFocus
            />
          ) : (
            <span
              className="text-gray-900 font-medium line-clamp-2 cursor-pointer"
              onDoubleClick={() => startEditing(task.id, 'task_name', task.task_name)}
              title="Double-click to edit"
            >
              {task.task_name}
            </span>
          )}
        </td>

        {/* Due Date - calendar picker inline */}
        <td className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.dueDate}`}>
          <Popover>
            <PopoverTrigger asChild>
              <button className={`text-sm hover:text-gray-700 cursor-pointer ${getDueDateColor(task.due_date) || 'text-gray-500'}`}>
                {task.due_date ? new Date(task.due_date + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' }) : '—'}
              </button>
            </PopoverTrigger>
            <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
              <Calendar
                mode="single"
                selected={task.due_date ? new Date(task.due_date + 'T00:00:00') : undefined}
                onSelect={(date) => saveDateField(task.id, date)}
                initialFocus
                classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
                modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
              />
            </PopoverContent>
          </Popover>
        </td>

        {/* Comment - inline editable textarea */}
        <td className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.comment}`}>
          {isEditingField('latest_comment') ? (
            <textarea
              value={editingValue}
              onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
              onBlur={saveInlineEdit}
              onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Escape') cancelEditing(); }}
              className="w-full min-w-[140px] border-none shadow-none p-0 bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 text-xs resize-none"
              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
              rows={2}
              autoFocus
            />
          ) : (
            <span
              className="text-gray-600 line-clamp-2 whitespace-pre-wrap cursor-pointer text-xs"
              onDoubleClick={() => startEditing(task.id, 'latest_comment', task.latest_comment || '')}
              title="Double-click to edit"
            >
              {task.latest_comment || '—'}
            </span>
          )}
        </td>

        {/* Frequency - inline select */}
        <td className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.frequency}`}>
          <Select value={task.frequency} onValueChange={(v) => saveSelectField(task.id, 'frequency', v)}>
            <SelectTrigger
              className={`border-none shadow-none bg-transparent w-auto h-auto ${frequencyBadge(task.frequency)} px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium inline-flex items-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none`}
              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
            >
              <SelectValue />
            </SelectTrigger>
            <SelectContent>
              {FREQUENCIES.map((f) => <SelectItem key={f} value={f}>{FREQUENCY_LABELS[f]}</SelectItem>)}
            </SelectContent>
          </Select>
        </td>

        {/* Type - inline select */}
        <td className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.type}`}>
          <Select value={task.task_type} onValueChange={(v) => saveSelectField(task.id, 'task_type', v)}>
            <SelectTrigger
              className={`border-none shadow-none bg-transparent w-auto h-auto ${typeBadge(task.task_type)} px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium inline-flex items-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none whitespace-nowrap`}
              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
            >
              <SelectValue />
            </SelectTrigger>
            <SelectContent>
              {TASK_TYPES.map((t) => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
            </SelectContent>
          </Select>
        </td>

        {/* Link - inline editable */}
        <td className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.link}`}>
          {isEditingField('link') ? (
            <Input
              value={editingValue}
              onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
              onBlur={saveInlineEdit}
              onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter') saveInlineEdit(); if (e.key === 'Escape') cancelEditing(); }}
              className="w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 text-xs"
              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
              autoFocus
            />
          ) : task.link ? (
            <a
              href={task.link}
              target="_blank"
              rel="noopener noreferrer"
              className="text-[#3e8692] hover:underline inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs"
              onDoubleClick={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); startEditing(task.id, 'link', task.link || ''); }}
              title="Double-click to edit"
            >
              <ExternalLink className="h-3 w-3" />
              Link
            </a>
          ) : (
            <span
              className="text-gray-400 cursor-pointer text-xs"
              onDoubleClick={() => startEditing(task.id, 'link', '')}
              title="Double-click to edit"
            >
              —
            </span>
          )}
        </td>

        {/* Created By */}
        <td className={`py-3 px-3 whitespace-nowrap ${COL.createdBy}`}>
          <span className="text-gray-600 text-xs">{task.created_by_name || '—'}</span>
        </td>

        {/* Created */}
        <td className={`py-3 px-3 whitespace-nowrap ${COL.created}`}>
          <span className="text-gray-500 text-xs">
            {new Date(task.created_at).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}
          </span>
        </td>

        {/* Actions */}
        <td className={`py-3 px-3 text-right ${COL.actions}`}>
          <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-0.5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
            <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0 hover:bg-gray-200" onClick={() => openForm(task)} title="Edit in popup">
              <Expand className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
            </Button>
            <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0 hover:bg-red-50" onClick={() => setDeletingId(task.id)}>
              <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-500" />
            </Button>
          </div>
        </td>
      </tr>
    );
  };

  const renderTaskTable = (groupTasks: Task[]) => {
    const sorted = [...groupTasks].sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
    return (
      <table className="w-full text-sm table-fixed">
        {tableHeader}
        <tbody>
          {sorted.map((task, idx) => renderTaskRow(task, idx, sorted, groupTasks))}
        </tbody>
      </table>
    );
  };

  return (
    <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] w-full bg-gray-50">
      <div className="w-full">
        <div className="space-y-4">
          {/* Header */}
          <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6">
            <div className="pb-5 border-b border-gray-100 flex flex-row items-center justify-between">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                <div className="bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-lg">
                  <ListTodo className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-600" />
                </div>
                <div>
                  <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Tasks</h2>
                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Manage team tasks, SOPs, and recurring work</p>
                </div>
              </div>
              <Button
                className="hover:opacity-90"
                style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
                onClick={() => openForm()}
              >
                <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
                Add Task
              </Button>
            </div>

            {/* Tabs */}
            <div className="pt-4">
              {loading ? (
                <div className="flex gap-2">
                  {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-9 w-28 rounded" />)}
                </div>
              ) : (
                <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={setActiveTab}>
                  <TabsList className="bg-gray-100 p-1 h-auto flex-wrap">
                    <TabsTrigger
                      value="one-time"
                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
                    >
                      One-Time
                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{oneTimeCount}</span>
                    </TabsTrigger>
                    <TabsTrigger
                      value="recurring"
                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
                    >
                      Recurring
                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{recurringCount}</span>
                    </TabsTrigger>
                    <TabsTrigger
                      value="client-sop"
                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
                    >
                      Client SOP
                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{clientSopCount}</span>
                    </TabsTrigger>
                  </TabsList>
                </Tabs>
              )}
            </div>

            {/* Search */}
            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 pt-4">
              <div className="relative flex-1 max-w-sm">
                <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
                <Input
                  placeholder="Search tasks, assignees, comments..."
                  className="pl-10 auth-input"
                  value={searchTerm}
                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
                />
              </div>
              {searchTerm && (
                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setSearchTerm('')}>
                  Clear
                </Button>
              )}
            </div>
          </div>

          {/* Grouped Tables */}
          {loading ? (
            <div className="p-6 space-y-3">
              {[1, 2, 3, 4].map((i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-12 w-full rounded" />)}
            </div>
          ) : filtered.length === 0 ? (
            <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm">
              <div className="text-center py-16">
                <ClipboardList className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-3" />
                <p className="text-gray-500 font-medium">
                  {tasks.length === 0 ? 'No tasks yet.' : 'No tasks match your filters.'}
                </p>
                {tasks.length === 0 && (
                  <Button
                    className="mt-4 hover:opacity-90"
                    style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
                    onClick={() => openForm()}
                  >
                    <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Create Your First Task
                  </Button>
                )}
              </div>
            </div>
          ) : (
            <div className="space-y-4">
              {groupedByUser.map((group, groupIdx) => {
                const isCollapsed = collapsedUsers.has(group.key);
                const colors = group.key === '_unassigned'
                  ? { bg: 'bg-slate-50', text: 'text-slate-600', border: 'border-slate-200' }
                  : getColorForIndex(groupIdx);
                const photoUrl = group.key !== '_unassigned' ? userPhotoMap[group.key] : null;

                return (
                  <div key={group.key}>
                    {/* Group Header */}
                    <div
                      className={`flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 ${colors.bg} ${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} border ${colors.border} ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} cursor-pointer select-none transition-all`}
                      onClick={() => toggleUserCollapse(group.key)}
                    >
                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
                        {isCollapsed ? (
                          <ChevronRight className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
                        ) : (
                          <ChevronDown className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
                        )}
                        {group.key === '_unassigned' ? (
                          <div className="h-7 w-7 rounded-full bg-slate-200 flex items-center justify-center">
                            <User className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-slate-500" />
                          </div>
                        ) : photoUrl ? (
                          <Image
                            src={photoUrl}
                            alt={group.label}
                            width={28}
                            height={28}
                            className="rounded-full object-cover h-7 w-7"
                          />
                        ) : (
                          <div className={`h-7 w-7 rounded-full bg-[#3e8692]/10 flex items-center justify-center text-[#3e8692] text-xs font-bold`}>
                            {getUserInitials(group.label)}
                          </div>
                        )}
                        <h3 className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`}>{group.label}</h3>
                        <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">
                          {group.tasks.length}
                        </Badge>
                      </div>
                    </div>

                    {/* Group Table */}
                    {!isCollapsed && (
                      <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0 overflow-hidden">
                        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
                          {renderTaskTable(group.tasks)}
                        </div>
                      </div>
                    )}
                  </div>
                );
              })}
            </div>
          )}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Add/Edit Dialog */}
      <Dialog open={isFormOpen} onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) { setIsFormOpen(false); setEditingId(null); } }}>
        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-[600px] max-h-[85vh] overflow-hidden">
          <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle>{editingId ? 'Edit Task' : 'Add Task'}</DialogTitle>
            <DialogDescription>
              {editingId ? 'Update the task details below.' : 'Create a new task for the team.'}
            </DialogDescription>
          </DialogHeader>
          <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[60vh] overflow-y-auto px-1 pb-4">
            {/* Task Name */}
            <div className="grid gap-2">
              <Label>Task Name <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
              <Input
                value={form.task_name}
                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, task_name: e.target.value })}
                placeholder="Enter task name"
                className="auth-input"
              />
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              {/* Assigned To */}
              <div className="grid gap-2">
                <Label>Assigned To</Label>
                <Select value={form.assigned_to} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, assigned_to: v })}>
                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select team member" /></SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    {teamMembers.map((m) => <SelectItem key={m.id} value={m.id}>{m.name}</SelectItem>)}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              {/* Due Date */}
              <div className="grid gap-2">
                <Label>Due Date</Label>
                <Popover>
                  <PopoverTrigger asChild>
                    <Button
                      variant="outline"
                      className="auth-input justify-start text-left font-normal"
                      style={{ borderColor: '#e5e7eb', backgroundColor: 'white', color: form.due_date ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af' }}
                    >
                      <CalendarIcon className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
                      {form.due_date ? form.due_date.toLocaleDateString() : 'Select date'}
                    </Button>
                  </PopoverTrigger>
                  <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
                    <Calendar
                      mode="single"
                      selected={form.due_date}
                      onSelect={(date) => setForm({ ...form, due_date: date || undefined })}
                      initialFocus
                      classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
                      modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
                    />
                  </PopoverContent>
                </Popover>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
              {/* Frequency */}
              <div className="grid gap-2">
                <Label>Frequency <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
                <Select value={form.frequency} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, frequency: v })}>
                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select frequency" /></SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    {FREQUENCIES.map((f) => <SelectItem key={f} value={f}>{FREQUENCY_LABELS[f]}</SelectItem>)}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>

              {/* Task Type */}
              <div className="grid gap-2">
                <Label>Task Type <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
                <Select value={form.task_type} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, task_type: v })}>
                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select type" /></SelectTrigger>
                  <SelectContent>
                    {TASK_TYPES.map((t) => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
                  </SelectContent>
                </Select>
              </div>
            </div>

            {/* Link */}
            <div className="grid gap-2">
              <Label>Link</Label>
              <Input
                value={form.link}
                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, link: e.target.value })}
                placeholder="https://..."
                className="auth-input"
              />
            </div>

            {/* Latest Comment */}
            <div className="grid gap-2">
              <Label>Latest Comment</Label>
              <Textarea
                value={form.latest_comment}
                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, latest_comment: e.target.value })}
                placeholder="Add a comment or note..."
                className="auth-input"
                rows={3}
              />
            </div>
          </div>
          <DialogFooter>
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => { setIsFormOpen(false); setEditingId(null); }}>Cancel</Button>
            <Button
              className="hover:opacity-90"
              style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
              onClick={handleSubmit}
              disabled={!form.task_name.trim() || !form.frequency || !form.task_type || submitting}
            >
              {submitting ? (
                <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-4 w-4 border-b-2 border-white" />
              ) : editingId ? 'Save Changes' : 'Add Task'}
            </Button>
          </DialogFooter>
        </DialogContent>
      </Dialog>

      {/* Delete Confirmation */}
      <Dialog open={!!deletingId} onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) setDeletingId(null); }}>
        <DialogContent className="max-w-md">
          <DialogHeader>
            <DialogTitle>Delete Task</DialogTitle>
            <DialogDescription>Are you sure you want to delete this task? This action cannot be undone.</DialogDescription>
          </DialogHeader>
          <DialogFooter>
            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setDeletingId(null)}>Cancel</Button>
            <Button variant="destructive" onClick={() => deletingId && handleDelete(deletingId)}>Delete</Button>
          </DialogFooter>
        </DialogContent>
      </Dialog>
    </div>
  );
}

```

```text
The file /Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/app/tasks/page.tsx has been updated. Here's the result of running `cat -n` on a snippet of the edited file:
     1→'use client';
     2→
```
