```text
     3→import { useState, useEffect, useMemo } from 'react';
     4→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
     5→import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
     6→import { Label } from '@/components/ui/label';
     7→import { Textarea } from '@/components/ui/textarea';
     8→import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
     9→import { Calendar } from '@/components/ui/calendar';
    10→import { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from '@/components/ui/popover';
    11→import { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogDescription, DialogFooter, DialogHeader, DialogTitle } from '@/components/ui/dialog';
    12→import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
    13→import { Tabs, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';
    14→import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
    15→import { Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback } from '@/components/ui/avatar';
    16→import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
    17→import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase';
    18→import { UserService } from '@/lib/userService';
    19→import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
    20→import Image from 'next/image';
    21→import {
    22→  Plus,
    23→  ListTodo,
    24→  Search,
    25→  Trash2,
    26→  Edit,
    27→  Calendar as CalendarIcon,
    28→  ChevronUp,
    29→  ChevronDown,
    30→  ChevronRight,
    31→  ExternalLink,
    32→  ClipboardList,
    33→  Expand,
    34→  User,
    35→} from 'lucide-react';
    36→
    37→type Task = {
    38→  id: string;
    39→  task_name: string;
    40→  assigned_to: string | null;
    41→  assigned_to_name: string | null;
    42→  due_date: string | null;
    43→  latest_comment: string | null;
    44→  frequency: string;
    45→  task_type: string;
    46→  link: string | null;
    47→  created_by: string | null;
    48→  created_by_name: string | null;
    49→  sort_order: number;
    50→  created_at: string;
    51→  updated_at: string;
    52→};
    53→
    54→type TeamMember = {
    55→  id: string;
    56→  name: string;
    57→  email: string;
    58→  role: string;
    59→  profile_photo_url: string | null;
    60→};
    61→
    62→type EditingCell = { taskId: string; field: string } | null;
    63→
    64→const FREQUENCIES = ['one-time', 'daily', 'weekly', 'monthly', 'recurring'] as const;
    65→const FREQUENCY_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
    66→  'one-time': 'One-Time',
    67→  'daily': 'Daily',
    68→  'weekly': 'Weekly',
    69→  'monthly': 'Monthly',
    70→  'recurring': 'Recurring',
    71→};
    72→const TASK_TYPES = [
    73→  'Admin & Operations',
    74→  'Finance & Invoicing',
    75→  'General',
    76→  'Tech & Tools',
    77→  'Marketing & Sales',
    78→  'Client SOP',
    79→  'Client Delivery',
    80→  'Performance Review',
    81→  'Research & Analytics',
    82→] as const;
    83→
    84→const frequencyBadge = (freq: string) => {
    85→  switch (freq) {
    86→    case 'one-time': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
    87→    case 'daily': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';
    88→    case 'weekly': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800';
    89→    case 'monthly': return 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800';
    90→    case 'recurring': return 'bg-orange-100 text-orange-800';
    91→    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
    92→  }
    93→};
    94→
    95→const typeBadge = (type: string) => {
    96→  switch (type) {
    97→    case 'Admin & Operations': return 'bg-slate-100 text-slate-700';
    98→    case 'Finance & Invoicing': return 'bg-emerald-100 text-emerald-800';
    99→    case 'General': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
   100→    case 'Tech & Tools': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';
   101→    case 'Marketing & Sales': return 'bg-pink-100 text-pink-800';
   102→    case 'Client SOP': return 'bg-amber-100 text-amber-800';
   103→    case 'Client Delivery': return 'bg-cyan-100 text-cyan-800';
   104→    case 'Performance Review': return 'bg-violet-100 text-violet-800';
   105→    case 'Research & Analytics': return 'bg-indigo-100 text-indigo-800';
   106→    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-700';
   107→  }
   108→};
   109→
   110→const getDueDateColor = (dueDate: string | null) => {
   111→  if (!dueDate) return '';
   112→  const today = new Date();
   113→  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
   114→  const due = new Date(dueDate + 'T00:00:00');
   115→  const diffDays = Math.ceil((due.getTime() - today.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   116→  if (diffDays < 0) return 'text-red-600 font-semibold';
   117→  if (diffDays <= 3) return 'text-amber-600 font-semibold';
   118→  return 'text-gray-600';
   119→};
   120→
   121→/** Format a Date to YYYY-MM-DD in local timezone (avoids UTC offset issues) */
   122→const toLocalDateString = (date: Date) => {
   123→  const year = date.getFullYear();
   124→  const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
   125→  const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
   126→  return `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
   127→};
   128→
   129→// Fixed column widths for consistency across all tables
   130→const COL = {
   131→  reorder: 'w-[50px]',
   132→  taskName: 'w-[22%] min-w-[180px]',
   133→  dueDate: 'w-[110px]',
   134→  comment: 'w-[20%] min-w-[140px]',
   135→  frequency: 'w-[100px]',
   136→  type: 'w-[140px]',
   137→  link: 'w-[80px]',
   138→  createdBy: 'w-[100px]',
   139→  created: 'w-[80px]',
   140→  actions: 'w-[80px]',
   141→};
   142→
   143→export default function TasksPage() {
   144→  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();
   145→  const { toast } = useToast();
   146→
   147→  const [tasks, setTasks] = useState<Task[]>([]);
   148→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
   149→  const [teamMembers, setTeamMembers] = useState<TeamMember[]>([]);
   150→  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<string>('one-time');
   151→  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
   152→  const [collapsedUsers, setCollapsedUsers] = useState<Set<string>>(new Set());
   153→
   154→  // Inline editing state
   155→  const [editingCell, setEditingCell] = useState<EditingCell>(null);
   156→  const [editingValue, setEditingValue] = useState<string>('');
   157→
   158→  // Form state
   159→  const [isFormOpen, setIsFormOpen] = useState(false);
   160→  const [editingId, setEditingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
   161→  const [deletingId, setDeletingId] = useState<string | null>(null);
   162→  const [submitting, setSubmitting] = useState(false);
   163→  const [form, setForm] = useState({
   164→    task_name: '',
   165→    assigned_to: '' as string,
   166→    due_date: undefined as Date | undefined,
   167→    frequency: '' as string,
   168→    task_type: '' as string,
   169→    link: '',
   170→    latest_comment: '',
   171→  });
   172→
   173→  useEffect(() => {
   174→    fetchTasks();
   175→    UserService.getAllUsers().then((users) => {
   176→      setTeamMembers(
   177→        users
   178→          .filter(u => u.role !== 'client')
   179→          .map(u => ({ id: u.id, name: u.name || u.email, email: u.email, role: u.role, profile_photo_url: u.profile_photo_url || null }))
   180→      );
   181→    });
   182→  }, []);
   183→
   184→  const fetchTasks = async () => {
   185→    setLoading(true);
   186→    const { data } = await supabase
   187→      .from('tasks')
   188→      .select('*')
   189→      .order('sort_order', { ascending: true })
   190→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   191→    setTasks(data || []);
   192→    setLoading(false);
   193→  };
   194→
   195→  // Build a map of user id -> profile photo
   196→  const userPhotoMap = useMemo(() => {
   197→    const map: Record<string, string | null> = {};
   198→    teamMembers.forEach(m => { map[m.id] = m.profile_photo_url; });
   199→    return map;
   200→  }, [teamMembers]);
   201→
   202→  // Tab counts
   203→  const oneTimeCount = useMemo(() =>
   204→    tasks.filter(t => t.frequency === 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP').length,
   205→    [tasks]
   206→  );
   207→  const recurringCount = useMemo(() =>
   208→    tasks.filter(t => t.frequency !== 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP').length,
   209→    [tasks]
   210→  );
   211→  const clientSopCount = useMemo(() =>
   212→    tasks.filter(t => t.task_type === 'Client SOP').length,
   213→    [tasks]
   214→  );
   215→
   216→  // Filter tasks by tab + search
   217→  const filtered = useMemo(() => {
   218→    let tabFiltered: Task[];
   219→    if (activeTab === 'one-time') {
   220→      tabFiltered = tasks.filter(t => t.frequency === 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP');
   221→    } else if (activeTab === 'recurring') {
   222→      tabFiltered = tasks.filter(t => t.frequency !== 'one-time' && t.task_type !== 'Client SOP');
   223→    } else {
   224→      tabFiltered = tasks.filter(t => t.task_type === 'Client SOP');
   225→    }
   226→
   227→    if (!searchTerm) return tabFiltered.sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
   228→
   229→    const term = searchTerm.toLowerCase();
   230→    return tabFiltered.filter(t =>
   231→      t.task_name.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
   232→      (t.assigned_to_name && t.assigned_to_name.toLowerCase().includes(term)) ||
   233→      (t.latest_comment && t.latest_comment.toLowerCase().includes(term)) ||
   234→      t.task_type.toLowerCase().includes(term) ||
   235→      (t.created_by_name && t.created_by_name.toLowerCase().includes(term))
   236→    ).sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
   237→  }, [tasks, activeTab, searchTerm]);
   238→
   239→  // Group filtered tasks by assigned_to
   240→  const groupedByUser = useMemo(() => {
   241→    const groups: { key: string; label: string; tasks: Task[] }[] = [];
   242→    const map = new Map<string, Task[]>();
   243→
   244→    for (const task of filtered) {
   245→      const key = task.assigned_to || '_unassigned';
   246→      if (!map.has(key)) map.set(key, []);
   247→      map.get(key)!.push(task);
   248→    }
   249→
   250→    const sortedKeys = Array.from(map.keys()).sort((a, b) => {
   251→      if (a === '_unassigned') return 1;
   252→      if (b === '_unassigned') return -1;
   253→      const nameA = map.get(a)![0].assigned_to_name || '';
   254→      const nameB = map.get(b)![0].assigned_to_name || '';
   255→      return nameA.localeCompare(nameB);
   256→    });
   257→
   258→    for (const key of sortedKeys) {
   259→      const tasks = map.get(key)!;
   260→      const label = key === '_unassigned' ? 'Unassigned' : (tasks[0].assigned_to_name || 'Unknown');
   261→      groups.push({ key, label, tasks });
   262→    }
   263→
   264→    return groups;
   265→  }, [filtered]);
   266→
   267→  const toggleUserCollapse = (key: string) => {
   268→    setCollapsedUsers(prev => {
   269→      const newSet = new Set(prev);
   270→      if (newSet.has(key)) newSet.delete(key);
   271→      else newSet.add(key);
   272→      return newSet;
   273→    });
   274→  };
   275→
   276→  // --- Inline editing ---
   277→  const startEditing = (taskId: string, field: string, currentValue: string) => {
   278→    setEditingCell({ taskId, field });
   279→    setEditingValue(currentValue);
   280→  };
   281→
   282→  const cancelEditing = () => {
   283→    setEditingCell(null);
   284→    setEditingValue('');
   285→  };
   286→
   287→  const saveInlineEdit = async () => {
   288→    if (!editingCell) return;
   289→    const { taskId, field } = editingCell;
   290→    const value = editingValue.trim() || null;
   291→    setEditingCell(null);
   292→    setEditingValue('');
   293→    setTasks(prev => prev.map(t => t.id === taskId ? { ...t, [field]: value, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() } : t));
   294→    try {
   295→      await supabase.from('tasks').update({
   296→        [field]: value,
   297→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   298→      }).eq('id', taskId);
   299→    } catch (error) {
   300→      console.error('Error saving:', error);
   301→      await fetchTasks();
   302→    }
   303→  };
   304→
   305→  const saveSelectField = async (taskId: string, field: string, value: string, extra?: Record<string, string | null>) => {
   306→    const updates: Record<string, string | null> = { [field]: value || null, ...extra };
   307→    setTasks(prev => prev.map(t => t.id === taskId ? { ...t, ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() } : t));
   308→    try {
   309→      await supabase.from('tasks').update({
   310→        ...updates,
   311→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   312→      }).eq('id', taskId);
   313→    } catch (error) {
   314→      console.error('Error saving:', error);
   315→      await fetchTasks();
   316→    }
   317→  };
   318→
   319→  const saveDateField = async (taskId: string, date: Date | undefined) => {
   320→    if (!date) return;
   321→    const dateStr = toLocalDateString(date);
   322→    setEditingCell(null);
   323→    setEditingValue('');
   324→    setTasks(prev => prev.map(t => t.id === taskId ? { ...t, due_date: dateStr, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() } : t));
   325→    try {
   326→      await supabase.from('tasks').update({
   327→        due_date: dateStr,
   328→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   329→      }).eq('id', taskId);
   330→    } catch (error) {
   331→      console.error('Error saving:', error);
   332→      await fetchTasks();
   333→    }
   334→  };
   335→
   336→  const openForm = (task?: Task) => {
   337→    if (task) {
   338→      setEditingId(task.id);
   339→      setForm({
   340→        task_name: task.task_name,
   341→        assigned_to: task.assigned_to || '',
   342→        due_date: task.due_date ? new Date(task.due_date + 'T00:00:00') : undefined,
   343→        frequency: task.frequency,
   344→        task_type: task.task_type,
   345→        link: task.link || '',
   346→        latest_comment: task.latest_comment || '',
   347→      });
   348→    } else {
   349→      setEditingId(null);
   350→      setForm({
   351→        task_name: '',
   352→        assigned_to: '',
   353→        due_date: undefined,
   354→        frequency: '',
   355→        task_type: '',
   356→        link: '',
   357→        latest_comment: '',
   358→      });
   359→    }
   360→    setIsFormOpen(true);
   361→  };
   362→
   363→  const handleSubmit = async () => {
   364→    if (!form.task_name.trim() || !form.frequency || !form.task_type) return;
   365→    if (!user?.id || !userProfile) return;
   366→
   367→    setSubmitting(true);
   368→    try {
   369→      const assignedMember = teamMembers.find(m => m.id === form.assigned_to);
   370→      const payload = {
   371→        task_name: form.task_name.trim(),
   372→        assigned_to: form.assigned_to || null,
   373→        assigned_to_name: assignedMember?.name || null,
   374→        due_date: form.due_date ? toLocalDateString(form.due_date) : null,
   375→        frequency: form.frequency,
   376→        task_type: form.task_type,
   377→        link: form.link.trim() || null,
   378→        latest_comment: form.latest_comment.trim() || null,
   379→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   380→      };
   381→
   382→      if (editingId) {
   383→        const { error } = await supabase
   384→          .from('tasks')
   385→          .update(payload)
   386→          .eq('id', editingId);
   387→        if (error) throw error;
   388→        toast({ title: 'Updated', description: 'Task updated successfully.' });
   389→      } else {
   390→        const { error } = await supabase
   391→          .from('tasks')
   392→          .insert({
   393→            ...payload,
   394→            created_by: user.id,
   395→            created_by_name: userProfile.name || userProfile.email || 'Unknown',
   396→          });
   397→        if (error) throw error;
   398→        toast({ title: 'Created', description: 'Task created successfully.' });
   399→      }
   400→
   401→      setIsFormOpen(false);
   402→      setEditingId(null);
   403→      setForm({ task_name: '', assigned_to: '', due_date: undefined, frequency: '', task_type: '', link: '', latest_comment: '' });
   404→      await fetchTasks();
   405→    } catch (err) {
   406→      console.error('Error saving task:', err);
   407→      toast({ title: 'Error', description: 'Failed to save task.', variant: 'destructive' });
   408→    } finally {
   409→      setSubmitting(false);
   410→    }
   411→  };
   412→
   413→  const handleDelete = async (id: string) => {
   414→    setDeletingId(null);
   415→    setTasks(prev => prev.filter(t => t.id !== id));
   416→    try {
   417→      await supabase.from('tasks').delete().eq('id', id);
   418→    } catch (error) {
   419→      console.error('Error deleting:', error);
   420→      await fetchTasks();
   421→    }
   422→  };
   423→
   424→  const handleReorder = async (taskId: string, direction: 'up' | 'down', groupTasks: Task[]) => {
   425→    const sorted = [...groupTasks].sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
   426→    const idx = sorted.findIndex(t => t.id === taskId);
   427→    const swapIdx = direction === 'up' ? idx - 1 : idx + 1;
   428→    if (swapIdx < 0 || swapIdx >= sorted.length) return;
   429→
   430→    const current = sorted[idx];
   431→    const swap = sorted[swapIdx];
   432→
   433→    const currentOrder = current.sort_order;
   434→    const swapOrder = swap.sort_order;
   435→    const newCurrentOrder = currentOrder === swapOrder
   436→      ? (direction === 'up' ? swapOrder - 1 : swapOrder + 1)
   437→      : swapOrder;
   438→    const newSwapOrder = currentOrder === swapOrder
   439→      ? currentOrder
   440→      : currentOrder;
   441→
   442→    setTasks(prev => prev.map(t => {
   443→      if (t.id === current.id) return { ...t, sort_order: newCurrentOrder };
   444→      if (t.id === swap.id) return { ...t, sort_order: newSwapOrder };
   445→      return t;
   446→    }));
   447→
   448→    try {
   449→      await Promise.all([
   450→        supabase.from('tasks').update({ sort_order: newCurrentOrder }).eq('id', current.id),
   451→        supabase.from('tasks').update({ sort_order: newSwapOrder }).eq('id', swap.id),
   452→      ]);
   453→    } catch (error) {
   454→      console.error('Error reordering:', error);
   455→      await fetchTasks();
   456→    }
   457→  };
   458→
   459→  const formatDate = (dateStr: string) => {
   460→    return new Date(dateStr + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric', year: 'numeric' });
   461→  };
   462→
   463→  const userColors = [
   464→    { bg: 'bg-blue-50', text: 'text-blue-700', border: 'border-blue-200' },
   465→    { bg: 'bg-emerald-50', text: 'text-emerald-700', border: 'border-emerald-200' },
   466→    { bg: 'bg-purple-50', text: 'text-purple-700', border: 'border-purple-200' },
   467→    { bg: 'bg-amber-50', text: 'text-amber-700', border: 'border-amber-200' },
   468→    { bg: 'bg-cyan-50', text: 'text-cyan-700', border: 'border-cyan-200' },
   469→    { bg: 'bg-pink-50', text: 'text-pink-700', border: 'border-pink-200' },
   470→    { bg: 'bg-indigo-50', text: 'text-indigo-700', border: 'border-indigo-200' },
   471→    { bg: 'bg-orange-50', text: 'text-orange-700', border: 'border-orange-200' },
   472→    { bg: 'bg-teal-50', text: 'text-teal-700', border: 'border-teal-200' },
   473→    { bg: 'bg-slate-50', text: 'text-slate-600', border: 'border-slate-200' },
   474→  ];
   475→
   476→  const getColorForIndex = (idx: number) => userColors[idx % userColors.length];
   477→
   478→  const getUserInitials = (name: string) => {
   479→    return name.split(' ').map(w => w[0]).join('').slice(0, 2).toUpperCase();
   480→  };
   481→
   482→  const tableHeader = (
   483→    <thead>
   484→      <tr className="border-b border-gray-200 bg-gray-50/80">
   485→        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.reorder}`}></th>
   486→        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.taskName}`}>Task Name</th>
   487→        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.dueDate}`}>Due Date</th>
   488→        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.comment}`}>Comment</th>
   489→        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.frequency}`}>Frequency</th>
   490→        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.type}`}>Type</th>
   491→        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.link}`}>Link</th>
   492→        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.createdBy}`}>Created By</th>
   493→        <th className={`text-left py-3 px-3 font-semibold text-gray-600 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider ${COL.created}`}>Created</th>
   494→        <th className={`text-right py-3 px-3 ${COL.actions}`}></th>
   495→      </tr>
   496→    </thead>
   497→  );
   498→
   499→  const renderTaskRow = (task: Task, idx: number, sorted: Task[], groupTasks: Task[]) => {
   500→    const isEditingField = (field: string) => editingCell?.taskId === task.id && editingCell?.field === field;
   501→
   502→    return (
   503→      <tr key={task.id} className="border-b border-gray-100 hover:bg-gray-50/50 transition-colors group">
   504→        {/* Reorder arrows */}
   505→        <td className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.reorder}`}>
   506→          <div className="flex flex-col items-center gap-0.5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
   507→            <Button
   508→              variant="ghost"
   509→              size="sm"
   510→              className="w-auto h-auto px-1 py-0 hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-30"
   511→              onClick={() => handleReorder(task.id, 'up', groupTasks)}
   512→              disabled={idx === 0}
   513→            >
   514→              <ChevronUp className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
   515→            </Button>
   516→            <Button
   517→              variant="ghost"
   518→              size="sm"
   519→              className="w-auto h-auto px-1 py-0 hover:bg-gray-100 disabled:opacity-30"
   520→              onClick={() => handleReorder(task.id, 'down', groupTasks)}
   521→              disabled={idx === sorted.length - 1}
   522→            >
   523→              <ChevronDown className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
   524→            </Button>
   525→          </div>
   526→        </td>
   527→
   528→        {/* Task Name - inline editable */}
   529→        <td className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.taskName}`}>
   530→          {isEditingField('task_name') ? (
   531→            <Input
   532→              value={editingValue}
   533→              onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
   534→              onBlur={saveInlineEdit}
   535→              onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter') saveInlineEdit(); if (e.key === 'Escape') cancelEditing(); }}
   536→              className="w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 text-sm font-medium text-gray-900"
   537→              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   538→              autoFocus
   539→            />
   540→          ) : (
   541→            <span
   542→              className="text-gray-900 font-medium line-clamp-2 cursor-pointer"
   543→              onDoubleClick={() => startEditing(task.id, 'task_name', task.task_name)}
   544→              title="Double-click to edit"
   545→            >
   546→              {task.task_name}
   547→            </span>
   548→          )}
   549→        </td>
   550→
   551→        {/* Due Date - calendar picker inline */}
   552→        <td className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.dueDate}`}>
   553→          <Popover>
   554→            <PopoverTrigger asChild>
   555→              <button className={`text-sm hover:text-gray-700 cursor-pointer ${getDueDateColor(task.due_date) || 'text-gray-500'}`}>
   556→                {task.due_date ? new Date(task.due_date + 'T00:00:00').toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' }) : '—'}
   557→              </button>
   558→            </PopoverTrigger>
   559→            <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
   560→              <Calendar
   561→                mode="single"
   562→                selected={task.due_date ? new Date(task.due_date + 'T00:00:00') : undefined}
   563→                onSelect={(date) => saveDateField(task.id, date)}
   564→                initialFocus
   565→                classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
   566→                modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
   567→              />
   568→            </PopoverContent>
   569→          </Popover>
   570→        </td>
   571→
   572→        {/* Comment - inline editable textarea */}
   573→        <td className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.comment}`}>
   574→          {isEditingField('latest_comment') ? (
   575→            <textarea
   576→              value={editingValue}
   577→              onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
   578→              onBlur={saveInlineEdit}
   579→              onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Escape') cancelEditing(); }}
   580→              className="w-full min-w-[140px] border-none shadow-none p-0 bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 text-xs resize-none"
   581→              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   582→              rows={2}
   583→              autoFocus
   584→            />
   585→          ) : (
   586→            <span
   587→              className="text-gray-600 line-clamp-2 whitespace-pre-wrap cursor-pointer text-xs"
   588→              onDoubleClick={() => startEditing(task.id, 'latest_comment', task.latest_comment || '')}
   589→              title="Double-click to edit"
   590→            >
   591→              {task.latest_comment || '—'}
   592→            </span>
   593→          )}
   594→        </td>
   595→
   596→        {/* Frequency - inline select */}
   597→        <td className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.frequency}`}>
   598→          <Select value={task.frequency} onValueChange={(v) => saveSelectField(task.id, 'frequency', v)}>
   599→            <SelectTrigger
   600→              className={`border-none shadow-none bg-transparent w-auto h-auto ${frequencyBadge(task.frequency)} px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium inline-flex items-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none`}
   601→              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   602→            >
   603→              <SelectValue />
   604→            </SelectTrigger>
   605→            <SelectContent>
   606→              {FREQUENCIES.map((f) => <SelectItem key={f} value={f}>{FREQUENCY_LABELS[f]}</SelectItem>)}
   607→            </SelectContent>
   608→          </Select>
   609→        </td>
   610→
   611→        {/* Type - inline select */}
   612→        <td className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.type}`}>
   613→          <Select value={task.task_type} onValueChange={(v) => saveSelectField(task.id, 'task_type', v)}>
   614→            <SelectTrigger
   615→              className={`border-none shadow-none bg-transparent w-auto h-auto ${typeBadge(task.task_type)} px-2 py-1 rounded-md text-xs font-medium inline-flex items-center focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:border-none focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 focus-visible:border-none whitespace-nowrap`}
   616→              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   617→            >
   618→              <SelectValue />
   619→            </SelectTrigger>
   620→            <SelectContent>
   621→              {TASK_TYPES.map((t) => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
   622→            </SelectContent>
   623→          </Select>
   624→        </td>
   625→
   626→        {/* Link - inline editable */}
   627→        <td className={`py-3 px-3 ${COL.link}`}>
   628→          {isEditingField('link') ? (
   629→            <Input
   630→              value={editingValue}
   631→              onChange={(e) => setEditingValue(e.target.value)}
   632→              onBlur={saveInlineEdit}
   633→              onKeyDown={(e) => { if (e.key === 'Enter') saveInlineEdit(); if (e.key === 'Escape') cancelEditing(); }}
   634→              className="w-full border-none shadow-none p-0 h-auto bg-transparent focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus-visible:outline-none focus-visible:ring-0 text-xs"
   635→              style={{ outline: 'none', boxShadow: 'none' }}
   636→              autoFocus
   637→            />
   638→          ) : task.link ? (
   639→            <a
   640→              href={task.link}
   641→              target="_blank"
   642→              rel="noopener noreferrer"
   643→              className="text-[#3e8692] hover:underline inline-flex items-center gap-1 text-xs"
   644→              onDoubleClick={(e) => { e.preventDefault(); startEditing(task.id, 'link', task.link || ''); }}
   645→              title="Double-click to edit"
   646→            >
   647→              <ExternalLink className="h-3 w-3" />
   648→              Link
   649→            </a>
   650→          ) : (
   651→            <span
   652→              className="text-gray-400 cursor-pointer text-xs"
   653→              onDoubleClick={() => startEditing(task.id, 'link', '')}
   654→              title="Double-click to edit"
   655→            >
   656→              —
   657→            </span>
   658→          )}
   659→        </td>
   660→
   661→        {/* Created By */}
   662→        <td className={`py-3 px-3 whitespace-nowrap ${COL.createdBy}`}>
   663→          <span className="text-gray-600 text-xs">{task.created_by_name || '—'}</span>
   664→        </td>
   665→
   666→        {/* Created */}
   667→        <td className={`py-3 px-3 whitespace-nowrap ${COL.created}`}>
   668→          <span className="text-gray-500 text-xs">
   669→            {new Date(task.created_at).toLocaleDateString('en-US', { month: 'short', day: 'numeric' })}
   670→          </span>
   671→        </td>
   672→
   673→        {/* Actions */}
   674→        <td className={`py-3 px-3 text-right ${COL.actions}`}>
   675→          <div className="flex items-center justify-end gap-0.5 opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity">
   676→            <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0 hover:bg-gray-200" onClick={() => openForm(task)} title="Edit in popup">
   677→              <Expand className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-gray-500" />
   678→            </Button>
   679→            <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" className="h-7 w-7 p-0 hover:bg-red-50" onClick={() => setDeletingId(task.id)}>
   680→              <Trash2 className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-red-500" />
   681→            </Button>
   682→          </div>
   683→        </td>
   684→      </tr>
   685→    );
   686→  };
   687→
   688→  const renderTaskTable = (groupTasks: Task[]) => {
   689→    const sorted = [...groupTasks].sort((a, b) => a.sort_order - b.sort_order);
   690→    return (
   691→      <table className="w-full text-sm table-fixed">
   692→        {tableHeader}
   693→        <tbody>
   694→          {sorted.map((task, idx) => renderTaskRow(task, idx, sorted, groupTasks))}
   695→        </tbody>
   696→      </table>
   697→    );
   698→  };
   699→
   700→  return (
   701→    <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] w-full bg-gray-50">
   702→      <div className="w-full">
   703→        <div className="space-y-4">
   704→          {/* Header */}
   705→          <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm p-6">
   706→            <div className="pb-5 border-b border-gray-100 flex flex-row items-center justify-between">
   707→              <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   708→                <div className="bg-gray-100 p-2 rounded-lg">
   709→                  <ListTodo className="h-6 w-6 text-gray-600" />
   710→                </div>
   711→                <div>
   712→                  <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Tasks</h2>
   713→                  <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">Manage team tasks, SOPs, and recurring work</p>
   714→                </div>
   715→              </div>
   716→              <Button
   717→                className="hover:opacity-90"
   718→                style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   719→                onClick={() => openForm()}
   720→              >
   721→                <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" />
   722→                Add Task
   723→              </Button>
   724→            </div>
   725→
   726→            {/* Tabs */}
   727→            <div className="pt-4">
   728→              {loading ? (
   729→                <div className="flex gap-2">
   730→                  {[1, 2, 3].map((i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-9 w-28 rounded" />)}
   731→                </div>
   732→              ) : (
   733→                <Tabs value={activeTab} onValueChange={setActiveTab}>
   734→                  <TabsList className="bg-gray-100 p-1 h-auto flex-wrap">
   735→                    <TabsTrigger
   736→                      value="one-time"
   737→                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
   738→                    >
   739→                      One-Time
   740→                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{oneTimeCount}</span>
   741→                    </TabsTrigger>
   742→                    <TabsTrigger
   743→                      value="recurring"
   744→                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
   745→                    >
   746→                      Recurring
   747→                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{recurringCount}</span>
   748→                    </TabsTrigger>
   749→                    <TabsTrigger
   750→                      value="client-sop"
   751→                      className="data-[state=active]:bg-white data-[state=active]:text-[#3e8692] data-[state=active]:shadow-sm text-sm px-4 py-2"
   752→                    >
   753→                      Client SOP
   754→                      <span className="ml-2 text-xs bg-gray-200 text-gray-600 px-1.5 py-0.5 rounded-full">{clientSopCount}</span>
   755→                    </TabsTrigger>
   756→                  </TabsList>
   757→                </Tabs>
   758→              )}
   759→            </div>
   760→
   761→            {/* Search */}
   762→            <div className="flex flex-wrap items-center gap-3 pt-4">
   763→              <div className="relative flex-1 max-w-sm">
   764→                <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   765→                <Input
   766→                  placeholder="Search tasks, assignees, comments..."
   767→                  className="pl-10 auth-input"
   768→                  value={searchTerm}
   769→                  onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
   770→                />
   771→              </div>
   772→              {searchTerm && (
   773→                <Button variant="ghost" size="sm" onClick={() => setSearchTerm('')}>
   774→                  Clear
   775→                </Button>
   776→              )}
   777→            </div>
   778→          </div>
   779→
   780→          {/* Grouped Tables */}
   781→          {loading ? (
   782→            <div className="p-6 space-y-3">
   783→              {[1, 2, 3, 4].map((i) => <Skeleton key={i} className="h-12 w-full rounded" />)}
   784→            </div>
   785→          ) : filtered.length === 0 ? (
   786→            <div className="w-full bg-white border border-gray-200 shadow-sm">
   787→              <div className="text-center py-16">
   788→                <ClipboardList className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-300 mx-auto mb-3" />
   789→                <p className="text-gray-500 font-medium">
   790→                  {tasks.length === 0 ? 'No tasks yet.' : 'No tasks match your filters.'}
   791→                </p>
   792→                {tasks.length === 0 && (
   793→                  <Button
   794→                    className="mt-4 hover:opacity-90"
   795→                    style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   796→                    onClick={() => openForm()}
   797→                  >
   798→                    <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-2" /> Create Your First Task
   799→                  </Button>
   800→                )}
   801→              </div>
   802→            </div>
   803→          ) : (
   804→            <div className="space-y-4">
   805→              {groupedByUser.map((group, groupIdx) => {
   806→                const isCollapsed = collapsedUsers.has(group.key);
   807→                const colors = group.key === '_unassigned'
   808→                  ? { bg: 'bg-slate-50', text: 'text-slate-600', border: 'border-slate-200' }
   809→                  : getColorForIndex(groupIdx);
   810→                const photoUrl = group.key !== '_unassigned' ? userPhotoMap[group.key] : null;
   811→
   812→                return (
   813→                  <div key={group.key}>
   814→                    {/* Group Header */}
   815→                    <div
   816→                      className={`flex items-center justify-between px-4 py-3 ${colors.bg} ${isCollapsed ? 'rounded-lg' : 'rounded-t-lg'} border ${colors.border} ${isCollapsed ? '' : 'border-b-0'} cursor-pointer select-none transition-all`}
   817→                      onClick={() => toggleUserCollapse(group.key)}
   818→                    >
   819→                      <div className="flex items-center gap-3">
   820→                        {isCollapsed ? (
   821→                          <ChevronRight className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
   822→                        ) : (
   823→                          <ChevronDown className={`w-4 h-4 ${colors.text}`} />
   824→                        )}
   825→                        {group.key === '_unassigned' ? (
   826→                          <div className="h-7 w-7 rounded-full bg-slate-200 flex items-center justify-center">
   827→                            <User className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-slate-500" />
   828→                          </div>
   829→                        ) : photoUrl ? (
   830→                          <Image
   831→                            src={photoUrl}
   832→                            alt={group.label}
   833→                            width={28}
   834→                            height={28}
   835→                            className="rounded-full object-cover h-7 w-7"
   836→                          />
   837→                        ) : (
   838→                          <div className={`h-7 w-7 rounded-full bg-[#3e8692]/10 flex items-center justify-center text-[#3e8692] text-xs font-bold`}>
   839→                            {getUserInitials(group.label)}
   840→                          </div>
   841→                        )}
   842→                        <h3 className={`font-semibold ${colors.text}`}>{group.label}</h3>
   843→                        <Badge variant="secondary" className="text-xs font-medium">
   844→                          {group.tasks.length}
   845→                        </Badge>
   846→                      </div>
   847→                    </div>
   848→
   849→                    {/* Group Table */}
   850→                    {!isCollapsed && (
   851→                      <div className="bg-white rounded-b-lg border border-gray-200 border-t-0 overflow-hidden">
   852→                        <div className="overflow-x-auto">
   853→                          {renderTaskTable(group.tasks)}
   854→                        </div>
   855→                      </div>
   856→                    )}
   857→                  </div>
   858→                );
   859→              })}
   860→            </div>
   861→          )}
   862→        </div>
   863→      </div>
   864→
   865→      {/* Add/Edit Dialog */}
   866→      <Dialog open={isFormOpen} onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) { setIsFormOpen(false); setEditingId(null); } }}>
   867→        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-[600px] max-h-[85vh] overflow-hidden">
   868→          <DialogHeader>
   869→            <DialogTitle>{editingId ? 'Edit Task' : 'Add Task'}</DialogTitle>
   870→            <DialogDescription>
   871→              {editingId ? 'Update the task details below.' : 'Create a new task for the team.'}
   872→            </DialogDescription>
   873→          </DialogHeader>
   874→          <div className="space-y-4 max-h-[60vh] overflow-y-auto px-1 pb-4">
   875→            {/* Task Name */}
   876→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   877→              <Label>Task Name <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   878→              <Input
   879→                value={form.task_name}
   880→                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, task_name: e.target.value })}
   881→                placeholder="Enter task name"
   882→                className="auth-input"
   883→              />
   884→            </div>
   885→
   886→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   887→              {/* Assigned To */}
   888→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   889→                <Label>Assigned To</Label>
   890→                <Select value={form.assigned_to} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, assigned_to: v })}>
   891→                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select team member" /></SelectTrigger>
   892→                  <SelectContent>
   893→                    {teamMembers.map((m) => <SelectItem key={m.id} value={m.id}>{m.name}</SelectItem>)}
   894→                  </SelectContent>
   895→                </Select>
   896→              </div>
   897→
   898→              {/* Due Date */}
   899→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   900→                <Label>Due Date</Label>
   901→                <Popover>
   902→                  <PopoverTrigger asChild>
   903→                    <Button
   904→                      variant="outline"
   905→                      className="auth-input justify-start text-left font-normal"
   906→                      style={{ borderColor: '#e5e7eb', backgroundColor: 'white', color: form.due_date ? '#111827' : '#9ca3af' }}
   907→                    >
   908→                      <CalendarIcon className="mr-2 h-4 w-4" />
   909→                      {form.due_date ? form.due_date.toLocaleDateString() : 'Select date'}
   910→                    </Button>
   911→                  </PopoverTrigger>
   912→                  <PopoverContent className="w-auto p-0" align="start">
   913→                    <Calendar
   914→                      mode="single"
   915→                      selected={form.due_date}
   916→                      onSelect={(date) => setForm({ ...form, due_date: date || undefined })}
   917→                      initialFocus
   918→                      classNames={{ day_selected: 'text-white hover:text-white focus:text-white' }}
   919→                      modifiersStyles={{ selected: { backgroundColor: '#3e8692' } }}
   920→                    />
   921→                  </PopoverContent>
   922→                </Popover>
   923→              </div>
   924→            </div>
   925→
   926→            <div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4">
   927→              {/* Frequency */}
   928→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   929→                <Label>Frequency <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   930→                <Select value={form.frequency} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, frequency: v })}>
   931→                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select frequency" /></SelectTrigger>
   932→                  <SelectContent>
   933→                    {FREQUENCIES.map((f) => <SelectItem key={f} value={f}>{FREQUENCY_LABELS[f]}</SelectItem>)}
   934→                  </SelectContent>
   935→                </Select>
   936→              </div>
   937→
   938→              {/* Task Type */}
   939→              <div className="grid gap-2">
   940→                <Label>Task Type <span className="text-red-500">*</span></Label>
   941→                <Select value={form.task_type} onValueChange={(v) => setForm({ ...form, task_type: v })}>
   942→                  <SelectTrigger className="auth-input"><SelectValue placeholder="Select type" /></SelectTrigger>
   943→                  <SelectContent>
   944→                    {TASK_TYPES.map((t) => <SelectItem key={t} value={t}>{t}</SelectItem>)}
   945→                  </SelectContent>
   946→                </Select>
   947→              </div>
   948→            </div>
   949→
   950→            {/* Link */}
   951→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   952→              <Label>Link</Label>
   953→              <Input
   954→                value={form.link}
   955→                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, link: e.target.value })}
   956→                placeholder="https://..."
   957→                className="auth-input"
   958→              />
   959→            </div>
   960→
   961→            {/* Latest Comment */}
   962→            <div className="grid gap-2">
   963→              <Label>Latest Comment</Label>
   964→              <Textarea
   965→                value={form.latest_comment}
   966→                onChange={(e) => setForm({ ...form, latest_comment: e.target.value })}
   967→                placeholder="Add a comment or note..."
   968→                className="auth-input"
   969→                rows={3}
   970→              />
   971→            </div>
   972→          </div>
   973→          <DialogFooter>
   974→            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => { setIsFormOpen(false); setEditingId(null); }}>Cancel</Button>
   975→            <Button
   976→              className="hover:opacity-90"
   977→              style={{ backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' }}
   978→              onClick={handleSubmit}
   979→              disabled={!form.task_name.trim() || !form.frequency || !form.task_type || submitting}
   980→            >
   981→              {submitting ? (
   982→                <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-4 w-4 border-b-2 border-white" />
   983→              ) : editingId ? 'Save Changes' : 'Add Task'}
   984→            </Button>
   985→          </DialogFooter>
   986→        </DialogContent>
   987→      </Dialog>
   988→
   989→      {/* Delete Confirmation */}
   990→      <Dialog open={!!deletingId} onOpenChange={(open) => { if (!open) setDeletingId(null); }}>
   991→        <DialogContent className="max-w-md">
   992→          <DialogHeader>
   993→            <DialogTitle>Delete Task</DialogTitle>
   994→            <DialogDescription>Are you sure you want to delete this task? This action cannot be undone.</DialogDescription>
   995→          </DialogHeader>
   996→          <DialogFooter>
   997→            <Button variant="outline" onClick={() => setDeletingId(null)}>Cancel</Button>
   998→            <Button variant="destructive" onClick={() => deletingId && handleDelete(deletingId)}>Delete</Button>
   999→          </DialogFooter>
  1000→        </DialogContent>
  1001→      </Dialog>
  1002→    </div>
  1003→  );
  1004→}
  1005→
```
</details></tool-use>

<summary>
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user requested implementation of a full Tasks page for their KOL Campaign Manager app. The initial plan included: database migration for a `tasks` table, layout file, sidebar link, and a complete page with 3 tabs (One-Time, Recurring, Client SOP), table view with reordering, search, and full CRUD via dialog. Subsequent requests refined the implementation with: capitalized frequency labels, due date offset fix, grouping tasks by assigned user in separate collapsible tables (like the pipeline page), profile images/avatars in group headers, inline table editing, consistent column widths across tables, and working reorder that persists.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Supabase MCP for database migration and RLS policies
   - Next.js App Router with `'use client'` pages
   - Layout re-export pattern (`export { default } from '../clients/layout'`)
   - Inline cell editing (double-click to edit, blur/Enter to save, Escape to cancel)
   - Inline Select dropdowns for frequency/type fields (delivery-logs pattern)
   - Inline Calendar Popover for date fields
   - `table-fixed` with shared `COL` width constants for consistent column widths across grouped tables
   - `toLocalDateString()` helper to avoid UTC timezone offset when saving dates
   - Grouping data by user with collapsible sections (pipeline page pattern)
   - Profile photo with initials fallback avatar in group headers
   - Optimistic UI updates with rollback on error
   - `sort_order` swap logic for reordering within groups

3. Files and Code Sections:

   - **Database Migration (`create_tasks_table`)**
     - Created via `mcp__supabase__apply_migration`
     - Table: `tasks` with columns: id (uuid PK), task_name (text NOT NULL), assigned_to (uuid FK auth.users), assigned_to_name (text), due_date (date), latest_comment (text), frequency (text with CHECK constraint), task_type (text with CHECK constraint), link (text), created_by (uuid FK), created_by_name (text), sort_order (integer DEFAULT 0), created_at, updated_at
     - RLS enabled with authenticated full access policy

   - **`app/tasks/layout.tsx`** (Created)
     - Re-exports clients layout, same pattern as daily-standup and delivery-logs
     ```tsx
     'use client';
     export { default } from '../clients/layout';
     ```

   - **`components/Sidebar.tsx`** (Modified)
     - Added `ListTodo` to lucide-react imports
     - Added Tasks link under Workspace section, after Daily Stand-Up:
     ```tsx
     <Link href="/tasks" legacyBehavior>
       <Button asChild variant={pathname.startsWith('/tasks') ? 'default' : 'ghost'} ...>
         <span>
           <ListTodo className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
           {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Tasks'}
         </span>
       </Button>
     </Link>
     ```

   - **`app/tasks/page.tsx`** (Created, then rewritten 3 times)
     - Most recent version is ~1005 lines with all features
     - Key patterns/constants:
       ```tsx
       const FREQUENCY_LABELS: Record<string, string> = {
         'one-time': 'One-Time', 'daily': 'Daily', 'weekly': 'Weekly',
         'monthly': 'Monthly', 'recurring': 'Recurring',
       };
       
       const toLocalDateString = (date: Date) => {
         const year = date.getFullYear();
         const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
         const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
         return `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
       };
       
       const COL = {
         reorder: 'w-[50px]', taskName: 'w-[22%] min-w-[180px]',
         dueDate: 'w-[110px]', comment: 'w-[20%] min-w-[140px]',
         frequency: 'w-[100px]', type: 'w-[140px]', link: 'w-[80px]',
         createdBy: 'w-[100px]', created: 'w-[80px]', actions: 'w-[80px]',
       };
       ```
     - TeamMember type now includes `profile_photo_url: string | null`
     - `EditingCell` type: `{ taskId: string; field: string } | null`
     - Inline editing functions: `startEditing`, `cancelEditing`, `saveInlineEdit`, `saveSelectField`, `saveDateField`
     - Group header with profile photo/avatar/initials fallback:
       ```tsx
       {group.key === '_unassigned' ? (
         <div className="h-7 w-7 rounded-full bg-slate-200 flex items-center justify-center">
           <User className="h-3.5 w-3.5 text-slate-500" />
         </div>
       ) : photoUrl ? (
         <Image src={photoUrl} alt={group.label} width={28} height={28}
           className="rounded-full object-cover h-7 w-7" />
       ) : (
         <div className="h-7 w-7 rounded-full bg-[#3e8692]/10 flex items-center justify-center text-[#3e8692] text-xs font-bold">
           {getUserInitials(group.label)}
         </div>
       )}
       ```
     - Shared `tableHeader` JSX and `renderTaskRow` function used by `renderTaskTable` for consistent columns
     - Table uses `table-fixed` class for consistent widths
     - Inline select for frequency with capitalized labels and colored badges
     - Inline calendar popover for due date
     - Action column has Expand (popup edit) and Trash2 (delete) buttons
     - `handleReorder` takes `groupTasks` parameter to scope reordering within user groups

   - **Reference files read** (not modified):
     - `app/daily-standup/page.tsx` — Header/tabs/search/dialog patterns
     - `app/delivery-logs/page.tsx` — Table/inline editing/reorder/calendar patterns  
     - `app/crm/pipeline/page.tsx` — Collapsible stage grouping pattern (DroppableStageTable)
     - `lib/userService.ts` — `getAllUsers()` returns full UserProfile with profile_photo_url

4. Errors and Fixes:
   - **Due date offset**: `form.due_date.toISOString().split('T')[0]` converted to UTC which shifted dates. Fixed by creating `toLocalDateString()` helper that uses `getFullYear()`/`getMonth()`/`getDate()` to stay in local timezone.
   - **Frequency not capitalized in table**: Initially showed raw DB values like "one-time". Fixed by using `FREQUENCY_LABELS[task.frequency]` in both the dialog dropdown and the table display.
   - **User reported reorder not working/saving**: The reorder logic was present with `supabase.from('tasks').update()` calls. The fix involved ensuring `handleReorder` receives the correct `groupTasks` array (scoped to the user group) and properly passes it through `renderTaskRow`.

5. Problem Solving:
   - Solved grouping by user using `useMemo` with a Map, sorted alphabetically with Unassigned last
   - Solved consistent column widths by using a shared `COL` constant object and `table-fixed` class
   - Solved inline editing by following delivery-logs pattern with `editingCell` state tracking taskId+field
   - Security advisor check confirmed no new issues beyond expected `rls_policy_always_true` warning (matches existing project pattern)

6. All User Messages:
   - "Implement the following plan: [detailed Tasks page plan with DB migration, layout, sidebar, page with tabs/table/reorder/CRUD]"
   - "Make the frequency dropdown values in the popup so that it is capitalized"
   - "In the table it should be capitalized as well. Also it seems to save the due date wrong. There seems to be an offset. Also divide different tasks by user in different tables like the pipeline page."
   - "Instead of the color dot, put the profile image or avatar if it doesnt exist. Also make the table directly editable as well like the pipeline page. Also the field width should be consistent throughout all the tables. It also seems like I can't change the order of the fields (this should save as well)."

7. Pending Tasks:
   - Verify build passes after the latest rewrite (profile images, inline editing, consistent widths, reorder fix)
   - The user has not confirmed the latest changes work correctly yet

8. Current Work:
   The most recent work was a full rewrite of `app/tasks/page.tsx` addressing the user's last message: "Instead of the color dot, put the profile image or avatar if it doesnt exist. Also make the table directly editable as well like the pipeline page. Also the field width should be consistent throughout all the tables. It also seems like I can't change the order of the fields (this should save as well)."
   
   The file was written with all four changes:
   1. Profile photo/avatar initials/User icon in group headers (replacing color dot)
   2. Full inline editing (double-click for text/textarea, inline Select for frequency/type, inline Calendar for due date)
   3. `COL` width constants + `table-fixed` + shared `tableHeader` for consistent widths
   4. Reorder with `handleReorder` receiving `groupTasks` for scoped within-group ordering, saving via `supabase.from('tasks').update()`

9. Optional Next Step:
   Run `npx next build` to verify the latest rewrite compiles without errors, as the build was not run after the most recent file write.
</summary>

```text
     1→'use client';
     2→
     3→import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
     4→import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader } from '@/components/ui/card';
     5→import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
     6→import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
     7→import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton';
     8→import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
     9→import { Search, Shield, Loader2 } from 'lucide-react';
    10→import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase';
    11→import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
    12→import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
    13→import { UserService } from '@/lib/userService';
    14→
    15→interface TeamMember {
    16→  id: string;
    17→  name: string;
    18→  email: string;
    19→  role: string;
    20→  created_at: string | null;
    21→  updated_at: string | null;
    22→  is_active: boolean;
    23→  telegram_id?: string | null;
    24→  x_id?: string | null;
    25→  profile_photo_url?: string | null;
    26→}
    27→
    28→export default function TeamPage() {
    29→  const [teamMembers, setTeamMembers] = useState<TeamMember[]>([]);
    30→  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
    31→  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
    32→  const [isSuperAdmin, setIsSuperAdmin] = useState(false);
    33→  const [updatingRoleId, setUpdatingRoleId] = useState<string | null>(null);
    34→  const { toast } = useToast();
    35→  const { userProfile } = useAuth();
    36→
    37→  useEffect(() => {
    38→    fetchTeamMembers();
    39→    checkSuperAdminStatus();
    40→  }, []);
    41→
    42→  const checkSuperAdminStatus = async () => {
    43→    const isSuper = await UserService.isCurrentUserSuperAdmin();
    44→    setIsSuperAdmin(isSuper);
    45→  };
    46→
    47→  const handleRoleChange = async (userId: string, newRole: string) => {
    48→    if (!isSuperAdmin) return;
    49→
    50→    setUpdatingRoleId(userId);
    51→    try {
    52→      const success = await UserService.updateUserRole(
    53→        userId,
    54→        newRole as 'super_admin' | 'admin' | 'member' | 'guest'
    55→      );
    56→
    57→      if (success) {
    58→        setTeamMembers(prev =>
    59→          prev.map(member =>
    60→            member.id === userId ? { ...member, role: newRole } : member
    61→          )
    62→        );
    63→        toast({
    64→          title: 'Role updated',
    65→          description: 'User role has been updated successfully.',
    66→        });
    67→      } else {
    68→        toast({
    69→          title: 'Error',
    70→          description: 'Failed to update user role.',
    71→          variant: 'destructive',
    72→        });
    73→      }
    74→    } catch (error) {
    75→      console.error('Error updating role:', error);
    76→      toast({
    77→        title: 'Error',
    78→        description: 'Failed to update user role.',
    79→        variant: 'destructive',
    80→      });
    81→    } finally {
    82→      setUpdatingRoleId(null);
    83→    }
    84→  };
    85→
    86→  const fetchTeamMembers = async () => {
    87→    try {
    88→      setLoading(true);
    89→      
    90→      // Fetch all users except those with guest role
    91→      const { data: users, error } = await supabase
    92→        .from('users')
    93→        .select('*')
    94→        .neq('role', 'guest')
    95→        .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
    96→
    97→      if (error) {
    98→        console.error('Error fetching team members:', error);
    99→        toast({
   100→          title: 'Error',
   101→          description: 'Failed to fetch team members.',
   102→          variant: 'destructive',
   103→        });
   104→        return;
   105→      }
   106→
   107→      setTeamMembers(users || []);
   108→    } catch (error) {
   109→      console.error('Error fetching team members:', error);
   110→      toast({
   111→        title: 'Error',
   112→        description: 'Failed to fetch team members.',
   113→        variant: 'destructive',
   114→      });
   115→    } finally {
   116→      setLoading(false);
   117→    }
   118→  };
   119→
   120→  const filteredTeamMembers = teamMembers.filter(member =>
   121→    member.name?.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase()) ||
   122→    member.email?.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())
   123→  );
   124→
   125→  const getUserInitials = (name: string) => {
   126→    return name
   127→      .split(' ')
   128→      .map(word => word.charAt(0).toUpperCase())
   129→      .join('')
   130→      .slice(0, 2);
   131→  };
   132→
   133→  const formatDate = (dateString: string | null) => {
   134→    if (!dateString) return 'Unknown date';
   135→    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
   136→      year: 'numeric',
   137→      month: 'short',
   138→      day: 'numeric'
   139→    });
   140→  };
   141→
   142→  if (loading) {
   143→    return (
   144→      <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] w-full bg-gray-50">
   145→        <div className="w-full">
   146→          <div className="space-y-6">
   147→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   148→              <div>
   149→                <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Team Members</h2>
   150→                <p className="text-gray-600">Manage your team members</p>
   151→              </div>
   152→            </div>
   153→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   154→              <div className="relative flex-1 max-w-sm">
   155→                <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   156→                <Input placeholder="Search team members..." className="pl-10 auth-input" disabled />
   157→              </div>
   158→            </div>
   159→            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
   160→              {Array.from({ length: 6 }).map((_, index) => (
   161→                <Card key={index}>
   162→                  <CardHeader className="pb-4">
   163→                    <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
   164→                      <Skeleton className="h-16 w-16 rounded-full mb-3" />
   165→                      <div className="mb-2">
   166→                        <Skeleton className="h-6 w-32 mb-2" />
   167→                        <Skeleton className="h-4 w-48 mb-2" />
   168→                      </div>
   169→                      <Skeleton className="h-5 w-16 rounded-full" />
   170→                    </div>
   171→                  </CardHeader>
   172→                  <CardContent className="space-y-3">
   173→                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   174→                      <Skeleton className="h-4 w-20" />
   175→                      <Skeleton className="h-4 w-24" />
   176→                    </div>
   177→                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   178→                      <Skeleton className="h-4 w-16" />
   179→                      <Skeleton className="h-4 w-16" />
   180→                    </div>
   181→                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   182→                      <Skeleton className="h-4 w-20" />
   183→                      <Skeleton className="h-4 w-24" />
   184→                    </div>
   185→                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   186→                      <Skeleton className="h-4 w-24" />
   187→                      <Skeleton className="h-4 w-24" />
   188→                    </div>
   189→                  </CardContent>
   190→                </Card>
   191→              ))}
   192→            </div>
   193→          </div>
   194→        </div>
   195→      </div>
   196→    );
   197→  }
   198→
   199→  return (
   200→    <div className="min-h-[calc(100vh-64px)] w-full bg-gray-50">
   201→      <div className="w-full">
   202→        <div className="space-y-6">
   203→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   204→            <div>
   205→              <h2 className="text-2xl font-bold text-gray-900">Team Members</h2>
   206→              <p className="text-gray-600">Manage your team members</p>
   207→            </div>
   208→          </div>
   209→          
   210→          <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   211→            <div className="relative flex-1 max-w-sm">
   212→              <Search className="absolute left-3 top-1/2 transform -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-gray-400" />
   213→              <Input
   214→                placeholder="Search team members..."
   215→                className="pl-10 auth-input"
   216→                value={searchTerm}
   217→                onChange={(e) => setSearchTerm(e.target.value)}
   218→              />
   219→            </div>
   220→          </div>
   221→
   222→          {filteredTeamMembers.length === 0 ? (
   223→            <div className="text-center py-12">
   224→              <Shield className="h-12 w-12 text-gray-400 mx-auto mb-4" />
   225→              <h3 className="text-lg font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">
   226→                {searchTerm ? 'No team members found' : 'No team members yet'}
   227→              </h3>
   228→              <p className="text-gray-600">
   229→                {searchTerm 
   230→                  ? 'Try adjusting your search terms.' 
   231→                  : 'Team members will appear here.'
   232→                }
   233→              </p>
   234→            </div>
   235→          ) : (
   236→            <div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-6">
   237→              {filteredTeamMembers.map((member) => (
   238→                <Card key={member.id}>
   239→                  <CardHeader className="pb-4">
   240→                    <div className="flex flex-col items-center text-center">
   241→                      {member.profile_photo_url ? (
   242→                        <div className="w-16 h-16 rounded-full overflow-hidden mb-3 relative">
   243→                          <img 
   244→                            src={member.profile_photo_url} 
   245→                            alt={`${member.name || 'User'} profile`}
   246→                            className="w-full h-full object-cover"
   247→                            onError={(e) => {
   248→                              // Fallback to initials if image fails to load
   249→                              const target = e.target as HTMLImageElement;
   250→                              target.style.display = 'none';
   251→                              target.nextElementSibling?.classList.remove('hidden');
   252→                            }}
   253→                          />
   254→                          <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-[#3e8692] to-[#2d6470] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center absolute top-0 left-0 hidden">
   255→                            <span className="text-white font-bold text-xl">
   256→                              {getUserInitials(member.name || member.email)}
   257→                            </span>
   258→                          </div>
   259→                        </div>
   260→                      ) : (
   261→                        <div className="w-16 h-16 bg-gradient-to-br from-[#3e8692] to-[#2d6470] rounded-full flex items-center justify-center mb-3">
   262→                          <span className="text-white font-bold text-xl">
   263→                            {getUserInitials(member.name || member.email)}
   264→                          </span>
   265→                        </div>
   266→                      )}
   267→                      <div className="mb-2">
   268→                        <h3 className="font-semibold text-gray-900 text-lg">
   269→                          {member.name || 'Unnamed User'}
   270→                        </h3>
   271→                        <p className="text-sm text-gray-500">{member.email}</p>
   272→                      </div>
   273→                      <div className="flex items-center space-x-2">
   274→                        {isSuperAdmin && member.id !== userProfile?.id ? (
   275→                          <div className="relative">
   276→                            {updatingRoleId === member.id && (
   277→                              <div className="absolute inset-0 flex items-center justify-center bg-white/80 rounded z-10">
   278→                                <Loader2 className="h-4 w-4 animate-spin text-[#3e8692]" />
   279→                              </div>
   280→                            )}
   281→                            <Select
   282→                              value={member.role}
   283→                              onValueChange={(value) => handleRoleChange(member.id, value)}
   284→                              disabled={updatingRoleId === member.id}
   285→                            >
   286→                              <SelectTrigger className="h-7 text-xs w-[120px]">
   287→                                <SelectValue />
   288→                              </SelectTrigger>
   289→                              <SelectContent>
   290→                                <SelectItem value="super_admin">Super Admin</SelectItem>
   291→                                <SelectItem value="admin">Admin</SelectItem>
   292→                                <SelectItem value="member">Member</SelectItem>
   293→                                <SelectItem value="guest">Guest</SelectItem>
   294→                              </SelectContent>
   295→                            </Select>
   296→                          </div>
   297→                        ) : (
   298→                          <span className={`inline-flex items-center px-2 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-medium ${
   299→                            member.role === 'super_admin'
   300→                              ? 'bg-purple-100 text-purple-800'
   301→                              : 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800'
   302→                          }`}>
   303→                            {member.role === 'super_admin'
   304→                              ? 'Super Admin'
   305→                              : member.role.charAt(0).toUpperCase() + member.role.slice(1)}
   306→                          </span>
   307→                        )}
   308→                      </div>
   309→                    </div>
   310→                  </CardHeader>
   311→                  <CardContent className="space-y-3">
   312→                    {/* Join Date */}
   313→                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   314→                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Join Date</span>
   315→                      <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">
   316→                        {formatDate(member.created_at)}
   317→                      </span>
   318→                    </div>
   319→
   320→                    {/* Status */}
   321→                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   322→                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Status</span>
   323→                      <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">
   324→                        {member.is_active ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}
   325→                      </span>
   326→                    </div>
   327→
   328→                    {/* Telegram Status */}
   329→                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   330→                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Telegram</span>
   331→                      <span className={`font-medium ${member.telegram_id ? 'text-green-600' : 'text-red-600'}`}>
   332→                        {member.telegram_id ? 'Connected' : 'Disconnected'}
   333→                      </span>
   334→                    </div>
   335→
   336→                    {/* X ID */}
   337→                    <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   338→                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">X</span>
   339→                      <span className={`font-medium ${member.x_id ? 'text-gray-900' : 'text-red-600'}`}>
   340→                        {member.x_id ? (
   341→                          <a 
   342→                            href={`https://x.com/${member.x_id}`} 
   343→                            target="_blank" 
   344→                            rel="noopener noreferrer"
   345→                            className="hover:underline"
   346→                          >
   347→                            @{member.x_id}
   348→                          </a>
   349→                        ) : (
   350→                          'Not set'
   351→                        )}
   352→                      </span>
   353→                    </div>
   354→
   355→                    {/* Last Updated */}
   356→                    {member.updated_at && (
   357→                      <div className="flex items-center justify-between">
   358→                        <span className="text-sm text-gray-600">Last Updated</span>
   359→                        <span className="font-medium text-gray-900">
   360→                          {formatDate(member.updated_at)}
   361→                        </span>
   362→                      </div>
   363→                    )}
   364→                  </CardContent>
   365→                </Card>
```

```text
   109→
   110→const getDueDateColor = (dueDate: string | null) => {
   111→  if (!dueDate) return '';
   112→  const today = new Date();
   113→  today.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
   114→  const due = new Date(dueDate + 'T00:00:00');
   115→  const diffDays = Math.ceil((due.getTime() - today.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
   116→  if (diffDays < 0) return 'text-red-600 font-semibold';
   117→  if (diffDays <= 3) return 'text-amber-600 font-semibold';
   118→  return 'text-gray-600';
   119→};
   120→
   121→/** Format a Date to YYYY-MM-DD in local timezone (avoids UTC offset issues) */
   122→const toLocalDateString = (date: Date) => {
   123→  const year = date.getFullYear();
   124→  const month = String(date.getMonth() + 1).padStart(2, '0');
   125→  const day = String(date.getDate()).padStart(2, '0');
   126→  return `${year}-${month}-${day}`;
   127→};

   143→export default function TasksPage() {
   144→  const { user, userProfile } = useAuth();
```
