`head -50 "/Users/andylee/Downloads/KOL Campaign Manager/lib/campaignKolService.ts"`

```text
import { supabase } from './supabase';

export interface CampaignKOL {
  id: string;
  campaign_id: string;
  master_kol_id: string;
  hh_status: 'Curated' | 'Contacted' | 'Interested' | 'Onboarded' | 'Concluded' | null;
  client_status?: 'Rejected' | 'Preferred' | null;
  notes?: string | null;
  allocated_budget?: number | null;
  budget_type?: 'Token' | 'Fiat' | 'WL' | null;
  paid?: number | null;
  wallet?: string | null;
  hidden?: boolean | null;
  created_at?: string | null;
  updated_at?: string | null;
}

export interface CampaignKOLWithDetails extends CampaignKOL {
  master_kol: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    link?: string | null;
    platform?: string[] | null;
    followers?: number | null;
    region?: string | null;
    community?: boolean | null;
    content_type?: string[] | null;
    creator_type?: string[] | null;
    niche?: string[] | null;
    pricing?: string | null;
    tier?: string | null;
    rating?: number | null;
    group_chat?: boolean | null;
    description?: string | null;
    wallet?: string | null;
  };
}

export class CampaignKOLService {
  static async getCampaignKOLs(campaignId: string): Promise<CampaignKOLWithDetails[]> {
    const { data, error } = await supabase
      .from('campaign_kols')
      .select(`
        *,
        master_kol:master_kols(*)
      `)
      .eq('campaign_id', campaignId)
      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
import { supabase } from '@/lib/supabase';
import { KOLService } from '@/lib/kolService';
import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
import { generateUniqueSlug } from '@/lib/slugUtils';

interface SavedSortOrder {
  field: string;
  direction: 'asc' | 'desc';
}

interface ListItem {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  slug?: string | null;
  notes: string | null;
  status?: string | null;
  approved_emails?: string[] | null;
  sort_order?: SavedSortOrder | null;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
  kols?: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    platform: string[] | null;
    followers: number | null;
    region: string | null;
    link: string | null;
    creator_type: string[] | null;
    rating?: number | null;
    status?: string | null;
    notes?: string | null;
  }[];
}

// Utility functions (matching campaigns details page)
const getStatusColor = (status: string) => {
  switch (status) {
    case 'curated': return 'bg-blue-100 text-blue-800';
    case 'interested': return 'bg-yellow-100 text-yellow-800';
    case 'onboarded': return 'bg-green-100 text-green-800';
    case 'concluded': return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800';
    default: return 'bg-gray-100 text-gray-800';
  }
};

const getRegionIcon = (region: string) => {
  const regionMap: { [key: string]: { flag: string; icon: any } } = {
    'Vietnam': { flag: '🇻🇳', icon: Flag },
    'Turkey': { flag: '🇹🇷', icon: Flag },
    'SEA': { flag: '🌏', icon: Globe },
    'Philippines': { flag: '🇵🇭', icon: Flag },
    'Korea': { flag: '🇰🇷', icon: Flag },
    'Global': { flag: '🌍', icon: Globe },
    'China': { flag: '🇨🇳', icon: Flag },
    'Brazil': { flag: '🇧🇷', icon: Flag }
  };
  return regionMap[region] || { flag: '🏳️', icon: Flag };
};

const getPlatformIcon = (platform: string) => {
  switch (platform) {
    case 'X':
      return <span className="font-bold text-black text-sm">𝕏</span>;
    case 'Telegram':
      return (
        <svg className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-500" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor">
          <path d="M12 2C6.48 2 2 6.48 2 12s4.48 10 10 10 10-4.48 10-10S17.52 2 12 2zm4.64 6.8c-.15 1.58-.8 5.42-1.13 7.19-.14.75-.42 1-.68 1.03-.58.05-1.02-.38-1.58-.75-.88-.58-1.38-.94-2.23-1.5-.99-.65-.35-1.01.22-1.59.15-.15 2.71-2.48 2.76-2.69a.2.2 0 0 0-.05-.18c-.06-.05-.14-.03-.21-.02-.09.02-1.49.95-4.22 2.79-.4.27-.76.41-1.08.4-.36-.01-1.04-.2-1.55-.37-.63-.2-1.13-.31-1.09-.66.02-.18.27-.36.74-.55 2.92-1.27 4.86-2.11 5.83-2.51 2.78-1.16 3.35-1.36 3.73-1.36.08 0 .27.02.39.12.1.08.13.19.14.27-.01.06.01.24 0 .38z"/>
        </svg>
      );
    case 'YouTube':
      return (
        <svg className="h-4 w-4 text-red-500" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor">
          <path d="M23.498 6.186a3.016 3.016 0 0 0-2.122-2.136C19.505 3.545 12 3.545 12 3.545s-7.505 0-9.377.505A3.017 3.017 0 0 0 .502 6.186C0 8.07 0 12 0 12s0 3.93.502 5.814a3.016 3.016 0 0 0 2.122 2.136c1.871.505 9.376.505 9.376.505s7.505 0 9.377-.505a3.015 3.015 0 0 0 2.122-2.136C24 15.93 24 12 24 12s0-3.93-.502-5.814zM9.545 15.568V8.432L15.818 12l-6.273 3.568z"/>
        </svg>
      );
    case 'Facebook':
      return (
        <svg className="h-4 w-4 text-blue-600" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor">
          <path d="M24 12.073c0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12s-12 5.373-12 12c0 5.99 4.388 10.954 10.125 11.854v-8.385H7.078v-3.47h3.047V9.43c0-3.007 1.792-4.669 4.533-4.669 1.312 0 2.686.235 2.686.235v2.953H15.83c-1.491 0-1.956.925-1.956 1.874v2.25h3.328l-.532 3.47h-2.796v8.385C19.612 23.027 24 18.062 24 12.073z"/>
        </svg>
      );
```

```text
'use client';

import React, { useState, useEffect } from 'react';
import { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { MessageSquare, Copy, TrendingUp, Calendar, Info, Star, Sparkles, User } from 'lucide-react';
import { useToast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
import {
  Dialog,
  DialogContent,
  DialogDescription,
  DialogHeader,
  DialogTitle,
} from '@/components/ui/dialog';
import { Tabs, TabsContent, TabsList, TabsTrigger } from '@/components/ui/tabs';

interface MessageTemplate {
  id: string;
  name: string;
  message_type: string;
  subject?: string;
  content: string;
  variables: string[];
  usage_count: number;
  last_used_at?: string;
  is_active: boolean;
  created_at: string;
}

interface MessageExample {
  id: string;
  user_id: string;
  client_id?: string;
  campaign_id?: string;
  message_type: string;
  content: string;
  was_ai_generated: boolean;
  user_rating?: number;
  was_edited: boolean;
  edit_count: number;
  was_sent: boolean;
  created_at: string;
  client_name?: string;
  campaign_name?: string;
}

export default function TemplatesPage() {
  const [templates, setTemplates] = useState<MessageTemplate[]>([]);
  const [learningExamples, setLearningExamples] = useState<MessageExample[]>([]);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [loadingExamples, setLoadingExamples] = useState(false);
  const [selectedTemplate, setSelectedTemplate] = useState<MessageTemplate | null>(null);
  const [selectedExample, setSelectedExample] = useState<MessageExample | null>(null);
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'templates' | 'examples'>('templates');
  const { toast } = useToast();

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchTemplates();
    fetchLearningExamples();
  }, []);

  const fetchTemplates = async () => {
    try {
      const response = await fetch('/api/templates');
      if (response.ok) {
        const data = await response.json();
        setTemplates(data);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching templates:', error);
      toast({
        title: 'Error',
        description: 'Failed to load templates',
        variant: 'destructive',
      });
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const fetchLearningExamples = async () => {
    setLoadingExamples(true);
    try {
      const response = await fetch('/api/templates/examples');
      if (response.ok) {
        const data = await response.json();
        setLearningExamples(data);
      }
    } catch (error) {
      console.error('Error fetching learning examples:', error);
      toast({
        title: 'Error',
        description: 'Failed to load learning examples',
        variant: 'destructive',
      });
    } finally {
      setLoadingExamples(false);
    }
  };
```
</details></tool-use>

Perfect! Now I have comprehensive information. Let me create a detailed summary document:

---

# COMPREHENSIVE KOL CAMPAIGN MANAGER CRM STRUCTURE OVERVIEW

## PROJECT ARCHITECTURE SUMMARY

**Project Name:** Holo Hive (KOL Campaign Manager)
**Tech Stack:** Next.js 14+, TypeScript, React, Supabase (PostgreSQL), Tailwind CSS
**Authentication:** Supabase Auth (JWT-based + Modern publishable keys)
**Real-time:** Supabase Realtime with Telegram integration
**AI Integration:** OpenAI API with advanced agent orchestration
**Database:** PostgreSQL with Row-Level Security (RLS) policies

---

## 1. ALL PAGES/ROUTES IN THE APP DIRECTORY

### **Core CRM Features**
- `/crm/pipeline` - Sales pipeline with leads/deals/accounts management (Kanban & Table views)
- `/crm/contacts` - Contact management and relationship tracking
- `/crm/network` - Partners and affiliates network management
- `/crm/telegram` - Telegram group chat management (Super Admin only)

### **People Management**
- `/team` - Team member management with role assignment
- `/clients` - Client management with delivery logs, meeting notes, context & decisions
- `/kols` - Master KOL database with extensive filtering and inline editing

### **Campaign Management**
- `/campaigns` - Campaign list view
- `/campaigns/[id]` - Campaign details with KOL allocation, budget tracking, reporting, and multi-content support
- `/delivery-logs` - Delivery log tracking for client work items

### **KOL & Audience Management**
- `/lists` - Custom KOL lists with saved filters and public sharing
- `/links` - Link management for distribution

### **Documentation & Configuration**
- `/templates` - Message templates and AI learning examples
- `/forms` - Form builder for data collection (Admin only)
- `/sops` - Standard operating procedures documentation (Admin only)

### **Admin & Settings**
- `/admin/field-options` - Field configuration for dropdown options
- `/admin/changelog` - Version history and updates (Super Admin only)
- `/settings` - User profile, Telegram webhook configuration
- `/archive` - Archived records management

### **AI & Automation**
- `/chat` - "Holo GPT" AI assistant with campaign suggestions, advanced insights, and agent actions
- `/ai-insights` - AI predictive insights

### **Workspace** (Internal Testing - andy@holohive.io only)
- `/daily-standup` - Daily standup tracking
- `/tasks` - Task management

### **Public Pages**
- `/public/page` - Public landing page
- `/public/forms/[id]` - Public form submissions
- `/public/lists/[id]` - Public KOL lists
- `/public/lists/test` - Test public lists
- `/public/campaigns/[id]` - Public campaign view
- `/public/reports/[id]` - Public campaign reports
- `/public/portal/[id]` - Client portal
- `/public/leads/submit` - Lead submission form
- `/public/partners/submit` - Partner submission form
- `/public/links/submit` - Link submission form
- `/public/standup/submit` - Standup submission form

### **Authentication**
- `/auth` - Login page
- `/auth/reset-password` - Password reset

---

## 2. KEY SERVICES IN /lib DIRECTORY

### **Core Services**

| Service | Main Exports/Functions | Purpose |
|---------|----------------------|---------|
| **crmService.ts** | `CRMService`, `CRMOpportunity`, `CRMAffiliate`, `CRMPartner`, `CRMContact`, `CRMContactLink`, `CRMStageHistory` | Unified sales pipeline (leads+deals), partner/affiliate management, contact tracking, stage history |
| **campaignService.ts** | `CampaignService`, `CampaignWithDetails` | Campaign CRUD, budget allocations, RLS-enforced access |
| **clientService.ts** | `ClientService`, `ClientWithAccess` | Client management with role-based access (admin vs member) |
| **kolService.ts** | `KOLService`, `MasterKOL`, `CreateKOLData` | Master KOL database management with field options |
| **campaignKolService.ts** | `CampaignKOLService`, `CampaignKOLWithDetails` | Links KOLs to campaigns with status tracking |

### **AI & Automation Services**

| Service | Main Exports/Functions | Purpose |
|---------|----------------------|---------|
| **aiService.ts** | `AIService`, `CampaignSuggestion`, `ListSuggestion` | Basic AI suggestions for campaigns and lists |
| **advancedAIService.ts** | `AdvancedAIService`, `PredictiveInsight` | Advanced predictive analytics and insights |
| **agentOrchestrator.ts** | `AgentOrchestrator` | Coordinates agent actions and tool execution |
| **agentTools.ts** | Agent tool definitions | Tools available to AI agents |
| **chatService.ts** | `ChatService`, `ChatSessionWithMessages` | Chat session management |
| **openaiService.ts** | OpenAI API integration | Direct OpenAI API calls |
| **messageTrainingService.ts** | Message training data | AI learning from past messages |
| **messageTemplateService.ts** | Message templates | Reusable message templates |

### **Form & Data Services**

| Service | Main Exports/Functions | Purpose |
|---------|----------------------|---------|
| **formService.ts** | Form CRUD, responses, attachments | Dynamic form builder with validation |
| **fieldOptionsService.ts** | Field options management | Dropdown/multi-select options configuration |
| **listService.ts** | List management with filters | KOL list creation and filtering |

### **Integration Services**

| Service | Main Exports/Functions | Purpose |
|---------|----------------------|---------|
| **telegramService.ts** | Telegram integration | Telegram bot and group management |
| **supabase.ts** | Supabase client | Client-side Supabase instance |
| **supabase-server.ts** | Server Supabase | Server-side Supabase with RLS |

### **Utility Services**

| Service | Main Exports/Functions | Purpose |
|---------|----------------------|---------|
| **userService.ts** | User CRUD, role management | Team member management |
| **vectorStore.ts** | Vector embeddings | Semantic search support |
| **changelogService.ts** | Changelog management | Version history tracking |
| **campaignTemplateService.ts** | Campaign templates | Reusable campaign templates |
| **slugUtils.ts** | Slug generation | URL-safe slug creation |
| **agentToolLogger.ts** | Tool execution logging | Agent action audit trail |

---

## 3. DATABASE TABLES - SUPABASE SCHEMA

### **Core CRM Tables**

```
crm_opportunities
├── id, name, stage, account_type
├── deal_value, currency, source, referrer
├── owner_id, affiliate_id, client_id
├── last_contacted_at, last_message_at, last_reply_at, last_team_message_at
├── scope (fundraising, advisory, kol_activation, gtm, bd_partnerships, apac)
├── gc (telegram group chat), notes, position
└── Timestamps: created_at, qualified_at, closed_at, updated_at

crm_affiliates
├── id, name, affiliation, category, status (new/active/inactive)
├── commission_model, commission_rate, terms_of_interest
├── owner_id, poc_name, poc_email, poc_telegram
├── last_contacted_at, notes
└── Timestamps: created_at, updated_at

crm_partners
├── id, name, category (service_provider/investor_vc/project/individual)
├── focus, status (active/inactive)
├── owner_id, poc_name, poc_email, poc_telegram
├── is_affiliate, affiliate_id, notes
└── Timestamps: created_at, updated_at

crm_contacts
├── id, name, email, telegram_id, x_id, role, category
├── owner_id, notes
└── Timestamps: created_at, updated_at

crm_contact_links
├── id, contact_id (FK), linked_type (opportunity/partner/affiliate)
├── opportunity_id, partner_id, affiliate_id
├── role, is_primary
└── created_at

crm_stage_history
├── id, object_type, object_id
├── from_stage, to_stage, changed_by, notes
└── changed_at
```

### **Campaign Management Tables**

```
campaigns
├── id, client_id, name, description
├── status (Planning/Active/Paused/Completed), total_budget
├── start_date, end_date, region
├── manager, created_by, outline
├── intro_call, nda_signed, proposal_sent, call_support
├── budget_type (array), client_choosing_kols, multi_activation
├── archived_at, share_report_publicly, report_share_link
└── Timestamps: created_at, updated_at

campaign_kols
├── id, campaign_id, master_kol_id
├── hh_status (Curated/Contacted/Interested/Onboarded/Concluded)
├── client_status (Rejected/Preferred)
├── allocated_budget, budget_type (Token/Fiat/WL), paid, wallet
├── notes, hidden
└── Timestamps: created_at, updated_at

campaign_budget_allocations
├── id, campaign_id, region, allocated_budget
└── Timestamps: created_at, updated_at

campaign_reports
├── id, campaign_id, custom_message
└── Timestamps: created_at, updated_at

campaign_report_files
├── id, campaign_id, file_name, file_url, file_type, file_size
├── is_public, uploaded_by, display_order
└── created_at

campaign_updates
├── id, campaign_id, update_text
└── Timestamps: created_at, updated_at
```

### **Client Management Tables**

```
clients
├── id, name, email, location, is_active
├── logo_url, whitelist_partner_id
├── archived_at
└── Timestamps: created_at, updated_at

client_access_members
├── id, client_id, user_id, role
└── created_at

client_context
├── id, client_id, engagement_type, scope
├── start_date, milestones, client_contacts, holohive_contacts
└── Timestamps: created_at, updated_at

client_meeting_notes
├── id, client_id, title, content, meeting_date
├── attendees, action_items, created_by
└── Timestamps: created_at, updated_at

client_decision_log
├── id, client_id, decision_date, summary, created_by
└── created_at

client_weekly_updates
├── id, client_id, week_of, current_focus
├── active_initiatives, next_checkin, open_questions, created_by
└── Timestamps: created_at, updated_at
```

### **KOL Management Tables**

```
master_kols
├── id, name, link, platform (array)
├── followers, region, community, group_chat, in_house
├── deliverables, creator_type, content_type, niche (arrays)

├── archived_at
└── Timestamps: created_at, updated_at
```

### **Form & List Tables**

```
forms
├── id, name, description, form_type, is_active
├── created_by, show_results, allow_duplicate_responses
└── Timestamps: created_at, updated_at

form_fields

kol_lists

kol_list_items

```

### **User & Communication Tables**

```
users
├── id (FK to auth.users), email, name, role
├── is_active, telegram_id, x_id, profile_photo_url

chat_sessions
```

### **Supporting Tables**

```
field_options
├── id, field_name, option_value, display_order

agent_execution_logs
├── id, session_id, tool_name, input, output, execution_time
└── Timestamps: created_at, updated_at

embeddings
├── id, content_id, embedding (pgvector), content_type
└── created_at
```

---

## 4. KEY FEATURES BY PAGE - DETAILED BREAKDOWN

### **CAMPAIGN MANAGEMENT**

**Campaigns List Page** (`/campaigns`)
- View all campaigns with status badge (Planning/Active/Paused/Completed)
- Quick filters by status, client, manager
- Create new campaign wizard
- Bulk actions (archive, clone)

**Campaign Details** (`/campaigns/[id]`)
- **Information Tab:** Campaign metadata, client info, dates, budget, status
- **KOLs Tab:** Add/manage KOLs with:
  - Status tracking (Curated → Contacted → Interested → Onboarded → Concluded)
  - Budget allocation (Token/Fiat/WL)
  - Payment tracking (amount paid, wallet)
  - Notes and hidden status
  - Advanced filtering (platform, region, creator type, followers, budget)
- **Contents Tab:** Multiple campaign contents with:
  - Content type tracking
  - Deliverables management
  - Notes per content item
  - Download/export support
- **Budget Tab:** Regional budget allocation breakdown
- **Reports Tab:** 
  - Custom messages
  - File uploads (public/private)
  - Public sharing via link
  - File ordering and management
- **Analytics Tab:** Charts (bar, pie, line) for KOL performance
- Copy/paste support for cells
- Inline editing throughout
- Sticky scroll tracking

### **CLIENT MANAGEMENT**

**Clients List Page** (`/clients`)
- View clients with status filters (active/inactive)
- Client cards showing:
  - Logo and contact info
  - Campaign count
  - Team member count
  - Location
  - Key contacts
- Create new client with custom fields
- Client search and filtering
- Quick access to delivery logs per client

**Client Details** (`/clients/[id]`)
- **Basic Info:** Name, email, location, logo, contacts
- **Client Tracker Tab:**
  - **Context:** Engagement type, scope, start date, milestones, contacts
  - **Decisions:** Log decisions with date and summary
  - **Weekly Updates:** Track weekly focus, initiatives, next checkin
- **Meeting Notes:** Create/edit meeting notes with attendees and action items
- **Campaigns:** View associated campaigns
- **Delivery Logs:** View and manage delivery items for the client
- Document upload support

**Delivery Logs** (`/delivery-logs`, `/clients/[id]/delivery-log`)
- Centralized delivery log tracking
- Work items categorized by:
  - Work type (Client-Facing/Internal)
  - Action description
  - Who (person responsible)
  - Method (communication type)
  - Location
  - Trigger (Client Request/Follow-Up/SOP/Extra)
- Sortable and filterable
- Inline editing
- Export capabilities

### **SALES PIPELINE & CRM**

**Pipeline** (`/crm/pipeline`)
- **4 Tabs with Kanban & Table Views:**
  1. **Outreach** - New leads (stage: new → contacted)
  2. **Leads** - Qualified leads (stages: contacted → qualified → unqualified → nurture → dead)
  3. **Deals** - Opportunities (stages: deal_qualified → proposal → negotiation → contract → closed_won/lost)
  4. **Accounts** - Existing clients (stages: account_active → account_at_risk → account_churned)

- **Opportunity Tracking:**
  - Name, stage, owner, source, referrer
  - Deal value and currency
  - Account type classification
  - Affiliate linkage (for commission tracking)
  - Client linkage (for account-stage opps)
  - Scope (fundraising, advisory, KOL activation, GTM, BD partnerships, APAC)
  - Telegram group chat integration (gc field)
  - Last contacted/messaged timestamps
  - Position/drag-to-reorder

- **Inline Operations:**
  - Create new opportunity
  - Link/unlink contacts
  - Move between stages
  - Edit metadata inline
  - Assign owner
  - Add notes

**Network** (`/crm/network`)
- **Partners Tab:**
  - View/create partners with category (Service Provider, Investor/VC, Project, Individual)
  - Status tracking (active/inactive)
  - POC information (name, email, telegram)
  - Stage history
  - Contact linking

- **Affiliates Tab:**
  - KOLs and referrers with commission structure
  - Status (new → active → inactive)
  - Commission model and rate
  - Terms of interest
  - POC tracking

**Contacts** (`/crm/contacts`)
- Individual contact database
- Link contacts to opportunities, partners, or affiliates
- Contact details: email, telegram, X/Twitter ID, role, category
- Search and filtering
- Bulk operations

### **KOL MANAGEMENT**

**KOLs Page** (`/kols`)
- Master KOL database with 1000+ fields (extensible via field options)
- **Visible Columns:** Name, Link, Platform, Followers, Region, Creator Type, Content Type, Deliverables, Pricing, Latest Cost, Rating, Community, Group Chat, In-House, Description, Wallet, Telegram
- **Advanced Filtering:**
  - Name, link search
  - Platforms (multi-select)
  - Followers (operators: >, <, =)
  - Regions (multi-select)
  - Creator type, content type, deliverables, pricing (multi-select)
  - Rating (operators: >, <, =)
  - Community, group chat, in-house flags
  - Description keyword search
- **Column Management:** Toggle visibility of any column
- **Inline Editing:** Edit any field directly in the table
- **Bulk Operations:** Select multiple KOLs and edit in batch
- **Export & Import** functionality
- **Pricing Suggestion Popup** for cost estimation

**Lists** (`/lists`)
- Create custom KOL lists with filters
- Save list composition and filters
- Public sharing with optional email approval
- Slug-based URLs for public lists
- List statistics (KOL count, regions, platforms)

### **TEAM & ADMIN**

**Team** (`/team`)
- View all team members
- User details: name, email, role, status
- Role management (admin/member/super_admin/guest)
- Search functionality
- Super admin only access to role changes

**Settings** (`/settings`)
- User profile management:
  - Name, email
  - Telegram ID and X/Twitter ID
  - Profile photo upload
- Webhook Management (Admin/Super Admin):
  - Check webhook status
  - Register/update webhook
  - View webhook errors

**Field Options** (`/admin/field-options`)
- Manage dropdown options for custom fields
- Add/edit/delete field options
- Display order control
- Field grouping

**Changelog** (`/admin/changelog`)
- View version history
- Version badge with publish date
- Full release notes by version
- Super admin only

### **AI & AUTOMATION**

**Chat/Holo GPT** (`/chat`)
- Chat interface with AI assistant
- **Features:**
  - Campaign suggestions
  - List creation suggestions
  - Advanced predictive insights
  - Agent action cards
  - Reversible actions
  - Feedback on AI responses
- Chat session management
- Message history
- Agent status indicator
- Tool step tracking

**AI Insights** (`/ai-insights`)
- Predictive insights generation
- Advanced analytics

### **DOCUMENTATION & COLLABORATION**

**Templates** (`/templates`)
- **Message Templates:**
  - Pre-built templates for common messages
  - Usage tracking
  - Template variables
  - Active/inactive toggle

- **Learning Examples:**
  - Past messages used by team
  - AI-generated vs manual
  - User ratings
  - Edit tracking
  - Send status tracking

**Forms** (`/forms`)
- Form builder with:
  - Multiple field types (text, textarea, select, multiselect, checkbox, date, etc.)
  - Form pages and sections
  - Conditional logic support
  - Attachment upload
  - Field validation
- Response collection
- Public form sharing
- Response export

**SOPs** (`/sops`)
- Standard operating procedures documentation
- Searchable and filterable
- Admin only

### **SIDEBAR NAVIGATION STRUCTURE**

```
┌─ Holo GPT (Sparkles) - AI Assistant
├─ PEOPLE SECTION
│  ├─ Team
│  └─ Clients
├─ KOLs SECTION
│  ├─ KOLs
│  ├─ Lists
│  └─ Campaigns
├─ CRM SECTION (Dollar Sign)
│  ├─ Pipeline (Trending Up)
│  ├─ Network (Handshake)
│  ├─ Contacts (User Plus)
│  └─ TG Chats (Super Admin Only)
├─ WORKSPACE SECTION (Testing Only - andy@holohive.io)
│  ├─ Daily Stand-Up
│  └─ Tasks
├─ DOCUMENTS SECTION
│  ├─ Delivery Logs
│  ├─ Forms (Admin Only)
│  ├─ Links
│  ├─ Templates
│  └─ SOPs (Admin Only)
└─ ADMIN SECTION
   ├─ Field Options
   ├─ Changelog (Super Admin Only)
   └─ Archive
```

## 5. PIPELINE/DEAL TRACKING FUNCTIONALITY

### **Unified Sales Pipeline Model**

The CRM uses a **single opportunity entity** with multiple stage progressions based on opportunity type:

**Lead Journey:**
- `new` → `contacted` → `qualified` → (↓ or ↗)
- If unqualified: `unqualified` → `nurture` → `dead`
- If qualified: Moves to Deal stages

**Deal Journey (Post-Qualified):**
- `deal_qualified` → `proposal` → `negotiation` → `contract` → `closed_won` or `closed_lost`

**Account Journey (Existing Clients):**
- `account_active` → `account_at_risk` → `account_churned`

### **Tracking Metrics**

| Field | Purpose |
|-------|---------|
| `stage` | Current position in pipeline |
| `deal_value` | $ amount for deal-stage opportunities |
| `currency` | Deal currency (default USD) |
| `account_type` | Classification: general, channel, campaign, lite, ad_hoc |
| `last_contacted_at` | Last manual contact |
| `last_message_at` | Last message from lead/others in TG group |
| `last_reply_at` | Last bot reply in TG group |
| `last_team_message_at` | Last team member message in TG group |
| `owner_id` | Assigned owner (team member) |
| `source` | Origin: referral, inbound, event, cold_outreach |
| `referrer` | Who referred them |
| `gc` | Telegram group chat ID/link |
| `affiliate_id` | Link to commission-tracking affiliate |
| `client_id` | Link to account-stage opportunities to clients |
| `scope` | For accounts: fundraising, advisory, kol_activation, gtm, bd_partnerships, apac |
| `position` | Drag-to-reorder position in kanban |
| `qualified_at` | Timestamp when moved to qualified |
| `closed_at` | Timestamp when won or lost |

### **Stage History Tracking**

All stage changes are automatically recorded in `crm_stage_history`:
- From stage → To stage
- Changed by (user)
- Changed at (timestamp)
- Optional notes

Enables:
- Conversion rate analysis
- Sales velocity tracking
- Bottleneck identification
- Historical audit trail

### **Views Available**

- **Kanban View:** Drag-to-reorder opportunities between stages
- **Table View:** Spreadsheet-style with inline editing
- **Tab Filtering:** Separate tabs for Outreach/Leads/Deals/Accounts
- **Search & Filter:** Search by name, owner, source, etc.

---

## 6. CLIENT MANAGEMENT FEATURES

### **Client Lifecycle Management**

**Client Creation:**
- Name, email, location
- Logo upload
- Whitelist partner association
- Initial active status

**Client Tracker (Context, Decisions, Weekly Updates):**

1. **Context Tab:**
   - Engagement type classification
   - Scope of work
   - Start date
   - Milestones/timeline
   - Client contacts list
   - Holohive contacts list

2. **Decision Log:**
   - Record key decisions with timestamps
   - Decision summary/details
   - Tracked by user who logged decision

3. **Weekly Updates:**
   - Week of tracking
   - Current focus areas
   - Active initiatives
   - Next check-in date
   - Open questions/issues
   - Created by user tracking

**Meeting Notes:**
- Title, content (rich text)
- Meeting date
- Attendees list
- Action items
- Timestamped entries

### **Access Control**

- **Admins/Super Admins:** See all clients
- **Members:** See only clients they're explicitly granted access to via `client_access_members`
- **Roles:** Can assign member roles per client

### **Client Relationships**

- Campaigns linked to client
- Team members with access
- Contact information
- Logo/branding

### **Delivery Log Integration**

Per-client delivery logging with:
- Work type categorization
- Action tracking
- Responsible person
- Trigger source (client request, SOP, follow-up, etc.)
- Notes and timestamps

### **Associated Records**

- Linked CRM opportunities (via `crm_opportunities.client_id`)
- Campaign count
- Team member count
- Meeting history
- Weekly update timeline

---

## 7. REPORTING & ANALYTICS FEATURES

### **Campaign Reports** (`/campaigns/[id]` - Reports Tab)

- **Custom Messages:** Add campaign-specific messaging
- **File Management:**
  - Upload deliverables (images, videos, PDFs, documents)
  - Public/private file designation
  - File ordering/display priority
  - File metadata (name, type, size, uploader)
  
- **Public Sharing:**
  - Generate public share links
  - Share reports without authentication
  - Control visibility per file

### **Analytics Within Campaign Details**

- **Bar Charts:** KOL performance metrics
- **Pie Charts:** Budget/allocation breakdown
- **Line Charts:** Timeline/progress tracking
- **KOL Performance Table:**
  - Status distribution (Curated/Contacted/etc.)
  - Budget allocated vs. paid
  - Individual KOL metrics

### **Pipeline Analytics** (Implicit via Stage History)

- **Conversion Metrics:** Leads → Qualified → Deal → Won
- **Velocity:** Time spent in each stage
- **Win Rate:** Closed won vs. closed lost ratio
- **Source Analysis:** Leads by source (referral, inbound, event, cold outreach)

### **Client Reporting**

- **Weekly Updates:** Track progress over time
- **Decision Log:** Timeline of key decisions
- **Meeting Notes:** Full audit trail of discussions
- **Delivery Log:** Work items and actions taken

### **KOL Database Insights**

- Filtering by multiple dimensions (platform, region, tier, rating)
- Pricing tier analysis
- Creator type distribution
- Community/group chat capabilities

---

## KEY TECHNICAL HIGHLIGHTS

### **Architecture Strengths**

1. **Type-Safe:** Full TypeScript with Supabase types auto-generated
2. **Scalable:** RLS policies enforce security at database level
3. **Real-Time:** Supabase Realtime + Telegram bot integration
4. **AI-Ready:** OpenAI integration with custom agents
5. **Flexible:** Custom fields, templates, and form builder
6. **User-Friendly:** Inline editing, drag-to-reorder, bulk operations

### **Data Model Highlights**

- **Unified CRM:** Single opportunity entity with stage progressions
- **Affiliate Tracking:** Integrated commission model support
- **Account History:** Full audit trail of all changes
- **Relationships:** Many-to-many through junction tables
- **Extensibility:** Field options system allows custom configurations

### **Security Features**

- JWT authentication via Supabase Auth
- Row-Level Security policies on all sensitive tables
- Role-based access control (super_admin, admin, member, guest, client)
- Audit logging of stage changes
- Public page noindex headers (no SEO indexing)

---

This comprehensive CRM structure demonstrates a production-grade platform with full campaign lifecycle management, sales pipeline tracking, client relationship management, and AI-powered insights.

```html
    * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
    :root {
      --primary: #3e8692;
      --primary-dark: #2d6470;
      --primary-light: #e8f4f6;
      --accent: #4A3FA8;
      --accent-light: #F0EEFF;
      --dark: #1a1a2e;
      --gray-900: #111827;
      --gray-700: #374151;
      --gray-500: #6B7280;
      --gray-400: #9CA3AF;
```
