_**Agent (claude-opus-4-6 2026-02-19 15:37:19Z)**_

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The audit document identifies several issues with the sales-playbook-crm-integration.html document. Let me summarize the key fixes needed:

**Critical Fixes (4):**
1. **Two-Path Booking Flow** - Phil DMs from Jdot's account (Path A) vs Phil's own account (Path B). Path A skips TG/GC. Path B requires TG + GC handoff. Need `dm_account`, `calendly_sent_via`, `tg_handle`, `gc_opened` fields.
2. **Pipeline Stages Wrong** - "DM Sent" → "Cold DM", "Response" → "Warm" with sub-states (Interested/Silent), add TG stage (Path B only), add Orbit (with reason) and Closed Lost (with reason) exit lanes


3. **Cold Outreach Sequence Missing** - The 5-bump cold outreach automation spanning roughly 19 days is the highest-volume workflow and needs to be fully mapped out.
4. **Calendly Integration Gaps** - Tracking fields and webhook integration for Calendly aren't currently documented.

**Phase 2 Backlog (6):**
The remaining items include building out the Orbit system with multiple exit reasons and cadences, adding nudge sequences for the TG stage, updating template mappings to use the corrected pipeline stages, deduplication logic across accounts, splitting dashboards by account, and handling no-shows plus contract tracking.

I'm identifying the specific database fields needed on crm_opportunities—things like dm_account, tg_handle, Calendly tracking timestamps, gc_opened, bump counters, warm substates, Orbit exit reasons, and closed-lost categorization. The new sequence types to support are cold_outreach, tg_booking, and orbit. The existing bucket system, sequence engine architecture, dashboard layout, and AI integration are working well and should stay intact. I'm also reconsidering the 70% data infrastructure claim—the workflow layer is actually new, so I should split Phase 1 into 1a and 1b to better reflect the scope. Now I need to review the integration plan document to see which sections require updates based on these audit findings.

I'm going through the document systematically to update each section. Section 2 needs the gap analysis refreshed to account for Calendly and the two-path routing logic. Section 3 should expand the gap analysis to cover two-path booking flows, the cold outreach sequence, Calendly integration details, and the Orbit system. Section 4 requires updates to the pipeline stages in 4A, the two-path booking flow diagram, cold outreach mechanics, Calendly field tracking, and template mapping corrections in 4C. Section 5 needs the pipeline stages redrawn to match the audit findings—Cold DM, Warm, TG, Booked stages with proper Orbit and Closed Lost exit lanes. Section 6 should document the three new automated sequences: cold_outreach with its 5-bump structure, tg_booking, and orbit.

For Section 7, I need to add account split as a dimension to the sales dashboard and incorporate no-show tracking plus contract alerts. The database schema in Section 9 requires all the missing fields from the audit plus the dedup_key field. The implementation roadmap in Section 10 needs Phase 1 split into 1a and 1b with the 70% claim adjusted accordingly. Finally, I'll revisit the Executive Summary to align the KPI language with these changes.
</details></think>

   541→<div class="hero">
   542→  <div class="hero-badge">Internal Proposal</div>
   543→  <h1>Sales Playbook &times; CRM<br>Integration Plan</h1>
   544→  <p>How we transform the HoloHive Sales Playbook v2.0 into a system-driven workflow inside our existing CRM &mdash; eliminating manual tracking, automating follow-ups, and giving the team a single source of truth.</p>
   545→  <div class="hero-meta">
   546→    <span>Prepared: February 2026</span>
   547→    <span>For: Management Review</span>
   548→    <span>Version: 1.0</span>
   549→  </div>
   550→</div>

   565→    <a href="#section-8"><span class="toc-num">08</span> AI Integration</a>
   566→    <a href="#section-9"><span class="toc-num">09</span> Database Schema Changes</a>
   567→    <a href="#section-10"><span class="toc-num">10</span> Implementation Roadmap</a>
   568→  </div>
   569→</div>
   570→
   571→<!-- SECTION 1: EXECUTIVE SUMMARY -->
   572→<div class="section" id="section-1">
   573→  <div class="section-header">
   574→    <div class="section-num">01</div>
   575→    <div>
   576→      <div class="section-title">Executive Summary</div>
   577→      <div class="section-subtitle">The 30-second version for decision-makers</div>
   578→    </div>
   579→  </div>
   580→
   581→  <p>The Sales Playbook v2.0 defines a proven process &mdash; from first DM to signed deal &mdash; but it currently lives as a static document. Meanwhile, our CRM already has a strong foundation: a unified pipeline, client tracker, KOL database, and Telegram integration.</p>
   582→
   583→  <p><strong>The opportunity:</strong> By embedding the playbook directly into the CRM, we turn a reference document into an executable system. Every stage, script, template, and follow-up cadence becomes a trackable, automated, and measurable workflow.</p>
   584→
   585→  <div class="kpi-grid">
   586→    <div class="kpi">
   587→      <div class="kpi-value">70%</div>
   588→      <div class="kpi-label">of playbook steps can map to existing CRM features</div>
   589→    </div>
   590→    <div class="kpi">
   591→      <div class="kpi-value">6</div>
   592→      <div class="kpi-label">new modules needed to close the gaps</div>
   593→    </div>
   594→    <div class="kpi">
   595→      <div class="kpi-value">3</div>
   596→      <div class="kpi-label">phases of implementation</div>
   597→    </div>
   598→    <div class="kpi">
   599→      <div class="kpi-value">2x</div>
   600→      <div class="kpi-label">target deal velocity improvement</div>
   601→    </div>
   602→  </div>
   603→
   604→  <div class="callout callout-primary">
   605→    <strong>Core Thesis</strong>
   606→    The playbook says "Phil sends DMs, books calls, Jdot runs discovery, follows BAMFAM." The CRM should enforce this rhythm automatically &mdash; surfacing the right action, for the right lead, at the right time &mdash; so the team executes instead of remembering.
   607→  </div>
   608→</div>
   609→
   610→<!-- SECTION 2: WHAT WE ALREADY HAVE -->
   611→<div class="section" id="section-2">
   612→  <div class="section-header">
   613→    <div class="section-num">02</div>
   614→    <div>
   615→      <div class="section-title">What We Already Have</div>
   616→      <div class="section-subtitle">Mapping current CRM capabilities to playbook requirements</div>
   617→    </div>
   618→  </div>
   619→
   620→  <p>Our CRM is not starting from zero. Many playbook concepts already have a home. Here's the mapping:</p>
   621→
   622→  <table>
   623→    <thead>
   624→      <tr>
   625→        <th>Playbook Concept</th>
   626→        <th>CRM Feature</th>

   629→      </tr>

   633→        <td><strong>Lead Buckets (A/B/C)</strong></td>
   634→        <td>Pipeline stages (new &rarr; contacted &rarr; qualified)</td>

   636→        <td>No bucket classification or temperature scoring</td>
   637→      </tr>
   638→      <tr>

   643→      </tr>

   728→  </div>
   729→</div>
   730→
   731→<!-- SECTION 3: GAP ANALYSIS -->
   732→<div class="section" id="section-3">
   733→  <div class="section-header">
   734→    <div class="section-num">03</div>
   735→    <div>
   736→      <div class="section-title">Gap Analysis</div>
   737→      <div class="section-subtitle">The six modules needed to close the gap</div>
   738→    </div>
   739→  </div>
   740→
   741→  <div class="card-grid">
   742→    <div class="card">
   743→      <div class="card-header">
   744→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--red-light); color: var(--red);">&#9873;</div>
   745→        <div class="card-title">1. Lead Scoring &amp; Bucket System</div>
   746→      </div>
   747→      <p>Classify every opportunity as Bucket A/B/C with auto-scoring based on signals (budget mentioned, timeline given, decision-maker present). Drive all downstream automation from the bucket.</p>
   748→    </div>
   749→
   750→    <div class="card">
   751→      <div class="card-header">
   752→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--blue-light); color: var(--blue);">&#128197;</div>
   753→        <div class="card-title">2. Activity &amp; Meeting Tracker</div>
   754→      </div>
   755→      <p>Log calls, meetings, and messages tied to opportunities. Track BAMFAM compliance (did the call end with a booked next step?). Surface overdue follow-ups.</p>
   756→    </div>
   757→
   758→    <div class="card">
   759→      <div class="card-header">
   760→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--amber-light); color: var(--amber);">&#9889;</div>
   761→        <div class="card-title">3. Automated Sequences</div>
   762→      </div>
   763→      <p>Bucket-driven follow-up cadences. When a lead enters Bucket B, the 21-day nurture sequence auto-queues. When a proposal is sent, the Day 3/7/14 follow-ups queue automatically.</p>
   764→    </div>
   765→
   766→    <div class="card">
   767→      <div class="card-header">
   768→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--green-light); color: var(--green);">&#128200;</div>
   769→        <div class="card-title">4. Sales Dashboard</div>
   770→      </div>
   771→      <p>Real-time metrics: Phil's DMs sent, response rate, meetings booked. Jdot's close rate, avg deal size, pipeline value. Weekly rhythm scorecards.</p>
   772→    </div>
   773→
   774→    <div class="card">
   775→      <div class="card-header">
   776→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--accent-light); color: var(--accent);">&#128196;</div>
   777→        <div class="card-title">5. Proposal &amp; Document Builder</div>
   778→      </div>
   779→      <p>Generate proposals from opportunity data. Auto-populate situation recap, scope, pricing. Track proposal status (sent, viewed, signed). Step-down to Korea Market Audit.</p>
   780→    </div>
   781→
   782→    <div class="card">
   783→      <div class="card-header">
   784→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: #FFF0F5; color: #DB2777;">&#128161;</div>
   785→        <div class="card-title">6. Trigger Event Monitor</div>
   786→      </div>
   787→      <p>Track competitor movements, exchange listings, funding rounds, and team hires. Auto-flag relevant Bucket B/C leads for re-engagement when triggers fire.</p>
   788→    </div>
   789→  </div>
   790→</div>
   791→
   792→<!-- SECTION 4: PROPOSED FEATURES -->
   793→<div class="section" id="section-4">
   794→  <div class="section-header">
   795→    <div class="section-num">04</div>
   796→    <div>
   797→      <div class="section-title">Proposed Features in Detail</div>
   798→      <div class="section-subtitle">What each module looks like inside the CRM</div>
   799→    </div>
   800→  </div>
   801→
   802→  <!-- 4A: BUCKET SYSTEM -->
   803→  <h3>4A. Lead Bucket System</h3>
   804→  <p>Every opportunity gets a <strong>bucket</strong> field and a <strong>temperature score</strong> (0-100). The bucket determines the playbook track.</p>
   805→
   806→  <div class="compare-grid">

   886→  <!-- 4B: ACTIVITY TRACKER -->
   887→  <h3>4B. Activity &amp; Meeting Tracker</h3>
   888→  <p>Every opportunity gets an activity timeline. Calls, messages, proposals, and meetings are logged with metadata. BAMFAM compliance is tracked automatically.</p>
   889→
   890→  <ul class="feature-list">
   891→    <li><span class="feature-new">NEW</span> <strong>Activity log per opportunity:</strong> Call happened, message sent, proposal delivered, meeting booked &mdash; each with timestamp, owner, and notes</li>
   892→    <li><span class="feature-new">NEW</span> <strong>BAMFAM tracker:</strong> Every call/meeting must have a "Next Step" field. If empty, the card shows a warning badge.</li>
   893→    <li><span class="feature-new">NEW</span> <strong>Meeting scheduler:</strong> Book next meetings inline. Calendar view of upcoming sales meetings across all opportunities.</li>
   894→    <li><span class="feature-new">NEW</span> <strong>Pre-call prep checklist:</strong> Structured form that auto-fills from opportunity data (project basics, token status, competitors, prepared insight drops)</li>
   895→    <li><span class="feature-check">&#10003;</span> <strong>Telegram integration (exists):</strong> Link TG messages to the activity timeline automatically via existing webhook</li>
   896→  </ul>
   897→
   898→  <!-- 4C: TEMPLATES IN CONTEXT -->
   899→  <h3>4C. Stage-Linked Message Templates</h3>
   900→  <p>The playbook has specific messages for every touchpoint. Instead of making the team search the Templates page, we surface the right template at the right time.</p>

  1042→  <h3>Key Changes</h3>

  1053→        <td>Split "Contacted" into <strong>DM Sent</strong> + <strong>Response</strong></td>

  1070→        <td>Section 6: Fast Track Day 4-5</td>
  1071→      </tr>
  1072→      <tr>
  1073→        <td>Add side-tracks: <strong>Nurture</strong> and <strong>Monthly</strong></td>

  1076→      </tr>
  1077→    </tbody>
  1078→  </table>
  1079→
  1080→  <div class="callout callout-warning">

  1082→    Existing opportunities in old stages will be auto-mapped to the nearest new stage. No data loss. Stage history will preserve the original stage names.
  1083→  </div>
  1084→</div>
  1085→
  1086→<!-- SECTION 6: AUTOMATED SEQUENCES -->
  1087→<div class="section" id="section-6">

  1093→    </div>
  1094→  </div>
  1095→
  1096→  <p>The playbook defines specific timing for every follow-up. Today, the team tracks this manually (or forgets). The CRM should queue these actions automatically and surface them as tasks.</p>

  1192→    </thead>
  1193→    <tbody>
  1194→      <tr><td>3-4</td><td>"any questions come up from the proposal?"</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1195→      <tr><td>7</td><td>Market intel value add (no pressure)</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1196→      <tr><td>14</td><td>Final follow-up. Auto-reclassify to Bucket B if no response.</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1197→    </tbody>
  1198→  </table>
  1199→
  1200→  <h3>Sequence 4: Monthly Nurture (Bucket B/C)</h3>
  1201→  <table>
  1202→    <thead>
  1203→      <tr>
  1204→        <th>Month</th>
  1205→        <th>Message Type</th>
  1206→        <th>Auto-Triggered?</th>
  1207→      </tr>
  1208→    </thead>
  1209→    <tbody>
  1210→      <tr><td>1</td><td>Competitor move OR exchange listing</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span> Monthly task</td></tr>
  1211→      <tr><td>2</td><td>Campaign results OR volume data</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1212→      <tr><td>3</td><td>Content piece OR KOL signal</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1213→      <tr><td>4-5 (no response)</td><td>Breakup message. Pause nurture. Door stays open.</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1214→    </tbody>
  1215→  </table>
  1216→
  1217→  <div class="callout callout-primary">
  1218→    <strong>How Sequences Work Technically</strong>
  1219→    A new <code>crm_sequences</code> table stores queued actions per opportunity. A cron job (Supabase Edge Function) runs daily, checks for due actions, and creates tasks in the Tasks system with the appropriate template pre-loaded. Phil/Jdot see these as action items on their dashboard.
  1220→  </div>
  1221→</div>
  1222→
  1223→<!-- SECTION 7: SALES DASHBOARD -->
  1224→<div class="section" id="section-7">
  1225→  <div class="section-header">
  1226→    <div class="section-num">07</div>
  1227→    <div>
  1228→      <div class="section-title">Sales Dashboard</div>
  1229→      <div class="section-subtitle">The metrics from Section 15 of the playbook, live in the CRM</div>
  1230→    </div>
  1231→  </div>
  1232→
  1233→  <p>The playbook defines exact metrics for Phil, Jdot, and the overall business. Today these aren't tracked anywhere. The Sales Dashboard makes them real-time.</p>
  1234→

  1270→          </div>
  1271→        </div>
  1272→      </div>
  1273→      <!-- Jdot's Row -->
  1274→      <div style="margin-bottom: 20px;">
  1275→        <div style="font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--gray-500); margin-bottom: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;">Jdot's Metrics</div>
  1276→        <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); gap: 10px;">
  1277→          <div style="background: var(--gray-50); border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px; text-align: center;">
  1278→            <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--primary);">3</div>
  1279→            <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--gray-500);">Discovery Calls</div>
  1280→            <div style="font-size: 10px; color: var(--green);">Target: 3-4</div>
  1281→          </div>
  1282→          <div style="background: var(--gray-50); border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px; text-align: center;">
  1283→            <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--primary);">72%</div>

  1288→            <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--primary);">$58K</div>

  1298→            <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--primary);">48%</div>

  1300→            <div style="font-size: 10px; color: var(--amber);">Target: 50%</div>
  1301→          </div>

  1304→      <!-- Pipeline Summary -->
  1305→      <div>
  1306→        <div style="font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--gray-500); margin-bottom: 10px; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.5px;">Pipeline Summary</div>
  1307→        <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 10px;">
  1308→          <div style="background: var(--green-light); border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px; text-align: center;">
  1309→            <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--green);">$340K</div>
  1310→            <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--green);">Pipeline Value</div>
  1311→          </div>
  1312→          <div style="background: var(--blue-light); border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px; text-align: center;">
  1313→            <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--blue);">6</div>
  1314→            <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--blue);">Active Deals</div>
  1315→          </div>
  1316→          <div style="background: var(--amber-light); border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px; text-align: center;">
  1317→            <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--amber);">3</div>
  1318→            <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--amber);">Overdue Follow-ups</div>
  1319→          </div>
  1320→          <div style="background: var(--red-light); border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px; text-align: center;">
  1321→            <div style="font-size: 24px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--red);">1</div>
  1322→            <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--red);">BAMFAM Violations</div>
  1323→          </div>
  1324→        </div>
  1325→      </div>
  1326→    </div>
  1327→  </div>
  1328→
  1329→  <h3>Weekly Rhythm Report (Auto-generated every Monday)</h3>
  1330→  <p>The playbook defines a weekly rhythm (Section 16). Every Monday morning, the CRM auto-generates a report sent to the team TG channel:</p>
  1331→  <ul>
  1332→    <li><strong>Last week:</strong> Deals closed, revenue, conversion rates, DMs sent, meetings run</li>
  1333→    <li><strong>This week:</strong> Scheduled calls, proposals due, nurture touches queued, follow-ups overdue</li>
  1334→    <li><strong>Alerts:</strong> Stale leads (no contact in 7+ days), BAMFAM violations, Bucket B leads ready for re-assessment</li>
  1335→  </ul>
  1336→</div>
  1337→
  1338→<!-- SECTION 8: AI INTEGRATION -->
  1339→<div class="section" id="section-8">
  1340→  <div class="section-header">
  1341→    <div class="section-num">08</div>
  1342→    <div>
  1343→      <div class="section-title">AI Integration</div>
  1344→      <div class="section-subtitle">Making Holo GPT the playbook's co-pilot</div>
  1345→    </div>
  1346→  </div>
  1347→
  1348→  <p>We already have Holo GPT with agent orchestration. Here's how we level it up with playbook knowledge:</p>
  1349→
  1350→  <div class="card-grid">
  1351→    <div class="card">
  1352→      <div class="card-header">
  1353→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--accent-light); color: var(--accent);">&#129302;</div>
  1354→        <div class="card-title">Pre-Call Research Agent</div>
  1355→      </div>
  1356→      <p>Before a discovery call, Holo GPT auto-generates the pre-call prep doc: project basics (from CRM data), token data (from external APIs), competitor Korea presence, 2-3 suggested insight drops, and recommended bucket prediction.</p>
  1357→    </div>
  1358→
  1359→    <div class="card">
  1360→      <div class="card-header">
  1361→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--green-light); color: var(--green);">&#128172;</div>
  1362→        <div class="card-title">Message Composer</div>
  1363→      </div>
  1364→      <p>Given the opportunity context and playbook stage, AI drafts personalized messages using the playbook templates as a base &mdash; filling in project name, competitor intel, market data. Phil reviews and sends.</p>
  1365→    </div>
  1366→
  1367→    <div class="card">
  1368→      <div class="card-header">
  1369→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--amber-light); color: var(--amber);">&#128200;</div>
  1370→        <div class="card-title">Bucket Scoring Engine</div>
  1371→      </div>
  1372→      <p>After call notes are logged, AI analyzes the notes against playbook criteria (budget mentioned? timeline given? decision-maker present?) and suggests a bucket classification with reasoning.</p>
  1373→    </div>
  1374→
  1375→    <div class="card">
  1376→      <div class="card-header">
  1377→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--blue-light); color: var(--blue);">&#128270;</div>
  1378→        <div class="card-title">Objection Coach</div>
  1379→      </div>
  1380→      <p>When Jdot logs an objection type on a call, Holo GPT surfaces the playbook's specific response script plus relevant NEPQ framework steps &mdash; available in real-time during the call if needed.</p>
  1381→    </div>
  1382→
  1383→    <div class="card">
  1384→      <div class="card-header">
  1385→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--red-light); color: var(--red);">&#128161;</div>
  1386→        <div class="card-title">Trigger Event Scanner</div>
  1387→      </div>
  1388→      <p>AI monitors competitor announcements, exchange listings, and funding rounds (via RSS/APIs). When a trigger matches a Bucket B/C lead's category, it auto-creates a re-engagement task with a drafted message.</p>
  1389→    </div>
  1390→
  1391→    <div class="card">
  1392→      <div class="card-header">
  1393→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: #FFF0F5; color: #DB2777;">&#128196;</div>
  1394→        <div class="card-title">Proposal Generator</div>
  1395→      </div>
  1396→      <p>AI drafts a proposal from opportunity data: situation recap, Korea opportunity sizing, scope of work, timeline, pricing. Jdot reviews, customizes, and sends &mdash; cutting proposal prep from 2 hours to 20 minutes.</p>
  1397→    </div>
  1398→  </div>
  1399→
  1400→  <div class="callout callout-success">
  1401→    <strong>Leveraging What Exists</strong>
  1402→    The <code>agentOrchestrator.ts</code>, <code>agentTools.ts</code>, and <code>advancedAIService.ts</code> already provide the agent framework. We add new tools: <code>getOpportunityContext</code>, <code>draftPlaybookMessage</code>, <code>scoreBucket</code>, <code>generateProposal</code>, <code>scanTriggers</code>. The chat interface (<code>/chat</code>) becomes the playbook co-pilot.
  1403→  </div>
  1404→</div>
  1405→
  1406→<!-- SECTION 9: DATABASE SCHEMA -->
  1407→<div class="section" id="section-9">
  1408→  <div class="section-header">
  1409→    <div class="section-num">09</div>
  1410→    <div>
  1411→      <div class="section-title">Database Schema Changes</div>
  1412→      <div class="section-subtitle">New tables and columns needed</div>
  1413→    </div>
  1414→  </div>
  1415→
  1416→  <h3>Modified Tables</h3>
  1417→  <table>
  1418→    <thead>
  1419→      <tr>
  1420→        <th>Table</th>
  1421→        <th>Change</th>
  1422→        <th>Purpose</th>
  1423→      </tr>
  1424→    </thead>
  1425→    <tbody>
  1426→      <tr>
  1427→        <td><code>crm_opportunities</code></td>
  1428→        <td>Add: <code>bucket</code> (A/B/C), <code>temperature_score</code> (0-100), <code>next_meeting_at</code>, <code>next_meeting_type</code>, <code>bucket_changed_at</code>, <code>proposal_sent_at</code>, <code>discovery_call_at</code></td>
  1429→        <td>Bucket system, BAMFAM tracking, sequence triggers</td>
  1430→      </tr>
  1431→      <tr>
  1432→        <td><code>crm_contacts</code></td>
  1433→        <td>Add: <code>is_decision_maker</code> (boolean), <code>influence_level</code> (champion/influencer/blocker)</td>
  1434→        <td>Decision-maker mapping (Playbook Section 3)</td>
  1435→      </tr>
  1436→      <tr>
  1437→        <td><code>message_templates</code></td>
  1438→        <td>Add: <code>pipeline_stage</code>, <code>bucket</code>, <code>sequence_day</code>, <code>playbook_section</code></td>
  1439→        <td>Context-aware template surfacing</td>
  1440→      </tr>
  1441→    </tbody>
  1442→  </table>
  1443→
  1444→  <h3>New Tables</h3>
  1445→  <table>
  1446→    <thead>
  1447→      <tr>
  1448→        <th>Table</th>
  1449→        <th>Key Columns</th>
  1450→        <th>Purpose</th>
  1451→      </tr>
  1452→    </thead>
  1453→    <tbody>
  1454→      <tr>
  1455→        <td><code>crm_activities</code></td>
  1456→        <td><code>opportunity_id</code>, <code>type</code> (call/message/meeting/proposal/note), <code>title</code>, <code>description</code>, <code>outcome</code>, <code>next_step</code>, <code>next_step_date</code>, <code>owner_id</code>, <code>created_at</code></td>
  1457→        <td>Activity timeline per opportunity. BAMFAM enforcement via next_step field.</td>
  1458→      </tr>
  1459→      <tr>
  1460→        <td><code>crm_sequences</code></td>
  1461→        <td><code>opportunity_id</code>, <code>sequence_type</code> (fast_track/nurture_21/post_proposal/monthly), <code>started_at</code>, <code>status</code> (active/paused/completed), <code>current_step</code></td>
  1462→        <td>Track which automated sequence an opportunity is on.</td>
  1463→      </tr>
  1464→      <tr>
  1465→        <td><code>crm_sequence_steps</code></td>
  1466→        <td><code>sequence_id</code>, <code>step_number</code>, <code>due_date</code>, <code>action_type</code>, <code>template_id</code>, <code>status</code> (pending/done/skipped), <code>completed_at</code>, <code>completed_by</code></td>
  1467→        <td>Individual steps within a sequence. Links to message templates. Creates tasks when due.</td>
  1468→      </tr>
  1469→      <tr>
  1470→        <td><code>crm_trigger_events</code></td>
  1471→        <td><code>event_type</code> (competitor_move/exchange_listing/funding_round/team_hire), <code>description</code>, <code>source_url</code>, <code>relevant_categories</code> (array), <code>matched_opportunities</code> (array), <code>created_at</code></td>
  1472→        <td>Market trigger events that flag re-engagement opportunities.</td>
  1473→      </tr>
  1474→      <tr>
  1475→        <td><code>crm_call_preps</code></td>
  1476→        <td><code>opportunity_id</code>, <code>project_basics</code>, <code>token_status</code>, <code>recent_news</code>, <code>competitors</code>, <code>korea_presence</code>, <code>insight_drops</code> (array), <code>case_study_ref</code>, <code>call_objective</code>, <code>created_by</code></td>
  1477→        <td>Structured pre-call preparation document (Playbook Section 3).</td>
  1478→      </tr>
  1479→      <tr>
  1480→        <td><code>crm_proposals</code></td>
  1481→        <td><code>opportunity_id</code>, <code>proposal_type</code> (full/audit), <code>situation_recap</code>, <code>opportunity_section</code>, <code>scope_section</code>, <code>results_roadmap</code>, <code>investment_terms</code>, <code>status</code> (draft/sent/viewed/accepted/rejected), <code>sent_at</code>, <code>created_by</code></td>
  1482→        <td>Proposal builder and tracking (Playbook Section 8).</td>
  1483→      </tr>
  1484→      <tr>
  1485→        <td><code>sales_metrics_daily</code></td>
  1486→        <td><code>date</code>, <code>user_id</code>, <code>dms_sent</code>, <code>responses_received</code>, <code>meetings_booked</code>, <code>discovery_calls</code>, <code>proposals_sent</code>, <code>deals_closed</code>, <code>revenue_closed</code></td>
  1487→        <td>Daily metric snapshots for dashboard and weekly reports.</td>
  1488→      </tr>
  1489→    </tbody>
  1490→  </table>
  1491→</div>
  1492→
  1493→<!-- SECTION 10: ROADMAP -->
  1494→<div class="section" id="section-10">
  1495→  <div class="section-header">
  1496→    <div class="section-num">10</div>
  1497→    <div>
  1498→      <div class="section-title">Implementation Roadmap</div>
  1499→      <div class="section-subtitle">Three phases, incremental value at each step</div>
  1500→    </div>
  1501→  </div>
  1502→
  1503→  <div class="timeline">
  1504→    <div class="timeline-item">
  1505→      <div class="timeline-dot"></div>
  1506→      <div class="timeline-label">Phase 1 &mdash; Foundation</div>
  1507→      <div class="timeline-title">Pipeline Alignment + Activity Tracking</div>
  1508→      <div class="timeline-desc">
  1509→        <ul style="margin-top: 8px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--gray-500);">
  1510→          <li>Add bucket field + temperature score to opportunities</li>
  1511→          <li>Add new pipeline stages (DM Sent, Response, Discovery Booked/Done, Proposal Sent/Call)</li>
  1512→          <li>Build <code>crm_activities</code> table and activity timeline UI on opportunity detail</li>
  1513→          <li>Add BAMFAM next_meeting tracking with warning badges</li>
  1514→          <li>Add decision-maker flag to contacts</li>
  1515→          <li>Link message templates to stages + buckets</li>
  1516→          <li>Build pre-call prep checklist form</li>
  1517→        </ul>
  1518→        <p style="margin-top: 8px;"><strong>Value delivered:</strong> Every opportunity has a clear bucket, activity history, and BAMFAM compliance. Templates surface at the right stage. Pre-call prep is structured.</p>
  1519→      </div>
  1520→    </div>
  1521→
  1522→    <div class="timeline-item">
  1523→      <div class="timeline-dot" style="background: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px var(--accent);"></div>
  1524→      <div class="timeline-label" style="color: var(--accent);">Phase 2 &mdash; Automation</div>
  1525→      <div class="timeline-title">Sequences + Dashboard + Weekly Reports</div>
  1526→      <div class="timeline-desc">
  1527→        <ul style="margin-top: 8px; font-size: 13px; color: var(--gray-500);">
  1528→          <li>Build sequence engine (<code>crm_sequences</code> + <code>crm_sequence_steps</code>)</li>
  1529→          <li>Implement all 4 sequences: Fast Track, 21-Day Nurture, Post-Proposal, Monthly Nurture</li>
  1530→          <li>Build Sales Dashboard page with Phil/Jdot metrics and pipeline summary</li>
  1531→          <li>Build <code>sales_metrics_daily</code> table with auto-snapshot Edge Function</li>
  1532→          <li>Auto-generate weekly Monday report to TG channel</li>
  1533→          <li>Build proposal tracker (<code>crm_proposals</code> table + UI)</li>
  1534→        </ul>

   207→    li { margin-bottom: 8px; }
   208→
   209→    /* CARDS */
   210→    .card-grid {
   211→      display: grid;
   212→      grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(280px, 1fr));
   213→      gap: 16px;
   214→      margin: 16px 0;
   215→    }
   216→    .card {
   217→      border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
   218→      border-radius: 10px;
   219→      padding: 20px;
   220→      background: var(--gray-50);
   221→    }
   222→    .card-header {
   223→      display: flex;
   224→      align-items: center;
   225→      gap: 10px;
   226→      margin-bottom: 10px;
   227→    }
   228→    .card-icon {
   229→      width: 36px;
   230→      height: 36px;
   231→      border-radius: 8px;
   232→      display: flex;
   233→      align-items: center;
   234→      justify-content: center;
   235→      font-size: 18px;
   236→      flex-shrink: 0;
   237→    }
   238→    .card-title {
   239→      font-weight: 700;
   240→      font-size: 15px;
   241→      color: var(--gray-900);
   242→    }
   243→    .card p {
   244→      font-size: 13px;
   245→      color: var(--gray-500);
   246→      margin: 0;
   247→    }
   248→
   249→    /* STATUS BADGES */
   250→    .badge {
   251→      display: inline-flex;
   252→      align-items: center;
   253→      gap: 6px;
   254→      padding: 3px 10px;
   255→      border-radius: 6px;
   256→      font-size: 12px;
   257→      font-weight: 600;
   258→      white-space: nowrap;
   259→    }
   260→    .badge-green { background: var(--green-light); color: var(--green); }
   261→    .badge-amber { background: var(--amber-light); color: var(--amber); }
   262→    .badge-red { background: var(--red-light); color: var(--red); }
   263→    .badge-blue { background: var(--blue-light); color: var(--blue); }
   264→    .badge-gray { background: var(--gray-100); color: var(--gray-500); }
   265→
   266→    /* TABLES */
   267→    table {
   268→      width: 100%;
   269→      border-collapse: collapse;
   270→      margin: 16px 0;
   271→      font-size: 14px;
   272→    }
   273→    th {
   274→      background: var(--gray-50);
   275→      padding: 10px 14px;
   276→      text-align: left;
   277→      font-weight: 600;
   278→      color: var(--gray-500);
   279→      font-size: 12px;
   280→      text-transform: uppercase;
   281→      letter-spacing: 0.5px;
   282→      border-bottom: 2px solid var(--gray-200);
   283→    }
   284→    td {
   285→      padding: 12px 14px;
   286→      border-bottom: 1px solid var(--gray-100);
   287→      vertical-align: top;
   288→    }
   289→    tr:hover td { background: var(--gray-50); }
   290→
   291→    /* CALLOUTS */
   292→    .callout {
   293→      border-radius: 10px;
   294→      padding: 20px 24px;
   295→      margin: 16px 0;
   296→      font-size: 14px;
   297→      border-left: 4px solid;
   298→    }
   299→    .callout-info {
   300→      background: var(--blue-light);
   301→      border-color: var(--blue);
   302→    }
   303→    .callout-success {
   304→      background: var(--green-light);
   305→      border-color: var(--green);
   306→    }
   307→    .callout-warning {
   308→      background: var(--amber-light);
   309→      border-color: var(--amber);
   310→    }
   311→    .callout-primary {
   312→      background: var(--primary-light);
   313→      border-color: var(--primary);
   314→    }
   315→    .callout strong { display: block; margin-bottom: 4px; }
   316→
   317→    /* FLOW DIAGRAMS */
   318→    .flow {
   319→      display: flex;
   320→      align-items: center;
   321→      gap: 8px 0;
   322→      margin: 20px 0;
   323→      flex-wrap: wrap;
   324→    }
   325→    .flow-step {
   326→      background: var(--white);
   327→      border: 2px solid var(--gray-200);
   328→      border-radius: 10px;
   329→      padding: 12px 18px;
   330→      font-size: 13px;
   331→      font-weight: 600;
   332→      color: var(--gray-700);
   333→      text-align: center;
   334→      min-width: 120px;
   335→    }
   336→    .flow-step.active {
   337→      background: var(--primary);
   338→      border-color: var(--primary);
   339→      color: white;
   340→    }
   341→    .flow-step.new {
   342→      background: var(--accent-light);
   343→      border-color: var(--accent);
   344→      color: var(--accent);
   345→    }
   346→    .flow-arrow {
   347→      font-size: 18px;
   348→      color: var(--gray-400);
   349→      padding: 0 6px;
   350→    }
   351→
   352→    /* COMPARISON */
   353→    .compare-grid {
   354→      display: grid;
   355→      grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
   356→      gap: 16px;
   357→      margin: 16px 0;
   358→    }
   359→    .compare-col {
   360→      border: 1px solid var(--gray-200);
   361→      border-radius: 10px;
   362→      overflow: hidden;
   363→    }
   364→    .compare-header {
   365→      padding: 14px 20px;
   366→      font-weight: 700;
   367→      font-size: 14px;
   368→    }
   369→    .compare-header.current {
   370→      background: var(--gray-100);
   371→      color: var(--gray-700);
   372→    }
   373→    .compare-header.proposed {
   374→      background: var(--primary);
   375→      color: white;
   376→    }
   377→    .compare-body {
   378→      padding: 16px 20px;
   379→    }
   380→    .compare-body li {
   381→      font-size: 13px;
   382→      margin-bottom: 6px;
   383→    }
   384→
   385→    /* PHASE TIMELINE */
   386→    .timeline {
   387→      position: relative;
   388→      margin: 24px 0;
   389→      padding-left: 32px;
   390→    }
   391→    .timeline::before {
   392→      content: '';
   393→      position: absolute;
   394→      left: 12px;
   395→      top: 0;
   396→      bottom: 0;
   397→      width: 2px;
   398→      background: var(--gray-200);
   399→    }
   400→    .timeline-item {

   537→</head>
   538→<body>
   539→
   540→<!-- HERO -->
   541→<div class="hero">
   542→  <div class="hero-badge">Internal Proposal</div>
   543→  <h1>Sales Playbook &times; CRM<br>Integration Plan</h1>
   544→  <p>How we transform the HoloHive Sales Playbook v2.0 into a system-driven workflow inside our existing CRM &mdash; eliminating manual tracking, automating follow-ups, and giving the team a single source of truth.</p>
   545→  <div class="hero-meta">
   546→    <span>Prepared: February 2026</span>
   547→    <span>For: Management Review</span>
   548→    <span>Version: 1.1 (Post-Audit)</span>
   549→  </div>
   550→</div>
   551→
   552→<div class="container">
   553→
   554→<!-- TABLE OF CONTENTS -->
   555→<div class="toc">
   556→  <h2>Contents</h2>
   557→  <div class="toc-grid">
   558→    <a href="#section-1"><span class="toc-num">01</span> Executive Summary</a>
   559→    <a href="#section-2"><span class="toc-num">02</span> What We Already Have</a>
   560→    <a href="#section-3"><span class="toc-num">03</span> Gap Analysis</a>
   561→    <a href="#section-4"><span class="toc-num">04</span> Proposed Features</a>
   562→    <a href="#section-5"><span class="toc-num">05</span> Pipeline Redesign</a>
   563→    <a href="#section-6"><span class="toc-num">06</span> Automated Sequences</a>
   564→    <a href="#section-7"><span class="toc-num">07</span> Sales Dashboard</a>
   565→    <a href="#section-8"><span class="toc-num">08</span> AI Integration</a>
   566→    <a href="#section-9"><span class="toc-num">09</span> Database Schema Changes</a>
   567→    <a href="#section-10"><span class="toc-num">10</span> Implementation Roadmap</a>
   568→  </div>
   569→</div>
   570→
   571→<!-- SECTION 1: EXECUTIVE SUMMARY -->
   572→<div class="section" id="section-1">
   573→  <div class="section-header">
   574→    <div class="section-num">01</div>
   575→    <div>
   576→      <div class="section-title">Executive Summary</div>
   577→      <div class="section-subtitle">The 30-second version for decision-makers</div>
   578→    </div>
   579→  </div>
   580→
   581→  <p>The Sales Playbook v2.0 defines a proven process &mdash; from first DM to signed deal &mdash; but it currently lives as a static document. Meanwhile, our CRM already has a strong foundation: a unified pipeline, client tracker, KOL database, and Telegram integration.</p>
   582→
   583→  <p><strong>The opportunity:</strong> By embedding the playbook directly into the CRM, we turn a reference document into an executable system. Every stage, script, template, and follow-up cadence becomes a trackable, automated, and measurable workflow.</p>
   584→
   585→  <div class="kpi-grid">
   586→    <div class="kpi">
   587→      <div class="kpi-value">~70%</div>
   588→      <div class="kpi-label">data infrastructure exists &mdash; but workflow layer is new</div>
   589→    </div>
   590→    <div class="kpi">
   591→      <div class="kpi-value">9</div>
   592→      <div class="kpi-label">new modules needed to close the gaps</div>
   593→    </div>
   594→    <div class="kpi">
   595→      <div class="kpi-value">4</div>
   596→      <div class="kpi-label">phases of implementation (1a, 1b, 2, 3)</div>
   597→    </div>
   598→    <div class="kpi">
   599→      <div class="kpi-value">2x</div>
   600→      <div class="kpi-label">target deal velocity improvement</div>
   601→    </div>
   602→  </div>
   603→
   604→  <div class="callout callout-warning">
   605→    <strong>Key Context (from Audit)</strong>
   606→    The SDR (Phil) now DMs from the Closer's (Jdot's) account in addition to his own. This creates <strong>two booking paths</strong> &mdash; Path A (Closer's account, Calendly in DM, no TG/GC needed) and Path B (SDR's account, requires TG handoff + GC creation). This two-path model is the routing key for the entire pipeline and affects stages, sequences, and templates.
   607→  </div>
   608→
   609→  <div class="callout callout-primary">
   610→    <strong>Core Thesis</strong>
   611→    The playbook says "Phil sends DMs, books calls, Jdot runs discovery, follows BAMFAM." The CRM should enforce this rhythm automatically &mdash; surfacing the right action, for the right lead, at the right time &mdash; so the team executes instead of remembering.
   612→  </div>
   613→</div>
   614→
   615→<!-- SECTION 2: WHAT WE ALREADY HAVE -->
   616→<div class="section" id="section-2">
   617→  <div class="section-header">
   618→    <div class="section-num">02</div>
   619→    <div>
   620→      <div class="section-title">What We Already Have</div>
   621→      <div class="section-subtitle">Mapping current CRM capabilities to playbook requirements</div>
   622→    </div>
   623→  </div>
   624→
   625→  <p>Our CRM is not starting from zero. Many playbook concepts already have a home. Here's the mapping:</p>
   626→
   627→  <table>
   628→    <thead>
   629→      <tr>
   630→        <th>Playbook Concept</th>
   631→        <th>CRM Feature</th>
   632→        <th>Status</th>
   633→        <th>Gap</th>
   634→      </tr>
   635→    </thead>
   636→    <tbody>
   637→      <tr>
   638→        <td><strong>Lead Buckets (A/B/C)</strong></td>
   639→        <td>Pipeline stages (new &rarr; contacted &rarr; qualified)</td>
   640→        <td><span class="badge badge-amber">Partial</span></td>
   641→        <td>No bucket classification or temperature scoring</td>
   642→      </tr>
   643→      <tr>
   644→        <td><strong>Discovery Call Prep</strong></td>
   645→        <td>Opportunity notes + client context</td>
   646→        <td><span class="badge badge-amber">Partial</span></td>
   647→        <td>No structured prep checklist or auto-research</td>
   648→      </tr>
   649→      <tr>
   650→        <td><strong>BAMFAM (Next Meeting)</strong></td>
   651→        <td>No meeting/calendar tracking</td>
   652→        <td><span class="badge badge-red">Missing</span></td>
   653→        <td>No meeting scheduling or reminders</td>
   654→      </tr>
   655→      <tr>
   656→        <td><strong>Follow-up Cadences</strong></td>
   657→        <td>No automated sequences</td>
   658→        <td><span class="badge badge-red">Missing</span></td>
   659→        <td>No timed follow-up automation</td>
   660→      </tr>
   661→      <tr>
   662→        <td><strong>Message Templates</strong></td>
   663→        <td>Templates page + learning examples</td>
   664→        <td><span class="badge badge-green">Exists</span></td>
   665→        <td>Not linked to pipeline stages</td>
   666→      </tr>
   667→      <tr>
   668→        <td><strong>Objection Handling</strong></td>
   669→        <td>SOPs page (static docs)</td>
   670→        <td><span class="badge badge-amber">Partial</span></td>
   671→        <td>Not context-aware or searchable in-flow</td>
   672→      </tr>
   673→      <tr>
   674→        <td><strong>Proposal Framework</strong></td>
   675→        <td>No proposal builder</td>
   676→        <td><span class="badge badge-red">Missing</span></td>
   677→        <td>Proposals built outside the system</td>
   678→      </tr>
   679→      <tr>
   680→        <td><strong>Contact/Stakeholder Mapping</strong></td>
   681→        <td>CRM Contacts + contact linking</td>
   682→        <td><span class="badge badge-green">Exists</span></td>
   683→        <td>No decision-maker flag or org chart</td>
   684→      </tr>
   685→      <tr>
   686→        <td><strong>Telegram Messaging</strong></td>
   687→        <td>TG bot + webhook integration</td>
   688→        <td><span class="badge badge-green">Exists</span></td>
   689→        <td>Not integrated with pipeline sequences</td>
   690→      </tr>
   691→      <tr>
   692→        <td><strong>Stage History / Audit Trail</strong></td>
   693→        <td>crm_stage_history table</td>
   694→        <td><span class="badge badge-green">Exists</span></td>
   695→        <td>No velocity metrics computed</td>
   696→      </tr>
   697→      <tr>
   698→        <td><strong>Client Onboarding</strong></td>
   699→        <td>Clients page + Client Tracker</td>
   700→        <td><span class="badge badge-green">Exists</span></td>
   701→        <td>No handoff workflow from pipeline</td>
   702→      </tr>
   703→      <tr>
   704→        <td><strong>Sales Metrics / Tracking</strong></td>
   705→        <td>Basic pipeline views</td>
   706→        <td><span class="badge badge-amber">Partial</span></td>
   707→        <td>No dashboards, KPI tracking, or weekly rhythm reports</td>
   708→      </tr>
   709→      <tr>
   710→        <td><strong>Trigger Event Monitoring</strong></td>
   711→        <td>Not implemented</td>
   712→        <td><span class="badge badge-red">Missing</span></td>
   713→        <td>No competitor/market event tracking</td>
   714→      </tr>
   715→      <tr>
   716→        <td><strong>Content Calendar</strong></td>
   717→        <td>Not implemented</td>
   718→        <td><span class="badge badge-red">Missing</span></td>
   719→        <td>Content planning lives outside CRM</td>
   720→      </tr>
   721→      <tr>
   722→        <td><strong>Phil's Weekly DM Outreach</strong></td>
   723→        <td>Not tracked</td>
   724→        <td><span class="badge badge-red">Missing</span></td>
   725→        <td>No outreach volume tracking</td>
   726→      </tr>
   727→      <tr>
   728→        <td><strong>Two-Path Booking (Path A / B)</strong></td>
   729→        <td>Not implemented</td>
   730→        <td><span class="badge badge-red">Missing</span></td>
   731→        <td>SDR DMs from Closer's account (Path A) vs own account (Path B) &mdash; different routing</td>
   732→      </tr>
   733→      <tr>
   734→        <td><strong>Calendly Integration</strong></td>
   735→        <td>Not implemented</td>
   736→        <td><span class="badge badge-red">Missing</span></td>
   737→        <td>No Calendly tracking, webhook, or sent-vs-booked visibility</td>
   738→      </tr>
   739→      <tr>
   740→        <td><strong>Cold Outreach 5-Bump Sequence</strong></td>
   741→        <td>Not implemented</td>
   742→        <td><span class="badge badge-red">Missing</span></td>
   743→        <td>Pre-discovery outreach is the highest-volume automation &mdash; not tracked at all</td>
   744→      </tr>
   745→      <tr>
   746→        <td><strong>Orbit / Exit System</strong></td>
   747→        <td>Pipeline has "nurture" stage</td>
   748→        <td><span class="badge badge-amber">Partial</span></td>
   749→        <td>No orbit reasons, resurrection cadences, or exit tracking</td>
   750→      </tr>
   751→      <tr>
   752→        <td><strong>Dedup Across Accounts</strong></td>
   753→        <td>Not implemented</td>
   754→        <td><span class="badge badge-red">Missing</span></td>
   755→        <td>Risk of contacting same project from multiple accounts</td>
   756→      </tr>
   757→    </tbody>
   758→  </table>
   759→
   760→  <div class="callout callout-warning">
   761→    <strong>Bottom Line (Updated After Audit)</strong>
   762→    Data infrastructure is at ~70% (templates, contacts, TG bot, stage history exist). But the playbook-driven <em>workflow</em> &mdash; two-path routing, bump sequences, Calendly tracking, Orbit system &mdash; is new work. Phase 1 is larger than initially scoped. We've split it into Phase 1a and 1b to manage complexity.
   763→  </div>
   764→</div>
   765→
   766→<!-- SECTION 3: GAP ANALYSIS -->
   767→<div class="section" id="section-3">
   768→  <div class="section-header">
   769→    <div class="section-num">03</div>
   770→    <div>
   771→      <div class="section-title">Gap Analysis</div>
   772→      <div class="section-subtitle">Nine modules needed to close the gap</div>
   773→    </div>
   774→  </div>
   775→
   776→  <div class="card-grid">
   777→    <div class="card">
   778→      <div class="card-header">
   779→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--red-light); color: var(--red);">&#9873;</div>
   780→        <div class="card-title">1. Lead Scoring &amp; Bucket System</div>
   781→      </div>
   782→      <p>Classify every opportunity as Bucket A/B/C with auto-scoring based on signals (budget mentioned, timeline given, decision-maker present). Drive all downstream automation from the bucket.</p>
   783→    </div>
   784→
   785→    <div class="card">
   786→      <div class="card-header">
   787→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--blue-light); color: var(--blue);">&#128197;</div>
   788→        <div class="card-title">2. Activity &amp; Meeting Tracker</div>
   789→      </div>
   790→      <p>Log calls, meetings, and messages tied to opportunities. Track BAMFAM compliance (did the call end with a booked next step?). Surface overdue follow-ups.</p>
   791→    </div>
   792→
   793→    <div class="card">
   794→      <div class="card-header">
   795→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--amber-light); color: var(--amber);">&#9889;</div>
   796→        <div class="card-title">3. Automated Sequences</div>
   797→      </div>
   798→      <p>Bucket-driven follow-up cadences. When a lead enters Bucket B, the 21-day nurture sequence auto-queues. When a proposal is sent, the Day 3/7/14 follow-ups queue automatically.</p>
   799→    </div>
   800→
   801→    <div class="card">
   802→      <div class="card-header">
   803→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--green-light); color: var(--green);">&#128200;</div>
   804→        <div class="card-title">4. Sales Dashboard</div>
   805→      </div>
   806→      <p>Real-time metrics: Phil's DMs sent, response rate, meetings booked. Jdot's close rate, avg deal size, pipeline value. Weekly rhythm scorecards.</p>
   807→    </div>
   808→
   809→    <div class="card">
   810→      <div class="card-header">
   811→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--accent-light); color: var(--accent);">&#128196;</div>
   812→        <div class="card-title">5. Proposal &amp; Document Builder</div>
   813→      </div>
   814→      <p>Generate proposals from opportunity data. Auto-populate situation recap, scope, pricing. Track proposal status (sent, viewed, signed). Step-down to Korea Market Audit.</p>
   815→    </div>
   816→
   817→    <div class="card">
   818→      <div class="card-header">
   819→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: #FFF0F5; color: #DB2777;">&#128161;</div>
   820→        <div class="card-title">6. Trigger Event Monitor</div>
   821→      </div>
   822→      <p>Track competitor movements, exchange listings, funding rounds, and team hires. Auto-flag relevant Bucket B/C leads for re-engagement when triggers fire.</p>
   823→    </div>
   824→
   825→    <div class="card" style="border-color: var(--red); border-width: 2px;">
   826→      <div class="card-header">
   827→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--red-light); color: var(--red);">&#128268;</div>
   828→        <div class="card-title">7. Two-Path Booking Router</div>
   829→      </div>
   830→      <p><span class="badge badge-red" style="margin-bottom: 6px;">CRITICAL</span> SDR DMs from Closer's account (Path A: Calendly in DM, no TG/GC) vs SDR's own account (Path B: get TG, send Calendly in TG, open GC). <code>dm_account</code> is the routing key for the whole pipeline.</p>
   831→    </div>
   832→
   833→    <div class="card" style="border-color: var(--red); border-width: 2px;">
   834→      <div class="card-header">
   835→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--red-light); color: var(--red);">&#128227;</div>
   836→        <div class="card-title">8. Cold Outreach 5-Bump Sequence</div>
   837→      </div>
   838→      <p><span class="badge badge-red" style="margin-bottom: 6px;">CRITICAL</span> The highest-volume automation: 5 bumps over ~19 days (Opener &rarr; Value &rarr; Credibility &rarr; Direct Ask &rarr; Breakup). Bump 4 + 7 days silence auto-moves to Orbit. Currently zero pre-discovery tracking.</p>
   839→    </div>
   840→
   841→    <div class="card" style="border-color: var(--red); border-width: 2px;">
   842→      <div class="card-header">
   843→        <div class="card-icon" style="background: var(--red-light); color: var(--red);">&#128197;</div>
   844→        <div class="card-title">9. Calendly Integration</div>
   845→      </div>
   846→      <p><span class="badge badge-red" style="margin-bottom: 6px;">CRITICAL</span> Calendly is the booking mechanism. Track where it was sent (DM vs TG), when it was sent, and when the lead booked. Webhook (<code>invitee.created</code>) auto-moves lead to Booked stage. Dashboard: "Calendly sent but not booked = follow up."</p>
   847→    </div>
   848→  </div>
   849→</div>
   850→
   851→<!-- SECTION 4: PROPOSED FEATURES -->
   852→<div class="section" id="section-4">
   853→  <div class="section-header">
   854→    <div class="section-num">04</div>
   855→    <div>
   856→      <div class="section-title">Proposed Features in Detail</div>
   857→      <div class="section-subtitle">What each module looks like inside the CRM</div>
   858→    </div>
   859→  </div>
   860→
   861→  <!-- 4A: BUCKET SYSTEM -->
   862→  <h3>4A. Lead Bucket System</h3>
   863→  <p>Every opportunity gets a <strong>bucket</strong> field and a <strong>temperature score</strong> (0-100). The bucket determines the playbook track.</p>
   864→
   865→  <div class="compare-grid">

   867→      <div class="compare-header current">Current Pipeline Stages</div>
   868→      <div class="compare-body">
   869→        <ul>
   870→          <li>new &rarr; contacted &rarr; qualified &rarr; unqualified</li>
   871→          <li>deal_qualified &rarr; proposal &rarr; negotiation &rarr; contract &rarr; closed_won/lost</li>
   872→          <li>No temperature or readiness indicator</li>
   873→          <li>Manual stage progression only</li>
   874→        </ul>
   875→      </div>
   876→    </div>
   877→    <div class="compare-col">
   878→      <div class="compare-header proposed">Proposed: Stages + Buckets</div>
   879→      <div class="compare-body">
   880→        <ul>
   881→          <li>Same stages, PLUS a <strong>bucket</strong> field (A/B/C) on every opportunity</li>
   882→          <li><strong>Auto-scoring</strong> based on: budget signal, timeline given, decision-maker identified, Korea mentioned unprompted</li>
   883→          <li>Bucket drives which <strong>sequence</strong> fires and which <strong>templates</strong> surface</li>
   884→          <li>Bucket can change as new signals arrive</li>
   885→        </ul>
   886→      </div>
   887→    </div>
   888→  </div>

   945→  <!-- 4A2: TWO-PATH BOOKING -->
   946→  <h3>4A-ii. Two-Path Booking Router</h3>
   947→  <p>The SDR DMs from two accounts. Which account determines the entire downstream flow:</p>
   948→
   949→  <div class="compare-grid">
   950→    <div class="compare-col">
   951→      <div class="compare-header proposed" style="background: var(--blue);">Path A &mdash; Closer's Account</div>
   952→      <div class="compare-body">
   953→        <ul>
   954→          <li>Cold DM &rarr; Warm &rarr; <strong>Calendly sent in DM</strong> &rarr; Booked</li>
   955→          <li>No TG exchange needed</li>
   956→          <li>No GC creation needed</li>
   957→          <li>Lead thinks they're talking to the Closer</li>
   958→          <li>Faster path &mdash; fewer steps to booking</li>
   959→        </ul>
   960→      </div>
   961→    </div>
   962→    <div class="compare-col">
   963→      <div class="compare-header proposed" style="background: var(--amber);">Path B &mdash; SDR's / Other Account</div>
   964→      <div class="compare-body">
   965→        <ul>
   966→          <li>Cold DM &rarr; Warm &rarr; <strong>Get TG</strong> &rarr; Calendly in TG &rarr; Booked &rarr; <strong>Open GC</strong> (add Closer)</li>
   967→          <li>TG handoff required before Calendly</li>
   968→          <li>GC opened after booking confirmed</li>
   969→          <li>Lead doesn't know the Closer yet</li>
   970→          <li>TG stage has its own nudge cadence (Day 2, 5, 10, 14)</li>
   971→        </ul>
   972→      </div>
   973→    </div>
   974→  </div>
   975→
   976→  <div class="callout callout-info">
   977→    <strong>Implementation Detail</strong>
   978→    A <code>dm_account</code> field on every opportunity is the routing key. Pipeline logic branches on this value: Path A skips the TG and GC stages entirely. Path B requires them. Templates also branch &mdash; Path A sends Calendly link directly in DM, Path B asks "drop your TG" first.
   979→  </div>
   980→
   981→  <!-- 4B: ACTIVITY TRACKER -->
   982→  <h3>4B. Activity &amp; Meeting Tracker</h3>
   983→  <p>Every opportunity gets an activity timeline. Calls, messages, proposals, and meetings are logged with metadata. BAMFAM compliance is tracked automatically.</p>
   984→
   985→  <ul class="feature-list">
   986→    <li><span class="feature-new">NEW</span> <strong>Activity log per opportunity:</strong> Call happened, message sent, proposal delivered, meeting booked &mdash; each with timestamp, owner, and notes</li>
   987→    <li><span class="feature-new">NEW</span> <strong>BAMFAM tracker:</strong> Every call/meeting must have a "Next Step" field. If empty, the card shows a warning badge.</li>
   988→    <li><span class="feature-new">NEW</span> <strong>Meeting scheduler:</strong> Book next meetings inline. Calendar view of upcoming sales meetings across all opportunities.</li>
   989→    <li><span class="feature-new">NEW</span> <strong>Pre-call prep checklist:</strong> Structured form that auto-fills from opportunity data (project basics, token status, competitors, prepared insight drops)</li>
   990→    <li><span class="feature-check">&#10003;</span> <strong>Telegram integration (exists):</strong> Link TG messages to the activity timeline automatically via existing webhook</li>
   991→  </ul>
   992→
   993→  <!-- 4C: TEMPLATES IN CONTEXT -->
   994→  <h3>4C. Stage-Linked Message Templates</h3>
   995→  <p>The playbook has specific messages for every touchpoint. Instead of making the team search the Templates page, we surface the right template at the right time.</p>

  1099→
  1100→  <div class="callout callout-info">
  1101→    <strong>Implementation Detail</strong>
  1102→    Templates already exist in the <code>message_templates</code> table. We add <code>pipeline_stage</code>, <code>bucket</code>, <code>dm_account</code> (for path-specific templates), and <code>sequence_day</code> fields. When a user opens an opportunity, the relevant templates auto-appear based on current stage, bucket, and path. Warm-stage templates branch on <code>dm_account</code>: Path A surfaces "send Calendly in DM," Path B surfaces "drop your TG."
  1103→  </div>
  1104→</div>

  1108→  <div class="section-header">

  1110→    <div>
  1111→      <div class="section-title">Pipeline Redesign</div>
  1112→      <div class="section-subtitle">Aligning pipeline stages with playbook workflow</div>
  1113→    </div>
  1114→  </div>
  1115→
  1116→  <h3>Current Pipeline Flow</h3>
  1117→  <div class="flow">

  1133→  </div>
  1134→
  1135→  <h3>Proposed Pipeline Flow (Corrected Per Audit)</h3>
  1136→  <div class="flow">
  1137→    <div class="flow-step new">Cold DM<br><small>5 bumps</small></div>
  1138→    <div class="flow-arrow">&rarr;</div>
  1139→    <div class="flow-step new">Warm<br><small>Int. / Silent</small></div>
  1140→    <div class="flow-arrow">&rarr;</div>
  1141→    <div class="flow-step new">TG*<br><small>Path B only</small></div>
  1142→    <div class="flow-arrow">&rarr;</div>
  1143→    <div class="flow-step new">Booked</div>
  1144→    <div class="flow-arrow">&rarr;</div>
  1145→    <div class="flow-step new">Discovery<br><small>Done</small></div>
  1146→    <div class="flow-arrow">&rarr;</div>
  1147→    <div class="flow-step new">Proposal<br><small>Sent</small></div>
  1148→    <div class="flow-arrow">&rarr;</div>

  1150→    <div class="flow-arrow">&rarr;</div>

  1152→    <div class="flow-arrow">&rarr;</div>
  1153→    <div class="flow-step active">Closed Won</div>
  1154→  </div>
  1155→  <p style="text-align: center; font-size: 12px; color: var(--gray-400); margin-top: 4px;">
  1156→    <span class="badge badge-blue" style="font-size: 10px;">NEW</span> = New/renamed stages &nbsp;&nbsp;
  1157→    *TG stage skipped for Path A &nbsp;&nbsp;
  1158→    Exit lanes at every stage: <strong>Orbit</strong> (with reason) or <strong>Closed Lost</strong> (with reason)
  1159→  </p>
  1160→
  1161→  <h4 style="margin-top: 24px;">Nurture side-track (Bucket B after Discovery)</h4>
  1162→  <div class="flow">
  1163→    <div class="flow-step new">Nurture<br><small>21 days</small></div>
  1164→    <div class="flow-arrow">&rarr;</div>
  1165→    <div class="flow-step" style="background: var(--gray-100); border-color: var(--gray-400); color: var(--gray-500);">Re-assess<br><small>Warm? &rarr; A</small></div>
  1166→    <div class="flow-arrow">&rarr;</div>
  1167→    <div class="flow-step" style="background: var(--gray-100); border-color: var(--gray-400); color: var(--gray-500);">Orbit<br><small>Monthly touch</small></div>
  1168→  </div>
  1169→
  1170→  <h3>Key Changes</h3>
  1171→  <table>
  1172→    <thead>
  1173→      <tr>
  1174→        <th>Change</th>
  1175→        <th>Why</th>
  1176→        <th>Audit Reference</th>
  1177→      </tr>
  1178→    </thead>
  1179→    <tbody>
  1180→      <tr>
  1181→        <td>"DM Sent" renamed to <strong>Cold DM</strong></td>
  1182→        <td>It's a stage, not an action &mdash; leads sit here through 5 bumps over ~19 days</td>
  1183→        <td>Audit #2: "It's a stage, not an action"</td>
  1184→      </tr>
  1185→      <tr>
  1186→        <td>"Response" renamed to <strong>Warm</strong> with sub-states</td>
  1187→        <td><code>warm_sub_state</code>: <strong>Interested</strong> (actively engaging) vs <strong>Silent</strong> (opened but no reply &mdash; triggers re-bump)</td>
  1188→        <td>Audit #2: Warm sub-states</td>
  1189→      </tr>
  1190→      <tr>
  1191→        <td>Add <strong>TG</strong> stage (Path B only)</td>
  1192→        <td>Path B requires TG handoff before Calendly. Own nudge cadence: Day 2, 5, 10. Day 14 no booking &rarr; Orbit.</td>
  1193→        <td>Audit #1, #6: Two-path + TG nudge</td>
  1194→      </tr>
  1195→      <tr>
  1196→        <td>Add <strong>Booked</strong> stage (via Calendly)</td>
  1197→        <td>Calendly link sent (DM or TG) &rarr; Lead books via Calendly &rarr; auto-move to Booked. Tracks Calendly sent-vs-booked gap.</td>
  1198→        <td>Audit #4: Calendly tracking</td>
  1199→      </tr>
  1200→      <tr>
  1201→        <td>Add <strong>Orbit</strong> exit lane (with reason)</td>
  1202→        <td>5 reasons: No Response, Not Now, Ghost, Has Team, Hard No. Two cadences: 45d or 60d. Resurrection flow back to pipeline.</td>
  1203→        <td>Audit #5: Full Orbit system</td>
  1204→      </tr>
  1205→      <tr>
  1206→        <td>Add <strong>Closed Lost</strong> exit lane (with reason)</td>
  1207→        <td>Terminal exit. Reason tracked for pattern analysis (budget, timing, competitor, went in-house, etc.)</td>
  1208→        <td>Audit #2: Exit lanes</td>
  1209→      </tr>
  1210→      <tr>
  1211→        <td>Split Proposal into <strong>Sent</strong> + <strong>Call</strong></td>
  1212→        <td>Track proposal-to-call conversion. Post-proposal silence sequence fires at Sent stage.</td>
  1213→        <td>Playbook Section 6: Fast Track</td>
  1214→      </tr>
  1215→    </tbody>
  1216→  </table>
  1217→
  1218→  <div class="callout callout-warning">
  1219→    <strong>Migration Note</strong>
  1220→    Existing opportunities in old stages will be auto-mapped to the nearest new stage. No data loss. Stage history will preserve the original stage names. <code>dm_account</code> defaults to "sdr" for existing leads (can be bulk-updated).
  1221→  </div>
  1222→</div>
  1223→
  1224→<!-- SECTION 6: AUTOMATED SEQUENCES -->
  1225→<div class="section" id="section-6">
  1226→  <div class="section-header">
  1227→    <div class="section-num">06</div>
  1228→    <div>
  1229→      <div class="section-title">Automated Sequences</div>
  1230→      <div class="section-subtitle">The playbook cadences, running on autopilot</div>
  1231→    </div>
  1232→  </div>
  1233→
  1234→  <p>The playbook defines specific timing for every follow-up. Today, the team tracks this manually (or forgets). The CRM should queue these actions automatically and surface them as tasks.</p>
  1235→
  1236→  <h3>Sequence 0: Cold Outreach &mdash; 5-Bump Sequence</h3>
  1237→  <div class="callout callout-warning">
  1238→    <strong>Audit Finding: This was completely missing.</strong> The 5-bump cold outreach is the highest-volume automation in the system. It runs before discovery and is where the majority of leads spend their time.
  1239→  </div>
  1240→  <table>
  1241→    <thead>
  1242→      <tr>
  1243→        <th>Bump</th>
  1244→        <th>Timing</th>
  1245→        <th>Message Type</th>
  1246→        <th>Auto-Triggered?</th>
  1247→      </tr>
  1248→    </thead>
  1249→    <tbody>
  1250→      <tr><td>0</td><td>Day 0</td><td>Opener &mdash; personalized cold DM</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span> On lead creation</td></tr>
  1251→      <tr><td>1</td><td>Day 3-4</td><td>Value &mdash; insight or market data</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1252→      <tr><td>2</td><td>Day 7-8</td><td>Credibility &mdash; case study or social proof</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1253→      <tr><td>3</td><td>Day 12-13</td><td>Direct Ask &mdash; explicit call-to-action</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1254→      <tr><td>4</td><td>Day 18-19</td><td>Breakup &mdash; "going to pause for now"</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1255→      <tr><td>&mdash;</td><td>Day 26</td><td>No response after Bump 4 &rarr; auto-move to <strong>Orbit</strong> (reason: no_response)</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1256→    </tbody>
  1257→  </table>
  1258→  <p style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--gray-500);"><strong>Fields needed:</strong> <code>bump_number</code> (0-4), <code>last_bump_date</code> on each opportunity. If lead replies at any bump &rarr; auto-move to <strong>Warm</strong> and stop the bump sequence.</p>
  1259→
  1260→  <h3>Sequence 0b: TG Booking Nudge (Path B Only)</h3>
  1261→  <table>
  1262→    <thead>
  1263→      <tr>
  1264→        <th>Day</th>
  1265→        <th>Action</th>
  1266→        <th>Auto-Triggered?</th>
  1267→      </tr>
  1268→    </thead>
  1269→    <tbody>
  1270→      <tr><td>0</td><td>Lead enters TG stage. Calendly sent in TG.</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1271→      <tr><td>2</td><td>Nudge: "Did you get a chance to check the calendar link?"</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1272→      <tr><td>5</td><td>Nudge: Value add + reminder</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1273→      <tr><td>10</td><td>Nudge: Direct re-ask</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1274→      <tr><td>14</td><td>No booking &rarr; auto-move to Orbit (reason: ghost)</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1275→    </tbody>
  1276→  </table>
  1277→
  1278→  <h3>Sequence 1: Bucket A &mdash; Fast Track</h3>
  1279→  <div class="mockup">
  1280→    <div class="mockup-bar">
  1281→      <div class="mockup-dot"></div><div class="mockup-dot"></div><div class="mockup-dot"></div>
  1282→      <span style="margin-left: 8px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--gray-500);">Sequence Timeline &mdash; Bucket A</span>
  1283→    </div>
  1284→    <div class="mockup-body" style="padding: 24px;">
  1285→      <div style="display: flex; gap: 0; align-items: stretch;">
  1286→        <div style="flex: 1; text-align: center; padding: 12px 8px; border-right: 2px solid var(--gray-200); position: relative;">
  1287→          <div style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--green);">DAY 0</div>
  1288→          <div style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 4px;">Discovery Call</div>
  1289→          <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--gray-400); margin-top: 2px;">Jdot runs CLOSER</div>
  1290→          <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--green); margin-top: 4px;">&#10003; BAMFAM: Book proposal call</div>
  1291→        </div>
  1292→        <div style="flex: 1; text-align: center; padding: 12px 8px; border-right: 2px solid var(--gray-200);">
  1293→          <div style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--green);">DAY 0</div>
  1294→          <div style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 4px;">Post-Call TG</div>
  1295→          <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--gray-400); margin-top: 2px;">Phil sends case studies</div>
  1296→          <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--blue); margin-top: 4px;">&#128172; Auto-queued template</div>
  1297→        </div>
  1298→        <div style="flex: 1; text-align: center; padding: 12px 8px; border-right: 2px solid var(--gray-200);">
  1299→          <div style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--primary);">DAY 2-3</div>
  1300→          <div style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 4px;">Proposal Prep</div>
  1301→          <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--gray-400); margin-top: 2px;">Jdot builds custom proposal</div>
  1302→          <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--blue); margin-top: 4px;">&#128196; Auto-generate from data</div>
  1303→        </div>
  1304→        <div style="flex: 1; text-align: center; padding: 12px 8px; border-right: 2px solid var(--gray-200);">
  1305→          <div style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--primary);">DAY 4-5</div>
  1306→          <div style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 4px;">Proposal Call</div>
  1307→          <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--gray-400); margin-top: 2px;">Walk through + BAMFAM</div>
  1308→          <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--green); margin-top: 4px;">&#10003; BAMFAM: Book contract review</div>
  1309→        </div>
  1310→        <div style="flex: 1; text-align: center; padding: 12px 8px;">
  1311→          <div style="font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--primary);">DAY 7-14</div>
  1312→          <div style="font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; margin-top: 4px;">Close</div>
  1313→          <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--gray-400); margin-top: 2px;">Contract &rarr; Signed &rarr; Work begins</div>
  1314→          <div style="font-size: 11px; color: var(--green); margin-top: 4px;">&#127881; Won! Create client record</div>
  1315→        </div>
  1316→      </div>
  1317→    </div>
  1318→  </div>
  1319→
  1320→  <h3>Sequence 2: Bucket B &mdash; 21-Day Nurture</h3>
  1321→  <table>
  1322→    <thead>
  1323→      <tr>
  1324→        <th>Day</th>
  1325→        <th>Action</th>
  1326→        <th>Owner</th>
  1327→        <th>Auto-Triggered?</th>
  1328→      </tr>
  1329→    </thead>
  1330→    <tbody>
  1331→      <tr>
  1332→        <td>0</td>
  1333→        <td>Discovery call done. Bucket classified as B. Post-call TG sent.</td>
  1334→        <td>Jdot / Phil</td>
  1335→        <td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span> Post-call template surfaces</td>
  1336→      </tr>
  1337→      <tr>
  1338→        <td>4-5</td>
  1339→        <td>First value touch: competitor intel OR market data OR campaign results</td>
  1340→        <td>Phil</td>
  1341→        <td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span> Task created, 3 template options shown</td>
  1342→      </tr>
  1343→      <tr>
  1344→        <td>8-10</td>
  1345→        <td>Second value touch: exchange/market signal</td>
  1346→        <td>Phil</td>
  1347→        <td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span> Task created with template</td>
  1348→      </tr>
  1349→      <tr>
  1350→        <td>14-21</td>
  1351→        <td>Soft re-engagement: "worth 15 min to walk through what changed?"</td>
  1352→        <td>Phil</td>
  1353→        <td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span> Task created with template</td>
  1354→      </tr>
  1355→      <tr>
  1356→        <td>21</td>
  1357→        <td>Temperature check. If warm &rarr; move to Bucket A. If cold &rarr; Monthly nurture.</td>
  1358→        <td>Phil / Jdot</td>
  1359→        <td><span class="badge badge-amber">Semi</span> System prompts for assessment</td>
  1360→      </tr>
  1361→    </tbody>
  1362→  </table>
  1363→
  1364→  <h3>Sequence 3: Post-Proposal Silence</h3>
  1365→  <table>
  1366→    <thead>
  1367→      <tr>
  1368→        <th>Day</th>
  1369→        <th>Action</th>
  1370→        <th>Auto-Triggered?</th>
  1371→      </tr>
  1372→    </thead>
  1373→    <tbody>
  1374→      <tr><td>3-4</td><td>"any questions come up from the proposal?"</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1375→      <tr><td>7</td><td>Market intel value add (no pressure)</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1376→      <tr><td>14</td><td>Final follow-up. Auto-reclassify to Bucket B if no response.</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1377→    </tbody>
  1378→  </table>
  1379→
  1380→  <h3>Sequence 4: Monthly Nurture (Bucket B/C)</h3>
  1381→  <table>
  1382→    <thead>
  1383→      <tr>
  1384→        <th>Month</th>
  1385→        <th>Message Type</th>
  1386→        <th>Auto-Triggered?</th>
  1387→      </tr>
  1388→    </thead>
  1389→    <tbody>
  1390→      <tr><td>1</td><td>Competitor move OR exchange listing</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span> Monthly task</td></tr>
  1391→      <tr><td>2</td><td>Campaign results OR volume data</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1392→      <tr><td>3</td><td>Content piece OR KOL signal</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1393→      <tr><td>4-5 (no response)</td><td>Breakup message. Pause nurture. Door stays open.</td><td><span class="badge badge-green">Yes</span></td></tr>
  1394→    </tbody>
  1395→  </table>
  1396→
  1397→  <h3>Sequence 5: Orbit (Bucket B/C &mdash; Long-Term)</h3>
  1398→  <table>
  1399→    <thead>
  1400→      <tr>
  1401→        <th>Orbit Reason</th>
  1402→        <th>Cadence</th>
  1403→        <th>Touch Type</th>
  1404→      </tr>
  1405→    </thead>
  1406→    <tbody>
  1407→      <tr><td>No Response</td><td>Every 60 days</td><td>Value touch (market data, competitor move)</td></tr>
  1408→      <tr><td>Not Now</td><td>Every 45 days</td><td>Value touch + soft re-engagement</td></tr>
  1409→      <tr><td>Ghost (booked but no-showed or went silent)</td><td>Every 60 days</td><td>Light touch, breakup after 3 attempts</td></tr>
  1410→      <tr><td>Has Team (doing it in-house)</td><td>Every 60 days</td><td>Case study results, "how's it going?"</td></tr>
  1411→      <tr><td>Hard No</td><td>None</td><td>No further outreach. Monitor for trigger events only.</td></tr>
  1412→    </tbody>
  1413→  </table>
  1414→  <p style="font-size: 13px; color: var(--gray-500);"><strong>Fields:</strong> <code>orbit_reason</code>, <code>orbit_cadence_days</code>, <code>orbit_touch_number</code>, <code>resurrect_count</code>. When a trigger event matches, lead can be resurrected back into the pipeline.</p>
  1415→
  1416→  <div class="callout callout-primary">
  1417→    <strong>How Sequences Work Technically</strong>
  1418→    A new <code>crm_sequences</code> table stores queued actions per opportunity. A cron job (Supabase Edge Function) runs daily, checks for due actions, and creates tasks in the Tasks system with the appropriate template pre-loaded. Phil/Jdot see these as action items on their dashboard.<br><br>
  1419→    <strong>7 sequence types:</strong> <code>cold_outreach</code> (5 bumps), <code>tg_booking</code> (Path B nudges), <code>fast_track</code>, <code>nurture_21</code>, <code>post_proposal</code>, <code>monthly</code>, <code>orbit</code>.
  1420→  </div>
  1421→</div>
  1422→
  1423→<!-- SECTION 7: SALES DASHBOARD -->
  1424→<div class="section" id="section-7">
  1425→  <div class="section-header">
  1426→    <div class="section-num">07</div>
  1427→    <div>
  1428→      <div class="section-title">Sales Dashboard</div>
  1429→      <div class="section-subtitle">The metrics from Section 15 of the playbook, live in the CRM</div>
  1430→    </div>
  1431→  </div>
  1432→
  1433→  <p>The playbook defines exact metrics for Phil, Jdot, and the overall business. Today these aren't tracked anywhere. The Sales Dashboard makes them real-time.</p>
  1434→

  1474→      <div style="margin-bottom: 20px;">

  1476→        <div style="display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(5, 1fr); gap: 10px;">
  1477→          <div style="background: var(--gray-50); border-radius: 8px; padding: 14px; text-align: center;">
