```text
    92→  const [editingValue, setEditingValue] = useState<string>('');
    93→
    94→  // Affiliate combobox state
    95→  const [affiliatePopoverOpen, setAffiliatePopoverOpen] = useState<string | null>(null);
    96→
    97→  // Contact linking state
    98→  const [isContactLinkOpen, setIsContactLinkOpen] = useState(false);
    99→  const [linkingOpportunity, setLinkingOpportunity] = useState<CRMOpportunity | null>(null);
   100→  const [opportunityContacts, setOpportunityContacts] = useState<CRMContactLink[]>([]);
   101→  const [selectedContactId, setSelectedContactId] = useState<string>('');
   102→  const [contactRole, setContactRole] = useState<string>('');
   103→  const [isPrimaryContact, setIsPrimaryContact] = useState(false);
   104→
   105→  // New contact creation state (within manage contacts dialog)
   106→  const [contactMode, setContactMode] = useState<'link' | 'create'>('link');
   107→  const [newContactForm, setNewContactForm] = useState<CreateContactData>({ name: '' });
   108→
   109→  // Stage history state
   110→  const [isHistoryOpen, setIsHistoryOpen] = useState(false);
   111→  const [historyOpportunity, setHistoryOpportunity] = useState<CRMOpportunity | null>(null);
   112→  const [stageHistory, setStageHistory] = useState<CRMStageHistory[]>([]);
   113→
   114→  // Delete confirmation dialog state
   115→  const [isDeleteDialogOpen, setIsDeleteDialogOpen] = useState(false);
   116→  const [opportunityToDelete, setOpportunityToDelete] = useState<{ id: string; name: string } | null>(null);
   117→  const [isBulkDeleteDialogOpen, setIsBulkDeleteDialogOpen] = useState(false);
   118→
   119→  // Convert to deal dialog state
   120→  const [isConvertDialogOpen, setIsConvertDialogOpen] = useState(false);
   121→  const [opportunityToConvert, setOpportunityToConvert] = useState<CRMOpportunity | null>(null);
   122→
   123→  // Convert to account dialog state
   124→  const [isConvertToAccountDialogOpen, setIsConvertToAccountDialogOpen] = useState(false);
   125→  const [dealToConvertToAccount, setDealToConvertToAccount] = useState<CRMOpportunity | null>(null);
   126→
   127→  // Analytics state
   128→  const [metrics, setMetrics] = useState<{
   129→    totalLeads: number;
   130→    totalDeals: number;
   131→    totalValue: number;
   132→    wonValue: number;
   133→    conversionRate: number;
   134→  } | null>(null);
   135→
   136→  // Filter state
   137→  const [filterSource, setFilterSource] = useState<string>('all');
   138→  const [filterAccountType, setFilterAccountType] = useState<string>('all');
   139→  const [filterAffiliate, setFilterAffiliate] = useState<string>('all');
   140→
   141→  // Sort state
   142→  const [sortBy, setSortBy] = useState<string>('position');
   143→
   144→  // Drag and drop state
   145→  const [activeId, setActiveId] = useState<string | null>(null);
   146→  const [activeOpportunity, setActiveOpportunity] = useState<CRMOpportunity | null>(null);
   147→
   148→  // Collapsed stages state (dead is collapsed by default)
   149→  const [collapsedStages, setCollapsedStages] = useState<Set<OpportunityStage>>(new Set(['dead']));
   150→
   151→  // Adding new row state
   152→  const [addingToStage, setAddingToStage] = useState<OpportunityStage | null>(null);
   153→  const [newRowName, setNewRowName] = useState('');
   154→  const savedScrollPositionRef = useRef<number>(0);
   155→
   156→  // Bulk edit state
   157→  const [selectedOpportunities, setSelectedOpportunities] = useState<string[]>([]);
   158→  const [bulkEdit, setBulkEdit] = useState<Partial<CRMOpportunity>>({});
   159→
   160→  // Helper to get scroll container
   161→  const getScrollContainer = () => {
   162→    return document.querySelector('[data-radix-scroll-area-viewport]') || document.scrollingElement;
   163→  };
   164→
   165→  // Helper to restore scroll position
   166→  const restoreScrollPosition = () => {
   167→    const scrollContainer = getScrollContainer();
   168→    if (scrollContainer) {
   169→      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   170→        scrollContainer.scrollTop = savedScrollPositionRef.current;
   171→      });
   172→    }
   173→  };
   174→
   175→  const handleAddNewRow = (stage: OpportunityStage) => {
   176→    // Capture scroll position before any state changes
   177→    const scrollContainer = getScrollContainer();
   178→    savedScrollPositionRef.current = scrollContainer?.scrollTop || 0;
   179→
   180→    // Expand the stage if collapsed
   181→    if (collapsedStages.has(stage)) {
   182→      setCollapsedStages(prev => {
   183→        const newSet = new Set(prev);
   184→        newSet.delete(stage);
   185→        return newSet;
   186→      });
   187→    }
   188→    setAddingToStage(stage);
   189→    setNewRowName('');
   190→
   191→    // Restore scroll position after React renders
   192→    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   193→      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   194→        if (scrollContainer) scrollContainer.scrollTop = savedScrollPositionRef.current;
   195→      });
   196→    });
   197→  };
   198→
   199→  const handleSaveNewRow = async () => {
   200→    if (!addingToStage || !newRowName.trim()) {
   201→      setAddingToStage(null);
   202→      setNewRowName('');
   203→      restoreScrollPosition();
   204→      return;
   205→    }
   206→
   207→    const stageSaving = addingToStage;
   208→    const nameSaving = newRowName.trim();
   209→
   210→    // Clear input states first
   211→    setAddingToStage(null);
   212→    setNewRowName('');
   213→    restoreScrollPosition();
   214→
   215→    try {
   216→      const newOpp = await CRMService.createOpportunity({
   217→        name: nameSaving,
   218→        stage: stageSaving,
   219→        owner_id: user?.id,
   220→        // For outreach tab, set source to cold_outreach
   221→        source: activeTab === 'outreach' ? 'cold_outreach' : undefined
   222→      });
   223→
   224→      // Optimistic update - add to state directly
   225→      if (newOpp) {
   226→        setOpportunities(prev => [newOpp, ...prev]);
   227→        restoreScrollPosition();
   228→      }
   229→    } catch (error) {
   230→      console.error('Error creating opportunity:', error);
   231→    }
   232→  };
   233→
   234→  const handleNewRowKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => {
   235→    if (e.key === 'Enter') {
   236→      e.preventDefault();
   237→      handleSaveNewRow();
   238→    } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   239→      setAddingToStage(null);
   240→      setNewRowName('');
   241→      restoreScrollPosition();
   242→    }
   243→  };
   244→
   245→  const toggleStageCollapse = (stage: OpportunityStage) => {
   246→    setCollapsedStages(prev => {
   247→      const newSet = new Set(prev);
   248→      if (newSet.has(stage)) {
   249→        newSet.delete(stage);
   250→      } else {
   251→        newSet.add(stage);
   252→      }
   253→      return newSet;
   254→    });
   255→  };
   256→
   257→  // Drag and drop sensors
   258→  const sensors = useSensors(
   259→    useSensor(PointerSensor, {
   260→      activationConstraint: {
   261→        distance: 8,
   262→      },
   263→    }),
   264→    useSensor(KeyboardSensor)
   265→  );
   266→
   267→  const outreachStages: OpportunityStage[] = ['new'];  // Outreach shows only 'new' stage with source 'cold_outreach'
   268→  const leadStages: OpportunityStage[] = ['new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'unqualified', 'nurture', 'dead'];
   269→  const dealStages: OpportunityStage[] = ['deal_qualified', 'proposal', 'negotiation', 'contract', 'closed_won', 'closed_lost'];
   270→  const accountStages: OpportunityStage[] = ['account_active', 'account_churned'];
   271→  const sourceOptions = ['referral', 'inbound', 'event', 'cold_outreach'];
   272→  const accountTypeOptions = ['general', 'channel', 'campaign', 'lite', 'ad_hoc'];
   273→  const scopeOptions = [
   274→    { value: 'fundraising', label: 'Fundraising' },
   275→    { value: 'advisory', label: 'Advisory' },
   276→    { value: 'kol_activation', label: 'KOL Activation' },
   277→    { value: 'gtm', label: 'GTM' },
   278→    { value: 'bd_partnerships', label: 'BD/Partnerships' },
   279→    { value: 'apac', label: 'APAC' },
   280→  ];
   281→
   282→  const stageLabels: Record<OpportunityStage, string> = {
   283→    new: 'New',
   284→    contacted: 'Contacted',
   285→    qualified: 'Qualified',
   286→    unqualified: 'Unqualified',
   287→    nurture: 'Nurture',
   288→    dead: 'Dead',
   289→    deal_qualified: 'Qualified',

   295→    account_active: 'Active',
   296→    account_at_risk: 'At Risk',
   297→    account_churned: 'Inactive'
   298→  };
   299→
   300→  const stageColors: Record<OpportunityStage, { bg: string; text: string; border: string; solid: string }> = {
```

```text
     7→// Opportunity Stages
     8→export type OpportunityStage =
     9→  | 'new' | 'contacted' | 'qualified' | 'unqualified' | 'nurture' | 'dead'  // Lead stages
    10→  | 'deal_qualified' | 'proposal' | 'negotiation' | 'contract' | 'closed_won' | 'closed_lost'  // Deal stages
    11→  | 'account_active' | 'account_at_risk' | 'account_churned';  // Account stages
    12→
    13→export type AccountType = 'general' | 'channel' | 'campaign' | 'lite' | 'ad_hoc';
    14→export type OpportunitySource = 'referral' | 'inbound' | 'event' | 'cold_outreach';
    15→
    16→export type AffiliateStatus = 'new' | 'active' | 'inactive';
    17→export type PartnerStatus = 'active' | 'inactive';
    18→export type PartnerCategory = 'service_provider' | 'investor_vc' | 'project' | 'individual';
    19→
    20→export type LinkedType = 'opportunity' | 'partner' | 'affiliate';
    21→
    22→// ============================================
    23→// Interfaces
    24→// ============================================
    25→
    26→export interface CRMAffiliate {
    27→  id: string;
    28→  name: string;
    29→  affiliation: string | null;
    30→  category: string | null;
    31→  status: AffiliateStatus;
    32→  commission_model: string | null;
    33→  commission_rate: number | null;
    34→  terms_of_interest: string | null;
    35→  last_contacted_at: string | null;
    36→  owner_id: string | null;
    37→  poc_name: string | null;
    38→  poc_email: string | null;
    39→  poc_telegram: string | null;
    40→  notes: string | null;
    41→  created_at: string;
    42→  updated_at: string;
    43→}
    44→
    45→export interface CRMOpportunity {
    46→  id: string;
    47→  name: string;
    48→  stage: OpportunityStage;
    49→  account_type: AccountType | null;
    50→  deal_value: number | null;
    51→  currency: string;
    52→  last_contacted_at: string | null;
    53→  last_message_at: string | null;       // When lead/others last messaged in TG group
    54→  last_reply_at: string | null;          // When our bot last messaged in TG group
    55→  last_team_message_at: string | null;   // When a team member last messaged in TG group
    56→  owner_id: string | null;
    57→  source: OpportunitySource | null;
    58→  referrer: string | null;
    59→  gc: string | null;               // Telegram group chat ID
    60→  affiliate_id: string | null;
    61→  client_id: string | null;        // Links account-stage opportunities to clients
    62→  scope: string | null;            // Scope for accounts: fundraising, advisory, kol_activation, gtm, bd_partnerships, apac
    63→  notes: string | null;
    64→  position: number;
    65→  created_at: string;
    66→  updated_at: string;
    67→  qualified_at: string | null;
    68→  closed_at: string | null;
    69→  // Joined data
    70→  affiliate?: CRMAffiliate | null;
    71→  contacts?: CRMContact[];
    72→  client?: { id: string; name: string } | null;
    73→}
    74→
    75→export interface CRMPartner {
    76→  id: string;
    77→  name: string;
    78→  category: PartnerCategory | null;
    79→  focus: string | null;
    80→  status: PartnerStatus;
    81→  last_contacted_at: string | null;
    82→  owner_id: string | null;
    83→  poc_name: string | null;
    84→  poc_email: string | null;
    85→  poc_telegram: string | null;
    86→  is_affiliate: boolean;
    87→  affiliate_id: string | null;
    88→  notes: string | null;
    89→  created_at: string;
    90→  updated_at: string;
    91→  // Joined data
    92→  affiliate?: CRMAffiliate | null;
    93→  contacts?: CRMContact[];
    94→}
    95→
    96→export interface CRMContact {
    97→  id: string;
    98→  name: string;
    99→  email: string | null;
   100→  telegram_id: string | null;
   101→  x_id: string | null;
   102→  role: string | null;
   103→  category: string | null;
   104→  owner_id: string | null;
   105→  notes: string | null;
   106→  created_at: string;
   107→  updated_at: string;
   108→}
   109→
   110→export interface CRMContactLink {
   111→  id: string;
   112→  contact_id: string;
   113→  linked_type: LinkedType;
   114→  opportunity_id: string | null;
   115→  partner_id: string | null;
   116→  affiliate_id: string | null;
   117→  role: string | null;
   118→  is_primary: boolean;
   119→  created_at: string;
   120→  // Joined data
   121→  contact?: CRMContact;
   122→}
   123→
   124→export interface CRMStageHistory {
   125→  id: string;
   126→  object_type: 'opportunity' | 'partner' | 'affiliate';
   127→  object_id: string;
   128→  from_stage: string | null;
   129→  to_stage: string;
   130→  changed_by: string | null;
   131→  changed_at: string;
   132→  notes: string | null;
   133→}
   134→
   135→// ============================================
   136→// Create/Update Data Types
   137→// ============================================
   138→
   139→export interface CreateAffiliateData {
   140→  name: string;
   141→  affiliation?: string;
   142→  category?: string;
   143→  status?: AffiliateStatus;
   144→  commission_model?: string;
   145→  commission_rate?: number;
   146→  terms_of_interest?: string;
   147→  owner_id?: string;
   148→  poc_name?: string;
   149→  poc_email?: string;
   150→  poc_telegram?: string;
   151→  notes?: string;
   152→}
   153→
   154→export interface CreateOpportunityData {
   155→  name: string;
   156→  stage?: OpportunityStage;
   157→  account_type?: AccountType;
   158→  deal_value?: number;
   159→  currency?: string;
   160→  owner_id?: string;
   161→  source?: OpportunitySource;
   162→  referrer?: string;
   163→  gc?: string;
   164→  affiliate_id?: string;
   165→  client_id?: string;
   166→  scope?: string;
   167→  notes?: string;
   168→  position?: number;
   169→}
   170→
   171→export interface CreatePartnerData {
   172→  name: string;
   173→  category?: PartnerCategory;
   174→  focus?: string;
   175→  status?: PartnerStatus;
   176→  owner_id?: string;
   177→  poc_name?: string;
   178→  poc_email?: string;
   179→  poc_telegram?: string;
   180→  is_affiliate?: boolean;
   181→  affiliate_id?: string;
   182→  notes?: string;
   183→}
   184→
   185→export interface CreateContactData {
   186→  name: string;
   187→  email?: string;
   188→  telegram_id?: string;
   189→  x_id?: string;
   190→  role?: string;
   191→  category?: string;
   192→  owner_id?: string;
   193→  notes?: string;
   194→}
   195→
   196→// ============================================
   197→// CRM Service Class
   198→// ============================================
   199→
   200→export class CRMService {
   201→  // ----------------------------------------
   202→  // AFFILIATES
   203→  // ----------------------------------------
   204→
   205→  static async getAllAffiliates(): Promise<CRMAffiliate[]> {
   206→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   207→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   208→      .select('*')
   209→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   210→
   211→    if (error) throw error;
   212→    return data || [];
   213→  }
   214→
   215→  static async getAffiliateById(id: string): Promise<CRMAffiliate | null> {
   216→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   217→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   218→      .select('*')
   219→      .eq('id', id)
   220→      .single();
   221→
   222→    if (error) throw error;
   223→    return data;
   224→  }
   225→
   226→  static async createAffiliate(affiliateData: CreateAffiliateData): Promise<CRMAffiliate> {
   227→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   228→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   229→      .insert([affiliateData])
   230→      .select()
   231→      .single();
   232→
   233→    if (error) throw error;
   234→
   235→    // Record stage history
   236→    await this.recordStageHistory('affiliate', data.id, null, affiliateData.status || 'new');
   237→
   238→    return data;
   239→  }
   240→
   241→  static async updateAffiliate(id: string, updates: Partial<CreateAffiliateData>): Promise<CRMAffiliate> {
   242→    // Get current state for stage history
   243→    const current = await this.getAffiliateById(id);
   244→
   245→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   246→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   247→      .update({ ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
   248→      .eq('id', id)
   249→      .select()
   250→      .single();
   251→
   252→    if (error) throw error;
   253→
   254→    // Record stage change if status changed
   255→    if (updates.status && current && current.status !== updates.status) {
   256→      await this.recordStageHistory('affiliate', id, current.status, updates.status);
   257→    }
   258→
   259→    return data;
   260→  }
   261→
   262→  static async deleteAffiliate(id: string): Promise<void> {
   263→    const { error } = await supabase
   264→      .from('crm_affiliates')
   265→      .delete()
   266→      .eq('id', id);
   267→
   268→    if (error) throw error;
   269→  }
   270→
   271→  // ----------------------------------------
   272→  // OPPORTUNITIES
   273→  // ----------------------------------------
   274→
   275→  static async getAllOpportunities(): Promise<CRMOpportunity[]> {
   276→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   277→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   278→      .select(`
   279→        *,
   280→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   281→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   282→      `)
   283→      .order('position', { ascending: true })
   284→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   285→
   286→    if (error) {
   287→      console.error('Error fetching opportunities:', error);
   288→      throw error;
   289→    }
   290→    return data || [];
   291→  }
   292→
   293→  static async getOpportunitiesByStage(stages: OpportunityStage[]): Promise<CRMOpportunity[]> {
   294→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   295→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   296→      .select(`
   297→        *,
   298→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   299→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   300→      `)
```
</details></tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="read" data-tool-name="Read"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **Read**</summary>
 `./sql/migrations/022_create_crm_tables.sql`

```text
     1→-- CRM Database Schema
     2→-- Core Tables: Opportunities (Leads+Deals), Partners, Affiliates, Contacts
     3→-- Supporting: Stage History for analytics
     4→
     5→-- ============================================
     6→-- 1. AFFILIATES TABLE (created first for FK reference)
     7→-- KOLs, referrers with rev-share or commission
     8→-- Lifecycle: New → Active → Inactive
     9→-- ============================================
    10→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_affiliates (
    11→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    12→
    13→  -- Basic Info
    14→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
    15→  affiliation TEXT, -- Their affiliation/company
    16→  category TEXT, -- Type of affiliate
    17→
    18→  -- Lifecycle
    19→  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new', -- 'new', 'active', 'inactive'
    20→
    21→  -- Commission
    22→  commission_model TEXT, -- Description of commission/rev-share structure
    23→  commission_rate DECIMAL, -- Percentage if applicable
    24→
    25→  -- Tracking
    26→  last_contacted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    27→
    28→  -- Ownership
    29→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
    30→
    31→  -- Point of Contact (inline)
    32→  poc_name TEXT,
    33→  poc_email TEXT,
    34→  poc_telegram TEXT,
    35→
    36→  -- Notes
    37→  notes TEXT,
    38→
    39→  -- Timestamps
    40→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    41→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
    42→);
    43→
    44→-- ============================================
    45→-- 2. OPPORTUNITIES TABLE (Unified Leads + Deals)
    46→-- Single pipeline: New → Contacted → Qualified → Proposal → Contract → Closed
    47→-- ============================================
    48→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_opportunities (
    49→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    50→
    51→  -- Basic Info
    52→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
    53→
    54→  -- Pipeline Stage (unified lead + deal stages)
    55→  stage TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'new',
    56→  -- Lead stages: 'new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'unqualified', 'nurture'
    57→  -- Deal stages: 'proposal', 'contract', 'closed_won', 'closed_lost'
    58→
    59→  -- Classification
    60→  account_type TEXT, -- 'general', 'channel', 'campaign', 'lite', 'ad_hoc' (set when qualified)
    61→
    62→  -- Value (set when becomes a deal)
    63→  deal_value DECIMAL,
    64→  currency TEXT DEFAULT 'USD',
    65→
    66→  -- Tracking
    67→  last_contacted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
    68→
    69→  -- Ownership & Source
    70→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
    71→  source TEXT, -- 'referral', 'inbound', 'event', 'cold_outreach'
    72→  referrer TEXT, -- Who referred them
    73→
    74→  -- Communication
    75→  gc TEXT, -- Group Chat link/info
    76→
    77→  -- Affiliate connection (for commission tracking)
    78→  affiliate_id UUID REFERENCES crm_affiliates(id),
    79→
    80→  -- Notes
    81→  notes TEXT,
    82→
    83→  -- Timestamps
    84→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    85→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
    86→  qualified_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE, -- When moved from lead to deal stage
    87→  closed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE -- When won or lost
    88→);
    89→
    90→-- ============================================
    91→-- 3. PARTNERS TABLE
    92→-- BD relationships, cross-partnerships
    93→-- Lifecycle: Active / Inactive
    94→-- ============================================
    95→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_partners (
    96→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
    97→
    98→  -- Basic Info
    99→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
   100→
   101→  -- Classification
   102→  category TEXT, -- 'service_provider', 'investor_vc', 'project', 'individual'
   103→  focus TEXT, -- Area of focus/expertise
   104→
   105→  -- Lifecycle
   106→  status TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'active', -- 'active', 'inactive'
   107→
   108→  -- Tracking
   109→  last_contacted_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE,
   110→
   111→  -- Ownership
   112→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
   113→
   114→  -- Point of Contact (inline)
   115→  poc_name TEXT,
   116→  poc_email TEXT,
   117→  poc_telegram TEXT,
   118→
   119→  -- Affiliate connection (if partner is also an affiliate)
   120→  is_affiliate BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
   121→  affiliate_id UUID REFERENCES crm_affiliates(id),
   122→
   123→  -- Notes
   124→  notes TEXT,
   125→
   126→  -- Timestamps
   127→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   128→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
   129→);
   130→
   131→-- ============================================
   132→-- 4. CONTACTS TABLE
   133→-- Individual people linked to opportunities/partners/affiliates
   134→-- ============================================
   135→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_contacts (
   136→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   137→
   138→  -- Basic Info
   139→  name TEXT NOT NULL,
   140→  email TEXT,
   141→  telegram_id TEXT,
   142→  x_id TEXT,
   143→  role TEXT, -- Their role/title
   144→  category TEXT, -- Contact category
   145→
   146→  -- Ownership
   147→  owner_id UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
   148→
   149→  -- Notes
   150→  notes TEXT,
   151→
   152→  -- Timestamps
   153→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   154→  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
   155→);
   156→
   157→-- ============================================
   158→-- 5. CONTACT LINKS (Junction Table)
   159→-- Links contacts to opportunities/partners/affiliates
   160→-- ============================================
   161→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_contact_links (
   162→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   163→  contact_id UUID NOT NULL REFERENCES crm_contacts(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   164→
   165→  -- Linked object type and ID
   166→  linked_type TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'opportunity', 'partner', 'affiliate'
   167→  opportunity_id UUID REFERENCES crm_opportunities(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   168→  partner_id UUID REFERENCES crm_partners(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   169→  affiliate_id UUID REFERENCES crm_affiliates(id) ON DELETE CASCADE,
   170→
   171→  -- Role in this relationship
   172→  role TEXT,
   173→  is_primary BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
   174→
   175→  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   176→
   177→  -- Ensure only one link type is set
   178→  CONSTRAINT check_single_link CHECK (
   179→    (CASE WHEN opportunity_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
   180→     CASE WHEN partner_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END +
   181→     CASE WHEN affiliate_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 1
   182→  )
   183→);
   184→
   185→-- ============================================
   186→-- 6. STAGE HISTORY (For Analytics)
   187→-- Tracks all stage changes for conversion/velocity analysis
   188→-- ============================================
   189→CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS crm_stage_history (
   190→  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(),
   191→
   192→  -- Object reference
   193→  object_type TEXT NOT NULL, -- 'opportunity', 'partner', 'affiliate'
   194→  object_id UUID NOT NULL,
   195→
   196→  -- Stage change
   197→  from_stage TEXT,
   198→  to_stage TEXT NOT NULL,
   199→
   200→  -- Who and when
   201→  changed_by UUID REFERENCES auth.users(id),
   202→  changed_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
   203→
   204→  notes TEXT
   205→);
   206→
   207→-- ============================================
   208→-- INDEXES
   209→-- ============================================
   210→
   211→-- Opportunities
   212→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_stage ON crm_opportunities(stage);
   213→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_owner ON crm_opportunities(owner_id);
   214→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_source ON crm_opportunities(source);
   215→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_affiliate ON crm_opportunities(affiliate_id);
   216→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_opportunities_created ON crm_opportunities(created_at);
   217→
   218→-- Partners
   219→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_partners_status ON crm_partners(status);
   220→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_partners_category ON crm_partners(category);
   221→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_partners_owner ON crm_partners(owner_id);
   222→
   223→-- Affiliates
   224→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_affiliates_status ON crm_affiliates(status);
   225→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_affiliates_category ON crm_affiliates(category);
   226→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_affiliates_owner ON crm_affiliates(owner_id);
   227→
   228→-- Contacts
   229→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contacts_owner ON crm_contacts(owner_id);
   230→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contacts_email ON crm_contacts(email);
   231→
   232→-- Contact links
   233→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_contact ON crm_contact_links(contact_id);
   234→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_opportunity ON crm_contact_links(opportunity_id);
   235→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_partner ON crm_contact_links(partner_id);
   236→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_contact_links_affiliate ON crm_contact_links(affiliate_id);
   237→
   238→-- Stage history
   239→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_stage_history_object ON crm_stage_history(object_type, object_id);
   240→CREATE INDEX idx_crm_stage_history_changed ON crm_stage_history(changed_at);
   241→
   242→-- ============================================
   243→-- COMMENTS
   244→-- ============================================
   245→
   246→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_opportunities IS 'Unified sales pipeline: Leads (new/contacted/qualified) → Deals (proposal/contract/closed). Single entity journey.';
   247→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_partners IS 'BD relationships. Categories: service_provider, investor_vc, project, individual. Can also be affiliates.';
   248→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_affiliates IS 'KOLs and referrers with commission/rev-share. Lifecycle: new → active → inactive.';
   249→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_contacts IS 'Individual people who can be linked to multiple CRM objects.';
   250→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_contact_links IS 'Links contacts to opportunities, partners, or affiliates with role info.';
   251→COMMENT ON TABLE crm_stage_history IS 'Audit trail of all stage changes for analytics (conversion rates, velocity).';
   252→
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→import './globals.css';
     2→import type { Metadata } from 'next';
     3→import { Inter } from 'next/font/google';
     4→import { AuthProvider } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
     5→import { ChangelogProvider } from '@/contexts/ChangelogContext';
     6→import { Toaster } from '@/components/ui/toaster';
     7→import ChangelogModal from '@/components/changelog/ChangelogModal';
     8→import { ChunkErrorHandler } from '@/components/ChunkErrorHandler';
     9→
    10→const inter = Inter({ subsets: ['latin'] });
    11→
    12→export const metadata: Metadata = {
    13→  title: 'Holo Hive Portal',
    14→  description: 'Manage your marketing campaigns and client relationships with Holo Hive',
    15→  icons: {
    16→    icon: '/images/logo.png',
    17→    shortcut: '/images/logo.png',
    18→    apple: '/images/logo.png',
    19→  },
    20→};
    21→
    22→export default function RootLayout({
    23→  children,
    24→}: {
    25→  children: React.ReactNode;
    26→}) {
    27→  return (
    28→    <html lang="en">
    29→      <body className={inter.className}>
    30→        <ChunkErrorHandler />
    31→        <AuthProvider>
    32→          <ChangelogProvider>
    33→            {children}
    34→            <ChangelogModal />
    35→          </ChangelogProvider>
    36→        </AuthProvider>
    37→        <Toaster />
    38→      </body>
    39→    </html>
    40→  );
    41→}
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
     1→'use client';

     3→import { useEffect } from 'react';
     4→import { useRouter } from 'next/navigation';
     5→import { useAuth } from '@/contexts/AuthContext';
     6→
     7→export default function Home() {
     8→  const router = useRouter();
     9→  const { user, loading } = useAuth();
    10→
    11→  useEffect(() => {
    12→    if (!loading) {
    13→      if (user) {
    14→        // If user is authenticated, redirect to campaigns
    15→        router.push('/campaigns');
    16→      } else {
    17→        // If user is not authenticated, redirect to auth
    18→        router.push('/auth');
    19→      }
    20→    }
    21→  }, [user, loading, router]);
    22→
    23→  // Show loading spinner while determining redirect
    24→  return (
    25→    <div className="min-h-screen flex items-center justify-center bg-gray-50">
    26→      <div className="animate-spin rounded-full h-32 w-32 border-b-2" style={{ borderBottomColor: '#3e8692' }}></div>
    27→    </div>
    28→  );
    29→}
```

```text
   348→  const handleCreateOpportunity = async () => {

   356→          ...opportunityForm,
   357→          owner_id: user?.id

   370→
   371→  const handleEditOpportunity = (opp: CRMOpportunity) => {
   372→    setEditingOpportunity(opp);
   373→    const isDeal = dealStages.includes(opp.stage) || accountStages.includes(opp.stage);
   374→    setOpportunityType(isDeal ? 'deal' : 'lead');
   375→    setOpportunityForm({
   376→      name: opp.name,
   377→      stage: opp.stage,
   378→      account_type: opp.account_type || undefined,
   379→      deal_value: opp.deal_value || undefined,
   380→      currency: opp.currency,
   381→      source: opp.source || undefined,
   382→      referrer: opp.referrer || undefined,
   383→      gc: opp.gc || undefined,
   384→      affiliate_id: opp.affiliate_id || undefined,
   385→      client_id: opp.client_id || undefined,
   386→      scope: opp.scope || undefined,
   387→      notes: opp.notes || undefined
   388→    });
   389→    setIsNewOpportunityOpen(true);
   390→  };
   391→
   392→  const handleDeleteOpportunity = (opp: CRMOpportunity) => {
   393→    setOpportunityToDelete({ id: opp.id, name: opp.name });
   394→    setIsDeleteDialogOpen(true);
   395→  };
   396→
   397→  const confirmDeleteOpportunity = async () => {
   398→    if (!opportunityToDelete) return;
   399→    try {
   400→      await CRMService.deleteOpportunity(opportunityToDelete.id);
   401→      setIsDeleteDialogOpen(false);
   402→      setOpportunityToDelete(null);
   403→      fetchData();
   404→    } catch (error) {
   405→      console.error('Error deleting opportunity:', error);
   406→    }
   407→  };
   408→
   409→  const confirmBulkDelete = async () => {
   410→    if (selectedOpportunities.length === 0) return;
   411→    try {
   412→      await Promise.all(selectedOpportunities.map(id => CRMService.deleteOpportunity(id)));
   413→      setIsBulkDeleteDialogOpen(false);
   414→      setSelectedOpportunities([]);
   415→      setBulkEdit({});
   416→      fetchData();
   417→    } catch (error) {
   418→      console.error('Error bulk deleting opportunities:', error);
   419→    }
   420→  };
   421→
   422→  const handleMoveStage = async (opp: CRMOpportunity, newStage: OpportunityStage) => {
   423→    // If moving to qualified, show convert to deal dialog
   424→    if (newStage === 'qualified' && opp.stage !== 'qualified') {
   425→      // First move to qualified
   426→      await performStageMove(opp, newStage);
   427→      // Then ask if they want to convert to deal
   428→      setOpportunityToConvert({ ...opp, stage: 'qualified' });
   429→      setIsConvertDialogOpen(true);
   430→      return;
   431→    }
   432→
   433→    // If moving to closed_won (deal won), show convert to account dialog
   434→    if (newStage === 'closed_won' && opp.stage !== 'closed_won' && dealStages.includes(opp.stage)) {
   435→      // First move to closed_won
   436→      await performStageMove(opp, newStage);
   437→      // Then ask if they want to convert to account
   438→      setDealToConvertToAccount({ ...opp, stage: 'closed_won' });
   439→      setIsConvertToAccountDialogOpen(true);
   440→      return;
   441→    }
   442→
   443→    await performStageMove(opp, newStage);
   444→  };
   445→
   446→  const performStageMove = async (opp: CRMOpportunity, newStage: OpportunityStage) => {
   447→    const oldStage = opp.stage;
   448→
   449→    // Preserve scroll position
   450→    const scrollContainer = document.querySelector('[data-radix-scroll-area-viewport]') || document.scrollingElement;
   451→    const scrollTop = scrollContainer?.scrollTop || 0;
   452→
   453→    // Optimistic update - update UI immediately
   454→    setOpportunities(prev =>
   455→      prev.map(o => o.id === opp.id ? { ...o, stage: newStage } : o)
   456→    );
   457→
   458→    // Restore scroll position after React re-render
   459→    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   460→      if (scrollContainer) {
   461→        scrollContainer.scrollTop = scrollTop;
   462→      }
   463→    });
   464→
   465→    try {
   466→      await CRMService.updateOpportunity(opp.id, { stage: newStage });
   467→    } catch (error) {
   468→      console.error('Error moving stage:', error);
   469→      // Revert on error
   470→      setOpportunities(prev =>
   471→        prev.map(o => o.id === opp.id ? { ...o, stage: oldStage } : o)
   472→      );
   473→    }
   474→  };
   475→
   476→  const handleConvertToDeal = async () => {
   477→    if (!opportunityToConvert) return;
   478→    await performStageMove(opportunityToConvert, 'deal_qualified');
   479→    setIsConvertDialogOpen(false);
   480→    setOpportunityToConvert(null);
   481→  };
   482→
   483→  const handleKeepAsLead = () => {
   484→    setIsConvertDialogOpen(false);
   485→    setOpportunityToConvert(null);
   486→  };
   487→
   488→  const handleConvertToAccount = async () => {
   489→    if (!dealToConvertToAccount) return;
   490→    await performStageMove(dealToConvertToAccount, 'account_active');
   491→    setIsConvertToAccountDialogOpen(false);
   492→    setDealToConvertToAccount(null);
   493→  };
   494→
   495→  const handleKeepAsDeal = () => {
   496→    setIsConvertToAccountDialogOpen(false);
   497→    setDealToConvertToAccount(null);
   498→  };
   499→
   500→  const handleInlineUpdate = async (oppId: string, field: string, value: any) => {
   501→    // Preserve scroll position
   502→    const scrollContainer = document.querySelector('[data-radix-scroll-area-viewport]') || document.scrollingElement;
   503→    const scrollTop = scrollContainer?.scrollTop || 0;
   504→
   505→    try {
   506→      setOpportunities(prev =>
   507→        prev.map(o => {
   508→          if (o.id !== oppId) return o;
   509→
   510→          const updates: Partial<CRMOpportunity> = { [field]: value || null };
   511→
   512→          // Handle related object updates for display
   513→          if (field === 'client_id') {
   514→            const selectedClient = clients.find(c => c.id === value);
   515→            updates.client = selectedClient ? { id: selectedClient.id, name: selectedClient.name } : null;
   516→          } else if (field === 'affiliate_id') {
   517→            const selectedAffiliate = affiliates.find(a => a.id === value);
   518→            updates.affiliate = selectedAffiliate || null;
   519→          }
   520→
   521→          return { ...o, ...updates };
   522→        })
   523→      );
   524→
   525→      // Restore scroll position after React re-render
   526→      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
   527→        if (scrollContainer) {
   528→          scrollContainer.scrollTop = scrollTop;
   529→        }
   530→      });
   531→
   532→      await CRMService.updateOpportunity(oppId, { [field]: value || null });
   533→    } catch (error) {
   534→      console.error('Error updating field:', error);
   535→    }
   536→    setEditingCell(null);
   537→    setEditingValue('');
   538→  };
   539→
   540→  // Bulk update handler
   541→  const handleBulkUpdate = async () => {
   542→    if (selectedOpportunities.length === 0 || Object.keys(bulkEdit).length === 0) return;
   543→
   544→    // Filter out undefined values
   545→    const updates: Record<string, any> = {};
   546→    Object.entries(bulkEdit).forEach(([key, value]) => {
   547→      if (value !== undefined) {
   548→        updates[key] = value;
   549→      }
   550→    });
   551→
   552→    if (Object.keys(updates).length === 0) return;
   553→
   554→    try {
   555→      // Optimistic update
   556→      setOpportunities(prev =>
   557→        prev.map(o => selectedOpportunities.includes(o.id) ? { ...o, ...updates } : o)
   558→      );
   559→
   560→      // Update in database
   561→      await Promise.all(
   562→        selectedOpportunities.map(id => CRMService.updateOpportunity(id, updates))
   563→      );
   564→
   565→      // Clear selection and bulk edit
   566→      setSelectedOpportunities([]);
   567→      setBulkEdit({});
   568→    } catch (error) {
   569→      console.error('Error bulk updating:', error);
   570→    }
   571→  };
   572→
   573→  const startEditing = (id: string, field: string, currentValue: string | number | null | undefined) => {
   574→    setEditingCell({ id, field });
   575→    setEditingValue(currentValue?.toString() || '');
   576→  };
   577→
   578→  const handleKeyDown = (e: React.KeyboardEvent, oppId: string, field: string) => {
   579→    if (e.key === 'Enter') {
   580→      e.preventDefault();
   581→      const value = field === 'deal_value' ? (parseFloat(editingValue) || null) : editingValue;
   582→      handleInlineUpdate(oppId, field, value);
   583→    } else if (e.key === 'Escape') {
   584→      setEditingCell(null);
   585→      setEditingValue('');
   586→    }
   587→  };
   588→
   589→  const handleDragStart = (event: DragStartEvent) => {
   590→    const { active } = event;
   591→    setActiveId(active.id as string);
   592→    const opp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === active.id);
   593→    setActiveOpportunity(opp || null);
   594→  };
   595→
   596→  const handleDragEnd = async (event: DragEndEvent) => {
   597→    const { active, over } = event;
   598→    setActiveId(null);
   599→    setActiveOpportunity(null);
```

```text
   304→    if (error) throw error;

   307→
   308→  static async getOpportunityById(id: string): Promise<CRMOpportunity | null> {
   309→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   310→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   311→      .select(`
   312→        *,
   313→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*),
   314→        client:clients!crm_opportunities_client_id_fkey(id, name)
   315→      `)
   316→      .eq('id', id)
   317→      .single();
   318→
   319→    if (error) throw error;
   320→    return data;
   321→  }
   322→
   323→  static async createOpportunity(opportunityData: CreateOpportunityData): Promise<CRMOpportunity> {
   324→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   325→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   326→      .insert([opportunityData])
   327→      .select()
   328→      .single();
   329→
   330→    if (error) throw error;
   331→
   332→    // Record stage history
   333→    await this.recordStageHistory('opportunity', data.id, null, opportunityData.stage || 'new');
   334→
   335→    return data;
   336→  }
   337→
   338→  static async updateOpportunity(id: string, updates: Partial<CreateOpportunityData>): Promise<CRMOpportunity> {
   339→    // Get current state for stage history
   340→    const current = await this.getOpportunityById(id);
   341→
   342→    const updateData: any = { ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() };
   343→
   344→    // Set qualified_at when moving to deal stages
   345→    if (updates.stage && ['proposal', 'contract', 'closed_won', 'closed_lost'].includes(updates.stage)) {
   346→      if (current && !current.qualified_at && ['new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'unqualified', 'nurture'].includes(current.stage)) {
   347→        updateData.qualified_at = new Date().toISOString();
   348→      }
   349→    }
   350→
   351→    // Set closed_at when closing
   352→    if (updates.stage && ['closed_won', 'closed_lost'].includes(updates.stage)) {
   353→      if (current && !current.closed_at) {
   354→        updateData.closed_at = new Date().toISOString();
   355→      }
   356→    }
   357→
   358→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   359→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   360→      .update(updateData)
   361→      .eq('id', id)
   362→      .select()
   363→      .single();
   364→
   365→    if (error) throw error;
   366→
   367→    // Record stage change if stage changed
   368→    if (updates.stage && current && current.stage !== updates.stage) {
   369→      await this.recordStageHistory('opportunity', id, current.stage, updates.stage);
   370→    }
   371→
   372→    return data;
   373→  }
   374→
   375→  static async deleteOpportunity(id: string): Promise<void> {
   376→    const { error } = await supabase
   377→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   378→      .delete()
   379→      .eq('id', id);
   380→
   381→    if (error) throw error;
   382→  }
   383→
   384→  static async updateOpportunityPositions(positions: { id: string; position: number }[]): Promise<void> {
   385→    // Update each opportunity's position
   386→    const updates = positions.map(({ id, position }) =>
   387→      supabase
   388→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   389→        .update({ position, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
   390→        .eq('id', id)
   391→    );
   392→
   393→    const results = await Promise.all(updates);
   394→    const errors = results.filter(r => r.error);
   395→    if (errors.length > 0) {
   396→      console.error('Errors updating positions:', errors);
   397→      throw errors[0].error;
   398→    }
   399→  }
   400→
   401→  // ----------------------------------------
   402→  // PARTNERS
   403→  // ----------------------------------------
   404→
   405→  static async getAllPartners(): Promise<CRMPartner[]> {
   406→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   407→      .from('crm_partners')
   408→      .select(`
   409→        *,
   410→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*)
   411→      `)
   412→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   413→
   414→    if (error) throw error;
   415→    return data || [];
   416→  }
   417→
   418→  static async getPartnerById(id: string): Promise<CRMPartner | null> {
   419→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   420→      .from('crm_partners')
   421→      .select(`
   422→        *,
   423→        affiliate:crm_affiliates(*)
   424→      `)
   425→      .eq('id', id)
   426→      .single();
   427→
   428→    if (error) throw error;
   429→    return data;
   430→  }
   431→
   432→  static async createPartner(partnerData: CreatePartnerData): Promise<CRMPartner> {
   433→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   434→      .from('crm_partners')
   435→      .insert([partnerData])
   436→      .select()
   437→      .single();
   438→
   439→    if (error) throw error;
   440→
   441→    // Record stage history (for status)
   442→    await this.recordStageHistory('partner', data.id, null, partnerData.status || 'active');
   443→
   444→    return data;
   445→  }
   446→
   447→  static async updatePartner(id: string, updates: Partial<CreatePartnerData>): Promise<CRMPartner> {
   448→    // Get current state for stage history
   449→    const current = await this.getPartnerById(id);
   450→
   451→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   452→      .from('crm_partners')
   453→      .update({ ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
   454→      .eq('id', id)
   455→      .select()
   456→      .single();
   457→
   458→    if (error) throw error;
   459→
   460→    // Record status change if changed
   461→    if (updates.status && current && current.status !== updates.status) {
   462→      await this.recordStageHistory('partner', id, current.status, updates.status);
   463→    }
   464→
   465→    return data;
   466→  }
   467→
   468→  static async deletePartner(id: string): Promise<void> {
   469→    const { error } = await supabase
   470→      .from('crm_partners')
   471→      .delete()
   472→      .eq('id', id);
   473→
   474→    if (error) throw error;
   475→  }
   476→
   477→  // ----------------------------------------
   478→  // CONTACTS
   479→  // ----------------------------------------
   480→
   481→  static async getAllContacts(): Promise<CRMContact[]> {
   482→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   483→      .from('crm_contacts')
   484→      .select('*')
   485→      .order('created_at', { ascending: false });
   486→
   487→    if (error) throw error;
   488→    return data || [];
   489→  }
   490→
   491→  static async getContactById(id: string): Promise<CRMContact | null> {
   492→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   493→      .from('crm_contacts')
   494→      .select('*')
   495→      .eq('id', id)
   496→      .single();
   497→
   498→    if (error) throw error;
   499→    return data;
   500→  }
   501→
   502→  static async createContact(contactData: CreateContactData): Promise<CRMContact> {
   503→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   504→      .from('crm_contacts')
   505→      .insert([contactData])
   506→      .select()
   507→      .single();
   508→
   509→    if (error) throw error;
   510→    return data;
   511→  }
   512→
   513→  static async updateContact(id: string, updates: Partial<CreateContactData>): Promise<CRMContact> {
   514→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   515→      .from('crm_contacts')
   516→      .update({ ...updates, updated_at: new Date().toISOString() })
   517→      .eq('id', id)
   518→      .select()
   519→      .single();
   520→
   521→    if (error) throw error;
   522→    return data;
   523→  }
   524→
   525→  static async deleteContact(id: string): Promise<void> {
   526→    const { error } = await supabase
   527→      .from('crm_contacts')
   528→      .delete()
   529→      .eq('id', id);
   530→
   531→    if (error) throw error;
   532→  }
   533→
   534→  // ----------------------------------------
   535→  // CONTACT LINKS
   536→  // ----------------------------------------
   537→
   538→  static async linkContactToOpportunity(contactId: string, opportunityId: string, role?: string, isPrimary?: boolean): Promise<CRMContactLink> {
   539→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   540→      .from('crm_contact_links')
   541→      .insert([{
   542→        contact_id: contactId,
   543→        linked_type: 'opportunity',
   544→        opportunity_id: opportunityId,
   545→        role,
   546→        is_primary: isPrimary || false
   547→      }])
   548→      .select()
   549→      .single();
   550→
   551→    if (error) throw error;
   552→    return data;
   553→  }
   554→
   555→  static async linkContactToPartner(contactId: string, partnerId: string, role?: string, isPrimary?: boolean): Promise<CRMContactLink> {
   556→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   557→      .from('crm_contact_links')
   558→      .insert([{
   559→        contact_id: contactId,
   560→        linked_type: 'partner',
   561→        partner_id: partnerId,
   562→        role,
   563→        is_primary: isPrimary || false
   564→      }])
   565→      .select()
   566→      .single();
   567→
   568→    if (error) throw error;
   569→    return data;
   570→  }
   571→
   572→  static async linkContactToAffiliate(contactId: string, affiliateId: string, role?: string, isPrimary?: boolean): Promise<CRMContactLink> {
   573→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   574→      .from('crm_contact_links')
   575→      .insert([{
   576→        contact_id: contactId,
   577→        linked_type: 'affiliate',
   578→        affiliate_id: affiliateId,
   579→        role,
   580→        is_primary: isPrimary || false
   581→      }])
   582→      .select()
   583→      .single();
   584→
   585→    if (error) throw error;
   586→    return data;
   587→  }
   588→
   589→  static async getContactsForOpportunity(opportunityId: string): Promise<CRMContactLink[]> {
   590→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   591→      .from('crm_contact_links')
   592→      .select(`
   593→        *,
   594→        contact:crm_contacts(*)
   595→      `)
   596→      .eq('opportunity_id', opportunityId)
   597→      .order('is_primary', { ascending: false });
   598→
   599→    if (error) throw error;
```

```text
    17→interface SidebarProps {

    20→
    21→export default function Sidebar({ children }: SidebarProps) {
    22→  const pathname = usePathname();
    23→  const router = useRouter();
    24→  const { userProfile, signOut } = useAuth();
    25→  const [isSidebarCollapsed, setIsSidebarCollapsed] = React.useState(() => {

    27→      const stored = localStorage.getItem('sidebarCollapsed');
    28→      return stored === 'true';
    29→    }
    30→    return false;
    31→  });

    36→  // Get changelog data from context (fetched once at app level)

    38→
    39→  // Format date for changelog display
    40→  const formatChangelogDate = (dateString: string | null) => {
    41→    if (!dateString) return '';
    42→    return new Date(dateString).toLocaleDateString('en-US', {
    43→      year: 'numeric',
    44→      month: 'long',
    45→      day: 'numeric'
    46→    });
    47→  };
    48→
    49→  // Render changelog content
    50→  const renderChangelogContent = (content: string) => {
    51→    return content.split('\n').map((line, index) => {
    52→      if (line.trim().startsWith('- ') || line.trim().startsWith('* ')) {
    53→        return (
    54→          <li key={index} className="ml-4 text-gray-700 text-sm">
    55→            {line.trim().substring(2)}
    56→          </li>
    57→        );
    58→      }
    59→      if (line.trim().startsWith('### ')) {
    60→        return (
    61→          <h4 key={index} className="font-semibold text-gray-900 mt-3 mb-1 text-sm">
    62→            {line.trim().substring(4)}
    63→          </h4>
    64→        );
    65→      }
    66→      if (line.trim().startsWith('## ')) {
    67→        return (
    68→          <h3 key={index} className="font-bold text-gray-900 mt-4 mb-2 text-sm">
    69→            {line.trim().substring(3)}
    70→          </h3>
    71→        );
    72→      }
    73→      if (line.trim() === '') {
    74→        return <div key={index} className="h-2" />;
    75→      }
    76→      return (
    77→        <p key={index} className="text-gray-700 text-sm">
    78→          {line}
    79→        </p>
    80→      );
    81→    });
    82→  };

   410→                    </span>
   411→                  </Button>
   412→                </Link>
   413→                {/* Forms tab - Admin only */}
   414→                {(userProfile?.role === 'admin' || userProfile?.role === 'super_admin') && (
   415→                  <Link href="/forms" legacyBehavior>
   416→                    <Button
   417→                      asChild
   418→                      variant={pathname.startsWith('/forms') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   419→                      className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   420→                      style={pathname.startsWith('/forms') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}

   425→                        {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Forms'}

   430→                {/* Links tab */}
   431→                <Link href="/links" legacyBehavior>

   433→                    asChild

   472→                        {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'SOPs'}

   483→                  <div className="flex-1 h-px bg-gray-200"></div>
   484→                </div>

   493→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/admin/field-options') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}

   495→                  >

   498→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Field Options'}
   499→                    </span>
   500→                  </Button>
   501→                </Link>
   502→                {/* Changelog tab - Super Admin only */}
   503→                {userProfile?.role === 'super_admin' && (
   504→                  <Link href="/admin/changelog" legacyBehavior>
   505→                    <Button
   506→                      asChild
   507→                      variant={pathname.startsWith('/admin/changelog') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   508→                      className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   509→                      style={pathname.startsWith('/admin/changelog') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   510→                      title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Changelog' : undefined}
   511→                    >
   512→                      <span>
   513→                        <Sparkles className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   514→                        {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Changelog'}
   515→                      </span>
   516→                    </Button>
   517→                  </Link>
   518→                )}
   519→                {/* Archive tab */}
   520→                <Link href="/archive" legacyBehavior>
   521→                  <Button
   522→                    asChild
   523→                    variant={pathname.startsWith('/archive') ? 'default' : 'ghost'}
   524→                    className={`w-full ${isSidebarCollapsed ? 'justify-center px-0' : 'justify-start'} hover:opacity-90`}
   525→                    style={pathname.startsWith('/archive') ? { backgroundColor: '#3e8692', color: 'white' } : {}}
   526→                    title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Archive' : undefined}
   527→                  >
   528→                    <span>
   529→                      <Archive className={`h-4 w-4 ${!isSidebarCollapsed ? 'mr-2' : ''}`} />
   530→                      {!isSidebarCollapsed && 'Archive'}
   531→                    </span>
   532→                  </Button>
   533→                </Link>
   534→              </div>
   535→
   536→            </nav>
   537→            {/* Collapse Button at Bottom */}
   538→            <div className="p-4 border-t border-gray-200">
   539→              <div className="flex justify-center">
   540→                <Button
   541→                  variant="ghost"
   542→                  size="sm"
   543→                  onClick={handleSidebarToggle}
   544→                  className="hover:bg-gray-100 w-auto px-2"
   545→                  title={isSidebarCollapsed ? 'Expand sidebar' : 'Collapse sidebar'}
   546→                >
   547→                  {isSidebarCollapsed ? (
   548→                    <PanelLeftOpen className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
   549→                  ) : (
   550→                    <PanelLeftClose className="h-4 w-4 text-gray-600" />
   551→                  )}
   552→                </Button>
   553→              </div>
   554→            </div>
   555→          </div>
   556→        </aside>
   557→        {/* Main Content */}
   558→        <main className="flex-1 overflow-y-auto p-6">{children}</main>
   559→      </div>
   560→
   561→      {/* Changelog History Dialog */}
   562→      <Dialog open={isChangelogOpen} onOpenChange={(open) => {
   563→        setIsChangelogOpen(open);
   564→        if (open) setChangelogPage(0);
   565→      }}>
   566→        <DialogContent className="sm:max-w-lg max-h-[80vh]">
   567→          <DialogHeader>
   568→            <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
   569→              <Sparkles className="h-5 w-5 text-[#3e8692]" />
   570→              <DialogTitle className="text-xl">Changelog</DialogTitle>
   571→            </div>
   572→            <DialogDescription>
   573→              Version history and updates
   574→            </DialogDescription>
   575→          </DialogHeader>
   576→          <ScrollArea className="max-h-[50vh] pr-4">
   577→            <div className="space-y-6">
   578→              {changelogs
   579→                .slice(changelogPage * changelogsPerPage, (changelogPage + 1) * changelogsPerPage)
   580→                .map((changelog, idx) => (
   581→                <div key={changelog.id} className={idx > 0 ? 'border-t pt-6' : ''}>
   582→                  <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
   583→                    <Badge
   584→                      variant="secondary"
   585→                      className="bg-[#3e8692]/10 text-[#3e8692]"
   586→                    >
   587→                      v{changelog.version}
   588→                    </Badge>
   589→                    {changelog.published_at && (
   590→                      <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
   591→                        {formatChangelogDate(changelog.published_at)}
   592→                      </span>
   593→                    )}
   594→                  </div>
   595→                  <h3 className="font-medium text-gray-900 mb-2">
   596→                    {changelog.title}
   597→                  </h3>
   598→                  <div className="space-y-1">
   599→                    {renderChangelogContent(changelog.content)}
   600→                  </div>
   601→                </div>
   602→              ))}
   603→              {changelogs.length === 0 && (
   604→                <p className="text-gray-500 text-center py-4">
   605→                  No changelogs available yet.
   606→                </p>
   607→              )}
   608→            </div>
   609→          </ScrollArea>
   610→          {changelogs.length > changelogsPerPage && (
   611→            <div className="flex items-center justify-between pt-4 border-t">
   612→              <Button
   613→                variant="outline"
   614→                size="sm"
   615→                onClick={() => setChangelogPage(p => Math.max(0, p - 1))}
   616→                disabled={changelogPage === 0}
   617→              >
   618→                <ChevronLeft className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" />
   619→                Previous
   620→              </Button>
   621→              <span className="text-sm text-gray-500">
   622→                Page {changelogPage + 1} of {Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage)}
   623→              </span>
   624→              <Button
   625→                variant="outline"
   626→                size="sm"
   627→                onClick={() => setChangelogPage(p => Math.min(Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage) - 1, p + 1))}
   628→                disabled={changelogPage >= Math.ceil(changelogs.length / changelogsPerPage) - 1}
   629→              >
   630→                Next
   631→                <ChevronRight className="h-4 w-4 ml-1" />
   632→              </Button>
   633→            </div>
   634→          )}
   635→        </DialogContent>
   636→      </Dialog>
   637→    </div>
   638→  );
   639→}
```
</details></tool-use>

```text
  closestCenter,
  KeyboardSensor,
  PointerSensor,
  useSensor,
  useSensors,

  DragEndEvent,

} from '@dnd-kit/core';
import { restrictToVerticalAxis } from '@dnd-kit/modifiers';
import {
  useSortable,
  SortableContext,
  verticalListSortingStrategy,
  arrayMove,
} from '@dnd-kit/sortable';
import { CSS } from '@dnd-kit/utilities';
import {
  CRMService,
  CRMOpportunity,
  CRMAffiliate,
  CRMContact,
  CRMContactLink,

  CreateOpportunityData,
  CreateContactData,
  OpportunityStage
} from '@/lib/crmService';
import { UserService } from '@/lib/userService';
import { ClientService, ClientWithAccess } from '@/lib/clientService';

export default function PipelinePage() {
  const { user } = useAuth();
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [searchTerm, setSearchTerm] = useState('');
  const [opportunities, setOpportunities] = useState<CRMOpportunity[]>([]);
  const [affiliates, setAffiliates] = useState<CRMAffiliate[]>([]);
  const [contacts, setContacts] = useState<CRMContact[]>([]);
  const [users, setUsers] = useState<{ id: string; name: string | null; email: string }[]>([]);
  const [clients, setClients] = useState<ClientWithAccess[]>([]);
  const [allContactLinks, setAllContactLinks] = useState<CRMContactLink[]>([]);
  const [isNewOpportunityOpen, setIsNewOpportunityOpen] = useState(false);
  const [isSubmitting, setIsSubmitting] = useState(false);
  const [editingOpportunity, setEditingOpportunity] = useState<CRMOpportunity | null>(null);
  const [opportunityForm, setOpportunityForm] = useState<CreateOpportunityData>({
    name: '',
    stage: 'new',
    source: undefined,
  });
  const [opportunityType, setOpportunityType] = useState<'lead' | 'deal'>('lead');
  const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState<'outreach' | 'leads' | 'deals' | 'accounts'>('leads');
  const [outreachViewMode, setOutreachViewMode] = useState<'kanban' | 'table'>('table');
  const [leadsViewMode, setLeadsViewMode] = useState<'kanban' | 'table'>('table');
  const [dealsViewMode, setDealsViewMode] = useState<'kanban' | 'table'>('table');
  const [accountsViewMode, setAccountsViewMode] = useState<'kanban' | 'table'>('table');

  // Inline editing state
  const [editingCell, setEditingCell] = useState<{ id: string; field: string } | null>(null);
  const [editingValue, setEditingValue] = useState<string>('');

  // Affiliate combobox state
  const [affiliatePopoverOpen, setAffiliatePopoverOpen] = useState<string | null>(null);

  // Contact linking state
  const [isContactLinkOpen, setIsContactLinkOpen] = useState(false);
  const [linkingOpportunity, setLinkingOpportunity] = useState<CRMOpportunity | null>(null);
  const [opportunityContacts, setOpportunityContacts] = useState<CRMContactLink[]>([]);
```

```text
   633→
   634→  // Handler for table row reordering (supports cross-stage dragging)
   635→  const handleTableRowDragEnd = async (event: DragEndEvent) => {
   636→    const { active, over } = event;
   637→    setActiveId(null);
   638→    setActiveOpportunity(null);
   639→
   640→    if (!over) return;
   641→
   642→    const draggedOpp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === active.id);
   643→    if (!draggedOpp) return;
   644→
   645→    const overId = over.id as string;
   646→
   647→    // Check if dropped on a stage droppable (stage name)
   648→    const isStageDroppable = currentStages.includes(overId as OpportunityStage);
   649→
   650→    // Check if dropped on another opportunity
   651→    const targetOpp = opportunities.find(o => o.id === overId);
   652→
   653→    if (isStageDroppable) {
   654→      // Dropped on a stage area - move to that stage
   655→      const newStage = overId as OpportunityStage;
   656→      if (draggedOpp.stage !== newStage) {
   657→        // If moving to qualified, show convert dialog
   658→        if (newStage === 'qualified' && draggedOpp.stage !== 'qualified') {
   659→          await performStageMove(draggedOpp, newStage);
   660→          setOpportunityToConvert({ ...draggedOpp, stage: 'qualified' });
   661→          setIsConvertDialogOpen(true);
   662→          return;
   663→        }
   664→
   665→        // If moving to closed_won, show convert to account dialog
   666→        if (newStage === 'closed_won' && draggedOpp.stage !== 'closed_won' && dealStages.includes(draggedOpp.stage)) {
   667→          await performStageMove(draggedOpp, newStage);
   668→          setDealToConvertToAccount({ ...draggedOpp, stage: 'closed_won' });
   669→          setIsConvertToAccountDialogOpen(true);
   670→          return;
   671→        }
   672→
   673→        await performStageMove(draggedOpp, newStage);
   674→      }
   675→    } else if (targetOpp) {
   676→      // Dropped on another opportunity
   677→      const sourceStage = draggedOpp.stage;
   678→      const targetStage = targetOpp.stage;
   679→
   680→      if (sourceStage === targetStage) {
   681→        // Same stage - reorder within stage
   682→        const stageOpps = currentOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === sourceStage);
   683→        const oldIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === active.id);
   684→        const newIndex = stageOpps.findIndex(o => o.id === over.id);
   685→
   686→        if (oldIndex === -1 || newIndex === -1 || oldIndex === newIndex) return;
   687→
   688→        const reordered = arrayMove(stageOpps, oldIndex, newIndex);
   689→        const positionUpdates = reordered.map((opp, index) => ({
   690→          id: opp.id,
   691→          position: index
   692→        }));
   693→
   694→        setOpportunities(prev => {
   695→          const otherOpps = prev.filter(o => o.stage !== sourceStage);
   696→          const updatedOpps = reordered.map((opp, index) => ({
   697→            ...opp,
   698→            position: index
   699→          }));
   700→          return [...updatedOpps, ...otherOpps];
   701→        });
   702→
   703→        try {
   704→          await CRMService.updateOpportunityPositions(positionUpdates);
   705→        } catch (error) {
   706→          console.error('Error updating positions:', error);
   707→          const freshData = await CRMService.getAllOpportunities();
   708→          setOpportunities(freshData);
   709→        }
   710→      } else {
   711→        // Different stage - move to target stage at target position
   712→        // If moving to qualified, show convert dialog
   713→        if (targetStage === 'qualified' && draggedOpp.stage !== 'qualified') {
   714→          await performStageMove(draggedOpp, targetStage);
   715→          setOpportunityToConvert({ ...draggedOpp, stage: 'qualified' });
   716→          setIsConvertDialogOpen(true);
   717→          return;
   718→        }
   719→
   720→        // If moving to closed_won, show convert to account dialog
   721→        if (targetStage === 'closed_won' && draggedOpp.stage !== 'closed_won' && dealStages.includes(draggedOpp.stage)) {
   722→          await performStageMove(draggedOpp, targetStage);
   723→          setDealToConvertToAccount({ ...draggedOpp, stage: 'closed_won' });
   724→          setIsConvertToAccountDialogOpen(true);
   725→          return;
   726→        }
   727→
   728→        await performStageMove(draggedOpp, targetStage);
   729→      }
   730→    }
   731→  };

   797→      );
   798→
   799→      // Refresh contacts list

   801→        CRMService.getAllContacts(),
   802→        CRMService.getContactsForOpportunity(linkingOpportunity.id)
   803→      ]);
   804→      setContacts(allConts);
   805→      setOpportunityContacts(links);
   806→
   807→      // Reset form
   808→      setNewContactForm({ name: '' });
   809→      setContactRole('');
   810→      setIsPrimaryContact(false);
   811→      setContactMode('link');
   812→    } catch (error) {
   813→      console.error('Error creating and linking contact:', error);
   814→    } finally {
   815→      setIsSubmitting(false);
   816→    }
   817→  };
   818→
   819→  const handleOpenHistory = async (opp: CRMOpportunity) => {
   820→    setHistoryOpportunity(opp);
   821→    try {
   822→      const history = await CRMService.getStageHistory('opportunity', opp.id);
   823→      setStageHistory(history);
   824→    } catch (error) {
   825→      console.error('Error fetching history:', error);
   826→      setStageHistory([]);
   827→    }
   828→    setIsHistoryOpen(true);
   829→  };
   830→
   831→  const filteredOpportunities = opportunities
   832→    .filter(o => {
   833→      // Search filter
   834→      if (searchTerm && !o.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchTerm.toLowerCase())) {
   835→        return false;
   836→      }
   837→      // Source filter
   838→      if (filterSource !== 'all' && o.source !== filterSource) {
   839→        return false;
   840→      }
   841→      // Account type filter
   842→      if (filterAccountType !== 'all' && o.account_type !== filterAccountType) {
   843→        return false;
   844→      }
   845→      // Affiliate filter
   846→      if (filterAffiliate !== 'all' && o.affiliate_id !== filterAffiliate) {
   847→        return false;
   848→      }
   849→      return true;
   850→    })
   851→    .sort((a, b) => {
   852→      switch (sortBy) {
   853→        case 'position':
   854→          return (a.position || 0) - (b.position || 0);
   855→        case 'created_desc':
   856→          return new Date(b.created_at).getTime() - new Date(a.created_at).getTime();
   857→        case 'created_asc':
   858→          return new Date(a.created_at).getTime() - new Date(b.created_at).getTime();
   859→        case 'name_asc':
   860→          return a.name.localeCompare(b.name);
   861→        case 'name_desc':
   862→          return b.name.localeCompare(a.name);
   863→        case 'value_desc':
   864→          return (b.deal_value || 0) - (a.deal_value || 0);
   865→        case 'value_asc':
   866→          return (a.deal_value || 0) - (b.deal_value || 0);
   867→        default:
   868→          // Default to position-based ordering
   869→          return (a.position || 0) - (b.position || 0);
   870→      }
   871→    });
   872→
   873→  const getOpportunitiesByStage = (stage: OpportunityStage) =>
   874→    filteredOpportunities.filter(o => o.stage === stage);
   875→
   876→  // Check if any filters are active
   877→  const hasActiveFilters = filterSource !== 'all' || filterAccountType !== 'all' || filterAffiliate !== 'all';
   878→
   879→  // Clear all filters
   880→  const clearFilters = () => {
   881→    setFilterSource('all');

   884→    setSearchTerm('');
```

```text
   652→
   653→  // ----------------------------------------
   654→  // STAGE HISTORY
   655→  // ----------------------------------------
   656→
   657→  static async recordStageHistory(
   658→    objectType: 'opportunity' | 'partner' | 'affiliate',
   659→    objectId: string,
   660→    fromStage: string | null,
   661→    toStage: string,
   662→    notes?: string
   663→  ): Promise<void> {
   664→    const { data: { user } } = await supabase.auth.getUser();
   665→
   666→    const { error } = await supabase
   667→      .from('crm_stage_history')
   668→      .insert([{
   669→        object_type: objectType,
   670→        object_id: objectId,
   671→        from_stage: fromStage,
   672→        to_stage: toStage,
   673→        changed_by: user?.id || null,
   674→        notes
   675→      }]);
   676→
   677→    if (error) {
   678→      console.error('Error recording stage history:', error);
   679→      // Don't throw - stage history is non-critical
   680→    }
   681→  }
   682→
   683→  static async getStageHistory(objectType: string, objectId: string): Promise<CRMStageHistory[]> {
   684→    const { data, error } = await supabase
   685→      .from('crm_stage_history')
   686→      .select('*')
   687→      .eq('object_type', objectType)
   688→      .eq('object_id', objectId)
   689→      .order('changed_at', { ascending: false });
   690→
   691→    if (error) throw error;
   692→    return data || [];
   693→  }
   694→
   695→  // ----------------------------------------
   696→  // UTILITY METHODS
   697→  // ----------------------------------------
   698→
   699→  static async updateLastContacted(
   700→    type: 'opportunity' | 'partner' | 'affiliate',
   701→    id: string
   702→  ): Promise<void> {
   703→    const tableName = type === 'opportunity' ? 'crm_opportunities' :
   704→                      type === 'partner' ? 'crm_partners' : 'crm_affiliates';
   705→
   706→    const { error } = await supabase
   707→      .from(tableName)
   708→      .update({
   709→        last_contacted_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   710→        updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
   711→      })
   712→      .eq('id', id);
   713→
   714→    if (error) throw error;
   715→  }

   789→
   790→  // ----------------------------------------
   791→  // ANALYTICS HELPERS
   792→  // ----------------------------------------
   793→
   794→  static async getOpportunityMetrics(): Promise<{
   795→    totalLeads: number;
   796→    totalDeals: number;
   797→    totalValue: number;
   798→    wonValue: number;
   799→    conversionRate: number;
   800→  }> {
   801→    const leadStages: OpportunityStage[] = ['new', 'contacted', 'qualified', 'unqualified', 'nurture', 'dead'];
   802→    const dealStages: OpportunityStage[] = ['deal_qualified', 'proposal', 'negotiation', 'contract', 'closed_won', 'closed_lost'];
   803→
   804→    const { data: opportunities, error } = await supabase
   805→      .from('crm_opportunities')
   806→      .select('stage, deal_value');
   807→
   808→    if (error) throw error;
   809→
   810→    const leads = opportunities?.filter(o => leadStages.includes(o.stage as OpportunityStage)) || [];
   811→    const deals = opportunities?.filter(o => dealStages.includes(o.stage as OpportunityStage)) || [];
   812→    const closedWon = opportunities?.filter(o => o.stage === 'closed_won') || [];
   813→    const closed = opportunities?.filter(o => o.stage === 'closed_won' || o.stage === 'closed_lost') || [];
   814→
   815→    const totalValue = deals.reduce((sum, d) => sum + (d.deal_value || 0), 0);
   816→    const wonValue = closedWon.reduce((sum, d) => sum + (d.deal_value || 0), 0);
   817→    const conversionRate = closed.length > 0 ? (closedWon.length / closed.length) * 100 : 0;
   818→
   819→    return {
   820→      totalLeads: leads.length,
   821→      totalDeals: deals.length,
   822→      totalValue,
   823→      wonValue,
   824→      conversionRate
   825→    };
   826→  }
   827→
   828→  // ----------------------------------------
   829→  // TELEGRAM INTEGRATION
   830→  // ----------------------------------------
   831→
   832→  /**
   833→   * Send a message to an opportunity's Telegram group chat
   834→   * and update the last_reply_at timestamp
   835→   */
   836→  static async sendTelegramMessage(
   837→    opportunityId: string,
   838→    message: string
   839→  ): Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }> {
   840→    // Get the opportunity to find the gc (chat ID)
   841→    const opportunity = await this.getOpportunityById(opportunityId);
   842→    if (!opportunity) {
   843→      return { success: false, error: 'Opportunity not found' };
   844→    }
   845→
   846→    if (!opportunity.gc) {
   847→      return { success: false, error: 'No Telegram group chat ID configured for this opportunity' };
   848→    }
   849→
   850→    // Send message via Telegram API
   851→    const botToken = process.env.TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN;
   852→    if (!botToken) {
   853→      return { success: false, error: 'Telegram bot not configured' };
   854→    }
   855→
   856→    try {
   857→      const response = await fetch(
   858→        `https://api.telegram.org/bot${botToken}/sendMessage`,
   859→        {
   860→          method: 'POST',
   861→          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
   862→          body: JSON.stringify({
   863→            chat_id: opportunity.gc,
   864→            text: message,
   865→            parse_mode: 'HTML'
   866→          })
   867→        }
   868→      );
   869→
   870→      if (!response.ok) {
   871→        const error = await response.json();
   872→        console.error('[CRM] Telegram send error:', error);
   873→        return { success: false, error: error.description || 'Failed to send message' };
   874→      }
   875→
   876→      // Update last_reply_at
   877→      await supabase
   878→        .from('crm_opportunities')
   879→        .update({
   880→          last_reply_at: new Date().toISOString(),
   881→          updated_at: new Date().toISOString()
   882→        })
   883→        .eq('id', opportunityId);
   884→
   885→      return { success: true };
   886→    } catch (error) {
   887→      console.error('[CRM] Error sending Telegram message:', error);
   888→      return { success: false, error: 'Failed to send message' };
   889→    }
   890→  }
   891→
   892→  /**
   893→   * Get opportunities that haven't been contacted recently
   894→   */
   895→  static async getStaleOpportunities(daysThreshold: number = 7): Promise<CRMOpportunity[]> {
   896→    const thresholdDate = new Date();
   897→    thresholdDate.setDate(thresholdDate.getDate() - daysThreshold);
   898→
   899→    const { data, error } = await supabase
```
</details></tool-use>
